name: Brianna Titone
subject: Back to Session! ✏️
body:
| | | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/3b8c9abbf964/back-to-session?e=8249791cac)
---
| | | | [|
---](https://briannaforcolorado.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e7333941d4549e2ed73aa08fb&id=49e67588fc&e=8249791cac)
| | | | | | | | | | | | Happy 2026 everyone! I hope you all had a joyous and restful winter. This month’s edition will discuss upcoming constituent and [community](https://briannaforcolorado.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e7333941d4549e2ed73aa08fb&id=93db1a804b&e=8249791cac) events, and in case you missed it headlines. But first, lets talk about the start of the 2026 Legislative Session!
---
|
---
| |
# BACK TO SESSION!
---
| | I’ve said before that a new legislative session starting feels like going back to school. There’s first day outfits and jitters, seeing your peers after a long break, new desk and room assignments, and lots of new faces. It feels odd to have had my last-first day in the Colorado House of Representatives, but I am ready to finish out my tenure strong.
The 2026 Colorado Legislative Session began on January 14th. That day two new representatives were sworn in: [Representative Lori Goldstein](https://briannaforcolorado.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e7333941d4549e2ed73aa08fb&id=1d80c51098&e=8249791cac) of House District 29 and [Representative Kenny Nguyen](https://briannaforcolorado.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e7333941d4549e2ed73aa08fb&id=53bd9d9cd7&e=8249791cac) of House District 33. Congrats to the new legislators!
On Thursday, Governor Polis gave his final [State of the State address](https://briannaforcolorado.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e7333941d4549e2ed73aa08fb&id=c1324f8805&e=8249791cac) and on Friday the [State of the Tribes](https://briannaforcolorado.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e7333941d4549e2ed73aa08fb&id=44d26d641a&e=8249791cac) address was delivered by [Marilynn House](https://briannaforcolorado.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e7333941d4549e2ed73aa08fb&id=328abddc44&e=8249791cac), Council Member of the Ute Mountain Ute Tribe, and [Melvin J. Baker](https://briannaforcolorado.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e7333941d4549e2ed73aa08fb&id=ab0b99de49&e=8249791cac), Chairman of the Southern Ute Indian Tribe. Additionally, the House and Senate passed joint resolution [HJR26-1002](https://briannaforcolorado.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e7333941d4549e2ed73aa08fb&id=0dffd688a1&e=8249791cac) in support of Martin Luther King Jr. Day.
---
|
---
| |
So far, only one of my 2026 bills have been introduced: [HB26-1036 Local Taxes on Vacant Residential Property](https://briannaforcolorado.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e7333941d4549e2ed73aa08fb&id=acb7bc1d6a&e=8249791cac). Over 40% of homes in some mountain counties are vacant throughout the year, with vacancy rates as high as 70% ([link](https://briannaforcolorado.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e7333941d4549e2ed73aa08fb&id=2146a588c7&e=8249791cac)). The goal of this bill is to ensure that locals have the opportunity to live there and that the potential taxes from these vacant vacation homes actually goes to the community. Think of the mansions in Vail or Aspen. They are typically owned by out-of-town, wealthy families who reside there once a year. I believe that those families should fiscally support the community that they have a vacation home in.
---
| | I will continue to share my bills’ progress throughout the session, but in the mean time, here are some helpful links:
* [Watch House or Senate proceedings](https://briannaforcolorado.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e7333941d4549e2ed73aa08fb&id=f1a6c7a99d&e=8249791cac)
* [Listen to the House](https://briannaforcolorado.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e7333941d4549e2ed73aa08fb&id=bc5fcfb2f9&e=8249791cac)
* [Listen to the Senate](https://briannaforcolorado.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e7333941d4549e2ed73aa08fb&id=1165a572ab&e=8249791cac)
* [Listen to caucus meetings](https://briannaforcolorado.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e7333941d4549e2ed73aa08fb&id=9c19c39a2e&e=8249791cac)
* [Sign up to give testimony](https://briannaforcolorado.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e7333941d4549e2ed73aa08fb&id=379e7bd01a&e=8249791cac)

---
|
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
| |
# PUBLIC SAFETY POWER SHUTOFF HEARINGS
---
| | Were you impacted by the recent power shutoffs and outages? Share your experiences and suggestions!
The [Colorado Public Utilities Commission](https://briannaforcolorado.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e7333941d4549e2ed73aa08fb&id=472e91793c&e=8249791cac) will be hosting a virtual public comment hearing on Wednesday, January 28th from 4-6pm. You can register to participate via [this link](https://briannaforcolorado.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e7333941d4549e2ed73aa08fb&id=44dc04339c&e=8249791cac). If you cannot attend, you can submit comments through [this link](https://briannaforcolorado.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e7333941d4549e2ed73aa08fb&id=15612389b6&e=8249791cac) or by [emailing](mailto:dora_puc_comments@state.co.us?subject=&body=).
Additionally, the [House Energy & Environment](https://briannaforcolorado.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e7333941d4549e2ed73aa08fb&id=72351c819d&e=8249791cac) and [Senate Transportation & Energy](https://briannaforcolorado.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e7333941d4549e2ed73aa08fb&id=0748dcc35c&e=8249791cac) Committees will be hearing from the Public Safety Power Shutoff Panel on Friday, January 30th at 1 pm in the Old State Library at the Capitol.
This is the [link to listen](https://briannaforcolorado.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e7333941d4549e2ed73aa08fb&id=3c12f25d4a&e=8249791cac) in to the meeting and [this link](https://briannaforcolorado.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e7333941d4549e2ed73aa08fb&id=e7632a71bf&e=8249791cac) is to sign up to testify. You can sign up to testify either in-person, remotely via Zoom, or by submitting written testimony.
This is preliminary information, so if you are having trouble accessing anything, please contact me and I will help!

# [ IN THE DISTRICT]()
---
| |
## ARVADA
---
| | **A CHOCOLATE AFFAIR**
---
| | | | | | | | | | |
---
|
---
| | | In conjunction with A Chocolate Affair on Saturday, Feb. 7, the tradition of hanging personalized hearts on the lampposts in Olde Town continues! All are invited to participate by purchasing a heart and giving it your personal message of love, whether that is for others, for your pets, for Arvada, for anything! Volunteers will decorate the hearts to hang in Olde Town during the first two weeks of February.
Show your support for Ralston House by purchasing a heart or sample tickets to A Chocolate Affair on the [Ralston House website](https://briannaforcolorado.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e7333941d4549e2ed73aa08fb&id=afe8a47433&e=8249791cac).
---
| | **SAVE THE DATE FOR WINTERFEST**
---
| | | | | | | | | | |
---
|
---
| | | **February 28th, Olde Town Arvada**
Arvada Winterfest returns to Olde Town on Saturday, Feb. 28. Additionally, volunteers are needed for it. The Arvada Festivals Commission is looking for volunteers to help with Winterfest. Shifts are available throughout the event, from set up to tear down. [Sign up to volunteer today](https://briannaforcolorado.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e7333941d4549e2ed73aa08fb&id=404dd31e0a&e=8249791cac)!
[Learn more](https://briannaforcolorado.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e7333941d4549e2ed73aa08fb&id=4748b648ad&e=8249791cac)
---
|
---
|
---
| | To find events coming up in Arvada, check out [**Visit Arvada**](https://briannaforcolorado.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e7333941d4549e2ed73aa08fb&id=89638772cd&e=8249791cac)!
---
|
---
| |
## GOLDEN
---
|
---
| | **FREE WINDSTORM DEBRIS DROP OFF**
---
| | | | | | | | | | |
---
|
---
| | | **January 23-24th**
To help residents manage storm-related debris following December’s windstorms, the Jefferson County SLASH Program will offer two free public drop-off days for fallen branches and downed trees resulting from the storms.
The Tincup Ridge Slash Yard (151 S Rooney Rd, Golden, CO 80401) will be open to the public from 9:00 a.m. - 4:00 p.m. on Friday, January 23, and Saturday, January 24.
These temporary drop-offs are intended for storm-related debris only, specifically fallen or downed branches. Christmas trees will not be accepted.
[Learn more](https://briannaforcolorado.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e7333941d4549e2ed73aa08fb&id=56d8efaade&e=8249791cac)
---
| | **CHRISTMAS TREE RECYCLING**
---
| | | | | | | | | | |
---
|
---
| | | **Ends January 26th**
The City of Golden offers a simple and eco-friendly way to dispose of your Christmas tree - by giving it a second life as mulch!
You can drop off your tree at The Splash (3151 Illinois St.) through January 26, from 8:00 a.m. to 4:00 p.m. daily.
To participate, please ensure your tree meets the following guidelines:
* Remove all ornaments, hardware, strings of lights, and tinsel.
* Only live Christmas trees will be accepted.
* Wreaths, tree branches, trash bags, or other wood materials will not be accepted.

The collected trees will be turned into mulch, which will be available for free pickup at a later date at the public site on 11th St., just west of the Clear Creek History Park.
---
|
---
| | For a list of upcoming Golden events, check out the [**Visit Golden website**](https://briannaforcolorado.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e7333941d4549e2ed73aa08fb&id=b91f75793d&e=8249791cac)**or the City’s**[**Community Calendar**](https://briannaforcolorado.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e7333941d4549e2ed73aa08fb&id=cda25e6771&e=8249791cac)**.**

clean_body: | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Happy 2026 everyone! I hope you all had a joyous and restful winter. This month’s edition will discuss upcoming constituent and events, and in case you missed it headlines. But first, lets talk about the start of the 2026 Legislative Session! | | | BACK TO SESSION! | | I’ve said before that a new legislative session starting feels like going back to school. There’s first day outfits and jitters, seeing your peers after a long break, new desk and room assignments, and lots of new faces. It feels odd to have had my last-first day in the Colorado House of Representatives, but I am ready to finish out my tenure strong. The 2026 Colorado Legislative Session began on January 14th. That day two new representatives were sworn in: of House District 29 and of House District 33. Congrats to the new legislators! On Thursday, Governor Polis gave his final and on Friday the address was delivered by , Council Member of the Ute Mountain Ute Tribe, and , Chairman of the Southern Ute Indian Tribe. Additionally, the House and Senate passed joint resolution in support of Martin Luther King Jr. Day. | | | So far, only one of my 2026 bills have been introduced: . Over 40% of homes in some mountain counties are vacant throughout the year, with vacancy rates as high as 70% (). The goal of this bill is to ensure that locals have the opportunity to live there and that the potential taxes from these vacant vacation homes actually goes to the community. Think of the mansions in Vail or Aspen. They are typically owned by out-of-town, wealthy families who reside there once a year. I believe that those families should fiscally support the community that they have a vacation home in. | | I will continue to share my bills’ progress throughout the session, but in the mean time, here are some helpful links: | | | | | | PUBLIC SAFETY POWER SHUTOFF HEARINGS | | Were you impacted by the recent power shutoffs and outages? Share your experiences and suggestions! The will be hosting a virtual public comment hearing on Wednesday, January 28th from 4-6pm. You can register to participate via . If you cannot attend, you can submit comments through or by mailto:dorapuccomments@state.co.us?subject=&body=. Additionally, the and Committees will be hearing from the Public Safety Power Shutoff Panel on Friday, January 30th at 1 pm in the Old State Library at the Capitol. This is the in to the meeting and is to sign up to testify. You can sign up to testify either in-person, remotely via Zoom, or by submitting written testimony. This is preliminary information, so if you are having trouble accessing anything, please contact me and I will help! | | | [UPCOMING CONSTITUENT EVENTS]() | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Beers with Brianna 🍺 JANUARY 23RD @ 7 PM Join me to share your views and chat about the legislative session, all while enjoying a local craft brew! 📍Cannonball Creek Brewing Company393 Washington Ave, Golden, CO, USA | | | | | [Virtual Office Hours]() 💻 | | If you can’t make this month’s constituent event, sign up for a virtual office hour! # [News & Updates]()

---](https://maiforus.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fe5f60ccb8fb671f0c1857dc9&id=1bdfe12526&e=dd5af5b7b1)
| | |

### **National Nurses Union Endorses Mai Vang for Congress**

I'm proud to share that National Nurses United—the largest union of registered nurses in the country—has endorsed our campaign.
Nurses show up every day, fight for their patients, and tell the truth about a healthcare system that puts profits first. That's exactly why this endorsement matters.
In her 2024 campaign, the incumbent raised nearly $872,000 from corporate PACs—that's 70% of her funding. Only 2% came from small donors. **Our campaign is different: we don't take corporate PAC money and we PUT PEOPLE BEFORE PROFITS.**
Nurses have our backs. Now let's build on this momentum.
Please consider donating today!
---
| [JOIN NURSES IN SUPPORTING MAI](https://maiforus.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fe5f60ccb8fb671f0c1857dc9&id=8973e224c2&e=dd5af5b7b1)
---
| | | | | | | | | | [|
---](https://maiforus.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fe5f60ccb8fb671f0c1857dc9&id=a41d3aecfc&e=dd5af5b7b1)
| | |
### **The Moral Choice is Clear. Abolish ICE.**
###

Our tax dollars fund the terrorizing of communities across this country.
Some believe reform and training can fix this. They can't. Incremental change created the conditions for ICE's abuses—it won't protect our communities now. We need to end qualified immunity, shut down for-profit immigration prisons, and prosecute agents who violate state and local laws. We need to abolish ICE.
In the coming days, Mai will take critical steps to protect Sacramento's immigrant communities. [**Stay updated, join our new #TeamMai IG channel.**](https://maiforus.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fe5f60ccb8fb671f0c1857dc9&id=c08188dd12&e=dd5af5b7b1)

In the coming days, Mai will take critical steps to protect Sacramento's immigrant communities. | | | | | | | | | | | | | [Events]() | | HITTING THE GROUND 5x a Week! | | | | | | | | | | | | Fresh off an amazing Academy kick-off, our FIELD team is ramping up our efforts on the ground and walking 5x a week. We’re deploying from two areas: the POCKET & ELK GROVE. Join us for the walk nearest you! | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you, so thank you for reading to the end. **Michele Tafoya, another White Liberal Woman, just got recruited by the RINO Uniparty Members in Minnesota to run against me.**

All she’s done from the sidelines is scream her head off that Trump shouldn’t have run for President back in 2023.

**Now, Michele thinks she can waltz up into the spotlight and win in Minnesota just because she has the support of the corrupt RINO Minnesota GOP.**

_From the sidelines to the RINO Establishment._

Minnesota is the belly of the beast. And Michele Tafoya is a product of the anti-Trump propaganda that’s created the environment we live in – Woke Politicians defending violent rioters who are attacking ICE Officers just trying to do their jobs.

The Minnesota GOP loves Michele. And they hate me. That should tell you everything you need to know.

_A donation to Michele is a donation for weak, pathetic, anti-Trump, RINO leadership. A donation to me is a donation for strong, unapologetic, pro-MAGA leadership._

name: Haley Stevens
subject: Kristi Noem must be impeached
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate
body:
Why I'm joining my colleagues to remove Noem from office immediately

| |
---|---|---
| | | Forwarded this email? [Subscribe here](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9oYWxleWZvcm1pLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.PWp_ayYiNkw8Sum0y-zl5hyCWaZ2UlFtZ_4K1CZqtq0?) for more
---
# [Kristi Noem must be impeached](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=6380051&post_id=185580817&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTg1NTgwODE3LCJpYXQiOjE3NjkyMTM3NjUsImV4cCI6MTc3MTgwNTc2NSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTYzODAwNTEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.8L5B-2rMGM--iJ_kQSbDSxKakJ4_VsXcfJGfFuqdvZc)
### Why I'm joining my colleagues to remove Noem from office immediately
| | [Haley Stevens](https://substack.com/@haleyformi)
---
| Jan 24
---
| [](https://substack.com/@haleyformi)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack..ZpMbUCvcLzukjPzRNVTt4ZGPV8Xw4dZX04gqeJl5DFI?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/haleyformi/p/kristi-noem-must-be-impeached?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

Across Michigan, I've been hearing the same thing again and again: People are scared.
And that fear is coming from the federal agency that's supposed to protect our communities. An agency whose leadership has lost the trust of the very people it's meant to serve.
Right now, the Department of Homeland Security is failing at its most basic responsibility. And at the top of that department is Secretary Kristi Noem.
**That 's why I joined more than 100 of my colleagues in co-sponsoring articles of impeachment against Secretary Noem.**
This is not a decision I made lightly. It's not political theater. It's a last resort.
Under the Trump administration, ICE has been deployed into cities despite opposition from local leaders - bypassing mayors, police chiefs, and all the people responsible for keeping communities safe.
The result? Confusion. Escalation. Tragedy.
We've seen deadly confrontations. Protests. Families caught in the chaos. Cities like Minneapolis, and communities right here in Michigan, are now living with the consequences of reckless, unaccountable federal enforcement.
Here's the truth: _When public safety starts to feel like a threat, something has gone terribly wrong._
**Why impeachment?**
Because Secretary Noem has repeatedly ignored my calls, and those of many others, to investigate deadly incidents tied to DHS and ICE operations.
Incidents like:
* The killing of Renee Nicole Good in Minneapolis
* The death of Nenko Gantchev at the North Lake Processing Center in Baldwin, Michigan

These are not headlines. They are human beings. Families deserve answers. Communities deserve justice.
But instead of accountability, we've gotten silence and continued abuses of power. No investigations. No action. No recognition that anything needs to change.
And so, I was left with no choice.
**ICE is not making our communities safer.**
Under Secretary Noem, and at Donald Trump's direction, ICE has been used to go after families and children, not to ensure public safety.
Federal agents have been sent into neighborhoods without warning. Local leaders have been cut out of the process. Families have been harassed, not protected.
In Minneapolis, that recklessness led to the death of an American citizen. In Michigan, it's led to fear, confusion, and distrust.
Local leaders warned this would happen. They were ignored. Instead, the administration doubled down - even floating the use of the Insurrection Act to send in the military and threatening to cut funding from states that push back.
That's weaponizing federal power for political gain.
This is not leadership. It's an abuse of power. Secretary Noem is failing to keep people safe
**Accountability matters**
I know this won't be easy - Republicans currently control Congress. And many have shown they'd rather protect Donald Trump than stand up for what's right.
But I was elected to fight for what's right, and that's exactly what I'm going to do.
When someone in power ignores oversight, deflects responsibility, and presides over deadly outcomes, I won't stay silent.
I'll stand up. I'll speak out. I'll demand better.
I'm doing this for the Michiganders afraid to answer the door. For families who deserve answers. For communities who deserve safety, not fear.
And I won't stop fighting until there's justice. That's what Michigan deserves.
With grit,
Haley
* * *

A personal note from Haley 👋

I'm a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. I've spent my career fighting for Michigan's working families - and now I'm running for the U.S. Senate to keep standing up for the people I love.

But here's the truth: Senate control could come down to Michigan. And Trump and his megadonors know it. That's why they're gearing up to spend tens of millions to defeat me and hand this seat to a MAGA Republican.

I need your help to fight back. This race will be one of the most competitive - and expensive - in the country, and I'm counting on grassroots support to win.

If you're with me, will you chip in today?
[Donate](https://substack.com/redirect/02d3f66c-37be-40d0-8334-52d10426a758?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
###### Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate.

---
| | | [Restack](https://substack..ZpMbUCvcLzukjPzRNVTt4ZGPV8Xw4dZX04gqeJl5DFI?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---

(C) 2026 Haley for MI
33717 Woodward Ave #539, Birmingham, MI 48009
[Unsubscribe](https://substack..hyAl8DC_5zzcQaGEDGjhT1O1t_CbM-XuAcecwfjsspc?)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/9047147c-7037-423a-9631-26c69657454a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)[](https://substack..ZVG7MzyDRMhhE_aN4NE3WRSLngFXKKCejzWdLUrT1Sk?)

name: Rashida Tlaib
subject: Stop companies from stealing and polluting our land, water, and air for profit
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress
body:
Rapidly expanding data centers are threatening our health, our water, and more. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.X6XUC7u8ppFLNtMO_55SZlNseb7gEYIOhm_EWnhzEOZKmTtnV3k2h4V2x_O3H7rdW2az5rgktBwzxQ8Ml9Wgkmv85qW-UsBonL4KRa0bcNqdICU6T3NBDdNIZG7w7wEWQyP3m04V5mk8cPy1DoXI-NH7wLeSpMfa3kLysb3u4O17Hc8mE2QWMeD72JXgGoOOkHYmrGQka4kITxR-myDNBkSZebuAwddeSMqT6AncNT1xZoQzFt1Y8a5B37TSHi64CrJ9qU5yuC6Usk7fM89Z4Kv6xIo1KKG_U8xA02O8qMzv43nRDIbvXi10UFRTP4QLCRYHCnVwYKkoOyJ7juVqEAj54l7_mg8GOFfbVGYB70DQKmzZMLiI9lOyDL_nJE9HaYZVPhWCGv95jkIJ6Hn0uQ/4nk/DqfCe3ScTWm-BIEOPaGAZw/h0/h001.4tr7sKmnpNVwkytSj2y3dgJ0NxyuIWjx7kDtyuGmgMo)
---
Friend, This weekend, a huge winter storm will impact half of the country. Power outages are expected, so prepare if you can! Power outages are increasing with climate-change-fueled storms, and at the same time, prices for electricity and other utilities are soaring. That’s why I’m leading the fight in Congress to erase utility debt and bring down the cost of life-saving utilities. This involves challenging Big Tech billionaires. **Did you know that Big Tech companies’ AI data centers are driving up local energy prices by nearly 270%?** These rapidly expanding data centers also take up a lot of land, and **each one requires millions of gallons of water every day** to cool servers and other equipment. This water evaporates, and what’s left often pollutes local drinking water—sometimes leading to massive increases in cancer rates near data centers. [**Please sign to demand your local and state leaders block Big Tech data centers near you.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38h9nrsCCiMen3CGd5zila9oqx6ruUh5S-q5KN4lht45jx5Sirt49HA6-icPSc5wiAMswteHPyCi3dLHYk53IisB-697YNcB2f6g1TrxU4F4GGOceCZLY_wpFy6Tp5fshMZ5saynwyr_zrWbW1P7vUHZzoon1uPhtC7w54OaqEGNa6OycBAIPajkLfsZ2SvY0YVRoS79yfd9HewJHy_E7yBfpHfWMSlc2Rggo6cr6jQgsYVW7bgnzvLsoXm4FDkFe6XRFFHIWbryE-logAkYu6ug8v5v-lgQmGjO04_FAF9uXNT5eYXaOYhYi86T686dUnDTJSHCMUQjuA9oiCT6wDnL8ShdbDL1JSx7gi_u_24J8JT61u6hcdz6Ju8ZLuW8A0QqsiieUfKbEtCTc8T8R_kHY1A8WmHhsHrdbIOwEUOjDqUA96ybDWgDca75AgqDdaPlnDqr0xFUToT0e9IonN-HjgVgZzoyJfa7yUgU4k8Zg/4nk/DqfCe3ScTWm-BIEOPaGAZw/h1/h001.2iqSbr2N5l1Fw11Vglmt_Dagmddg9ojJkHaUQdgG_dE) | [SIGN ON](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38h9nrsCCiMen3CGd5zila9oqx6ruUh5S-q5KN4lht45jx5Sirt49HA6-icPSc5wiAMswteHPyCi3dLHYk53IisB-697YNcB2f6g1TrxU4F4GGOceCZLY_wpFy6Tp5fshOqMr4AHkY7yQhVAvxEXr-qhzKOmOVv_ajD9jFVWMhNVzIB7wmNImarNY3Vz4UZwhnW73k1H5mroK0VREDHXZAW4Ts868xIMJzQYoPbS1DW457wWusfanwJjjpXzdoS_MHCCFQesEUT9Rdx91mSmRsMgnZm2bnVn67khuRi5XJo5CU2f8QRa7dJFgEzQw-6cc4xBHafrhCtQHx7N8K7O2cfEOd9SZ-0p1kenrSjGJOKCtfapdVxbC3d5F1TS8Pc1M5Uzaz87dFuZ7xJzIoOhILYTcC6jDaUuAv1k6yqlZT8y1qABESYdrW0dR4P43_pnuzjyHbu7JFsR_niARR0TcomoIbV3AtL7Q0ZJqRlju7caw/4nk/DqfCe3ScTWm-BIEOPaGAZw/h2/h001.Ma8GiHNhGtiFTrfBBxMcqXAku1OC9SBs9mTI6DErB3w)
---
Powered by dirty fossil fuels, these data centers are contributing further to the climate crisis. People living near these centers are speaking up about not only water pollution but also air pollution and toxic smells, as well as noise and light pollution.
**Many of my constituents are trying to stop multiple proposed data centers in my district. They don’t want for-profit companies to steal and pollute our land, water, and air.**
Despite public outcry, local leaders in my district are moving ahead with the plans anyway.
Some officials believe that new data centers bring jobs, but that only happens during a brief construction period. Only a few people stay on to run each data center long-term.
But the tech industry lies, and they are often given tax breaks for constructing these centers. That means our communities are subsidizing these polluting projects with our tax dollars.
Our leaders should understand the threats these data centers pose, and prioritize protecting their communities rather than helping Big Tech profit at our expense. But many don’t yet understand, so we need to get louder.
[**Take the first step today: Add your name to oppose data centers in your community.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38h9nrsCCiMen3CGd5zila9oqx6ruUh5S-q5KN4lht45jx5Sirt49HA6-icPSc5wiAMswteHPyCi3dLHYk53IisB-697YNcB2f6g1TrxU4F4GGOceCZLY_wpFy6Tp5fshMXdckw7B3CsjK7rMSonmzlsQ12hcTqMNhJuD8RIl6REEdsTeVa70BmtiwCXWqa4xN10AqDMF-UcNqMZXemH6kmpvHEGrpxWJe4EtUW2ngeFnzS690aGH0hB9G1ZwWIQZyG-yhqYeG_G3eAwp9CqFVPC5alWn1F09ZlQaPjRWZ8aYismV4G0MGj8iYNrMRcP2hn83Z-VoIKzGibnT2byg84H8M03LgdVZG75JFpUz8tSjCdB7zRQXFcvBcSiHYaK0AHMaLQW9666Wxsz6ydO_HJSdTRA4Pa2wvcjU7MsfAtCH-QOcW-37CZALkfa49uv7gnrlkvLuaJ-WnZFp8OpFOEChDdDWHPd3AwGFx2Tz3_8w/4nk/DqfCe3ScTWm-BIEOPaGAZw/h3/h001.EUekvZk_MnZIkH0FK65_l0t8PvaYavUoS3Q_yU2ewBU)
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38h9nrsCCiMen3CGd5zila9oqx6ruUh5S-q5KN4lht45jx5Sirt49HA6-icPSc5wiAMswteHPyCi3dLHYk53IisB-697YNcB2f6g1TrxU4F4GGOceCZLY_wpFy6Tp5fshPxOmOVW29q4ea7s8sDgW9ccjcv9oLZPY-kw_D3V4ngdPI8JTkfhd0nEiQa2WRIHOisJ88OjCjBBDOT1pmM1Qrs8SMRPlsYvEuCLVaOi1PiJpI87eBr9_Z2yd6Y8BrZoAU3UtGGkXy67rMyeJNUEQlGBz6BuaU7GFRh5NIWOQKqITaRRELBh19oj5PSYiFkmiEmjLytmQH2sUK8CncFlG0TK1ln8HWNwoxF3xZEUYk_uB-XWVK_RUUw30VgatZZaCl0HovaqRZPVqeIGKuEx9A728Kqt3bqLSz6h7Os1daYqC43RuyObdGwWStF_tSl-mWz6oByIzt0Vqq7vowVly9sJPDVpZVwGvSUGYJNli0OEg/4nk/DqfCe3ScTWm-BIEOPaGAZw/h4/h001.5CCzYobgO9eFSfV8RduJpYjcHM7pjHnDftSHmgvN8Fg)

Already in my home state of Michigan, multiple towns have successfully rallied and moved their local leaders to reverse plans and revoke licenses for these projects. People power works!
Thank you for taking action today, and don’t forget to take the next step of reaching out to your local and state leaders directly.
If you’re gearing up for one of these fights in your community, [check out these resources](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.nTQp_FEIcSHl649vCJCicijQjwfQKdxkknqqcT5Hd9pGy7plFcBvIyS8ar72lc_eBhT5EDMveLvAT57Qk7V_V7mhgXUxpFQ6-muGm9-BumxSnwQYJtSTK5iH2L5VhrChBPLE8B7l6yPevU7vU0Qmtzo9O5roYV8-SCf812GlUTG4aHsTnn2cXK-c0wfjUb9ttBCbEMR0FYgLirJuRB5CMwZ6w1zTeEeOpVblqJlZTdEPCXZHIWMyGv4INQwsfVecYookFmQ7RrvmuqejFyOpyGfNl964AtlInJxtUJcL_pUH62P59QAhN2Zlr3x1uFl_RZLy7NMnYqKnO_WfffxLSOOuFehK4N831-qAejF4Hu732rulLq6yxenClG9yllHsKYynK3WcuP-LFyaJ-VT5oyBcIx-p6ClCiOBAWAlMbLmWMq18vBgq4Iw3Q6TIzMmh/4nk/DqfCe3ScTWm-BIEOPaGAZw/h5/h001.vd7bcP1iHLlBbEvB2X8P9h6sAxAeELuzy7pv2e5QD8c) from the NAACP about how to stop data centers and reduce their harms.
In solidarity,
Rashida

name: GOTV PAC
subject: What Ron DeSantis is up to…
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GET OUT THE VOTE PAC NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR ANY CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpac2026?refcode=Email1022026 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpac2026?refcode=Email1022026]
Peter ,
Ron DeSantis just made his next move.
He announced that Florida Republicans will take up mid-decade redistricting in April to lock in GOP control before the 2026 midterms.
Right now, Florida’s congressional delegation stands at 20 Republicans and 8 Democrats. DeSantis wants to tilt the map even further – and he’s timing it carefully.
Why April? Because Republicans are waiting on a Supreme Court decision that could gut the Voting Rights Act and make it easier to dismantle majority-minority districts nationwide. DeSantis all but admitted it.
If we’re going to blunt the impact of GOP gerrymanders in Florida – and across the country – we need to scale up now, not after the maps are locked in.
Can you chip in $25 or more today to help GOTV PAC fight back against this redistricting power grab? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpac2026?refcode=Email1232026]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

name: Michele Tafoya
subject: I loved those Sundays walking on the gridiron sidelines
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tafoya for Senate
body:
Hi folks! I just made it official: I‘m running for U.S. Senate!
[](http://links.right-red.com/u/click?_t=7f2cc7f35be547959fee68a54bdac0d9&_m=097cdc35e54a4019b4b4263d8d27adbc&_e=hR7ZpqNirlF8coQllnMHAleDG6nZu8OeXFluUO5_m_3Za3HND_hFr472M1F4jxnvgDoaOrFOmBGe7TDQbheZ_GH0cRxC6vRlkutG0JK1EJLV5Eb2u92XRdDBH0ARS8QEdP4LJT4uDSx_MhK6h01SS437v5srBvW4pXUnZKcy81f3-KGrhyDUkZS1NRIBWqFeLc-CHYD9V_OayCoifC676xrdkKjG8nWobjVRPzIYunOiVwwWSCjKnx32B5n8X5DPAlBpczrOFNN-y7ItyapqQMHLNACLXWSkoLp9lXQYkSS1MnVqt2F5INxwZO_SM6W7XovnpNkhfa5HJLCrVnyxVWdixclWdOQ9zUqJYA3_1k9kbyM-BGHjbwNF5VviPpnaIaeNJT80l66IBRHP2gp51BWDPEsJkoVuINzHrOuz8vxncDQ-U-0hb-6N1KFE9YNYHqBHMmHWmExlUU5hM9WDqg9eUjYO3Dghcn7uTk9yll2fM0uyET4MsQohGbqPfoXWLv523fqcuCIlZeHI0Fr8vUugbIjgPyE87USpzzT0yQ0auJ7ZF4PRIwpQeP7pCZGqQOrpvZdCdAl4vYH_X3Vh1XI6cnKPyJ89CUsQXbBiYPDH6wq6FKV1xhuABtpE2Uy-7D9esjaXtaTCANW1nuXruRdyEN7sZB7HVskahM2egok%3D) Folks - my name is Michele Tafoya. ** ** I made a career as a sideline reporter for some of the biggest moments in sports history. I spent many Sunday evenings out on the gridiron. And I've interviewed all-time greats, including Peyton Manning, Patrick Mahomes, and many others who changed the game forever. ** ** Now I'm ready to make a big change myself. ** ** With the disaster that failed leadership has brought us to in Minnesota, I just made it official: I'm running for U.S. Senate in my home state of Minnesota!
Before I go on, this will be one of the most consequential Senate races in the entire country - is there anything I can say to convince you to become a [FOUNDING DONOR](http://links.right-red.com/u/click?_t=7f2cc7f35be547959fee68a54bdac0d9&_m=097cdc35e54a4019b4b4263d8d27adbc&_e=hR7ZpqNirlF8coQllnMHAleDG6nZu8OeXFluUO5_m_3Za3HND_hFr472M1F4jxnvgDoaOrFOmBGe7TDQbheZ_GH0cRxC6vRlkutG0JK1EJLV5Eb2u92XRdDBH0ARS8QEdP4LJT4uDSx_MhK6h01SS437v5srBvW4pXUnZKcy81f3-KGrhyDUkZS1NRIBWqFeLc-CHYD9V_OayCoifC676xrdkKjG8nWobjVRPzIYunMG-Qb8y3lgUJeH5CE9ydzMR1r2X_5mcZ6u8f_fXL6zVKJZ5hnbBAoud8G_ViSYKSyLvnrdwXuVQ7KibxxwQmlmrytVVFPDyHD3H9Dd3hxinjBElOEuM5_9p3YjGyTDhPCxNMfuB_4d3ip1JNz5-cJFczDikUMDipRFvUIVNWLVHdmzWksjrY1iloDxDfYcFoEizU1M99U3TLyIPqOJWjskLH1bKdNwRZRwKoq9a8zc2IrjSn1sgNrYzRfcV6_KafyrmYj5zwjiYBGTLtYC-449hKU3sRuuz5BQG7MO3fFtFGasD8uUFXLprjBf4rjWW0e402qCBF6_fK7gnzj9brMxmIysqG-UnLmqnfbN3f7JorW-UGDMMyAeLSz5ek0DkdpIpGoP99YnyGzPXTiGMOlh0MntUn2gOarX7i7nELYe-7D1MsvjbnYLs4vrdlECAXs%3D) to my new campaign? ](http://links.right-red.com/u/click?_t=7f2cc7f35be547959fee68a54bdac0d9&_m=097cdc35e54a4019b4b4263d8d27adbc&_e=hR7ZpqNirlF8coQllnMHAleDG6nZu8OeXFluUO5_m_3Za3HND_hFr472M1F4jxnvgDoaOrFOmBGe7TDQbheZ_GH0cRxC6vRlkutG0JK1EJLV5Eb2u92XRdDBH0ARS8QEdP4LJT4uDSx_MhK6h01SS437v5srBvW4pXUnZKcy81f3-KGrhyDUkZS1NRIBWqFeLc-CHYD9V_OayCoifC676xrdkKjG8nWobjVRPzIYunNr4QLgeqicMwkOU7oFT0GZdg4EAvan24d05O0wkqGZDv5S9NsavaOJOVEO2MmedIVgPytUV3C6p1f35XzINNiSLP2byBXjxBNa12ge1mWz9x9l07aeq5AepvqNyNLMIoMgOkGKkljuknANRukjJ3EfFuudL6GMBwxhQXSNIMIsxpvoUdy_UDbiXJBdAZ9McjiLxpMk0ljot-GXKWy4TREUoxXVPjM1bKl_7vMq1jV7c869l9ay7SxKg4J4dT2gjxpDokcbc9nVM2054ckda8dE_emi5eN3nZgbZbhENTOcZgwkc_B49M8oytkCMa-z8RN25dgiVFa8d0NIRdb5yiHzESZ7vrcmqLLST-PfsR4auRg-Qn881msx3j3Ra-FotK-UBwAP4wcTdTnxAEXkPfd_L8FXFQRkpUcZuGDye2p5NcVpHMegef6GcsD-GGcxHoc%3D) I never in my life thought I'd be sending you this email. ** ** I'm not a politician, I haven't run for office before, and elected office wasn't really an endgame I'd ever thought about. But what Tim Walz, the far-Left, and the career politicians have done to our state forced me to reconsider, including when they ... ** ** - STORMED our churches to intimidate worshippers - SQUANDERED our tax dollars on fraudulent daycares - DEMONIZED our brave cops and border agents - ALLOWED men into women's locker rooms - TAXED us into oblivion with zero tangible benefits - SUED the Trump Admin to allow boys in girls' sports - OPENED our borders to millions of illegal immigrants - FORCED divisive propaganda into our classrooms ** ** As a sports professional, patriot, Catholic, granddaughter of legal immigrants, wife, and mama bear, they've come after just about everything I care about most. So I had a choice to make: 1) let my state and country descend into ruin, or 2) take a leap of faith to fix it. ** ** Experts and consultants told me running for Senate in Minnesota was a fool's errand. ** ** After all, we have a far-Left Governor and two far-Left Senators, Minnesota has been a blue state since Nixon, and it's the ONLY STATE Ronald Reagan didn't win. ** ** But blazing my own trail has never scared me. I made history on TV and won four Emmys for my sports coverage. I've taken on longer odds than this - and I beat them. ** ** [So that’s why I just launched my Senate campaign.](http://links.right-red.com/u/click?_t=7f2cc7f35be547959fee68a54bdac0d9&_m=097cdc35e54a4019b4b4263d8d27adbc&_e=hR7ZpqNirlF8coQllnMHAleDG6nZu8OeXFluUO5_m_3Za3HND_hFr472M1F4jxnvgDoaOrFOmBGe7TDQbheZ_GH0cRxC6vRlkutG0JK1EJLV5Eb2u92XRdDBH0ARS8QEdP4LJT4uDSx_MhK6h01SS437v5srBvW4pXUnZKcy81f3-KGrhyDUkZS1NRIBWqFeLc-CHYD9V_OayCoifC676xrdkKjG8nWobjVRPzIYunO5Q9JWYbmM6krb7BTPz_aRLN0l3faLQGiVJEiIR1l91kdJkB2jN-SwquWrxTf2yEn0L66nQfsZHgIVNG5nbqrABREt1gcadj6PCTchZ9G1H1rNYzDf6xKLg-GwV4Iv5O70d2O48SmctWo7qTLxU7QwdDrkloSRbYtPh9S_ISgMG97ZCASA8PuW5qul2xjCYkYc0ag24ZlI7OqbiKb57oY9Y6XeEhj4ajUXknqDg1RfApjkhTg9rZEVSoNQuMSHBasFcGYg3intxZki1IKY1Szy7q6mNBNqRq_HfyCdw1_tPYC7mDyWd1i70h2sKvVUiO4kzwCtb3ovzlcOB0oNXV0efYsyldlvVm8psLOeebnv1EC2X-_pzdXEwv6ryPNUcBsRRYlNLeu-WUHmG7zE48AEBGgU1TBRyyjWFC_opJfhaSzmaN2tQZW0DJokPFUBlAw%3D) I'm taking on Tim Walz's inner circle, the DC power brokers, and the political class who have sold us out for too long. ** ** Luckily, there are a lot more of us than there are of them! ** ** Now that I have made my decision, my path to winning this Senate race is in your hands. The ONLY way we can flip this seat is by out-organizing, out-working, and out-raising our opponents. ** ** That last part is important - because if we can't get our message out far and wide, this race is over and the far-Left wins. This just became one of the biggest Senate races in the entire country. I mean it. I'm already hearing that the career politicians are terrified of my campaign.
** **
They're scared because 120+ million people saw a viral video showcasing rampant fraud happening under Tim Walz's watch.
** **
They're scared because folks know who I am and they know I don't take BS from anyone - not from players on the field and certainly not from some empty suits in DC.
** **
And they're scared because they know that if the American people have to choose between fraud, incompetence, special interests, and powerful party bosses... And honesty, common sense, and plain talk - the political class is in for a reckoning.
** **

clean_body: Hi folks! I just made it official: I‘m running for U.S. Senate! Folks - my name is Michele Tafoya. I made a career as a sideline reporter for some of the biggest moments in sports history. I spent many Sunday evenings out on the gridiron. And I've interviewed all-time greats, including Peyton Manning, Patrick Mahomes, and many others who changed the game forever. Now I'm ready to make a big change myself. With the disaster that failed leadership has brought us to in Minnesota, I just made it official: I'm running for U.S. Senate in my home state of Minnesota! Before I go on, this will be one of the most consequential Senate races in the entire country - is there anything I can say to convince you to become a to my new campaign? I never in my life thought I'd be sending you this email. I'm not a politician, I haven't run for office before, and elected office wasn't really an endgame I'd ever thought about. But what Tim Walz, the far-Left, and the career politicians have done to our state forced me to reconsider, including when they ... - STORMED our churches to intimidate worshippers - SQUANDERED our tax dollars on fraudulent daycares - DEMONIZED our brave cops and border agents - ALLOWED men into women's locker rooms - TAXED us into oblivion with zero tangible benefits - SUED the Trump Admin to allow boys in girls' sports - OPENED our borders to millions of illegal immigrants - FORCED divisive propaganda into our classrooms As a sports professional, patriot, Catholic, granddaughter of legal immigrants, wife, and mama bear, they've come after just about everything I care about most. So I had a choice to make: 1) let my state and country descend into ruin, or 2) take a leap of faith to fix it. Experts and consultants told me running for Senate in Minnesota was a fool's errand. After all, we have a far-Left Governor and two far-Left Senators, Minnesota has been a blue state since Nixon, and it's the ONLY STATE Ronald Reagan didn't win. But blazing my own trail has never scared me. I made history on TV and won four Emmys for my sports coverage. I've taken on longer odds than this - and I beat them. I'm taking on Tim Walz's inner circle, the DC power brokers, and the political class who have sold us out for too long. Luckily, there are a lot more of us than there are of them! Now that I have made my decision, my path to winning this Senate race is in your hands. The ONLY way we can flip this seat is by out-organizing, out-working, and out-raising our opponents. That last part is important - because if we can't get our message out far and wide, this race is over and the far-Left wins. | | ---|--- This just became one of the biggest Senate races in the entire country. I mean it. I'm already hearing that the career politicians are terrified of my campaign. They're scared because 120+ million people saw a viral video showcasing rampant fraud happening under Tim Walz's watch. They're scared because folks know who I am and they know I don't take BS from anyone - not from players on the field and certainly not from some empty suits in DC. And they're scared because they know that if the American people have to choose between fraud, incompetence, special interests, and powerful party bosses... And honesty, common sense, and plain talk - the political class is in for a reckoning. Are you with me? I can't do this without you! Thanks for taking the time to read this email! Together, we're going to make history - I can feel it in my bones. Be brave. Do good. - Michele Michele Tafoya Republican for Senate, Minnesota It's official - Michele Tafoya is running for U.S. Senate in Minnesota! name: Sarah McBride
subject: Greenland
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McBride for Delaware
body:
I’m sure you’ve seen the headlines about Donald Trump’s reckless obsession with seizing Greenland from Denmark.
#
I’m sure you’ve seen the headlines about Donald Trump’s reckless obsession with seizing Greenland from Denmark.
Like so many moments in politics, I know it’s easy to read something like that and shrug it off as political theater or traditional Trump saber-rattling.
**But I keep thinking about the people who don’t have the option to tune it out.**
Denmark is one of our allies and a member of NATO, an alliance that has been our greatest force for peace and security for more than 80 years. Now, Trump is fundamentally undermining this relationship by threatening our NATO allies and casting doubt on our shared defense commitments.
On Truth Social, Donald Trump claimed that NATO would not defend the U.S. if we were attacked. That’s simply not true. _The only time NATO’s collective defense has been invoked was after 9/11, and it was invoked in our defense._
Denmark answered that call. They sent their citizens to serve alongside Americans, and they lost more people per capita than any other country.
Now those same families are listening to the president of the United States talk about taking their land. In Greenland, parents are saying their kids aren’t sleeping at night, afraid of American invasion. That fear is real, and it’s being created by words spoken from the most powerful office in the world.
This is how global stability erodes — when allies begin to wonder whether they’ll pay the price for reckless leadership.
I believe America should be a country that honors its commitments and treats our allies with dignity. [**If you believe that too, I’m asking you to pitch in today. Your support helps me continue to speak out, push back against Donald Trump, and stand up for the values that actually keep people safe.**](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/go/1184?c0=mcb-em-20260123-1.MTaNy4&refcode=em20260123-2724&amount=5&t=1&akid=2724%2E21716%2EeQlXeL)
**[Donate $5 »](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/go/1184?c0=mcb-em-20260123-1.MTaNy4&amount=5&refcode=em20260123-2724&t=20&akid=2724%2E21716%2EeQlXeL)**
Thank you for being part of this,
Sarah McBride

Friend,

**It was only a year ago that Republicans were fired up – demanding that DOGE expose the WASTE, FRAUD, and ABUSE buried in our federal programs.**

_Thanks to DOGE, we cut funding to USAID, NPR, and PBS, saving MILLIONS in wasted taxpayer dollars._

name: The Democratic National Committee
subject: Here's why your support matters:
body:
---
Derek, today is January 23. We hope it's also the day you'll make your first donation of 2026 to the DNC. Here’s why your support matters: If everyone who received this email gave just a few dollars, we’d have the resources to scale up our work and make major headway towards winning the midterms this year. But the reality is that not everyone who receives this email will give. So we’re relying on each one of our supporters to chip in when it makes the most sense for them. **Derek, the DNC’s work investing in state parties, registering voters, and organizing nationwide is going to help voters flip control of the House and the Senate in 2026, and build the Democratic infrastructure to take back the White House in 2028. name: Bobby Pulido
subject: This is what Monica de la Cruz voted for
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bobby Pulido for Texas
body:
I’m running for Congress because I refuse to accept an economy where working families are treated as expendable.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123918219/597017423/1513848?&refcode=BLU_EM_PULD_2026-01-23_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMjA2OTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZWVhODExNWItYmZmOC1mMDExLThkNGMtMDAyMjQ4MmQyNzliIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=RwzJYV8xl8RPpHjPfKwIuP0GRQSpHlSzPAlLCqCsg5o=)
---
Peter,

A new report confirms what families down here in South Texas feel every day: **Texas is losing manufacturing jobs** , and people are being left with fewer opportunities and higher costs. At the same time, millions of Americans stand to **lose their health care coverage and SNAP benefits** because of last year’s so-called “big beautiful bill.”

That bill didn’t build anything beautiful for us.

**But Monica de la Cruz voted for it.** Instead of lowering costs or protecting jobs, that vote put politics over people.

That’s what happens when leaders stop showing up for their district and start voting on autopilot for their party.

I’m running for Congress because I refuse to accept an economy where working families are treated as expendable. We deserve leadership that shows up early, stays late, and does the work to make life more affordable.

[_**If you’re with me, I’m humbly asking you to support my campaign with a contribution of $10, $25, or whatever you can give today:**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123918220/597017452/-2068234379?refcode=BLU_EM_PULD_2026-01-23_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMjA2OTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZWVhODExNWItYmZmOC1mMDExLThkNGMtMDAyMjQ4MmQyNzliIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=RwzJYV8xl8RPpHjPfKwIuP0GRQSpHlSzPAlLCqCsg5o=)

clean_body: I’m running for Congress because I refuse to accept an economy where working families are treated as expendable. | = Peter, A new report confirms what families down here in South Texas feel every day: Texas is losing manufacturing jobs , and people are being left with fewer opportunities and higher costs. At the same time, millions of Americans stand to lose their health care coverage and SNAP benefits because of last year’s so-called “big beautiful bill.” That bill didn’t build anything beautiful for us. But Monica de la Cruz voted for it. Instead of lowering costs or protecting jobs, that vote put politics over people. That’s what happens when leaders stop showing up for their district and start voting on autopilot for their party. I’m running for Congress because I refuse to accept an economy where working families are treated as expendable. We deserve leadership that shows up early, stays late, and does the work to make life more affordable. = | | | = | = | = | = | = Grateful for your support, Bobby * | | = Paid for by Bobby Pulido for Texas Bobby Pulido for Texas PO Box 1604 Edinburg, TX 78540 United States | = = If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please

name: Dan Goldman
subject: Trump’s Naked Power Grab
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan Goldman for New York**
body:
|
---
Peter — The Trump administration is working overtime to weaken our democracy, usurp power, and establish itself as a full-blown authoritarian regime. They are sending untrained, masked, violent ICE agents into our cities with orders to use force against the American people. It’s not about public safety — _**it’s a power grab.**_ After sending thousands of ICE agents to terrorize people and incite violence on the streets of Minneapolis, Donald Trump has now threatened several times to invoke the Insurrection Act. While Trump plots to take total control, Department of Homeland Security Secretary Kristi Noem is doubling down on her excuses for ICE’s actions in Minneapolis, spreading rampant lies to absolve ICE of any accountability. **We can’t trust this corrupt administration to hold itself accountable. That means we must do it ourselves.** Here’s how I’m fighting back:
* My office in New York is a safe place for immigrant and mixed-status families whose family members have been detained by ICE at the neighboring immigration court, and my staff and I are working tirelessly to support these families.

* Months ago, I demanded that the New York City Police Department be prepared to arrest ICE agents when they illegally arrest and detain New Yorkers.

* On January 6, I made the first of my now weekly oversight visits to the ICE detention facility at 26 Federal Plaza to ensure that the Trump administration complies with federal law and maintains humane conditions.

* I have also introduced legislation like the No Secret Police Act, the Immigration Court Due Process Protection Act, and the Stop Excessive Force in Immigration Act — all of which will hold Donald Trump’s ICE accountable by preventing their use of authoritarian tactics. **Most recently, I just introduced my ICE OUT Act, which would remove qualified immunity protections from ICE agents and ensure they are held accountable, not given a get-out-of-jail-free card.**

**[ICE is not above the law. I’m fighting back against this administration’s abuses of power, but I need to know that you’re with me. Will you make a contribution of any amount to my campaign?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123918659/597021897/-2121819019?amount=10&refcode=AU_DSG_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20260123_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NTZkODIwZC1jMGY4LWYwMTEtOGQ0Yy0wMDIyNDgyZDI3OWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MCqT92JjUIekSWebPs_8llJIejGF9ZrPa3CoDHVoidA=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ |

clean_body: | Peter — The Trump administration is working overtime to weaken our democracy, usurp power, and establish itself as a full-blown authoritarian regime. They are sending untrained, masked, violent ICE agents into our cities with orders to use force against the American people. It’s not about public safety — it’s a power grab. After sending thousands of ICE agents to terrorize people and incite violence on the streets of Minneapolis, Donald Trump has now threatened several times to invoke the Insurrection Act. While Trump plots to take total control, Department of Homeland Security Secretary Kristi Noem is doubling down on her excuses for ICE’s actions in Minneapolis, spreading rampant lies to absolve ICE of any accountability. We can’t trust this corrupt administration to hold itself accountable. That means we must do it ourselves. Here’s how I’m fighting back: My office in New York is a safe place for immigrant and mixed-status families whose family members have been detained by ICE at the neighboring immigration court, and my staff and I are working tirelessly to support these families. Months ago, I demanded that the New York City Police Department be prepared to arrest ICE agents when they illegally arrest and detain New Yorkers. On January 6, I made the first of my now weekly oversight visits to the ICE detention facility at 26 Federal Plaza to ensure that the Trump administration complies with federal law and maintains humane conditions. I have also introduced legislation like the No Secret Police Act, the Immigration Court Due Process Protection Act, and the Stop Excessive Force in Immigration Act — all of which will hold Donald Trump’s ICE accountable by preventing their use of authoritarian tactics. Most recently, I just introduced my ICE OUT Act, which would remove qualified immunity protections from ICE agents and ensure they are held accountable, not given a get-out-of-jail-free card. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thank you for fighting alongside me, Dan Dan Goldman for New York PO BOX 3306 New York, NY 10008 United States | mailto:info@dangoldmanforny.com | Paid for by Dan Goldman for New York

With the Republican U.S. House Majority essentially down to zero, flipping this seat from red to blue could give Democrats control of the U.S. House even before the midterms in November! = = = When you donate to the California Democratic Party you are investing in real, around-the-clock, year-round, grassroots organizing. We put paid field organizers on the phones and on the streets. And we mobilize volunteers to ensure every single voter in every single competitive district hears why they need to vote blue. Once they're claimed, the doors close forever – no exceptions, no second chances. This opportunity will only be available for you UNTIL MIDNIGHT. After that, I will have to move on to the queue of Patriots who are eagerly waiting to activate their MAGA Elite Membership for 2026! Thank you, Donald J. When the pundits talk about “electability” they mean someone quiet. Someone who will follow the old rulebook, take their cues, and not make anyone in power too uncomfortable.
That’s never been me — and it’s never going to be.
**But the polling already shows what Democratic voters actually believe:_that I’m the candidate most likely to beat a Republican in November._**
And that’s not because I’m willing to do what I’m told, but because I’m willing to stand my ground, speak plainly, and fight back when it counts.
This Saturday at 2 PM CT, on the debate stage, I’m going to prove exactly that.
[**If you want to help me walk onto that stage with momentum behind me, I’m asking you to chip in right now. We’re working to raise $50,000 before the debate, and your support helps make sure this moment reaches voters across Texas.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123919074/597032319/-1529437191?amount=10&refcode=260123_E4A2_JC_Debate2&refcode2=dc60ea3e-c4f8-f011-8d4c-0022482d279b&contactdata=ZlOAGTuDHAXXFOHOTt0eU6ZVhAXd6p1P6Z63ajopIsm5G3onDDGh/pIAFQf1gTuM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDMwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYzYwZWEzZS1jNGY4LWYwMTEtOGQ0Yy0wMDIyNDgyZDI3OWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gAH4dMz_0y42Ia4hQvh_7YxoMhRKHBgJlopqzXKHUfY=)

](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/2PHuEhDJLWMM_HSI78c0JWh4mcA_KLMOfuvrHprBkv8g3NY0S6tnQqUYOgKS_QiVSkh2biXjrUna8WIxaXf7vWkDhoJT1PglKwhdsqGQNQVUIV3RWPWBdCo5YEl4P3XTMyIF-6ICzTBv_FYZ0-9NI_jjfifk3SGMLOCd7IbvB-irYAcKEUjZvC2nwBdOVw1jvWqzO-sAA28nbRl2GOCZtidCDRlcwzKpVAWym6moI4u_PZeK41H2Wk69FM5ZxuR8Fk6j5dxjB-mDCF0pxLbEfnqo0Jp9AcuaacHYtEG157Ds2DpXVyvuO23RVLjEgsOwIUd6nQ6xyXrGI9D5i1DHm9vX-LgnNu265DFqmlIXbyDNF3ROVmL0ooBNwoNd1jDN68gMVkclQmk2saudMqO8p0hDpcK3J09JZAc-clKHXaquY4zPNrIo8jZuujlmpUyuVWvBz_8LmskEk4ltIszRHLS3B3NyAj-2dSYCTWddlhuyFBgPJJvApRfxQJwfSqo07pgXZxXC8HgModIdoeDUfuin_a73Az_cKSqlhoohWEkYEmcu2IkPvu0tDjKXVZ3IN3gYYa0irlKdhWI1U95Em5EXabQXh3qYlO9gGFrfNcmN6f0igw3PdJyDOkaofCJMWGTWOqPqBi3gtz8eWcNsPzKTZTl6wHfRejbQpe8V5MdfVobMud8FXoHW7ufq8UgFB5VE5VOkl2b3jQ-KCTsWf85bd2kKqodVPZS3a4jXSiO2UDoppSDgPmEezMCKjdpBkgZ7Ak5aoTa2_y6HbPbyIE5cBpTc0FDkGKaCWme9KAc8_RMbVA/82ppf81KfDmTmFKGTeBSEHIbTC3G3Z_I/17)I have spent long hours in prayer and conversation with those I trust most. I know leadership means accepting the heaviest burdens, and this choice has been the weightiest of my career.

body:

|
---
[|
---](https://scottfitzgeraldforcongress.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c59bc0db5e945d61b14749b2b&id=a10853e82f&e=561a28864e)

| |

Dear Friend,
I’m reaching out today because the stakes for Wisconsin and for our country could not be higher.
Recent actions could dramatically change congressional districts here in Wisconsin, and that means we have to be prepared for anything. The fight for the majority in Congress will run straight through our state, and control of Congress could very well depend on whether we’re ready.
That’s why I’m asking for your support today. Your contribution of **$30, $50, $100, or even $500** will ensure we have the resources to organize early, communicate our message, and protect this seat no matter what happens.
Here are a few recent accomplishments I’m proud to have delivered on your behalf:
* **Introduced legislation to lower the tax burden on middle-class homeowners** and expand access to affordable housing by eliminating the capital gains taxes on the sale of primary residences.
* **Consistently earned a strong pro-life rating** , including an A+ rating from the Susan B Anthony List Scorecard.
* **Fought to keep violent offenders off our streets** , including advancing tougher bail accountability measures for bad actors
* **Advanced common sense conservative bills through committee** , protecting children, lowering energy costs, and reducing burdensome regulations

These are real wins that make our community stronger and that I want to keep fighting for, but they won’t matter if we aren’t ready on day one of the next election.
[Please consider clicking here to contribute **$30, $50, $100, or $500**](https://scottfitzgeraldforcongress.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c59bc0db5e945d61b14749b2b&id=3d61811ac1&e=561a28864e) now to ensure we stay competitive, organized, and ready for whatever comes next.
Thank you for your commitment and support.Sincerely,
**Scott Fitzgerald**
Wisconsin’s 5th Congressional District

name: Tom Fitton
subject: Russiagate Update!
body:
Fighting Lawfare Targeting Trump Advisers

[INSIDE JW]

JUDICIAL WATCH SUES FOR RECORDS ON CROSSFIRE HURRICANE INVESTIGATION

[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=79120&L=36927&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cueW91dHViZS5jb20vd2F0Y2g/dj00TGpsTmFMYVNFYyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=ca842b2df67e9e3e26714a3973c2a65b545fc5c28199c52f46d67d832d91166c]

We are working to get the entire record on the Obama/Biden Justice
Department lawfare against President Trump. It is the worst government
corruption scandal in U.S. history, and the American people deserve to
see the whole story.

We filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=79120&L=36899&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZG9qLWR1cmhhbS1jb21wbGFpbnQtMDAxMzgvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=0a8e16eac1b1c99afbe499088cca64581ac91f76fd45888800f43ee32b8bc8dd]
against the U.S. Department of Justice for fully unredacted records
and previously withheld or missing portions of Durham’s
investigation into the origins of Crossfire Hurricane/Russiagate
(_Judicial Watch Inc. v. U.S. Department of Justice_
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=79120&L=36900&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZG9qLWR1cmhhbS1jb21wbGFpbnQtMDAxMzgvXV8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=2ba238003cf3e52fb5b3a5fc68cf5a1b4fba9d78f3434d27345a6d5e4344771d
_(No.
1:26-cv-00138)).

We sued in the U.S. District Court for the District of Columbia after
the Justice Department failed to respond to an August 5, 2025, FOIA
request for:

* The complete, unredacted notes taken by former CIA Director John
Brennan during the August 3, 2016, White House briefing, which
reportedly discussed intelligence regarding a Hillary Clinton campaign
plan to link Donald Trump to Russia.
* The full, unredacted Inspection Division Report from the Department
of Justice Office of the Inspector General that critiques the FBI’s
handling of the Crossfire Hurricane investigation.
* The 14 missing pages of the Durham Report appendix that have not
been publicly released.

* All unredacted transcripts, summaries, or notes from interviews
conducted by Special Counsel John Durham with the following
individuals regarding the 2016 election and related investigations:

* Hillary Clinton (interviewed May 2022)
* John Brennan (interviewed August 2020)
* Stefan Halper
* Alexander Downer
* Jake Sullivan (interviewed November 2021)
* John Podesta (interviewed January 2022)
* Robby Mook
* All unredacted records of referrals made by Special Counsel John
Durham to the Department of Defense or any other federal agencies.

* All emails and communications between Fusion GPS and _The New York
Times_, _The Washington Post_, or other major media outlets as well as
between Fusion GPS and the Hillary Clinton campaign or the Democratic
National Committee (DNC).
* All unredacted emails, memoranda, or other communications between
former head of British intelligence Sir Richard Dearlove, U.S.
intelligence officials (including CIA and FBI personnel), Stefan
Halper, and Christopher Steele.

In July 2016, during the presidential election campaign between Donald
Trump and Hillary Clinton, the FBI’s Counterintelligence Division
opened the Crossfire Hurricane
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=79120&L=36901&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZm94bmV3cy5jb20vcG9saXRpY3MvZnJvbS1jcm9zc2ZpcmUtaHVycmljYW5lLXRvLXRpbi1wYW5kYS1hLWxvb2stYXQtbm90YWJsZS1mYmktY29kZS1uYW1lcz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=14c93528f4526667c30bdb5420b441b8e706b3e45f2b470455da2c4c96af8013]
investigation. In August 2016, then-CIA Director John Brennan briefed
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=79120&L=36902&F=T&&hash=f77cc7bfdb436a7d0f287cd2e095359045a918729757297b26e32a740b58c3e9]
President Obama and other senior officials on intelligence reportedly
showing a Hillary Clinton campaign plan to link Trump to Russia.

In May 2019, Durham was appointed special counsel
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=79120&L=36903&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZm94MzVvcmxhbmRvLmNvbS9uZXdzL3JlcG9ydC1iYXJyLWFwcG9pbnRzLXByb3NlY3V0b3ItdG8tZXhhbWluZS1ydXNzaWEtcHJvYmUtb3JpZ2lucz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=52315a2fcd1743fe914806bfa28342a705c9344f2062db8907713ad0a4896f13]
to investigate the origins and conduct of the FBI’s Crossfire
Hurricane investigation.

In May 2023, Durham released his final repor
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=79120&L=36928&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVzdGljZS5nb3YvYXJjaGl2ZXMvbWVkaWEvMTM4MTIxMS9kbF10P3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=0aa1bbf33509d6bd7d7ea4da83e62acc49a97521b32571709e28049e1d281117
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=79120&L=36603&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVzdGljZS5nb3YvYXJjaGl2ZXMvbWVkaWEvMTM4MTIxMS9kbD91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=b5a73008a1e96e64fcb9b7bb91fd0c7ee7daf02f45db29d52ee6720ca6b9e490],
concluding that
the FBI opened a full investigation based on “raw, unanalyzed and
uncorroborated intelligence” and displayed “confirmation bias”
in pursuing the investigation. The report noted problems with the FISA
(Foreign Intelligence Surveillance Act) surveillance practices, noting
that unverified information from the Steele dossier was used to help
justify FISA applications targeting Trump campaign adviser Carter
Page. The report also noted that an FBI lawyer, Kevin Clinesmith,
pleaded guilty to altering an email used in a FISA application.

In July 2025, Senate Judiciary Committee Chairman Chuck Grassley
(R-IA) made public the formerly classified Appendix
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=79120&L=36604&F=T&&hash=2de4ebcf1f155e5192838159ca99634c43d115bc3153383c39ee0887bab9be1e]
(“Durham Annex”) to John Durham’s 2023 Special Counsel report,
which “contains previously classified information exposing a
reported Clinton campaign plan to falsely tie President Donald Trump
to Russia.”

We have been instrumental in uncovering much of what the public knows
about Crossfire Hurricane/Russiagate, which involved a long list of
Democratic political figures, lawyers, and staffers who shaped the
narrative around the Trump-Russia hoax.

In November 2025, we provided an in-depth recap
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=79120&L=36612&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcnVzc2lhZ2F0ZS10aGUtY29tZXktY29uc3BpcmFjeS8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=cafced6c75f325f95aecafc4c6cd4a7b018248d2e2b9744310a862b2d18eaa89]
of
the Crossfire Hurricane/Russiagate debacle.

In May 2025, we sued
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=79120&L=35947&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvY29tZXktaW52ZXN0aWdhdGlvbi1vZi10cnVtcC8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=416a83411f15fd7a601490c2303c510c6a3b889164a4f3311fb58ac99add8747]
the
Justice Department for all records regarding the FBI, under
then-Director James Comey, initiating an investigation of
hen-presidential candidate Donald Trump in 2016.

In October 2020, we uncovered
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=79120&L=35971&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvanVkaWNpYWwtd2F0Y2gtc2tlcHRpY2lzbS1hYm91dC1zdGVlbGUtcmVwb3J0cy8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=6c90706210129d56cc079bf8c503910ddd4e153a0d09b86d3878648d48a933a4]
heavily redacted email communications among top-level U.S. State
Department officials and a U.S. ambassador expressing skepticism about
reports by Steele’s London-based private intelligence firm Orbis
Business Intelligence. (Steele was the author of the Clinton-funded,
anti-Trump dossier.) The emails show one assistant secretary of state
saying some of Steele’s reports sound “extreme” and others “do
not ring true,” while the U.S. ambassador to Ukraine called some of
the Steele reports “flaky.”

In May 2020, we forced the declassification and release of the
“electronic communication
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=79120&L=27814&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZGVjbGFzc2lmaWNhdGlvbi1zcHlvcGVyYXRpb24vXeKAnT91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=cd004839323d3049b907e5791f937b1f3c8e2b9281db32924c66549368bf378a
used
to launch Crossfire Hurricane, written by former FBI official Peter
Strzok.

In April 2020, we obtained emails
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=79120&L=35972&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvanVkaWNpYWwtd2F0Y2gtZW1haWxzLXN1Z2dlc3Qtb2JhbWEtZmJpLWtuZXctbWNjYWluLWxlYWtlZC10cnVtcC1kb3NzaWVyLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=becba92429cee0ba2b49140198b5445ba012517cdb5944907213cbce54fa2c3b]
between former FBI official Peter Strzok and former FBI attorney Lisa
Page, including an email dated January 10, 2017, in which Strzok said
that the version of the dossier published by _BuzzFeed_ was
“identical” to the version given to the FBI by McCain and had
“differences” from the dossier provided to the FBI by Fusion GPS
co-founder Glenn Simpson and _Mother Jones_ reporter David Corn.
January 10, 2017, is the same day _BuzzFeed_ published the anti-Trump
dossier by former British spy Steele. The emails also show Strzok and
other FBI agents mocking President Trump a few weeks before he was
inaugurated. In addition, the emails revealed that Strzok communicated
with then-Deputy Director Andrew McCabe about the “leak
investigation” tied to the Clinton Foundation (the very leak in
which McCabe was later implicated).

In September 2019, we released State Department records
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=79120&L=35973&F=T&&hash=21bcc0b54fd6878e9df55d8f93ac2b22f8c21e966887a0e9d3ed2cdec0528546]
revealing that Steele had an extensive and close working relationship
dating back to May of 2014 with high-ranking Obama State Department
officials including Jonathan Winer and Victoria Nuland.

In August 2019, we obtained “302” report material
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=79120&L=27816&F=T&&hash=f65f0c5817b1ad52e705d7e54f31d55412281909a504472c4f2fc6f839a98da7]
from 2016 FBI interviews of Associate Deputy U.S. Attorney Bruce Ohr,
who was removed from his position in December 2017. (A Form 302 is
used by FBI agents to memorialize interviews they undertake during an
investigation.) In a November 22, 2016, interview, Ohr said that
“reporting on Trump’s ties to Russia were going to the Clinton
Campaign, Winer at the State Department and the FBI.” In a late
September 2016 interview, Ohr described a person (likely Christopher
Steele) as “desperate that Donald Trump not get elected and was
passionate about him not being the U.S. President.” A report states
that “Ohr knew that [Fusion GPS’s] Glenn Simpson and others were
talking to Victoria Nuland at the U.S. State Department.”

In July 2019, we obtained records
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=79120&L=15344&F=T&&hash=4d769a9cdfef39da53169385133a5fa0fc0f9ca58756a7195d2823a6396eb75c]
revealing a September 2016 email exchange between then-Assistant
Secretary of State Victoria Nuland and Special Coordinator for Libya,
Winer, who was a close associate of dossier author Steele, discussing
a “face-to-face” meeting on a “Russian matter.”

In August 2018, the Justice Department admitted in a Judicial Watch
FOIA lawsuit court filing that the Foreign Intelligence Surveillance
Court held no hearings
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=79120&L=9712&F=T&&hash=4b56000f1cfb03dbe596b599099501ff64785894120ec111d2a336e91b56e715]
on the FISA spy warrant applications targeting Carter Page, a former
Trump campaign part-time adviser who was the subject of four
controversial FISA warrants.

In July 2018, we released records
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=79120&L=8914&F=T&&hash=44a58e59809ffe72845678427f9227999928f00e941e64eb61284358c0df72be]
about FISA warrants targeting Page, which appeared to confirm that the
FBI and DOJ misled the FISA court by withholding material information
showing that Hillary Clinton’s campaign and the DNC were behind the
“intelligence” used to persuade the court to approve the FISA
warrants targeting the Trump team.

JUDICIAL WATCH SUES JUSTICE DEPT. OVER FBI CELEBRATING PETER NAVARRO
PROSECUTION

With the Clintons in the news for refusing a congressional subpoena,
it is instructive to look back at how the Left used subpoenas against
Trump’s team.

We filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=79120&L=36905&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZG9qLW5hdmFycm8tY29tcGxhaW50LTAwMDc5Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=f6a0985a167ecabe22a274e943f1384f2ae51fd47ea43cb50fbd4092113df724]
against the U.S. Department of Justice for communications of Federal
Bureau of Investigation (FBI) agents regarding the prosecution of
former Trump trade adviser Peter Navarro (_Judicial Watch Inc. v. U.S.
Department of Justice_
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=79120&L=36905&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZG9qLW5hdmFycm8tY29tcGxhaW50LTAwMDc5Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=f6a0985a167ecabe22a274e943f1384f2ae51fd47ea43cb50fbd4092113df724]

Navarro was sentenced
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=79120&L=36908&F=T&&hash=5ba59023621d75609038642aed72e622bf8c6372da1cbdc7dbe525be93d44f1b]
on January 24, 2024, to four months in prison for refusing to appear
before the U.S. Congress to give testimony and produce documents as
required by a subpoena he received from the Democrat-led Select
Committee to Investigate the January 6th Attack on the United States
Capitol.

The politicization of the Justice Department and FBI against President
Trump and his advisers is a disgrace. The lives of outstanding public
servants were derailed.

We sued in the U.S. District Court for the District of Columbia after
the Justice Department failed to respond adequately to a May 2, 2025,
FOIA request for:

* Records and communications of Special Agent Walter Giardina;
Supervisory Special Agent Blaire Toleman; and Assistant Special Agent
in Charge Timothy Thibault about the investigation, arrest,
indictment, or prosecution of Peter Navarro – including contempt of
Congress referrals regarding Navarro or any former Trump
administration officials.

[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=79120&L=36906&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cucG9saXRpY28uY29tL25ld3MvMjAyNS8wOC8wNy9mYmktZmlyaW5ncy10cnVtcC0wMDQ5OTE5Mz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=d78bc2d920a702cc46a18b0270b5a3cfd9e26a0cc4d95179fa60f0ef9a050d48]

[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=79120&L=31981&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvbmFtZXMtb2YtdG9wLXN0YWZmLWFudGktdHJ1bXAvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=f983bb930d170366a97627dca8c343257ec206b62fce008c7bee21f62e8ad904]
a
federal court to allow the agency to keep secret the names of top
staffers working in Special Counsel Jack Smith’s office that was
targeting Trump and other Americans (_Judicial Watch Inc. v. U.S.
Department of Justice_
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=79120&L=29636&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZG9qLWphY2stc21pdGgtc3RhZmYtY29tcGxhaW50LTAxNDg1Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=3985033431528cfd2d844cb130abdf4b04aa93d9787b861e782c66e510e8bb27]
(No. 1:23-cv-01485)).

In August 2022, we successfully sued to unseal the search warrant
affidavit
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=79120&L=27949&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvdHJ1bXAtcmFpZC1hZmZpZGF2aXQtcmVsZWFzZWQvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=22dabfa64e9212ff0b80e18c9a6b2668c6f232c9de4b5aa4e752faddf3fb3ea8]
used to
justify the unprecedented raid on Trump’s home (
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=79120&L=36109&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p1ZGljaWFsLXdhdGNoLW1vdGlvbi10by11bnNlYWwtc2VhcmNoLXdhcnJhbnQtMDgzMzIvXV9VLlM/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=87338a9479edd4ffe0ba617e7e2c6688992dd85157b1cf82837496a53c67272c.
