name: INGOP
subject: A Record Year for Hoosiers
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE INDIANA REPUBLICAN STATE COMMITTEE
body:
Dear Hoosier Republicans, No images? [Click here](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail20.com/t/y-e-ayhjrik-hhlljjcji-jh/) **_A Record Year for Hoosiers_** Dear Hoosier Republicans,I was thrilled to begin the week celebrating Indiana University bringing home the national title and capping a perfect 16-0 season! I am proud to report that when I played the IU Fight song to the RNC Midwest caucus this morning, it was met with a huge round of applause and congratulatory screams. There truly has never been a better time to be a Hoosier!Governor Mike Braun closed the year with a record of measurable results for Hoosiers, marking his first year in office with higher wages, historic growth, and a renewed focus on region-led economic development. 2025 established a clear standard for Republican leadership in Indiana, visible to families keeping more of what they earn, to communities seeing long-planned projects finally break ground, and to taxpayers seeing that an entrepreneurial state government can accomplish more with less.That is the record we are running on in 2026, and Republican leadership is staying focused on what works: disciplined spending, region-led growth, support for job creators, and policy that puts families, not bureaucracy, first.As always, thank you for being a part of our team, and please feel free to reach out if there's any way I can be of assistance.With winter storms moving in, I encourage all Hoosiers to take precautions, stay warm, and look out for one another.Yours in service, Lana Keesling, Indiana GOP Chairwoman _**Governor Braun Announces Launch of Crossroads Health Ventures, $21 Million+ Early-Stage Fund**_ Governor Braun announced the launch of Crossroads Health Ventures, a new early-stage venture fund aimed at helping Indiana's life sciences startups start, scale, and succeed here at home. Backed by more than $21 million in public-private commitments, the fund will strengthen Indiana's global leadership in human, animal, and plant health while turning research breakthroughs into high-wage Hoosier jobs. "Indiana continues to lead by bringing together public and private partners to support innovation at every stage. Crossroads Health Ventures will help ensure the next generation of life sciences companies can start, scale, and succeed right here in Indiana."\- Governor Braun via a [press release](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail20.com/t/y-l-ayhjrik-hhlljjcji-r/) **_Gov. Braun Opts in to New Federal Tax Credit for School Choice Scholarships_** Governor Braun announced Indiana is opting into a new federal initiative that will allow Hoosiers to receive tax savings for investing in K-12 scholarships, expanding educational opportunity across the state. This move builds on Indiana's commitment to universal school choice and ensures more students can access a high-quality education, regardless of income or ZIP code."Parents are in charge of their children's education. As a state, we are prioritizing that through universal school choice and a state tax credit for donations made to scholarship-granting organizations, which helps make a high-quality education accessible and affordable for every Hoosier family. Under President Trump's leadership, we welcome this increased focus on school choice at the federal level and are ready to leverage this additional federal tax credit to expand opportunities for students and families across our state." \- Governor Braun via a [press release](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail20.com/t/y-l-ayhjrik-hhlljjcji-y/) **Congress of Counties 2026** [Click Here for More Information](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail20.com/t/y-l-ayhjrik-hhlljjcji-j/) [Click Here to Register](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail20.com/t/y-l-ayhjrik-hhlljjcji-t/) _**Indiana GOP is Hiring Interns for the Spring Semester**_ **📱 _News You Can Use_ ** **Governor Mike Braun **[visited](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail20.com/t/y-l-ayhjrik-hhlljjcji-i/) ReElement Technologies' pilot facility in Noblesville, a leader in recycling and refining critical minerals, saying, "Indiana's economy is growing, and the most critical industries are choosing the Hoosier State to innovate and grow."**Lieutenant Governor Micah Beckwith** extended his sympathies to the Honorable Steve Meyer and his wife, who were shot in their home, saying, "Judges serve our communities by delivering justice, and they must be able to do so without fear for their own safety. Susan and I will be praying for Judge Meyer and his wife, Kim, as they recover."**Secretary Diego Morales **[spoke](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail20.com/t/y-l-ayhjrik-hhlljjcji-d/) with law enforcement from across the state during a training from the Securities Division, saying, "Strong partnerships between our office and law enforcement are critical to ensuring Hoosiers remain protected."**Treasurer Daniel Elliott** [stood](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail20.com/t/y-l-ayhjrik-hhlljjcji-h/) with Hoosiers at the Indiana March for Life, saying, every life is valuable, and I'm proud to support a movement that protects the most vulnerable and strengthens Hoosier families across our state.**Attorney General Todd Rokita **[announced](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail20.com/t/y-l-ayhjrik-hhlljjcji-k/) that Mercedes-Benz will send $12.7 million to Indiana to settle allegations the companies violated state laws prohibiting unfair or deceptive trade practices by marketing, selling, and leasing vehicles equipped with illegal and undisclosed emissions "defeat devices" designed to circumvent emissions standards. **State Comptroller Elise Nieshalla **[congratulated](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail20.com/t/y-l-ayhjrik-hhlljjcji-u/) Indiana University's football team for bringing home the National Championship for the first time in school history.**Senator Todd Young **[introduced](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail20.com/t/y-l-ayhjrik-hhlljjcji-o/) legislation to boost American sports diplomacy as the U.S. kicks off a decade of hosting large worldwide sporting events, which will help increase the number of tourists coming to the United States to attend them. **Senator Jim Banks **[urged](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail20.com/t/y-l-ayhjrik-hhlljjcji-b/) the U.K. to halt a proposed Chinese diplomatic complex in London over national security risks, raising serious concerns about the Chinese government's planned "super-embassy" in London and the national security risks it poses to both the United States and the United Kingdom.**Congressman Rudy Yakym **[ripped](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail20.com/t/y-l-ayhjrik-hhlljjcji-n/) Democrats' efforts to defund pregnancy resource centers. In a powerful personal testimony during a Ways and Means Committee markup, Yakym spoke in support of the Supporting Pregnant and Parenting Women and Families Act, a legislative effort to ensure these centers remain eligible for vital federal funding.**Congressman Marlin Stutzman**[i](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail20.com/t/y-l-ayhjrik-hhlljjcji-p/)[ntroduced](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail20.com/t/y-l-ayhjrik-hhlljjcji-x/) the _Regulation A+ Improvement Act_ and the _Streamlining Rural Housing Act_ , both advancing through the House Financial Services Committee, which cut red tape by expanding capital access for small and mid-sized businesses and accelerating affordable housing development in rural communities.**Congressman Jim Baird **[introduced](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail20.com/t/y-l-ayhjrik-hhlljjcji-m/) the _Kareem N. Dockery Medal of Honor Act_ to allow the President of the United States to award former Major Kareem Nicholas Dockery with the Medal of Honor for his heroism in Afghanistan in support of Operation Enduring Freedom. Dockery is an Indianapolis, IN native and one of only two U.S. officers to receive two Silver Stars for gallantry in the post-9/11 era.**Congresswoman Victoria Spartz**[testified](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail20.com/t/y-l-ayhjrik-hhlljjcji-c/) before the House Rules Committee on their amendments to restore Delphi retirees' pensions and bring long-overdue justice to blue-collar workers who were wronged by the government for political reasons.**Congressman Jefferson Shreve **[introduced](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail20.com/t/y-l-ayhjrik-hhlljjcji-q/) the Securing Federal Devices from Chinese Applications Act to strengthen federal cybersecurity and block applications controlled by the Chinese Communist Party from U.S. government devices.**Congressman Mark Messmer**[received](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail20.com/t/y-l-ayhjrik-hhlljjcji-a/) an A+ on the Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America scorecard.**Congresswoman Erin Houchin** [questioned](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail20.com/t/y-l-ayhjrik-hhlljjcji-f/) healthcare CEOs, demanding answers to how PBM GPOs can generate $50 million in revenue per employee off the backs of American patients. **_Upcoming Events_****January 29: [Fortville-McCordsville Republican Club Meeting](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail20.com/t/y-l-ayhjrik-hhlljjcji-z/)****February 4:[Washington Township Lincoln Day Dinner](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail20.com/t/y-l-ayhjrik-hhlljjcji-v/)****February 7:[Pulaski County Lincoln Day](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail20.com/t/y-l-ayhjrik-hhlljjcji-e/)****February 7:[Biscuits & Politics Legislative Breakfast](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail20.com/t/y-l-ayhjrik-hhlljjcji-s/)****February 20: _[Congress of Counties 2026](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail20.com/t/y-l-ayhjrik-hhlljjcji-g/)_****February 28: [Carroll County Lincoln Day Dinner](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail20.com/t/y-l-ayhjrik-hhlljjcji-w/)****April 9: [Wells County Lincoln Day Dinner](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail20.com/t/y-l-ayhjrik-hhlljjcji-yd/)****April 10: [Dearborn County Lincoln Day Dinner](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail20.com/t/y-l-ayhjrik-hhlljjcji-yh/)****April 27: [Adams County Republican Party Lincoln Day Gala](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail20.com/t/y-l-ayhjrik-hhlljjcji-yk/)****June 19: _[Indiana Republican State Convention 2026](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail20.com/t/y-l-ayhjrik-hhlljjcji-yu/)_** [Click Here to Learn more about Governor Braun's Administrative Orders, Policy Proposals, and Leadership Appointments](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail20.com/t/y-l-ayhjrik-hhlljjcji-jl/) clean_body: Dear Hoosier Republicans, No images? A Record Year for Hoosiers Dear Hoosier Republicans,I was thrilled to begin the week celebrating Indiana University bringing home the national title and capping a perfect 16-0 season! I am proud to report that when I played the IU Fight song to the RNC Midwest caucus this morning, it was met with a huge round of applause and congratulatory screams. There truly has never been a better time to be a Hoosier!Governor Mike Braun closed the year with a record of measurable results for Hoosiers, marking his first year in office with higher wages, historic growth, and a renewed focus on region-led economic development. 2025 established a clear standard for Republican leadership in Indiana, visible to families keeping more of what they earn, to communities seeing long-planned projects finally break ground, and to taxpayers seeing that an entrepreneurial state government can accomplish more with less.That is the record we are running on in 2026, and Republican leadership is staying focused on what works: disciplined spending, region-led growth, support for job creators, and policy that puts families, not bureaucracy, first.As always, thank you for being a part of our team, and please feel free to reach out if there's any way I can be of assistance.With winter storms moving in, I encourage all Hoosiers to take precautions, stay warm, and look out for one another.Yours in service, Lana Keesling, Indiana GOP Chairwoman Governor Braun Announces Launch of Crossroads Health Ventures, $21 Million+ Early-Stage Fund Governor Braun announced the launch of Crossroads Health Ventures, a new early-stage venture fund aimed at helping Indiana's life sciences startups start, scale, and succeed here at home. Backed by more than $21 million in public-private commitments, the fund will strengthen Indiana's global leadership in human, animal, and plant health while turning research breakthroughs into high-wage Hoosier jobs. "Indiana continues to lead by bringing together public and private partners to support innovation at every stage. Crossroads Health Ventures will help ensure the next generation of life sciences companies can start, scale, and succeed right here in Indiana."\- Governor Braun via a Gov. Braun Opts in to New Federal Tax Credit for School Choice Scholarships Governor Braun announced Indiana is opting into a new federal initiative that will allow Hoosiers to receive tax savings for investing in K-12 scholarships, expanding educational opportunity across the state. This move builds on Indiana's commitment to universal school choice and ensures more students can access a high-quality education, regardless of income or ZIP code."Parents are in charge of their children's education. As a state, we are prioritizing that through universal school choice and a state tax credit for donations made to scholarship-granting organizations, which helps make a high-quality education accessible and affordable for every Hoosier family. Under President Trump's leadership, we welcome this increased focus on school choice at the federal level and are ready to leverage this additional federal tax credit to expand opportunities for students and families across our state." \- Governor Braun via a Congress of Counties 2026 Indiana GOP is Hiring Interns for the Spring Semester 📱 News You Can Use Governor Mike Braun ReElement Technologies' pilot facility in Noblesville, a leader in recycling and refining critical minerals, saying, "Indiana's economy is growing, and the most critical industries are choosing the Hoosier State to innovate and grow."Lieutenant Governor Micah Beckwith extended his sympathies to the Honorable Steve Meyer and his wife, who were shot in their home, saying, "Judges serve our communities by delivering justice, and they must be able to do so without fear for their own safety. Susan and I will be praying for Judge Meyer and his wife, Kim, as they recover."Secretary Diego Morales with law enforcement from across the state during a training from the Securities Division, saying, "Strong partnerships between our office and law enforcement are critical to ensuring Hoosiers remain protected."Treasurer Daniel Elliott with Hoosiers at the Indiana March for Life, saying, every life is valuable, and I'm proud to support a movement that protects the most vulnerable and strengthens Hoosier families across our state.Attorney General Todd Rokita that Mercedes-Benz will send $12.7 million to Indiana to settle allegations the companies violated state laws prohibiting unfair or deceptive trade practices by marketing, selling, and leasing vehicles equipped with illegal and undisclosed emissions "defeat devices" designed to circumvent emissions standards. State Comptroller Elise Nieshalla Indiana University's football team for bringing home the National Championship for the first time in school history.Senator Todd Young legislation to boost American sports diplomacy as the U.S. kicks off a decade of hosting large worldwide sporting events, which will help increase the number of tourists coming to the United States to attend them. Senator Jim Banks the U.K. to halt a proposed Chinese diplomatic complex in London over national security risks, raising serious concerns about the Chinese government's planned "super-embassy" in London and the national security risks it poses to both the United States and the United Kingdom.Congressman Rudy Yakym Democrats' efforts to defund pregnancy resource centers. In a powerful personal testimony during a Ways and Means Committee markup, Yakym spoke in support of the Supporting Pregnant and Parenting Women and Families Act, a legislative effort to ensure these centers remain eligible for vital federal funding.Congressman Marlin Stutzman the Regulation A+ Improvement Act and the Streamlining Rural Housing Act , both advancing through the House Financial Services Committee, which cut red tape by expanding capital access for small and mid-sized businesses and accelerating affordable housing development in rural communities.Congressman Jim Baird the Kareem N. Dockery Medal of Honor Act to allow the President of the United States to award former Major Kareem Nicholas Dockery with the Medal of Honor for his heroism in Afghanistan in support of Operation Enduring Freedom. Dockery is an Indianapolis, IN native and one of only two U.S. officers to receive two Silver Stars for gallantry in the post-9/11 era.Congresswoman Victoria Spartz before the House Rules Committee on their amendments to restore Delphi retirees' pensions and bring long-overdue justice to blue-collar workers who were wronged by the government for political reasons.Congressman Jefferson Shreve the Securing Federal Devices from Chinese Applications Act to strengthen federal cybersecurity and block applications controlled by the Chinese Communist Party from U.S. government devices.Congressman Mark Messmer an A+ on the Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America scorecard.Congresswoman Erin Houchin healthcare CEOs, demanding answers to how PBM GPOs can generate $50 million in revenue per employee off the backs of American patients. Upcoming EventsJanuary 29: 4: 7: 7: 20: 28: 9: 10: 27: 19: PAID FOR BY THE INDIANA REPUBLICAN STATE COMMITTEE. NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Fight Back Against Hollywoodâ€™sAgenda with Iggy and Mr. Kirk
body:
Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love.

| | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friend in Faith,Please – for the sake of all our families – take it from me as someone who’s lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with “entertainment” that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace.But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue’s Clues_...
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zndks6i5t5l7su15nkv0orj1kcn9e50t5pg56m2o_rp22sh2s8i6eor4s9hm0pb6cph2bs)
---
| | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to “educate” YOU about your “old-fashioned” and “mean” ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. **[Today, I’m inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children’s television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zcj27leaohhe5gi6q1n0gbsloedi7p5p92n0bgfg_rp22sh2s8i6eor4s9hm0pb6cph2bs)** Introducing: _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.I’m making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at **Brave Books**.If you’ve seen me and **Brave Books** on _Fox News_ , you know we’ve already countered those awful “Drag Queen Story Hours” the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic “Story Hours” of our own.And now, THOUSANDS of children and parents can gather to pledge allegiance to our flag, read wholesome books, and pray together in their libraries.It’s encouraging to see we can win when we fight back! Now we’re working to have that same impact in television.
---
>> Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth.Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. >> Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart.>> Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Because we can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a **Founding Supporter**.
---
The great news is that we’ve already completed and released the first ten character-building episodes of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_! We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces.And I wish you could have experienced _the parents_ watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages.It was quite a moment for everyone – including folks just like you – who worked so hard to get us that far. But now **Brave Books** has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with.
---
_**#1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left.**_
---
You see, we’ve made the first five episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ available absolutely FREE. That’s the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging.But no one will see it if we can’t get the word out. And the Left will try to bury _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 – and with the recent launch, we need to raise the funds immediately.
---
_**#2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $250,000 for post production.**_
---
I know that’s a lot of money but it’s actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously, we won’t work through Hollywood.Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children.We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That’s why I’m asking you to please contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, $2,500 or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $250,000 for advertising and $250,000 for Season 2.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ziu885ejdtdueu2hraigeo82plpas3hc0ouij748_rp22sh2s8i6eor4s9hm0pb6cph2bs) ** As our special “Thank You” for becoming a **Founding Supporter** at the $50 level, we’ll send you all ten episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ FREE on DVD.This exclusive _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ DVD is only offered to **Founding Supporters**. It won’t be available for sale anywhere. So with **[**your gift of $50**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zg2h1sdkoea7i52m9aafos6g2b4dilau2vbe5vh0_rp22sh2s8i6eor4s9hm0pb6cph2bs)** , you’ll be part of a small select group of people who own our wholesome TV show on DVD. You’ll have it ready to watch with the children in your life. Or you can drop your DVD by your local school, church, mission, or even leave it in the waiting room at your doctor’s office. So many children have no way of hearing God’s message in their lives. Your random act of kindness may change a child’s life. **[So please – whether you can send $50, $5,000, $25,000, or anything higher or lower, please respond quickly and know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zl4pkuner499encq2qhr6au23tqk2q810tv7v228_rp22sh2s8i6eor4s9hm0pb6cph2bs)** There’s no time to waste. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America’s Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family – not filth.Thank you for being a part of history by becoming a **Founding Supporter** of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.
---
Sincerely,
---
| | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)Actor, Author, and Father
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z3u778i85lktle550me0ruhf69tcl2n9co9s6gn8_rp22sh2s8i6eor4s9hm0pb6cph2bs)
---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z18mnqg38bh71arsoeb7k3u75dr3hp14obborue8_rp22sh2s8i6eor4s9hm0pb6cph2bs)
---
**Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)** **Actor, Author, and Father**
---
|
---
| | P.S. The #1 thing you can do today to stop the Hollywood groomers who are tearing families apart – maybe even yours – is to support the very first children’s television show in _history_ made possible by contributions from grandparents and seniors like you. **[Please send in your Founding Supporter gift and help me reclaim America with the Biblical values our country was founded upon.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zg8psi8hc3nocaqg54g6e3g7b7lfhpkpglcqas7o_rp22sh2s8i6eor4s9hm0pb6cph2bs)** Thank you and God bless you and your family! -- Kirk
---
[ **DONATE **](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zat12qk2en1nrque7a02f405c0hf5srrjr59fak8_rp22sh2s8i6eor4s9hm0pb6cph2bs)
---
| | **Brave Books** 13618 Poplar Cir, Suite 302Conroe, TX 77304
---
| | Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.
---

---

body:
| | | | | [](https://6s79z9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001CKreUtV_oX9NFqU4yuIkjEymj2fKwe6xdk8ijAx5FCh6z50xgI12UxrXwpTp9L82o_6Dpiovsp6sMmfobA6X8SrNsEUfISk5MdDQ_fCe5Y0BlA0mP-OzB-F0GAh0nxWdbHIDLKa9bfdX8fhMydWlV8ZM7aKFta66x5IhL9_-3NZUg5joRCTPI-1Zvqn0yhrPwICilefcLo2TrygzPuNXFA==&c=nTHaQ0wH-sjyL7gzZoPpoXBBm-W93mI5LCjiW627-RCI4EkIbJQpig==&ch=1vRlKXTwKnEGjDYSpk_Q-qWq9EMBDIzA-Tm3jh_so_9LCxUCaZgEng==)

Peter,
Right now, the White House is in a full panic.
Just this week, Virginia and Maryland began efforts to redraw their maps and give Democrats additional seats in Congress. And a decision by New York's state Supreme Court paved the way for Democrats to eliminate the last remaining GOP seat in the state.
Now, Trump is begging the Supreme Court to overturn CA's redrawn map:
---
| [](https://6s79z9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001CKreUtV_oX9NFqU4yuIkjEymj2fKwe6xdk8ijAx5FCh6z50xgI12UxrXwpTp9L82o_6Dpiovsp6sMmfobA6X8SrNsEUfISk5MdDQ_fCe5Y0BlA0mP-OzB-F0GAh0nxWdbHIDLKa9bfdX8fhMydWlV8ZM7aKFta66x5IhL9_-3NZUg5joRCTPI-1Zvqn0yhrPqv9ZF556jVkkGvMMRavUHA==&c=nTHaQ0wH-sjyL7gzZoPpoXBBm-W93mI5LCjiW627-RCI4EkIbJQpig==&ch=1vRlKXTwKnEGjDYSpk_Q-qWq9EMBDIzA-Tm3jh_so_9LCxUCaZgEng==)
---
Trump is coming to the realization that Democrats aren't rolling over and letting him rig elections...and he's soiling his Depends.
MAGA needs to gerrymander 18 seats to take complete control of Congress for a decade plus. But after MD, VA, NY, and CA joined the fight, that task became difficult to pull off.
And with Colorado joining the fight, that task will be all but impossible.
As they say, "FAFO."
Colorado Draws the Line is spearheading the ballot initiative in Colorado that would give Democrats 3-4 additional seats in Congress.
Colorado will not stand by and let MAGA lock in one party rule for a decade plus. Our initiative will end the fight that Trump started but couldn't finish.
Trump and MAGA know that too. That's why they've launched a hail mary to try and block CA's map and why we expect them to throw everything they have at us to block our initiative. But if enough Democrats rally to our cause, we can make Trump's election rigging scheme blow up in his face:
[Please, will you rush a contribution of $25, $15, or whatever you can spare to to our ballot measure committee and help us get new maps on the ballot for Colorado? Our average donation is around $30. Many give more. Some give less. The amount doesn't matter; just donate what you can because it all adds up.](https://6s79z9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001CKreUtV_oX9NFqU4yuIkjEymj2fKwe6xdk8ijAx5FCh6z50xgI12UxrXwpTp9L82lIkKodZoUNqTmttAe6PwQL_Lc-uJCWHU--IHk6sqPZswIw0eJ2CzSxE97clyZXY1OFPDDtjJBeP36PCCQpG0v77Ypi34Oo-fCMzrEzAqc4iCY3ZOejz-HS6cpGnoosCCBj1-UzcM9sk0hihV5CtCR80JTupE4rEn&c=nTHaQ0wH-sjyL7gzZoPpoXBBm-W93mI5LCjiW627-RCI4EkIbJQpig==&ch=1vRlKXTwKnEGjDYSpk_Q-qWq9EMBDIzA-Tm3jh_so_9LCxUCaZgEng==)

name: State Senator Andrea Hunley
subject: District 46 Newsletter
body:
---
| | | | | | | [](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?%3D)
---
| | | | | [ ](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?%3D)| [Facebook](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?%3D)

---|---
| |
### District 46,
**We are just a few days away from wrapping up the first half of the 2026 Legislative Session. **
Our last day of committee for Senate bills will be on Monday, and this upcoming Thursday is our _third reading deadline_ for Senate Bills.

**But what does that mean?** After next week, our State Senate will be done hearing Senate Bills, and any bills that fail to pass the full Senate will be "dead bills."

What this also means is that after this upcoming week, we'll start hearing bills that have passed out of the House of Representatives.

This next week will be a critical few days for our state as legislation impacting every corner of Indiana will potentially jump a major hurdle in becoming the law of the land.

Please keep an eye on legislation making its way to the Senate floor this next week, and follow my social media for updates on bills that you should keep an eye on. **⬇️ Click to Watch my Reason For Voting No on a Bill Robbing Indianapolis of Authority Over its Own Zoning Ordinances ⬇️**
---
| [ ](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?%3D)
---
* * *
---
# **Celebrating the Work of Foster Success**
---
| | | |
---
| |
---
I was so glad to see Foster Success in the Statehouse this past week,

While they were here showcasing the incredible workthey do, Foster Success was also advocating for three key, commonsense policy changes.

**1\. A foster youth bill of rights
2\. Improved foster parent training
3\. Comprehensive medical record keepin**g

As someone who was in the foster care system as a child, the topic of foster care is near and dear to my heart.

Foster care isn't just a chapter in my story; it helped shape the path of my life.

The success stories that exist because of the work of Foster Success are proof that when young people are empowered, lives truly change.

These are the voices we need to listen to when considering policy changes, and I am so grateful to every person who made the time to advocate at the People's House.
---

* * *
---
# **This Week in Committee**
---
|
---
### This Past Week, I served on three committees where we heard the following bills:

[Tax and Fiscal](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?%3D "Tax and Fiscal ")
* [Senate Bill 8: Library Budgets](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?%3D "https://iga.in.gov/legislative/2026/bills/senate/8/details")
* [Senate Bill 142: Local Hospitality Boards](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?%3D "https://iga.in.gov/legislative/2026/bills/senate/142/details")
* [Senate Bill 161: Education Matters](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?%3D "https://iga.in.gov/legislative/2026/bills/senate/161/details")
* [Senate Bill 163: Various Property Tax Matters](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?%3D "https://iga.in.gov/legislative/2026/bills/senate/163/details")
* [Senate Bill 187: Regional Sewer Districts](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?%3D "https://iga.in.gov/legislative/2026/bills/senate/187/details")
* [Senate Bill 213: Income Tax Deduction for Theft Loss](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?%3D "https://iga.in.gov/legislative/2026/bills/senate/213/details")
* [Senate Bill 233: Powers and Duties of the Election Commission](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?%3D "https://iga.in.gov/legislative/2026/bills/senate/233/details")
* [Senate Bill 238: Property and Local Income Taxes](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?%3D "https://iga.in.gov/legislative/2026/bills/senate/238/details")
* [Senate Bill 242: Innkeeper's Tax](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?%3D "https://iga.in.gov/legislative/2026/bills/senate/242/details")
* [Senate Bill 243: Various Tax Matters](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?%3D "https://iga.in.gov/legislative/2026/bills/senate/243/details")
* [Senate Bill 259: Partnership Composite Returns](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?%3D "https://iga.in.gov/legislative/2026/bills/senate/259/details")
* [Senate Bill 264: Economic Development Tax Credits](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?%3D "https://iga.in.gov/legislative/2026/bills/senate/264/details")

Did you know one in four teenagers who menstruate cannot afford menstrual products?

Or that 44% of teens report stress and embarrassment due to a lack of access to period products?

It is far past time we address that. **Acknowledging that these are not luxury goods and treating menstrual products accordingly is how we start.

Indiana once again has the chance this legislative session to join the majority of states that treat menstrual products as a necessity. **

### **It is time. **
---

All of these bills represent real conversations I have had with constituents, and I am so honored to advocate for these issues and opportunities this session. ** **⬇️ Read more about my bills by clicking below ⬇️**

# **⚠️ _Severe Weather Alert:_ Warming Centers and Emergency Shelter Options⚠️**
---
**Friends,

We are expecting some serious weather this weekend, with low temperatures and heavy snowfall. **

If you are able, stay inside this weekend as travel could be dangerous.

If you need to travel, please keep an extra flashlight, food and water in your vehicle in case of an emergency.

**If you or someone you know is in need of shelter, contact the Mayor's Action Center between 8 a.m. and 5 p.m. **

**Outside of those hours, dial 211 for assistance. **

### Low-Income Home Energy Assistance Program
The Energy Assistance Program's (EAP) application is now live until April 20, 2026. You can apply [online ](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?%3D "https://urldefense.com/v3/__https:/www.in.gov/ihcda/homeowners-and-renters/low-income-home-energy-assistance-program-liheap/__;!!FlTQaCg!i0IlNmwztWy24u3OfjflEyvBopYLxqtX54ZBOGpkRIGHfA-g0F4tvn2RkRjwIClxVywwPaZ8QxM8BqUkhHdM0-IFVw$"), by mail or in person. To apply in person or request a paper application form, applicants must contact their local service provider (LSP). For more information on which LSP serves an area, be sure to check the map available on Indiana's [LIHEAP site](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?%3D "https://urldefense.com/v3/__https:/www.in.gov/ihcda/homeowners-and-renters/low-income-home-energy-assistance-program-liheap/__;!!FlTQaCg!i0IlNmwztWy24u3OfjflEyvBopYLxqtX54ZBOGpkRIGHfA-g0F4tvn2RkRjwIClxVywwPaZ8QxM8BqUkhHdM0-IFVw$").

In addition to this program, Indiana's utilities have financial assistance programs available, as well as other tools that can help customers manage their bills. You can find _[AES's program here](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?%3D "https://urldefense.com/v3/__https://www.aesindiana.com/payment-assistance__;!!FlTQaCg!jwpfitqHKx4bP-5cnhYvoAX1m8Q0kv3P901-pv7dMHXQdpRgas_bRhhF66AOaSuHe8tMuc2p6moGi_XjArAanOEmX3Q$") [.](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?%3D "https://urldefense.com/v3/__https:/www.nipsco.com/bills-and-payments/financial-support__;!!FlTQaCg!i0IlNmwztWy24u3OfjflEyvBopYLxqtX54ZBOGpkRIGHfA-g0F4tvn2RkRjwIClxVywwPaZ8QxM8BqUkhHfV2_ol6Q$")_

As a reminder, the winter moratorium runs from December 1 through March 15 and prevents disconnection of residential energy utility service to any customer who is eligible for and has applied for the Energy Assistance Program. Moratorium protection applies once a household submits an application and allows the Local Service Provider time to determine eligibility.

Utility bills continue to rise, and what should be an essential service has become an overwhelming burden for many families. If you're eligible, please take advantage of the available resources so you don't have to choose between keeping food on the table and keeping the lights on.

body:
| | | | | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001IGwwwobzzKVBAMy5QwjI_1CDixsJrMgzGiSYgUG0MN81eWskfUq9CHlOp-GyFk5ra-GGtW1lQsgstOptuxJP2-YCpQdj7fslF0196RSaTYLRHxa3cEADysGZpNyAgETnxKdkkqXd_El5Gn61XMySnYPa-V4JLc7TRfNTGG4MU2DIhrqhiJUvwGC6wf7t_QWy6XDvlqLDcksqxeV8FZivAvGEGLWfDNK88jGT7uk4qtY=&c=N8Y1pYXuGDZ92g6JBqqK7QgL_utXb3Bgmn-P8kqdpy_5CIpGaASfgw==&ch=8WSzBXP4bNBNNwc6EIt1daMXJUIzyH-1BOvblg75EjR_9rRIAZP9Rw==)
---
| Peter,,
Right now, MAGA is having a meltdown over the upcoming April Wisconsin Supreme Court race. This is the first major election for Democrats of the '26 election cycle and a must-win for MAGA.
MAGA's handpicked judge, Maria Lazar, supports an extreme abortion ban and has connections to election deniers. And with that record, it's no surprise her campaign is off to a horrible start.
Liberal judge Chris Taylor just outraised Lazar 10 to 1--Oof.
After last year's win, Democrats now hold a 4-3 majority on the WI court. With a seat up for grabs again this year, we now have a chance to expand our majority to 5-2.
More importantly, a win here would lock down the WI Supreme Court for Democrats until at least 2030, securing a key swing state court for the rest of Trump's presidency.
That's why MAGA is freaking out:
---
| [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001IGwwwobzzKVBAMy5QwjI_1CDixsJrMgzGiSYgUG0MN81eWskfUq9CHlOp-GyFk5ra-GGtW1lQsgstOptuxJP2-YCpQdj7fslF0196RSaTYLRHxa3cEADysGZpNyAgETnxKdkkqXd_El5Gn61XMySnYPa-V4JLc7TRfNTGG4MU2DIhrqhiJUvwGC6wf7t_QWy6XDvlqLDcksqxeV8FZivAhijCHeHOT_n3gAuuR5EFqM=&c=N8Y1pYXuGDZ92g6JBqqK7QgL_utXb3Bgmn-P8kqdpy_5CIpGaASfgw==&ch=8WSzBXP4bNBNNwc6EIt1daMXJUIzyH-1BOvblg75EjR_9rRIAZP9Rw==)
---
Our team has been around politics long enough to know what a statement like this from a conservative radio host actually means:
MAGA is sending an S.O.S. to MAGA billionaires and dark money groups to help save Lazar's campaign.
While their desperation is amusing, MAGA billionaires and dark money groups can dump millions of money into a race in a blink of an eye. It's no joke. And it is definitely going to happen.
That's why Defend Our Courts is jumping in this race to help WI Dems defeat Lazar.
Last year, we helped lead the defense of Pennsylvania's Supreme Court and lockdown a dem majority on that court until 2029. Now, we are taking our winning formula national and Wisconsin is our first major test.

Sounds extreme? It’s not.
Under Obama’s Dodd-Frank Act, banks have the legal right to **freeze your accounts and use your savings to bail themselves out**.

And now, **63 U.S. banks are teetering on the edge** — buried under $517 billion in unrealized losses.
This isn’t a warning.
It’s your last chance.

📉 FDIC is in crisis mode behind closed doors.
When the next collapse hits, your dollars could be locked down... or wiped out.

But smart Americans are already getting ahead of it.

The truth about U.S. banks and your cash| | | | | | | | | Trump’s Bold Stand Against Zelenskyy: The World Is Watching Shocking Statement: What It Means for Global Peace Sponsored Content | By AD ---|--- | | Do You Bank With These Banks? Because if you do... They could legally steal your money — and there’s nothing you could do to stop it. | Sounds extreme? It’s not. Under Obama’s Dodd-Frank Act, banks have the legal right to freeze your accounts and use your savings to bail themselves out. And now, 63 U.S. banks are teetering on the edge — buried under $517 billion in unrealized losses. This isn’t a warning. It’s your last chance. 📉 FDIC is in crisis mode behind closed doors. When the next collapse hits, your dollars could be locked down... or wiped out. But smart Americans are already getting ahead of it. They’re quietly moving their savings out of the system — and into real assets that can’t be printed, seized, or frozen. Gold. Silver. Hard stores of value — not paper promises. Priority Gold is giving away a that reveals exactly how to do it — fast, legally. | Resolution adopted at MRSC Meeting 11/20/2025 Resolution in Support of Parental Rights WHEREAS: parental and legal guardian rights are foundational to the well-being and protection of Massachusetts children, ensuring that parents and legal guardians serve as their children's primary caregivers, protectors, and advocates; WHEREAS: current Massachusetts law permits children as young as 13 to exclude their parents/legal guardians from medical consultations and restrict access to their own medical records, thereby limiting parental/guardian ability to support and guide their minor children in critical health decisions; WHEREAS: a growing body of legislation risks diminishing the essential involvement of parents/legal guardians in education, health, and welfare decisions affecting their minor children, creating unintended vulnerabilities for children; and WHEREAS: empowering parents/legal guardians ensures children are best protected from exploitation and coercion and allows families to maintain appropriate oversight consistent with long-standing social and constitutional principles. Therefore, Be It RESOLVED: that the Massachusetts Republican Party (MassGOP) unequivocally supports the fundamental rights of parents/legal guardians to direct the upbringing, education, and healthcare of their minor children; BE IT FURTHER RESOLVED: that the MassGOP shall: • Advocate for and sponsor laws requiring parental /legal guardian notification and/or consent before any non-emergency medical treatment, counseling, or educational decisions are made for minors, except in strict circumstances where imminent harm or abuse is involved; • Support strengthening transparency requirements so that parents and legal guardians are fully informed of and have access to pertinent information regarding their children's care, education, and well-being; • Promote initiatives that reinforce the guiding and protective role of parents and legal guardians as essential for the healthy development and security of children; • Oppose legislation or policies that erode parental and legal guardian involvement or consent in the education and healthcare decisions of minor children; and • Urge all elected officials to vote with these principles in all relevant legislative and policy matters concerning minors and their families. RESOLVED FURTHER: that copies of this resolution shall be distributed to Republican lawmakers, the Governor, leadership in both legislative chambers, and relevant committees to advise of the MassGOP's commitment to the principle that children are best protected when their parents/guardians are empowered and involved. Current Massachusetts Laws: • Treatment for substance use disorder. A child 12 or older may consent to treatment for substance use disorder (other than methadone maintenance therapy). See G.L. c.112, §12E; 110 CMR 11.08(1). • Inpatient mental health treatment. Youths 16 or older may commit themselves to a mental health facility. See G.L. c. 123, §10; 104 CMR 27.06(1); 110 CMR 11.16(2). • Diseases dangerous to the public health and sexually transmitted diseases. Children who believe they have contracted a dangerous, contagious disease, may consent to their own treatment. See G.L. c. 112, §12F; 110 CMR 11.09; 110 CMR 11.10. • Pregnant teens. A minor who is pregnant or believes she is pregnant may consent to her own medical and dental treatment, except abortion which can be obtained with judicial approval. See G.L. c. 112, §12F; 110 CMR 11.06. This provision is not limited to pregnancy related treatment but covers all medical and dental treatment during pregnancy. • Parenting teens. Minor parents may consent to their own medical and dental treatment. See G.L. c. 112, §12F. Minor parents may also consent to medical and dental treatment for their children. See G.L. c. 112, §12F. • Family planning services. A minor may consent to family planning services. See G.L. c. 111, §24E; 110 CMR 11.05(3). Under each of these circumstances, the minor's parent or guardian is not treated as the minor's authorized representative. Accordingly, the parent or guardian cannot authorize the disclosure of information related to the service on the minor's behalf. See 45 C.F.R. §164.502(g) (3)(i). Instead, the provider must obtain the minor's consent to disclose information to a third party. Respectfully submitted by State Committeewomen Kayla Churchill & Kathy Lynch, & State Rep. John Gaskey

| Tip of the Month Endorsements: State, Town & City Committee members are allowed to endorse Republican candidates who have primary challengers. The Party Chair & Executive Committee are prohibited from endorsing candidates except as described in Bylaw Section 7. See the following sections from MRSC Bylaws: Section 2. Political Activity of Members. No Regular Member of the State Committee, nor a Regular or Associate member of a ward or town committee, shall in any way serve the interests of any political party or sponsor or endorse any candidate of a political party other than the Republican Party in connection with any partisan election or primary in which there is a Republican candidate. Failure of a Regular Member of the State Committee or of a Regular or Associate member of a ward or town committee to comply with the foregoing standard shall subject such person to such sanctions as may be imposed by the Committee involved, which may include a request for the resignation of that Regular or Associate Member or a vote of censure. Notwithstanding the foregoing, nothing shall preclude a Regular Member of the State Committee, or a Regular or Associate Member of a ward or town committee, to support an unenrolled candidate if there is no declared Republican candidate for any partisan election or primary. Furthermore, notwithstanding the foregoing, nothing shall preclude a Regular Member of the State Committee, or a Regular or Associate Member of a ward or town committee, from supporting any candidate in a nonpartisan municipal election. Complaints by a Regular member under this section shall be referred to the Executive Committee which promptly shall invite the involved members to attend and shall issue a recommendation with an explanation to the full state committee. Section 7. Republican Primaries. Unless approved by two-thirds (2/3) majority vote of the entire Executive Committee, neither the State Chair nor any person employed by the State Committee, shall assist, aid or publicly endorse any candidate in favor of another candidate in either a contested Republican primary or in any contested election for office within the State Committee. Violation of this section shall constitute grounds for removal of the State Chair or employee. Providing a primary candidate has received the approval of the Executive Committee as set forth in the first sentence of this section, nothing in this section shall prohibit such primary candidate from receiving campaign funds, provided that such funds are approved and disbursed pursuant to all other provisions of these by-laws. Nothing in this section shall prohibit any other Regular Member of the State Committee from endorsing a candidate in a Republican primary or State Committee election.

clean_body: and hold the seats we have! | | | | | | | == | MassGOP Public Relations Committee | Newsletter for Republican City & Town Committee Members & Friends | Hello Republican Friends, Happy New Year! We have a busy election year ahead of us so let's work together with purpose and strength to defeat the leftist incumbents and hold the seats we have! In Unity, Leanne Harris Chair, MassGOP Public Relations Committee State Committeewoman, Middlesex & Norfolk District X @LeanneHarrisMA mailto:leannejharris@gmail.com | State of the Commonwealth Response Representative Ken Sweezey from the 6th Plymouth District will deliver the Republican response to the State of the Commonwealth on Thursday 01/22/2026 Tune in to the MassGOP Facebook page at 8 pm to watch live | State Committee Caucus Update Welcome new State Committeeman Rich Berrena, Hampden & Hampshire (caucus results to be ratified at the next MRSC meeting) | | | Action: Letters We asked you to write Letters to the Editor & Opinion Pieces and you did not disappoint! Kerry White, Chair of Milton RTC shares one of her published opinion letters. Thank you, Kerry! MassGOP would like more LTEs and Opinion letters written by Republicans throughout the state- from local media to larger media outlets- to get our message to the folks without being filtered through a lens of liberal bias Contact me directly if you need any assistance or to flag a submission for MassGOP. mailto:leannejharris@gmail.com | | | Events: Opening Night Screening of Melania | == | | == | Resolution adopted at MRSC Meeting 11/20/2025 Resolution in Support of Parental Rights WHEREAS: parental and legal guardian rights are foundational to the well-being and protection of Massachusetts children, ensuring that parents and legal guardians serve as their children's primary caregivers, protectors, and advocates; WHEREAS: current Massachusetts law permits children as young as 13 to exclude their parents/legal guardians from medical consultations and restrict access to their own medical records, thereby limiting parental/guardian ability to support and guide their minor children in critical health decisions; WHEREAS: a growing body of legislation risks diminishing the essential involvement of parents/legal guardians in education, health, and welfare decisions affecting their minor children, creating unintended vulnerabilities for children; and WHEREAS: empowering parents/legal guardians ensures children are best protected from exploitation and coercion and allows families to maintain appropriate oversight consistent with long-standing social and constitutional principles. Therefore, Be It RESOLVED: that the Massachusetts Republican Party (MassGOP) unequivocally supports the fundamental rights of parents/legal guardians to direct the upbringing, education, and healthcare of their minor children; BE IT FURTHER RESOLVED: that the MassGOP shall: • Advocate for and sponsor laws requiring parental /legal guardian notification and/or consent before any non-emergency medical treatment, counseling, or educational decisions are made for minors, except in strict circumstances where imminent harm or abuse is involved; • Support strengthening transparency requirements so that parents and legal guardians are fully informed of and have access to pertinent information regarding their children's care, education, and well-being; • Promote initiatives that reinforce the guiding and protective role of parents and legal guardians as essential for the healthy development and security of children; • Oppose legislation or policies that erode parental and legal guardian involvement or consent in the education and healthcare decisions of minor children; and • Urge all elected officials to vote with these principles in all relevant legislative and policy matters concerning minors and their families. RESOLVED FURTHER: that copies of this resolution shall be distributed to Republican lawmakers, the Governor, leadership in both legislative chambers, and relevant committees to advise of the MassGOP's commitment to the principle that children are best protected when their parents/guardians are empowered and involved. Current Massachusetts Laws: • Treatment for substance use disorder. A child 12 or older may consent to treatment for substance use disorder (other than methadone maintenance therapy). See G.L. c.112, §12E; 110 CMR 11.08(1). • Inpatient mental health treatment. Youths 16 or older may commit themselves to a mental health facility. See G.L. c. 123, §10; 104 CMR 27.06(1); 110 CMR 11.16(2). • Diseases dangerous to the public health and sexually transmitted diseases. Children who believe they have contracted a dangerous, contagious disease, may consent to their own treatment. See G.L. c. 112, §12F; 110 CMR 11.09; 110 CMR 11.10. • Pregnant teens. A minor who is pregnant or believes she is pregnant may consent to her own medical and dental treatment, except abortion which can be obtained with judicial approval. See G.L. c. 112, §12F; 110 CMR 11.06. This provision is not limited to pregnancy related treatment but covers all medical and dental treatment during pregnancy. • Parenting teens. Minor parents may consent to their own medical and dental treatment. See G.L. c. 112, §12F. Minor parents may also consent to medical and dental treatment for their children. See G.L. c. 112, §12F. • Family planning services. A minor may consent to family planning services. See G.L. c. 111, §24E; 110 CMR 11.05(3). Under each of these circumstances, the minor's parent or guardian is not treated as the minor's authorized representative. Accordingly, the parent or guardian cannot authorize the disclosure of information related to the service on the minor's behalf. See 45 C.F.R. §164.502(g) (3)(i). Instead, the provider must obtain the minor's consent to disclose information to a third party. Respectfully submitted by State Committeewomen Kayla Churchill & Kathy Lynch, & State Rep. John Gaskey | Tip of the Month Endorsements: State, Town & City Committee members are allowed to endorse Republican candidates who have primary challengers. The Party Chair & Executive Committee are prohibited from endorsing candidates except as described in Bylaw Section 7. See the following sections from MRSC Bylaws: Section 2. Political Activity of Members. No Regular Member of the State Committee, nor a Regular or Associate member of a ward or town committee, shall in any way serve the interests of any political party or sponsor or endorse any candidate of a political party other than the Republican Party in connection with any partisan election or primary in which there is a Republican candidate. Failure of a Regular Member of the State Committee or of a Regular or Associate member of a ward or town committee to comply with the foregoing standard shall subject such person to such sanctions as may be imposed by the Committee involved, which may include a request for the resignation of that Regular or Associate Member or a vote of censure. Notwithstanding the foregoing, nothing shall preclude a Regular Member of the State Committee, or a Regular or Associate Member of a ward or town committee, to support an unenrolled candidate if there is no declared Republican candidate for any partisan election or primary. Furthermore, notwithstanding the foregoing, nothing shall preclude a Regular Member of the State Committee, or a Regular or Associate Member of a ward or town committee, from supporting any candidate in a nonpartisan municipal election. Complaints by a Regular member under this section shall be referred to the Executive Committee which promptly shall invite the involved members to attend and shall issue a recommendation with an explanation to the full state committee. Section 7. Republican Primaries. Unless approved by two-thirds (2/3) majority vote of the entire Executive Committee, neither the State Chair nor any person employed by the State Committee, shall assist, aid or publicly endorse any candidate in favor of another candidate in either a contested Republican primary or in any contested election for office within the State Committee. Violation of this section shall constitute grounds for removal of the State Chair or employee. Providing a primary candidate has received the approval of the Executive Committee as set forth in the first sentence of this section, nothing in this section shall prohibit such primary candidate from receiving campaign funds, provided that such funds are approved and disbursed pursuant to all other provisions of these by-laws. Nothing in this section shall prohibit any other Regular Member of the State Committee from endorsing a candidate in a Republican primary or State Committee election. | == | Candidate Corner | | | | | | | | == | | | | | | == | | | | | | == | | | == | | | Delegate Caucus Events Find & share local Republican Committee Caucus Events on the MassGOP website under the 2026 Convention menu. | | == | Convention 2026 Delegate Caucus elections will be complete by the end of February. All Republican Committee Members are encouraged to nominate themselves to be a delegate and attend the Convention. Guest tickets will be available for those who wish to attend as non-delegates. This will be an energetic & exciting event! For vendor information, contact State Committeeman Christopher Ryan: geolopes@comcast.net Convention information will be shared with State Committee members as it becomes available; the State Committee members are responsible for disseminating that information to local committees within their districts. (some information may be sent out directly to local committee Chairs & members) | | | == Highlights: Social Media Why follow MassGOP on TikTok, YouTube, X, Instagram, & Facebook? MassGOP Social Media is a fast & easy way to find out the latest political news & events in MA. When you Like & Share MassGOP posts you help us grow our outreach; the more people who follow and see our posts, the more we overcome the negative spin & liberal bias of most media here in MA. | == == == == == | | | MassGOP's digital show has new interviews with a variety of topics: Subscribe now so you don't miss an episode! | | == | MassGOP State Committee Meeting The next MassGOP State Committee Meeting is scheduled for January 31, 2026. These meetings are open to the public. Ask your State Committee members for more details. A list of Committee members is available on the MassGOP website here: == == == == == == | MassGOP | == | | | | | | Massachusetts Republican Party | 85 Merrimac Street, Suite 505 | Boston, MA 02114 US | | | | | | | | |

body:

_**A Special Message from our Sponsor**_ _Please note that views expressed in this message do not necessarily reflect those of_ _Parler_ _and do not constitute an endorsement or recommendation by_ _Parler_ _._

| Folks... it's time to get serious | **INSIDER ALERT:** [](https://click.parlermailer.com/?) _**(WARNING: This offer is only while supplies last. Once we sell out, this offer closes)**_ [](https://click.parlermailer.com/?) **YES! You get a FREE 2-Month Survival Food Kit with this Exclusive BOGO Deal!** This RED HOT deal is vanishing by the minute. ACT FAST and grab yours now before it's gone: [**ACT FAST and grab yours now before it's gone**](https://click.parlermailer.com/?) Everything ships tomorrow. No waiting for backorders. You can lock in this entire package for just $77 down. [](https://click.parlermailer.com/?) If you've been watching the headlines... You already know the threat of food shortages, blackouts and supply chain failures is more real than ever. That's why thousands have already claimed their [**2 Months of FREE Survival Food**](https://click.parlermailer.com/?) with this Exclusive Limited-Time deal! These food kits are flying off the shelves, selling out time and time again. People are waking up to the truth: you can't count on the system anymore. Here's what happened... We gave our warehouse manager, Matt, one mission: **produce as many kits as humanly possible.** And wow... did he ever deliver. The result? **A tidal wave of inventory just crashed into our warehouse - more kits than we have space for.** Now we're on the hook for major storage costs... and we need your help. **This is your chance to take advantage of our mistake.** We're slashing prices and practically *giving away* these premium survival food kits - just to move them fast. When you claim yours today, you're not only securing peace of mind for your family... **you're helping an American-owned company stay afloat through a supply chain nightmare.** And yes - **you'll get 2-Months of Survival Food for FREE** as our thank you. **The Biggest BOGO Deal We've Ever Done!** **YES! Order Today And Get 2 Months of Survival Food Worth $559.90**
**YOU GET IT FOR FREE!** That's right - the biggest "BOGO" deal we've ever done, with 2 months worth of FREE delicious food, designed to last for 25 years! And you'll snag our most popular food kit, in the process:
* Delicious & designed to last for 25 years
* **1,088 total servings**
* $0.64 Per Serving - holy smokes!
* **Secret gift for seniors & military (see if you qualify at checkout)**
* 2 FREE months of survival food - $559.90 value, on us
* **Only $77 down, ships tomorrow!**
* _And you also get a NEW affordable payment plan with no interest - take 9 MONTHS to pay!_

[**ACT FAST and grab yours now before it's gone**](https://click.parlermailer.com/?) [](https://click.parlermailer.com/?) **Get 5 Months of Food, Security & Peace of Mind, All In One Kit** This is more than just food. It's **freedom in a box.** These 4Patriots Survival Food Kits are loaded with hearty, satisfying meals that are built to last 25 years. That's right - **no junk fillers, no sketchy ingredients** - just real food, crafted for real emergencies. Hand-packed in a small American facility by people who actually care, these meals are designed to keep you nourished, calm, and strong when everything else falls apart. And thanks to the recent upgrades, **these kits contain more food than ever.** It's a massive value - and right now, it's the lowest price you'll ever see. **Don't wait for a crisis to wish you had prepared.** Right now, this overstock deal gives you the chance to save big, feed your family in an emergency, and protect what matters most. But this inventory won't last long. [**ACT FAST and grab yours now before it's gone**](https://click.parlermailer.com/?) [](https://click.parlermailer.com/?) **Stay Safe. Stay Prepared.**

Frank Bates
Patriot Headquarters [](https://click.parlermailer.com/?) P.S. Thanks to your support, we're able to provide support to important charities that help American veterans and their families. Charities like Fisher House, A Soldier's Child Foundation, Team Rubicon and Operation Homefront. [](https://click.parlermailer.com/?) **Real People. Real Emergencies. Real Gratitude.** [](https://click.parlermailer.com/?) **_Rory H._**_
"I was surprised to find that the densely packed packages were easy to prepare and were tasty as well. I definitely recommend having survival food on hand for the times when 'life' happens while we are planning other things."_ _**Billy H.**
"Received my food kit, and I was able to make the potato soup on my cookstove. Just needed boiling water. Gave it a good stir and let it simmer. When I opened up the pot, it smelled so good. You can see the chunks of potatoes and carrots in each bite you take. It's a good soup."_ _**Kevin S.**
"Perfect starter kit for any scenario. Put one in your car, work bag, in your house or RV. If you want to start preparing safe food, this is where to start."_ _**Carol B.**
"I have been iced in this weekend. I thought I would try my potato soup. To my utter delight, IT WAS DELICIOUS. Thank you for such a wonderful product and the peace of mind it brings."_ _**Ken K.**
"I am not a full-blown survivalist. I am not an idiot, either. I have been through enough in my life and have seen friends who have been through an emergency situation. Save up if you have to, but get at least a month's supply. It tastes good. Although if it's a dire of an emergency, you will be happy to eat anything. IF you have something to eat for your family. We made some of this product, and had family and friends over for them to taste. They all agreed they didn't think anything would be this good, and they will be ordering. Just do something. You can't miss out on this deal."_ _**Justin A.**
"My wife and I tried the food and we were both surprised about how good it tasted and how satisfied it made us feel afterwards. It feels good knowing that I can provide for my family if a crisis arose and I intend to get more in the future. Also the shipping and customer service has been top notch. This is probably the cheapest survival food I have found, and the company is great."_ _**Gary M.**
"I actually had lost my job and was homeless for a while. I dug into my food supply, and I cannot fully describe how delicious and easy to prepare everything is. I felt like I was eating like a king. I am going to stock up again as soon as I settle into my new job. Everyone should participate with this company. You will not be disappointed."_ _**John H.**
"We're in Florida and have made many preparations for the aftermath of a possible hurricane. While we are thankful that Florida has not been hit in several years, it gives us great peace of mind to know we have our 4Patriots kit stashed away, knowing it's not a case of "if" but "when"."_ [**ACT FAST and grab yours now before it's gone**](https://click.parlermailer.com/?) [](https://click.parlermailer.com/?)

name: Humanoid Robot Demo, Jacob Davis | FIU
subject: Caught on Camera: Humanoid Robot Demo Leaves Analysts Speechless ∕ Saturday, January 24, 2026

A Humanoid Robot You Have to See to Believe. | | Lifе and death Son of Mykhailo Sulyma, Ivan came from a petty noble (szlachta) family. He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw
---
Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18]

“This is the ChatGPT moment for robotics.”
What followed stunned even seasoned analysts.A humanoid robot—powered by advanced AI—demonstrated real-world tasks with shocking precision.

The footage? Real. Eye-opening. Rapidly evolving.

**Behind this leap:** a little-known $7 company helping build the systems powering this movement.

And here is a recently released a special briefing on a company they believe deserves a closer look in this fast-moving sector.

This isn’t sci-fi. It’s a milestone in the evolution of robotics.

name: The Flyover
subject: Winter Storm, GOP Midterm Convention, and the Rescue of Portable
body:

## Winter Storm Slams U.S.
A massive, slow-moving winter storm spread across the U.S. on Friday, set to slam [at least 40 states](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGuGyEQRb-G7caCAXvlgiLNdi9tytUsDF4idrFgYst_H_HyCelGmquje8-vr_WLcsnn4ycd7CXV9eR3LyzCbX3nU7h1qe141OeRo3A7Qj1fK2q8gTaAbo2Uy2d1U_SJGdlO7M18u-MVZ-em3VskuqdNz-mujY644RaJUgxXSzciO2U_aNqgM0ZfHV4Cb7PVLthZR3tPrJzmmKW2y--aT9k5lU99cbuEekzF7yLPruwPhYvC5fw8a5fxUrgMsMJFm3FbhcufDmPfyDG18gFjtYZU8mOXDoHOwIUj0M4UoSbY81ifA_xTAd8uoLOAVNgKdYHRBJyGLiQ8yFPz8fnOpeR-m5XTj4Ny-e4q_yX45fFvAAAA__8WIZCF) from Arizona to Maine with snow, sleet, freezing rain, and dangerous Arctic cold. Forecasters warned ice damage could be severe, with about 177 million people under snow or ice alerts and more than 200 million under cold advisories. Wind chills near minus 40 degrees in the Upper Midwest prompted school closures. [Here are weather maps](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0L1uwyAUBeCnwRsWXLCJB4Yu3tK1o0XgOqHlxwIUlLevnD5Ctytd6Rx95-u6XY0PPt0_TUTd9rwl7DVga1i27lPDUlsu8Z6P6F3DEm1Ozw0YzJRxCnJzxofXJgend0RAMaDmal5gAiXl8NAwzUYsyySN4ri45SKNVRduODLGLk4MXp9pjIPknE0SRos3JZi0QjEnlh2JZOh8y2X8zj61B-7hlZ9YRpvjEPSjtaMS8UFgJbD23kd7q6fi_BNYz5PAGs1R6Z-Ivkm0ptypzcHRjviDyRFYh6Ld0X0Ivs6KSHaPxod3UfvXOk8NvwEAAP__y2J6Ww) tracking the storm. More than [2,000 flights scheduled for Saturday](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkDEPnSAURn8Nbhi4oOjA0KRxe12apqNBufpui2CQp3n_vvF16d75JCff-X4-xoejQHH95ja0ZUljxOsIWArm8aJYMB8l5W1N-0a-YN7mFM8RBLRcSA569I7Ce9SVtwsioKrQStP20IDRunpa1xltACbtOgmN613nXTP1GkEgeN1VZG-bkKClFI2GesbJKKFnZYRX_YJMC_RUUq5_JYrliUt4pxNzPaetCvZZyn4w9YXBwGBw03wX1Gu6MYPhx3cGQ6AT-Wv3ruDBYPgbxj9l_F_GS3bzb4or9y6umNPr4DQjP2K6br8ayDP1VUKv214aVWXr94tCoKM1TIt1cxQ-u8p_nXla-BMAAP__OjaJZg) have been canceled. The potentially historic storm was expected to hit the majority of air travel hubs over the weekend — including Dallas, St. Louis, Nashville, Charlotte, Atlanta, Washington, DC, and New York— before tapering off Monday afternoon. Airlines issued travel waivers as cancellations mounted, and officials urged residents to stock up, avoid driving and prepare for outages as ice-laden trees and power lines could fail for days.
## House GOP Ekes Out War Powers Win
The House on Thursday [barely rejected a war powers resolution](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkMvK2zAUhJ9G3inoFrteaJFSvGraQildGlk6Sk7RxUiKRfr0xX2FfzcwMMz3_b6vd4MB0-ObiaCbz2uCXgO0BmXtmBqU2nKJj7xHdA1KtDkdq2BipIxToVZnMLxXNTjtAQTIATSfxllcxaTU8NRyhMmYmV3tJzMBtyDBj0zxWXk5m-s2oD7XGBeKc3ZV4mJhmyRTVk7MydkDUQwctlwufzKm9gQf3vmAcrE5DkE_W9srkTciFiKW3vsl1nR2RCyQ6KsSsZxQRCx7DtjQnrHA_toCWpMqTaaU3MObekiOZu_pho62TANGbLSVV9xpTvSABH9fEAwRiyn0duO_vv7YvhO5ZIuOyC-fT5HQ608o-1C02zuGgHWciGKPaDD8v9w-5PnQ4l8AAAD__2iclM4) to block President Donald Trump from launching military action in Venezuela without Congress. The measure originally seemed to end in a 215-214 win for Democrats, but Republicans kept voting open more than 20 minutes so GOP Rep. Wesley Hunt, absent while campaigning for a Texas Senate bid, could return and cast the tying vote. That defeated the measure and [sparked procedural protests](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkDuunDAARVdjOo_841e4SEP30oyilMjgCzgyNrINiKw-mmzh1Ve6Ouf8_hq_jPMurD_NDl2WOAbc2aMUpPF2oSDlEtO-xmN3tiDtcwzXKJhoKONUqNEa559RVVYvgICsoHnb9KIWrVLVprsGbOrqRdpJAorPXDHZtaZvO6BTtnL688a4UJyzWonXjKmVTM2yZVb2C4hisK7E9PoTXSgbFv_EC-k1x73yeivlyET-IGIgYjDT_DF4rfEzEzH8ehMx3C7hXWJ6iBi2eGbQhOOcvJtNyHQyCf6hFgtMoRcC_p7wht4m0SPeSJkm5OjP4mKgXPSq6XtVV0nb43beu9y0RLF1N87_hyrfKnlp8S8AAP__rseKZQ) from House Democrats. Only GOP Reps. Don Bacon and Thomas Massie joined Democrats in voting for the measure.
## Map: What Each State Spends on Alcohol
Alaska spent the [most money per capita on alcohol](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0DFuhDAQheHTQGdkbC-whYs0dJs2JRrwABMZ27JnQXv7aJMjpP_0nvR_PaYHkKewfcKBltc4BbyKR2bM00WBMReO-dhiOsgx5mOJ4ZyUVJ2QrVBmckD-NZna2RVRoa7Rtn13VzfVG1Pvdoa5b4fBdLqdh9sATg2gTacHA_O6dqYm-16TrTJtK29GNQvOvZZm0b10-r5iZSQ64pib70iBd1z9K56YmyUetbc7cyqV_qjUWKnxuq7mpPIEv0AiBk-F37BS4wEpoRPgl7hHL0rC4ChsImEWf1jML_EURRQGxkqNdbYuXeQ9la6vjNwOIP97y_9qdVr1EwAA__9YaoA5) in 2024 at over $1,200, closely followed by Wyoming and Colorado, according to data tracking U.S. consumption. The state spending the least per capita in 2024? That would be Utah, where a large religious population and strict alcohol regulations kept the state’s spending per adult at just over $600. Several Southern and Midwestern states, including West Virginia, Mississippi, Tennessee, and Oklahoma, also fall near the bottom of the rankings, while several New England states rank in the top 10. [See where your state ranks here](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0DFuhDAQheHTQGdkbC-whYs0dJs2JRrwABMZ27JnQXv7aJMjpP_0nvR_PaYHkKewfcKBltc4BbyKR2bM00WBMReO-dhiOsgx5mOJ4ZyUVJ2QrVBmckD-NZna2RVRoa7Rtn13VzfVG1Pvdoa5b4fBdLqdh9sATg2gTacHA_O6dqYm-16TrTJtK29GNQvOvZZm0b10-r5iZSQ64pib70iBd1z9K56YmyUetbc7cyqV_qjUWKnxuq7mpPIEv0AiBk-F37BS4wEpoRPgl7hHL0rC4ChsImEWf1jML_EURRQGxkqNdbYuXeQ9la6vjNwOIP97y_9qdVr1EwAA__9YaoA5).
