clean_body: A massive, slow-moving winter storm spread across the U.S. on Friday, set to slam from Arizona to Maine with snow, sleet, freezing rain and dangerous Arctic cold. | | | | | | Saturday, January 24, 2026 ---|--- Good morning! On this day in 1781, Patriot commanders Lieutenant Colonel Henry "Light Horse" Lee and led a raid on Georgetown, South Carolina, which was defended by 200 British soldiers. The Flyover family of newsletters passed 4 million total readers on Friday, a new milestone for us. That includes The Flyover national edition you're reading now, but we also cover the news in nine states as well. —if your home state's among them, we encourage you to become a reader! Today’s sponsor is , a fast-growing Colombian coffee leader bringing Juan Valdez back to North America and targeting a 2027 IPO, with major retail distribution and a chance for early investors to get up to 20% bonus shares. | Winter Storm Slams U.S. A massive, slow-moving winter storm spread across the U.S. on Friday, set to slam from Arizona to Maine with snow, sleet, freezing rain, and dangerous Arctic cold. Forecasters warned ice damage could be severe, with about 177 million people under snow or ice alerts and more than 200 million under cold advisories. Wind chills near minus 40 degrees in the Upper Midwest prompted school closures. tracking the storm. More than have been canceled. The potentially historic storm was expected to hit the majority of air travel hubs over the weekend — including Dallas, St. Louis, Nashville, Charlotte, Atlanta, Washington, DC, and New York— before tapering off Monday afternoon. Airlines issued travel waivers as cancellations mounted, and officials urged residents to stock up, avoid driving and prepare for outages as ice-laden trees and power lines could fail for days. House GOP Ekes Out War Powers Win The House on Thursday to block President Donald Trump from launching military action in Venezuela without Congress. The measure originally seemed to end in a 215-214 win for Democrats, but Republicans kept voting open more than 20 minutes so GOP Rep. Wesley Hunt, absent while campaigning for a Texas Senate bid, could return and cast the tying vote. That defeated the measure and from House Democrats. Only GOP Reps. Don Bacon and Thomas Massie joined Democrats in voting for the measure. Map: What Each State Spends on Alcohol Alaska spent the in 2024 at over $1,200, closely followed by Wyoming and Colorado, according to data tracking U.S. consumption. The state spending the least per capita in 2024? That would be Utah, where a large religious population and strict alcohol regulations kept the state’s spending per adult at just over $600. Several Southern and Midwestern states, including West Virginia, Mississippi, Tennessee, and Oklahoma, also fall near the bottom of the rankings, while several New England states rank in the top 10. . | The following stories are featured exclusively on The Flyover Podcast—a daily show that gives you the most important headlines in under 15 minutes, straight from the heart of the country.Clicking the link will take you directly to these stories: ➤ U.S. murder rates plunged at a historic pace in 2025. () ➤ NYC mayor Zohran Mamdani says schools will be in session despite major snow forecast for the Big Apple. () ➤ Hollywood and fashion celebrities gathered in Rome to bid farewell to legendary designer Valentino. () | ➤ Seven House Democrats teamed with Republicans on Thursday to pass a bill to fund the Department of Homeland Security, overcoming an effort by Democrats to cut funds from ICE. () ➤ The Republican National Committee approved a rule change during its winter meeting on Friday that would allow the party to hold an unusual midterm convention this election year, as requested by President Trump. () ➤ President Trump withdrew his invitation to Canada to join his “Board of Peace,” days after Prime Minister Mark Carney spoke in Davos against the threat of economic coercion by the world’s superpowers. () ➤ The U.S. officially completed its withdrawal from the World Health Organization, exactly one year after President Donald Trump signed an executive order to begin the process of withdrawal. () ➤ Philadelphia officials sued the U.S. Department of the Interior over the removal by National Park Service staff of an exhibit on slavery at the President’s House site in Independence National Historical Park. () Flying together with our sponsor ➤ This Sleeping Position Triggers Nerve Pain. Back sleeper or side sleeper? One common sleeping position stops nerves from repairing and triggers burning pain every night. Board-certified surgeon Dr. John Jairo reveals which position to avoid and the real solution to nerve pain. () | Flying together with our sponsor A Pre-IPO Opportunity Is Brewing in the $100B U.S. Coffee Industry Colombia’s #1 largest coffee producer is setting its sights on an IPO in 2027. With 37x revenue growth since 2021, has the perfect foundation. They’re already the official coffee of the Chicago Cubs and LA Rams , serving millions of fans. But their crown jewel? Bringing Juan Valdez back to North America. Juan Valdez is one of the world’s most beloved coffees. Consumers have ranked it higher than Starbucks and Dunkin ’. The brand was even featured in the film Bruce Almighty, when Jim Carrey uses his powers to order Juan Valdez coffee to his house! Now, Green Coffee is , in real life. They’re selling at Target, Walmart.com, Raley’s, and beyond. Plus, the company is innovating with new revenue streams from coffee waste, including distilling coffee cherries for high-value products. They’re targeting $250 million in annual sales before 2030 and $1 billion valuation before their planned public listing. They’ve already raised $100 million from investors. You can still become a shareholder before their 2027 IPO plans unfold. . | ➤Former Olympic snowboarder Ryan Wedding was arrested by the FBI yesterday on charges that include multinational drug trafficking and killing a federal witness. ---

---|---|---

---

| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3159258&post_id=185313037&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTg1MzEzMDM3LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc2OTI1MzExMSwiZXhwIjoxNzcxODQ1MTExLCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMzE1OTI1OCIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.NUxSa47uGyoHv8d3qZoPfE35-jKxlsEZwpRbdZLlkYQ&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)

| | [](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9vcGVuLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9wdWIvbWF0dGRpZW1lci9wL2FmZmxlY2stYW5kLWRhbW9uLXB1c2gtYmFjay1vbi10aGU_.io88Bl7XEFN1EGonj-3d211oiKrdvAbtrAjU1f5M_RM?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)

| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/mattdiemer/p/affleck-and-damon-push-back-on-the?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

Something that's been circulating lately is a conversation on _Joe Rogan_ featuring **Ben Affleck and Matt Damon** , where both of them push back--hard--on the idea that AI is about to replace humans at scale the way tech companies keep promising.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/7063c392-5a35-4f03-a9f2-bbeb47876b2e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
What struck me wasn't just what they said, but why they said it. Their argument lines up almost perfectly with how I've been thinking about AI's actual trajectory versus the story being sold to investors, lawmakers, and the public.
This isn't an anti-AI take.
It's an anti-hype take.
## This is The 80% / 20% Problem...

name: NEGOP
subject: Reminder: 🚨 Your Weekly Update From The NEGOP
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Nebraska Republican Party 1610 N St
body:
News, events, and action items to keep Nebraska red and growing strong.
| | | | |
---
| Letter from the Chair
---
Join Us in Lincoln: Honoring Our Senators with Laughter & Tom Shillue!
Dear Fellow Republicans,
The Nebraska Republican Party (NEGOP) is excited to host our annual Senator Recognition Dinner on Wednesday, March 5th in Lincoln--a special evening dedicated to thanking and honoring our hardworking Republican Senators and giving them a well-deserved night of fun and relaxation away from the demands of public service.
This year, we're thrilled to welcome nationally acclaimed comedian, actor, author, and talk-show host Tom Shillue as our keynote speaker. Known for his sharp, clean humor and appearances on Gutfeld!, Fox News Saturday Night, and his bestselling book Mean Dads for a Better America, Tom brings the perfect blend of wit and warmth to lighten the mood and celebrate the people who serve our state so tirelessly.
Our Senators pour their hearts into their work--not just during the legislative session, but year-round. They prepare legislation, attend hearings, connect with constituents, volunteer in their communities, and often balance "real" jobs on top of it all. They give up precious family time and personal pursuits, all to make Nebraska stronger... and for an annual salary of just $12,000.
But as the moral virtue of eutrapelia reminds us--or "right recreation"--true balance includes refreshing the mind and spirit through humor and good company. All work and no play isn't sustainable; it's why events like this matter. A night of laughter and appreciation recharges our leaders so they can continue fighting for our values with renewed energy.
We invite you to join us! Reserve your seats today for the dinner and the exclusive VIP reception honoring those Senators whose terms conclude in 2026. Your presence will mean the world to them--and help create lasting memories.
Can't attend? Consider becoming a sponsor or making a donation. Every dollar raised supports our critical Get-Out-The-Vote efforts and volunteer recruitment for the upcoming elections--fueling the work that keeps Nebraska red and strong.
Let's show our gratitude, share some laughs, and recharge together.

Nebraska Grassroots Workshop
Mark your calendars: On Friday, January 30, 2026, from 10:00 a.m. to 2:00 p.m., the NEGOP is excited to invite Leadership Institute to host the Nebraska Grassroots Workshop in Kearney, Nebraska, and we invite you to join us for a day of practical training, engagement, and connection. Details: Location: Younes Conference Center North 707 West Talmadge St. Kearney, NE 68845 Date & Time: Friday, January 30, 2026 | 10:00 AM - 2:00 PM Cost: $10 registration fee (includes lunch)
The program will begin with a foundational training on how local party meetings and activities function - how discussions are conducted, decisions are made, and how respectful, orderly participation supports effective outcomes. The afternoon session will focus on grassroots engagement at the local level, helping participants understand how party activity operates and how individuals can participate, communicate effectively, and contribute to positive results.

clean_body: News, events, and action items to keep Nebraska red and growing strong. | | | | | | Letter from the Chair Join Us in Lincoln: Honoring Our Senators with Laughter & Tom Shillue! Dear Fellow Republicans, The Nebraska Republican Party (NEGOP) is excited to host our annual Senator Recognition Dinner on Wednesday, March 5th in Lincoln--a special evening dedicated to thanking and honoring our hardworking Republican Senators and giving them a well-deserved night of fun and relaxation away from the demands of public service. This year, we're thrilled to welcome nationally acclaimed comedian, actor, author, and talk-show host Tom Shillue as our keynote speaker. Known for his sharp, clean humor and appearances on Gutfeld!, Fox News Saturday Night, and his bestselling book Mean Dads for a Better America, Tom brings the perfect blend of wit and warmth to lighten the mood and celebrate the people who serve our state so tirelessly. Our Senators pour their hearts into their work--not just during the legislative session, but year-round. They prepare legislation, attend hearings, connect with constituents, volunteer in their communities, and often balance "real" jobs on top of it all. They give up precious family time and personal pursuits, all to make Nebraska stronger... and for an annual salary of just $12,000. But as the moral virtue of eutrapelia reminds us--or "right recreation"--true balance includes refreshing the mind and spirit through humor and good company. All work and no play isn't sustainable; it's why events like this matter. A night of laughter and appreciation recharges our leaders so they can continue fighting for our values with renewed energy. We invite you to join us! Reserve your seats today for the dinner and the exclusive VIP reception honoring those Senators whose terms conclude in 2026. Your presence will mean the world to them--and help create lasting memories. Can't attend? Consider becoming a sponsor or making a donation. Every dollar raised supports our critical Get-Out-The-Vote efforts and volunteer recruitment for the upcoming elections--fueling the work that keeps Nebraska red and strong. Let's show our gratitude, share some laughs, and recharge together. Reserve your spot or sponsor now: == Sincerely, Mary Jane Truemper Chairman, Nebraska Republican Party Follow us: == | ==| ==| == Donate today: Support the NEGOP at == For more information, visit == | Gain Skills for Navigating Party Processes County Conventions Delegate registration for the 2026 county conventions is underway--and hundreds of dedicated Republicans across Nebraska have already stepped up to make their voices heard! If you're ready to serve as a delegate and help shape our party's future at the grassroots level, now is the time to act. Register online today at: ==. The form remains open until 11:59 p.m. on March 1, 2026. Please share this link widely with fellow Republicans in your county--every additional delegate strengthens our organization and amplifies conservative principles statewide. Lifе and death Son of Mykhailo Sulyma, Ivan came from a petty noble (szlachta) family. He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw
Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18]

Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18] | | | First Invеstmеnt Updаtеs brоught tо уоu bу Іnception Media, LLC. We would like to emphasize that we do not offer tailored financial advice. This email does not serve as financial guidance, and you bear full responsibility for your investment decisions. # Saturday, January 24, 2026

**Good Morning!** On this day in 1845, the Texas Senate [ratified a peace treaty ](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkD3ypCAQR0-DGRY0-EFAsInZbLqhxUg79haCBew43n7LucI_e0HXq9e_P4_54ShQfP12O9r6WdMc8SwBa8U8nxQr5lJT3kvFjyspXPtBLs4goOdCctCzdxSuWTfePoU3skErh95A14sems2OZhGojRmeUkEHUqzKjMvaqXHoBjCyIXvLhAQtQYjOtFr34BWKUSoDSnqmBXqqKbd1w2_GGq70xtwuaW-C3Wo9ClO_GEwMpsMV5zGSi-2Zsj8ylnIfMphAgGYwCXnzTV8Z3-j-kBYX-E4BS00RC0-R140K9-7if1385_LFQdeNwdRk64-TQqDSD0yL1-4ofGPqzyZ8W_gfAAD__5KDhPE)that had been brokered by Sam Houston between Anglo settlers and 11 Native American tribes, a key step towards establishing peaceful coexistence. The weather looks [difficult this weekend](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGOszAMB_CngS0oMWmAIcO3dOu33oicximRAqkSq7Rvf4K7N7j1L-tv__x1m28YU9we_3Ely--Q5432moiZyrzHjalUzmWtTG-sOX3WZ8RtBglGSCVAzx5j-sy69dZJP6mWrBrMBBcjDbSLdUjBBzf0bhzNpB1INyrlLtgHHGGY2miPMqlAK5DyMnVaG_A9yVH1E_TKN1qSj5xLxwudZ4T0yS8q3T2vbbIL87M2_b8Grg1c933vQn7rg3EMHBEhL1QauHpMCav4DcRZJn6U4mSKExZyoTtWbov1zz2mFKsZGi0fK8Z0buW__epl4TsAAP__ii6ALQ), and even more so if you have to drive on streets covered in snow and ice. Let us know how confident you are in your winter driving skills in today's _Poll_ below. Today's sponsor is the [Texas State Historical Association](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykjzuOwyAQQE9jd7GGMYFQUGyTLttuiSZmHCOBiWCUz-1XmyvsAd7Tez-XcKGU0377psJeXmsNOz97ZhFu4Zl24dalttKFX9Rrfpd7oj0goDmAOqAOkVJ-Bz1Gf4Xo1MheWePwaMDguHl9PSLZFdTJWqsdzYtbjKYVYKGFYhyT_5OBQq0Q4OgmrQ3GmeGkZoezioMGjklqm2TjT8aa3_XBbVpqGbPfRO59mL8GPA94pjJJ32jiB-_SBzyPzcf7M-WcurGDhluhlD-o_G_44fE3AAD__yfhakM), inviting Texas history fans to DFW for their 130th Annual in Irving March 4-7, 2026, featuring 30+ expert talks and a can't-miss Casino Night anniversary celebration.

## Icy Winter Weather Slides into Texas
Snow began falling in parts of Texas on Friday as huge swaths of the South entered what's forecast to be a full weekend of [severe winter weather](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGOszAMB_CngS0oMWmAIcO3dOu33oicximRAqkSq7Rvf4K7N7j1L-tv__x1m28YU9we_3Ely--Q5432moiZyrzHjalUzmWtTG-sOX3WZ8RtBglGSCVAzx5j-sy69dZJP6mWrBrMBBcjDbSLdUjBBzf0bhzNpB1INyrlLtgHHGGY2miPMqlAK5DyMnVaG_A9yVH1E_TKN1qSj5xLxwudZ4T0yS8q3T2vbbIL87M2_b8Grg1c933vQn7rg3EMHBEhL1QauHpMCav4DcRZJn6U4mSKExZyoTtWbov1zz2mFKsZGi0fK8Z0buW__epl4TsAAP__ii6ALQ), with temperatures dropping into the single digits in parts of the state and power outages expected. Hundreds of flights were [canceled](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2upDAMhZ8GOlDshL8ixTZ0d9stkYeYIVIgKLGG4e1X8Aq3tS2f7zv_fqYf8sHv77-0sZXvEqedzxxYhNN0-l04ZYlpy8JfyjFc2-Fpn1BhWymo0EyOfLgmUzr7Um6Aki107YBNq1osV-sIOlAvo2fsFbthYeh1MxP1jZpBNaW39zMFaACVaobamBadZtWDHlCDK4xi5yWmWlZ-MJZwxQ-neo5bGewqcuRC_ylwLHA8z7Perkw77RJ3H--jAsfb6t4yycqpwJGS-DnwPXssq0ezWoJ_r1I5DnTl6kmrEDSA7pr6WI8yWXecPgSf264w6r2RDw-I_K6-j8X_AQAA__-IpoXQ) at state airports as winter storm warnings took effect, running through Monday in some areas. Dallas and other cities in North Texas expect the most severe ice conditions, and areas like San Antonio received alert upgrades in expectation of icy weather as well. [Here's a forecast map](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDFuwzAMRU8jbwokWpGjQUMXb-na0VAtOiYgW4HExsntCztAL9Dx8xPEe_y6DtdAidbbZ1jQ83PKw4pbTciMZdhoZSyVc1kq4zPUnF7LncI6gAIrlZZghhgovQbTRP-totMNet1ZB2erLDSzDxetlHE4jdi5Vp0727kRotZgwcbgGvL7MaXBaFDq7E7GWIgtqotuHbQ6CqMwEudy4hkPjCm98gPLacxLk_zMfK-i_RDQC-g3DDy_OwH9m30fHyoC-l1PQP8n0Mp3JY9VOWFZ5Ux7oFHSiLKueZNTLjiGyrLmH57lmgvPuOeF4oaVm-LjfaOUqNpOGHVbAqWDj__31YeH3wAAAP__BJaOBQ) for Texas and surrounding states. While officials are urging residents to stay off the roads, [Texas transportation officials](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDGu2zAMQE9jbwpkipGlwUMXb79rR0Oy6ISobBkyGye3L5IOPcDfCD6AfHi_vqavwJm328-w0iDPpUwbnUcmEarTyZtQPaTU9RB6hqPk17pz2CbQYJXuFOCUAufXhG0aok6-a2noeuvharWF9j4slBxeE3p0aObofFwsuT4s4JdoYWl5eB_THWAHWl_9BdFCMqRdZzyYLjWoKbGUepE7fTSW_CoPqpe5rG0e7iL70ZgfDYwNjOd5Xn4__tAbNjA-OFF5rynIner_SfG6h1kaGOWZiqi90r7zdlOfD6qWkA71L8CbzbyzBOGyNTCC9QpDsCY6VGB8VIjGqti7XrmIURun3RxtW4e0n5wzH7ZvUN_WwPljLd9r_RjgbwAAAP__zq2TUA) made road preparations for those who do travel.
## Dallas Student Fatally Shot, Classmate Charged
A [shooting at a Dallas park](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLESnCAURb8GOxx4uBgLijR2mzalg_JYmSA48LKsf59xfyH1nXvn3PP7uTxtiCG9ftkDDX18XhK2GpEIy9JCIiyVcjkq4cfWHK_jDDYtIEBzITkMi7MhXsvQObMKN8kOjRz1BA8tNHS7Qf3wWinwTojVb2pbvZicGGFDK5WHLph7TEgYJAjxmPph0OAUih9STaCkY4NAFyiXnnb8Yvh45TeWfstHF81OdFamfjKYGcyttT6tm_PtjhnM9x8Gc8ybjQzmSn8dJuLeko3x4nXPxC3x05Y_PKEtvOXsSm68hVhz4nt47bxue853XU0jiBEYzF0x7mwhxlD1yAbxOmyIXyT6P5FvA_8CAAD__y1AiV8) left Woodrow Wilson High School student Wornan Padilla Garcia dead on Thursday, and Dallas police have charged a 16-year-old classmate with murder. Dallas Fire Rescue responded to a gunshot wound report at around 3:45 p.m. Thursday, and units descended on the [parking lot](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDFu6zAMhk9jbzYkWlaeBg1vyZauHQ3ZomOhsmlIRJTcvlDaG3QiAX4g-f2ft-nmQgzH_cPtaPm50nRgyRGZMU0lHIwpM6U9Mz5dpvjaz-COCQToTsgO1ORdiK9Jtd7OwhvZopUXbWDUQkO72XkZ0Snp5sUbuZhh1uvqYFn0OLjR6LkNti4TEpQEIUbTK6XBDyj-ycHAIH2jBPrAlHre8P3GGl_0wNQvtLfRbsxnbob_DVwbuJZS-pWeqmpUoIFrbeuEyCcqXQkx01FLDLn7dexOl766vBFxOO5tsv78AfSlUeK-uxDf5_hvIT0sfAcAAP__B55_Qw) where the incident occurred, across the street from the high school. Garcia, a senior on the school’s soccer team, was rushed to the hospital where he was pronounced dead. Police said three students were involved in the incident, but have yet to confirm details. A police source told WFAA Dallas that the students were [playing with the gun](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLHO4yAQhJ8Gd0SwEIgLF9e4-6-90trAOka3Nhagnz9vf3Je4bqRZjT6Zv58LV-YOB2v37jT1H7WvBzUK1NrVJaejkaltlz22ugHa-b3fiY8FlDgpNIS7BIx8XuxQ5yeKo56oEl7N8LdKQfDNo0OrffeBUBDDqK5P-JqyIbRKx28G9J0lSkNVoNS9_Fm7RUj9dBmBKOjsIpiarnc2kYfjJXf-ZvKLeR94Glr7azC_BIwC5h777e-Il6mgBlLS4FJwHztEjBzDsgC5rrl3NLxkgdhkT3nWHKXPXHNh9zSa5M1bDmzLHhEZJYnlr_yUljlh0LADA8vn8FqN2KUoFYjrbFWoolehvX-VOZpgnM0lCmePTGn6ryw6rVj4g9--7_Tvyf4FwAA__8QS5Xu) when it discharged.
## Y’all Street Hits 100 Companies Listed
The New York Stock Exchange’s expansion into Texas, dubbed NYSE Texas or Y’all Street, now has over [100 companies listed](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2OozAURp8GOiP74phQuNgmXbbdEhl8Cdb6B_neCeHtR4nmDaY-n46Ovn_36e5CDPnx1yW0_FrLlPGgiMxYpyNkxkpcaiLGl6MSz7QHlyeQYIRUAvTkXYjnpFtvZ-lH1aJVgxnhYqSBdrNXNRoPKyo3qNmZYZh7tSx-mdfxMoDCNti3TCrQCqS8jJ3WBnyP8qr6EXrlGy3RBy614w0_GWs8yxNrt5TURrsx79T0fxq4NXA7jqNby2v-opCR6L1p4JZc_Y9Mb-5iFMQVkUl8bCKVJ4qHC5kEMbok8kn4w7bAJJSUYilpd_kUKUQkLhnbav1-hBgDmaHR8pFciJ8k_t2RTwvfAQAA__88zIvO), reaching a major milestone less than a year after opening. NYSE President Lynn Martin said the expansion allows companies to take advantage of Texas’ pro-business climate while still benefitting from the safety and stability of Wall Street. President Trump weighed in on Y’all Street’s success, saying it is “an [unbelievably bad thing](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLHOozAQhJ_GdI7sxYZQUFxD9197JVq8m2DF2Mh2Qnj7U_IKfzPNSDOfvn8_8w_64OP9L2481vctzZGPErhWzvPhY-VcaspbqfzGksK57R7jDAo6qbQEMxP6cM6moXFRNOiGR913A9hOddCs49JaBuJbOwzEiyZUSGSdtr11_WK58eNnTGkwGpSyw8WYDqhlddXtAK0mYRSTrylf6spfjFs404vzxaWtCeNa615E-0fAJGA6juPyWNPzUwqYMFfvAguYthT5FDAtz-IjlyJginzIM-WHLDW5h-S3WzHeWRKGgEXGs7D8Hsqan9v-ybrKkpzHIGCCay8XPVjltJOKll4aRSivZJy0qLsrtG5YEJo80n74EHzpemHUfUMfvvD1d8pfI_wPAAD__7MmlrQ) for New York.” NYSE Texas, based in Dallas, is intended to better serve companies in the South and Southwest. It launched in March 2025 and continues to operate alongside the main exchange.
| [](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykjzuOwyAQQE9jd7GGMYFQUGyTLttuiSZmHCOBiWCUz-1XmyvsAd7Tez-XcKGU0377psJeXmsNOz97ZhFu4Zl24dalttKFX9Rrfpd7oj0goDmAOqAOkVJ-Bz1Gf4Xo1MheWePwaMDguHl9PSLZFdTJWqsdzYtbjKYVYKGFYhyT_5OBQq0Q4OgmrQ3GmeGkZoezioMGjklqm2TjT8aa3_XBbVpqGbPfRO59mL8GPA94pjJJ32jiB-_SBzyPzcf7M-WcurGDhluhlD-o_G_44fE3AAD__yfhakM) Calling all DFW history lovers: the state’s premier Texas history event is landing in Irving! Join the Texas State Historical Association for our [130th Annual Meeting](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykjzuOwyAQQE9jd7GGMYFQUGyTLttuiSZmHCOBiWCUz-1XmyvsAd7Tez-XcKGU0377psJeXmsNOz97ZhFu4Zl24dalttKFX9Rrfpd7oj0goDmAOqAOkVJ-Bz1Gf4Xo1MheWePwaMDguHl9PSLZFdTJWqsdzYtbjKYVYKGFYhyT_5OBQq0Q4OgmrQ3GmeGkZoezioMGjklqm2TjT8aa3_XBbVpqGbPfRO59mL8GPA94pjJJ32jiB-_SBzyPzcf7M-WcurGDhluhlD-o_G_44fE3AAD__yfhakM), March 4–7, 2026, at the Westin Irving DFW. Whether you're a lifelong Texan or a new arrival, don’t miss the chance to dive deep into our shared heritage right in your own backyard. This year’s highlights include 30+ expert-led discussions on everything from Texas in conflicts like the American Revolution, Civil War, and WWII to the legendary 1901 Spindletop gusher, the history of bullfighting, water conservation, and much more! The crown jewel of the weekend is our 130th Anniversary Celebration: Casino Night. Kick up your heels or double down at an Old West saloon party featuring gaming tables, live music by the Cory Cross Band, and a Texas-sized dinner. Don’t miss three days jam-packed with Texas history. Visit our website to learn more and[ register today!](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykjzuOwyAQQE9jd7GGMYFQUGyTLttuiSZmHCOBiWCUz-1XmyvsAd7Tez-XcKGU0377psJeXmsNOz97ZhFu4Zl24dalttKFX9Rrfpd7oj0goDmAOqAOkVJ-Bz1Gf4Xo1MheWePwaMDguHl9PSLZFdTJWqsdzYtbjKYVYKGFYhyT_5OBQq0Q4OgmrQ3GmeGkZoezioMGjklqm2TjT8aa3_XBbVpqGbPfRO59mL8GPA94pjJJ32jiB-_SBzyPzcf7M-WcurGDhluhlD-o_G_44fE3AAD__yfhakM)

**➤ Corpus Christi: **The city's two primary water sources—Lake Corpus Christi and Choke Canyon Reservoir—have dropped to a combined capacity of 10%, their lowest-ever recorded volume. On this day in 1845, the Texas Senate had been brokered by Sam Houston between Anglo settlers and 11 Native American tribes, a key step towards establishing peaceful coexistence. The weather looks , and even more so if you have to drive on streets covered in snow and ice. Let us know how confident you are in your winter driving skills in today's Poll below. Today's sponsor is the , inviting Texas history fans to DFW for their 130th Annual in Irving March 4-7, 2026, featuring 30+ expert talks and a can't-miss Casino Night anniversary celebration. Abilene 🌤️ 27/15° | Amarillo 🌤️ 8/4° | Austin 🌤️ 51/30° | Brownsville ☁️ 82/62° | Corpus Christi 🌦️ 71/43° | DFW 🌤️ 32/20° | El Paso 🌦️ 54/46° | Houston 🌧️ 57/38° | Laredo 🌧️ 70/41° | Lubbock 🌤️ 17/11° | Midland 🌤️ 28/15° | San Antonio 🌤️ 63/32° | Tyler 🌤️ 33/23° | Waco 🌤️ 38/25° Take The Flyover with you. Busy day? Listen to our daily 15-minute podcast while commuting, cooking, or walking the dog--your Flyover fix, anywhere. | | Icy Winter Weather Slides into Texas Snow began falling in parts of Texas on Friday as huge swaths of the South entered what's forecast to be a full weekend of , with temperatures dropping into the single digits in parts of the state and power outages expected. Hundreds of flights were at state airports as winter storm warnings took effect, running through Monday in some areas. Dallas and other cities in North Texas expect the most severe ice conditions, and areas like San Antonio received alert upgrades in expectation of icy weather as well. for Texas and surrounding states. While officials are urging residents to stay off the roads, made road preparations for those who do travel. Dallas Student Fatally Shot, Classmate Charged A left Woodrow Wilson High School student Wornan Padilla Garcia dead on Thursday, and Dallas police have charged a 16-year-old classmate with murder. Dallas Fire Rescue responded to a gunshot wound report at around 3:45 p.m. Thursday, and units descended on the where the incident occurred, across the street from the high school. Garcia, a senior on the school’s soccer team, was rushed to the hospital where he was pronounced dead. Police said three students were involved in the incident, but have yet to confirm details. A police source told WFAA Dallas that the students were when it discharged. Y’all Street Hits 100 Companies Listed The New York Stock Exchange’s expansion into Texas, dubbed NYSE Texas or Y’all Street, now has over , reaching a major milestone less than a year after opening. NYSE President Lynn Martin said the expansion allows companies to take advantage of Texas’ pro-business climate while still benefitting from the safety and stability of Wall Street. President Trump weighed in on Y’all Street’s success, saying it is “an for New York.” NYSE Texas, based in Dallas, is intended to better serve companies in the South and Southwest. It launched in March 2025 and continues to operate alongside the main exchange. | Calling all DFW history lovers: the state’s premier Texas history event is landing in Irving! Join the Texas State Historical Association for our , March 4–7, 2026, at the Westin Irving DFW. Whether you're a lifelong Texan or a new arrival, don’t miss the chance to dive deep into our shared heritage right in your own backyard. This year’s highlights include 30+ expert-led discussions on everything from Texas in conflicts like the American Revolution, Civil War, and WWII to the legendary 1901 Spindletop gusher, the history of bullfighting, water conservation, and much more! The crown jewel of the weekend is our 130th Anniversary Celebration: Casino Night. Kick up your heels or double down at an Old West saloon party featuring gaming tables, live music by the Cory Cross Band, and a Texas-sized dinner. Don’t miss three days jam-packed with Texas history. Visit our website to learn more and | ➤ Corpus Christi: The city's two primary water sources—Lake Corpus Christi and Choke Canyon Reservoir—have dropped to a combined capacity of 10%, their lowest-ever recorded volume. Officials are discussing plans to develop a third well field for the city. () ➤ Dallas: City Council unanimously voted to add new restrictions to a proposed high-speed train to Houston while also accepting $500,000 in federal funding to identify a corridor for the train. () ➤ Statewide: A spokesperson for Sen. Ted Cruz responded to backlash for the senator leaving Texas ahead of this weekend’s winter storm, saying he was on a “pre-planned work trip” and would return “before the storm is projected to hit.” () ➤ San Antonio: Wanted fugitive Ruby Delarosa was arrested at a local marijuana dispensary after deputies followed her into the shop and found illegal narcotics and weapons. () ➤ Starbase: SpaceX CEO Elon Musk is reportedly considering Bank of America, Goldman Sachs, JPMorgan Chase, and Morgan Stanley to lead the company’s initial public offering (IPO) for transitioning to a publicly-traded entity. subject: ICYMI: Inviting the Violence Home
body:
Amanda McKinney and the Threat of State Power
| | | | |
---
| What Is In This Newsletter?

* Inviting the Violence Home: Amanda McKinney
* Day of Advocacy
* The Evil Has Landed: PAC Money in Rural Washington

---

| |
---
| Amanda McKinney, a Yakima County Commissioner and candidate for Congress in Washington's 4th Congressional District, is dangerous. She is dangerous because she openly invites state violence into our communities and pledges loyalty to a President who has already turned that violence inward on the American people. What follows is why that matters.
America is a country of violence. We see ourselves as peacekeepers and generally good people, but the data suggests otherwise. No statistics are needed to recognize the horror that defines much of our daily life.
I lived for many years in Hong Kong, then one of the safest cities in the world. Despite its density, you would not hesitate to send your twelve-year-old daughter to the corner ATM at 2 a.m. to withdraw a thousand dollars and stop at a 7-Eleven on the way home for ice cream. The thought that harm might befall her did not exist because violence was absent from daily life, regardless of neighborhood. Living without fear changes you. It frees you to do more and to see the world through an optimistic lens. You do not recognize it at the time because it feels normal.
When I returned to the United States, it took nearly six months to feel comfortable again. I immediately felt the presence of violence. Living in a relatively safe part of West Valley, Yakima, I did not witness violence firsthand, but I was saturated by it through radio, television, newspapers, and social media. Whether through real accounts of gun violence or relentless political discourse, the weight was palpable. Over time, that fear became normalized, woven into daily life. I often wonder how our tolerance for violence would change if Americans could experience life without it, even briefly.
---
| | [](https://zmhksxhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0019xMpExt50FwtNIZWqxdEGh4EhLIuf0onASLEJXuOuWZCxBLGsF-Ac0avQq5DMSY-GuB_BM1-Fr4LY19ihVgyhESif1QQTg-ZL7M1YjZXiGM4Lxbz9M248Nxv5mn3wmmdTK7zx3F3SyH0wFiPQk8yuhhTrcO_Bd3RmMa4n8Gp2K4=&c=NkN0s30S2BvYes8jeiS-cULA2GlSB2OiuvqH-Ogt5vK46DM2J5Aykw==&ch=CzH58q9C5uzEaEGF79QjOSEJ4kNYHEiN0H0G_lfMFyAft3DC4Dql4A==)
---
| Stephen Miller giving unlimited power to ICE

Now we live under a new threat, one that comes from our own government acting against its own people. This is the danger we associate with Selma, Kent State, or the Bonus Army, moments when state power was turned inward. Those moments were horrific and limited. Today, the threat is broader and more sustained. Our President has turned state violence inward with deliberate force. Washington, D.C., Los Angeles, Chicago, Portland, Memphis, New York City, Baltimore, New Orleans, Oakland, San Francisco, St. Louis, and most recently Minneapolis. In the span of a single week, one person was killed and another shot. The response was not restraint or remorse, but escalation.
According to [NPR](https://zmhksxhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0019xMpExt50FwtNIZWqxdEGh4EhLIuf0onASLEJXuOuWZCxBLGsF-Ac0avQq5DMSY-OJ27wkIuLJcuQCenVgAnPxto3ht1B2vVk9oeTF8oFAagPyD1bRXCdVS5xLW4Wuq0tPPmDJW7nzWvD-85W9VhF-Z3UFaBntDMjtA9DL9UC0M3JW9EEmMFiONm5hJLOzY-NnmYuAC6WjydhzYFcUXhy981CQluwbNLHCs0ooyCggxKCpKcLpkJ_aMThHCl57pHE1mWMuGbrRZYTAyPgOuuEEw2YoOCu4Q9u5OznN_w5YOylwpg1vKYGxOdGT69q033G-psQ4HryUjAywWG5XcLNrGuea9tDUKWIgd_Vygk2UDF4TqGgKYM2goaQAGeMxjFBTg073kCO5I=&c=NkN0s30S2BvYes8jeiS-cULA2GlSB2OiuvqH-Ogt5vK46DM2J5Aykw==&ch=CzH58q9C5uzEaEGF79QjOSEJ4kNYHEiN0H0G_lfMFyAft3DC4Dql4A==) there are as many as 3,000 troops on standby to deploy to Minnesota under a manufactured narrative of immigration and domestic terrorism. ICE, as intended, provides a necessary service. As it exists today, it has become an army of terror directed at the American people. With warrantless stops, Kavanaugh-era standards, and absolute immunity, the incentive appears to be escalation. Violence is the only argument where more is required to achieve less.
In Washington, we have largely avoided the President's direct threat. Even Yakima County's Constitutional Sheriff, Bob Udell, has said his office would not support ICE raids. Yet we have traitors in our ranks. Amanda "MAGA Barbie" McKinney petitioned to bring federal troops into our towns. Amanda has pledged singular loyalty to the President and is the single greatest threat to our community's safety.
Amanda has moved beyond rhetoric. She has [advocated](https://zmhksxhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0019xMpExt50FwtNIZWqxdEGh4EhLIuf0onASLEJXuOuWZCxBLGsF-Ac0avQq5DMSY-MZFCpIpbCse0FrV-EFsdD5Auu03urmIIUGA8CErHlQIJqedzY8ebGvOkO2BpY3v5pD8iEu1g7MAyrON95sxZJqggn9CDK1Qg-ziEtVWcvFgqZKe6ILwCOAVxiIckKjOb4NOdWh5BmSrkKwRUmeCRrfAGEfIBCKiWIDxpKTEnZZf66MVY5xQQ7ETPv5eA49C6RqVu8V3ELjvAg5LAv-faLLQxZloTOD3_4_net3btH3QvfwjfsChUbA38hmeuV_Ok4JwY_1a3L6xrd0o94cml7O8x4sCCPok_oVPka9Ydzuw23PdMrEM3CHCOOMe6D7pyCcUW3nSgYbc=&c=NkN0s30S2BvYes8jeiS-cULA2GlSB2OiuvqH-Ogt5vK46DM2J5Aykw==&ch=CzH58q9C5uzEaEGF79QjOSEJ4kNYHEiN0H0G_lfMFyAft3DC4Dql4A==) for the kind of violence now playing out in Minneapolis. If elected, Amanda would bring armed personnel into our streets under the guise of public safety. She is dangerous. Because of people like Amanda McKinney, Rural Americans United will not stop. We are committed to a rural Washington where justice, inclusion, and informed voices prevail.
---

The evil has landed
Most of us have heard of Brian Heywood and his onslaught of questionably constitutional propositions he has tried to force onto Washington State ballots. He heads up the[ Let's Go Washington PAC](https://zmhksxhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0019xMpExt50FwtNIZWqxdEGh4EhLIuf0onASLEJXuOuWZCxBLGsF-Ac0avQq5DMSY-R0jbduZzuMYEQotucEBGrSSaXCnb2j_L8G-WD3p5ZeVA43cGr3JKEPp7c4cAiS9fDseaNVNHjo4m-QTykC6F1DDh-16DTAOggMLcYXDmfxY59Ctg6sl4zqejrh5bDpq2&c=NkN0s30S2BvYes8jeiS-cULA2GlSB2OiuvqH-Ogt5vK46DM2J5Aykw==&ch=CzH58q9C5uzEaEGF79QjOSEJ4kNYHEiN0H0G_lfMFyAft3DC4Dql4A==), which was originally created to place six initiatives on the Washington ballot. Since then, with the help of several very wealthy Washingtonians, it has proliferated into another PAC, Washington Rising*. An odd name for a PAC registered in Tennessee, but less odd once you follow the money behind it.
According to the Washington State [PDC](https://zmhksxhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0019xMpExt50FwtNIZWqxdEGh4EhLIuf0onASLEJXuOuWZCxBLGsF-Ac0avQq5DMSY-ouOSeQY3-94hVcEpKKLZbzd6IUcSLowKD5YoT54_2pIGpQT2bedIh53qVzawrMAjGAmOXreTGnfm280FgNeeH65EaODpNPZd-OmCwNNRS8pned98xN53vTmbCrkrkAobr2mXp7JkQF7g9n2-PD1tLmHmAQtqdPTkYZszGVzpovc=&c=NkN0s30S2BvYes8jeiS-cULA2GlSB2OiuvqH-Ogt5vK46DM2J5Aykw==&ch=CzH58q9C5uzEaEGF79QjOSEJ4kNYHEiN0H0G_lfMFyAft3DC4Dql4A==), $1,074,999 has been donated by Washington residents, with $1,000,000 coming from just two donors, the Plath family and Robert Ramsey. The Plath family is behind the Washington Fruit and Produce Company and [Ramsey](https://zmhksxhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0019xMpExt50FwtNIZWqxdEGh4EhLIuf0onASLEJXuOuWZCxBLGsF-Ac0avQq5DMSY-jL7FAnT8DvAxyBIycDzWVjQxrjzJ9b_SGIMc0MpcUEG67uHyhL9ugSJw2zq09-D9d4SzntJ3Uo4lVe80tqouGR9Zqgbjwj0Txa4PyHO9nfwXC9IKmEFrmDucdWoP6iExwLfqTsaOGiueDro6fFx2PsJecFskgW5FosPmPjy2kEGvAWgVhxwYxav5NVIeR2IlyQ2wzn9qZ4Q=&c=NkN0s30S2BvYes8jeiS-cULA2GlSB2OiuvqH-Ogt5vK46DM2J5Aykw==&ch=CzH58q9C5uzEaEGF79QjOSEJ4kNYHEiN0H0G_lfMFyAft3DC4Dql4A==) made his money off of Tribal members, beginning with the Yakima Nation. Knowing that the Yakima Nation and the Confederated Tribes of the Colville Reservation vote heavily Democratic, it is striking that people who profit from these communities would work seemingly against their interests.
That alone would be sufficiently scandalous to warrant scrutiny, but that is not my point.

| Open Secrets, 2024 election cycle
The money being funneled into Washington Rising is being used to fund their poster child, Amanda "MAGA Barbie" McKinney. The rumor mill has Amanda boasting that she has $1.8 million behind her, and that claim appears increasingly credible. With her tight connections to Trump, the Kirks, and now Washington Rising, there seems to be no depth of moral corruption she cannot finance.
We have seen how MAGA approaches elections, each cycle becoming more foul and more dishonest. With lies now being manufactured and funded by the likes of Trump, Kirk, and Heywood, the question is no longer if it gets worse, but how much worse we are about to see.

Inviting the Violence Home: Amanda McKinney Day of Advocacy The Evil Has Landed: PAC Money in Rural Washington | | == | == ---|--- mailto:?subject=ICYMI%3A%20Inviting%20the%20Violence%20Home&body= | mailto:?subject=ICYMI%3A%20Inviting%20the%20Violence%20Home&body= ---|--- == | == ---|--- | | | | | Amanda McKinney, a Yakima County Commissioner and candidate for Congress in Washington's 4th Congressional District, is dangerous. She is dangerous because she openly invites state violence into our communities and pledges loyalty to a President who has already turned that violence inward on the American people. What follows is why that matters. America is a country of violence. We see ourselves as peacekeepers and generally good people, but the data suggests otherwise. No statistics are needed to recognize the horror that defines much of our daily life. I lived for many years in Hong Kong, then one of the safest cities in the world. Despite its density, you would not hesitate to send your twelve-year-old daughter to the corner ATM at 2 a.m. to withdraw a thousand dollars and stop at a 7-Eleven on the way home for ice cream. The thought that harm might befall her did not exist because violence was absent from daily life, regardless of neighborhood. Living without fear changes you. It frees you to do more and to see the world through an optimistic lens. You do not recognize it at the time because it feels normal. When I returned to the United States, it took nearly six months to feel comfortable again. I immediately felt the presence of violence. Living in a relatively safe part of West Valley, Yakima, I did not witness violence firsthand, but I was saturated by it through radio, television, newspapers, and social media. Whether through real accounts of gun violence or relentless political discourse, the weight was palpable. Over time, that fear became normalized, woven into daily life. I often wonder how our tolerance for violence would change if Americans could experience life without it, even briefly. | | == | Stephen Miller giving unlimited power to ICE Now we live under a new threat, one that comes from our own government acting against its own people. This is the danger we associate with Selma, Kent State, or the Bonus Army, moments when state power was turned inward. Those moments were horrific and limited. Today, the threat is broader and more sustained. Our President has turned state violence inward with deliberate force. Washington, D.C., Los Angeles, Chicago, Portland, Memphis, New York City, Baltimore, New Orleans, Oakland, San Francisco, St. Louis, and most recently Minneapolis. In the span of a single week, one person was killed and another shot. The response was not restraint or remorse, but escalation. According to == there are as many as 3,000 troops on standby to deploy to Minnesota under a manufactured narrative of immigration and domestic terrorism. ICE, as intended, provides a necessary service. As it exists today, it has become an army of terror directed at the American people. With warrantless stops, Kavanaugh-era standards, and absolute immunity, the incentive appears to be escalation. Violence is the only argument where more is required to achieve less. In Washington, we have largely avoided the President's direct threat. Even Yakima County's Constitutional Sheriff, Bob Udell, has said his office would not support ICE raids. Yet we have traitors in our ranks. Amanda "MAGA Barbie" McKinney petitioned to bring federal troops into our towns. Amanda has pledged singular loyalty to the President and is the single greatest threat to our community's safety. Amanda has moved beyond rhetoric. She has == for the kind of violence now playing out in Minneapolis. If elected, Amanda would bring armed personnel into our streets under the guise of public safety. She is dangerous. Because of people like Amanda McKinney, Rural Americans United will not stop. We are committed to a rural Washington where justice, inclusion, and informed voices prevail. | | | | | | == | Yakima Day of Advocacy Rural Americans United is proud to be a sponsor of this good and necessary event. Saturday January 24th from 9am - 3pm. At the Englewood Christian Church in Yakima. An odd name for a PAC registered in Tennessee, but less odd once you follow the money behind it. | Friend,
The first main event for Democrats of the '26 election cycle is the Wisconsin Supreme Court race this April.
MAGA is looking to bounce back after the brutal butt kicking WI Dems gave them last year and they cannot afford to lose.

---
| [](https://zzejj9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001SHKAVxILdDUUq83Mzfwjn2FYJ79_4jNAEyzUv2oxjQAPmPTtwjbpg-k82h0CwkDrAhYE6IROwhyo3pY9iu7vnvWE6cdHc9YIS4xsO1A2AQ0iImkswmAshYw7hF_fqPe3E8yhURUzUs3OVHHgLpdAE8wkkmXDPmoxL20bopXaCBbRMrg7hJuASj4PmzoPSiqKcbSbYVo9JQqzBLjKwCQZm1llSzv3C4xTiX668GcQ2Tmw3ucu3virOBGvEJ9r-nrkJD2zg_ea7ME=&c=vSGgc8L-xb4jgmzQ7xK1-W0EUHvNPF9tjBCUOQrRxRdr7N9BMfSp2Q==&ch=Yya_frt1xcYKJTP4HiAdFSCqtg3mIgGmj1vbSiGS4cVy3_Bs9bGOyw==)

This is a chance for Democrats to choke off MAGA's lifeline in Wisconsin.
After last year's win, Democrats now hold a 4-3 majority on the WI court. With a seat up for grabs again this year, we now have a chance to expand our majority to 5-2.
More importantly, a win here would lock down the WI Supreme Court for Democrats until at least 2030, securing a key swing state court for the rest of Trump's presidency.
That's crucial because Trump has been attempting to seize control of state Supreme Courts, the courts with final say on election laws/results, in key swing states across the country as part of a plot to rig elections in favor of MAGA in 2026 and 2028.
Last year, Defend Our Courts helped lead the defense of Pennsylvania's Supreme Court and lockdown a dem majority on that court until 2029. Now, we are taking our winning formula national and Wisconsin is our first major test.
We expect MAGA to throw everything they have at this race to keep WI in play while Trump is president. They'll be spending tens of millions to buy this seat again, and if Democrats are going to stop them we have to start building the warchest to counter them immediately.

[That's why we are calling all Dems to rally to our aid once again. | | Charlie Kirk built a movement for truth -- but his final message pointed to something eternal.

It wasn't about politics... or elections... or even about the culture war.

His final book was deeply personal, and unlike anything Charlie had written before...

**It was about the Sabbath. **

About sacred rest. Reconnecting with God.

Charlie wrote this book because he knew what America was missing... and what he nearly lost himself.

He found that in a world addicted to busyness, noise, and scrolling...

_**The most radical act of resistance is to STOP. **_

To rest. To reflect. To return to God.

This book is his blueprint for how we do that -- as individuals, as families, and as a nation.

🔥 You'll discover how Charlie learned to honor the Sabbath in a culture that never stops
🔥 How setting aside just one day a week gave him clarity, peace, and strength
🔥 Why he believed this message could spark a spiritual revival across America

I know he would've wanted you to have this book.

**When you give today to Turning Point USA, you 're not just supporting the movement Charlie built -- you're helping pass on the message he felt most urgently in his final months. **

**[And we’ll ship you a copy of Charlie’s final book straight to your door.](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=3a9c1d1dcc9140e49df7638155089d52&_e=bi3GTbPXILLVlZr5_syTMrXcwvxTdwIWc66p7XAz7b6qjljPWSqxkU6MEyGMzCDgYY4K2tDoysavDZ_PplwloYd8NL6URteTdhJGIjChQpHsHyi9HqsH4rAk_pHpZEStLcdpt_7LH7mvETY2TjGEFgxU4QzbgKMq-p5ZJ620QUvMGYYkOT_xsPeMrFvlk18KM0oUqY2uf8jx34nLNTvDk8iw20Lr2CiF9G-tKA-w9oSQM7QnxAVY1yXYPQXcHHli01aVpxdRjm2-u1PsBcf-uguH5XktvGjfSEKhJbaiXRhLB9T-8gZEGH4D5islspuYZUdXDLaXf8KcIgdbSNMD1XlPRFidQiIQASTPYFldNjqSzs2NebKMtVrISTvNAQ2DgTNYw-E769R-ot_SdO1bnrJC1N_bN7twa18Eo9PwbVFZwI2lGZ3KUjEs3Jpju0pva28x4W3hxA4XG-8guX9bqEu7eLOTxf_4Txxxqu-OqsJjAaZ2DTYaaFtobP2MMLS3CYE8vSTUMIjn_FZDkOLOQipqryLiGWEl5Uuv4tq-5JJxf6iAdYzRSIi_7iN8JmyWOH4Ns5XrP4SyCK5siu1LwE04OKzvbhzQ0VQX_xlj5Kb6KhrPtb_N6_BJPDjg0IgIEDW4OiptUcwZkWxGtgNkLD1N74qhLe1I71pRDpBj7O71rPMIwJC4tFPko3LmDMWr)**

Fellow Patriot, thank you, in advance, for helping reach the next generation with truth, faith, and moral courage -- _the very things Charlie gave his life for. _

And as you do, may the message of this book lead you -- just as it led Charlie -- to a deeper trust in God, a stronger love for your family, and a renewed peace in your own soul.

**For Charlie, **

**Justin Streiff **
Chief Operating Officer
Turning Point USA

clean_body: no matter what| | | | | Fellow Patriot, | | Charlie Kirk built a movement for truth -- but his final message pointed to something eternal. It wasn't about politics... or elections... or even about the culture war. His final book was deeply personal, and unlike anything Charlie had written before... It was about the Sabbath. About sacred rest. Reconnecting with God. Charlie wrote this book because he knew what America was missing... and what he nearly lost himself. He found that in a world addicted to busyness, noise, and scrolling... The most radical act of resistance is to STOP. To rest. To reflect. To return to God. This book is his blueprint for how we do that -- as individuals, as families, and as a nation. 🔥 You'll discover how Charlie learned to honor the Sabbath in a culture that never stops 🔥 How setting aside just one day a week gave him clarity, peace, and strength 🔥 Why he believed this message could spark a spiritual revival across America I know he would've wanted you to have this book. When you give today to Turning Point USA, you 're not just supporting the movement Charlie built -- you're helping pass on the message he felt most urgently in his final months. Fellow Patriot, thank you, in advance, for helping reach the next generation with truth, faith, and moral courage -- the very things Charlie gave his life for. And as you do, may the message of this book lead you -- just as it led Charlie -- to a deeper trust in God, a stronger love for your family, and a renewed peace in your own soul. For Charlie, Justin Streiff Chief Operating Officer Turning Point USA P.S. Charlie Kirk's final book, Stop, in the Name of God, is a heartfelt call to slow down, remember what's eternal, and rest in God. 4940 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044

name: Douglas Carswell
subject: If You Want Parent Power, Only HB2 Will Do
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/hb2parentpower?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
| _**If you're not in front of our Saturday email, you're behind.**_
---
| Dear Friend, **Over the past few years, Mississippi lawmakers have passed some critical conservative reforms. **

Last year, Mississippi became the first state in America to legislate to eliminate the income tax in 40 years. In 2022, we implemented flat tax reform. A few years before that, we passed important labor market reforms. In 2024, we reformed school funding to get more money into the classroom.

**It is thanks to these flagship conservative reforms that Mississippi has enjoyed more economic growth in the past five years than over the previous fifteen combined. **

Yet every single time one of these flagship conservative reform was being considered, I noticed a similar pattern.

**Those opposed to flagship conservative policy are too wily to come straight out and say they don’t want conservative policy in a conservative state. **What they do instead is offer less substantial alternatives, which might be perfectly good policy, but don’t really change much at all.

On school funding, for example, those opposed to the new funding formula offered a few tweaks to the old system. Those that did not want income tax to be eliminated proposed a handful of performative tax reductions here and there.

Now that Mississippi has a real chance to achieve universal school choice, we are seeing the same distraction strategy.

**Speaker Jason White’s Mississippi Education Freedom Bill (HB 2) is the most consequential education legislation seen in a generation. **

It establishes Magnolia Student Accounts as education savings accounts to enable universal school choice in Mississippi. Families would receive roughly $7,000 per child deposited into a dedicated account. Parents could use these funds for tuition, curriculum materials, or other approved education expenses at the school of their choice—public, private, charter, or homeschool.

The program is due to begin in the 2027-28 school year with 12,500 accounts. Half of those (6,250) are reserved for students currently enrolled in public schools, while the remaining half are awarded via a first-come, first-served lottery to any eligible student.

Speaker White’s bill goes further by dismantling outdated, self-serving bureaucratic restrictions. It eliminates school districts' ability to block student transfers: If a receiving district is willing and has capacity, students can freely switch. The bill also removes barriers to charter school growth. HB 2 allows charters to open wherever operators see demand and viability, enabling statewide expansion.

**You would have to be a socialist to oppose this** – which is why it was so disappointing to see some Republicans listed at the bottom of this message vote against parent power.
---
|
---
| **Having failed to kill HB2 in the House, the socialists are now trying another tactic. They are offering up far less significant reforms that appeal to conservative ears, but fall far short of giving parents power.**

This week the Senate approved a cluster of such education bills. There’s a bill that will require financial literacy lessons, another that will insist on civics. One of the bills approved by the Senate will try to improve math outcomes, another that will require 8th graders to reach a certain reading standard before advancing.

All of these things may be desirable, but they fall far short of parent power.

**_The danger is that some misguided voices big up these bills as something more substantial than they really are – and in doing make it easier for those opposed to flagship conservative reform to quietly kill off the important bits in HB2._**

HB2 has now passed out of the Mississippi House and is on its way for consideration by the State Senate.

If enacted, this would represent the pinnacle of conservative education reform in the United States. Most importantly, it shows a deep understanding that truly successful education reform requires parental involvement.

The Magnolia State has made great progress in recent years on the education front. Mississippi’s fourth graders now read better than those in New York, California, or Minnesota, according to National Assessment of Educational Progress (NAEP) scores. **You read that correctly: A state that barely a decade ago ranked near the bottom for fourth grade reading now sits near the top of the NAEP tables.**

But despite Mississippi’s stellar progress, almost half of fourth graders still are not proficient in reading and math, and roughly one in four elementary students continues to be chronically absent.

The solution to that is not to micromanage how teachers teach in every classroom in our state, but to give families the power to choose the education for their child.

Mississippi needs to give parents - not politicians - the ultimate oversight of what happens in the classroom.

**You cannot credibly claim to be a conservative in the legislature if you oppose HB2.** Here, incidentally, is a list of the Republican members of the House that sided with the socialists against parent power.

**Who sided with progressives to try to block school choice?**
* Richard Bennett
* Andy Boyd
* Billy Calvert
* Carolyn Crawford
* Becky Currie
* Jill Ford
* Greg Haney
* Stacey Hobgood-Wilkes
* Timmy Ladner
* Clay Mansell
* Kent McCarty
* Missy McGee
* Dana McLean
* Gene Newman
* Fred Shanks
* Troy Smith
* Lance Varner

Stay warm this weekend!
---
| [Forward this email to a friend!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=008fafbf2e&e=5703353baa "Forward this email to a friend!")
---
| |
---
Warm regards,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO
---
|
---
| | _ _
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
Mississippi Center for Public Policy520 George StJackson, MS 39202-3013

name: Roy Cooper
subject: a few things that are important to me
body:
Will you help me fight for a better country?
|
# [](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2365?source=&t=1&akid=408%2E124072%2EAGxW2Z)
I want to tell you about a few things that are important to me, Peter, so I hope you’ll give me just a minute or two of your time today: **Public education:** My mom was a public school teacher right here in North Carolina, and I attended public schools all the way from first grade through university and law school. Our future leaders are learning in public schools today. I believe _every_ child deserves an excellent public education — no matter where their parents live or what they earn — and I’ll make public education a priority in the Senate. **Health care access:** Expanding Medicaid was one of our most impactful accomplishments during my service as Governor of North Carolina. America is the richest country in the world, and every one of us deserves the care we need to stay healthy — and bringing Medicaid Expansion to NC helped more than 670,000 people get it. But the entire Medicaid system is now at risk because national Republicans decided to slash Medicaid funding and give a handout to the rich instead. I will fight to save Medicaid for all Americans. **Voting rights:** North Carolina has been a proving ground for the GOP’s worst efforts to undermine voting rights and access. They’ve enacted ultra-partisan gerrymanders and restrictive anti-voter laws. In the wake of a 2024 election loss, Republicans even launched a lawsuit attempting to throw out tens of thousands of valid ballots and change the result. We must defend and expand voting rights to ensure that every one of us can have our fair say in our democracy — and we have to be prepared for the GOP to try to steal future elections that they lose. **[Peter, I know we share many of the same values, beliefs, and hopes for our nation’s future. I’m ready to do everything in my power to make this country better for all of us, but I need your help to make it to the U.S. Senate. Can I count on you to donate $5 or more right now?](https://act.roycooper.com/go/4662?t=8&akid=408%2E124072%2EAGxW2Z)** | **[DONATE](https://act.roycooper.com/go/4663?t=9&akid=408%2E124072%2EAGxW2Z)**
---
I appreciate all your help in this fight,
Roy Cooper
[](https://act.roycooper.com/go/4663?t=10&akid=408%2E124072%2EAGxW2Z)
* * *
Democrat Roy Cooper is running for U.S. Senate to help take back the Majority for Democrats. North Carolina is Democrats’ best chance to flip a seat from red to blue — the path to stopping Republicans in Washington starts here.

National Republicans will target North Carolina as a key battleground and invest heavily in defeating us.

Cooper is a former state legislator, Attorney General, and most recently Governor of North Carolina. North Carolina will be the most competitive Senate election of 2026, and Cooper enters the race as the most formidable candidate of either party.

Cooper’s signature achievements include helping to expand Medicaid and helping make NC the top state for business by creating thousands of jobs and growing the clean energy economy.

**[Donate today to help win this seat and flip the Senate blue.](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1914?source=&t=2&akid=408%2E124072%2EAGxW2Z)**
[DONATE](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1914?source=&t=3&akid=408%2E124072%2EAGxW2Z)
---
[DONATE MONTHLY](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1915?source=&t=4&akid=408%2E124072%2EAGxW2Z)
[SHOP OUR MERCH STORE](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2133?t=5&akid=408%2E124072%2EAGxW2Z)
[info@roycooper.com](mailto:info@roycooper.com) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.roycooper.com/go/825?t=6&akid=408%2E124072%2EAGxW2Z)
Cooper Victory Fund
PO Box 1190
Raleigh, NC 27602
Paid for by Cooper Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Cooper for North Carolina, DSCC, and North Carolina Democratic Party — Federal.
---
Contributions or gifts to Cooper Victory Fund are not tax deductible.
The first $7,000 of each contribution from a person and the first $10,000 from a multicandidate committee (“PAC”) will be allocated to Cooper for North Carolina. The first $3,500 of a person’s contribution and the first $5,000 of a PAC’s contribution will be designated for the primary election; the next $3,500/$5,000 will be designated for the general election. The next $10,000 from a person and $5,000 from a PAC will be allocated to North Carolina Democratic Party – Federal. The next $44,300 of a contribution from a person and the next $15,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC General Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Headquarters Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Legal Fund. A contributor may designate his or her contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if following it would result in an excessive contribution.
Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email address, with a check, or with a spouse — thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.
By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

[You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time.](http://act.roycooper.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=408%2E124072%2EAGxW2Z)
If you wish to receive fewer messages from us, [submit this form to let us know.](https://act.roycooper.com/signup/i-want-less-emails-cooper-north-carolina/?t=11&akid=408%2E124072%2EAGxW2Z)

Friend,
---
Every 40 seconds a child goes missing in America.* Many are lured in when they are on Snapchat or TikTok by predators who confine these children to traffic them for sex.Today, a child is waiting to be found. **[For just $25, $50, or $100, you can help reunite a child with their parents before midnight.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=b4a91940a9994ecc8f819fb0ba701adc&_e=hjhP2uwVcAHLymBzJdrZW22C4KyJQZ0ciZP__a4WYkoXKvbHEi_XkH8WEmHJ3Qy-gkK11GjMHiolxhu7UtKCGeaWd_TteuZ-CEOmujE39Mq25wBxQcYyKjlKselKqpUmvaqK7rQWer8Z4xJtRfRBawb8z4_Tdi-hQriQm7j-vPzH1GcUwXbJnTsIgfTMD4a3B8dVjOKhaOJIQQJ7R3h1gfk9wm6lpgbNJedFemDjq8Rfrz_8Uo_knWtzSl5ohUjjkPOVK-bXeLJd7-Bl0K4bJAUQkE0xdX-vcF4TMikeZwm8CtHT-vjGrRW9pBPVyr8jV3l0ZiYOdqtu_lZ0IpLeR5eMSwBRc5SM9nYXEMof1Mg-zsO9aH9yvny4561FPzQVG6xxBsIEXz2t6tSm_40ck3qitQ9ybWMBlYqIQm-pZ1-4kB-c_nEn4ABruza0G7Gzd74ONQaRky7897Zv1Iq3VZOTSlytJ-VHKMw1J7zhe0icxCdT7hJGpCq2nIMRpTVzYl6FArIQ_ZGvPB17xc-cKGM2UwQturmkpII-EAoNq_mbAB3PntZwNuG-QC3fpdjtYtzrg2IK-ZiVpkcZNgoIkrKFQT7dumZYLTeyYFLLeLu_G8HpI5BuIC0zbTmWjAlNn8k6TXcjYP3puCrqUJh1TM10IthQLvXvbPte7jmcMsj8n8s8zJHB_kNtJVI1qBOQJkFTwuGcWs0LF8v0_I_hhhQ9WVrl-9mqtQQV8TAfldmjSn2Ks0Tm9pwqHRXEKSO43uMOUfb1N2kkXUlBMO7bgLPMfjWQB5wv0efDwWJ0pYGKG7sVbnWg7txjhbcZwBUBena6O6b7DKTN_fUQrqcwvg%3D%3D)** My name is Eduardo Verastegui. I produced the movie Sound of Freedom because I couldn't stay silent anymore. I've seen these children after raids -- shaking, crying, whispering "Please don't let them take me again." They look just like my nieces and nephews. Their eyes haunt me every single night.Can you help me put an end to the nightmare for these children?

I'm reaching out to you from the **Sound of Freedom Foundation** -- the organization that funds real-time rescue operations in partnership with law enforcement and former special forces to find and extract children from traffickers -- fast.When a tip comes in, the teams made up of former Navy SEALs, undercover investigators, and cyber-intelligence analysts move within hours, sometimes minutes.In partnership with local law enforcement, we pull these children out of hotels, vehicles moving across the country, and brothels.The **Sound of Freedom Foundation** team works tirelessly to protect youth from the ravages of human trafficking and exploitation. Our mission is clear - to create a world where no child ever has to live in fear of being trafficked or exploited. clean_body: Today a child is waiting to be found—will you answer the call?| | | Friend, Every 40 seconds a child goes missing in America. Many are lured in when they are on Snapchat or TikTok by predators who confine these children to traffic them for sex.Today, a child is waiting to be found. My name is Eduardo Verastegui. I produced the movie Sound of Freedom because I couldn't stay silent anymore. I've seen these children after raids -- shaking, crying, whispering "Please don't let them take me again." They look just like my nieces and nephews. Their eyes haunt me every single night.Can you help me put an end to the nightmare for these children? I'm reaching out to you from the Sound of Freedom Foundation -- the organization that funds real-time rescue operations in partnership with law enforcement and former special forces to find and extract children from traffickers -- fast.When a tip comes in, the teams made up of former Navy SEALs, undercover investigators, and cyber-intelligence analysts move within hours, sometimes minutes.In partnership with local law enforcement, we pull these children out of hotels, vehicles moving across the country, and brothels.The Sound of Freedom Foundation team works tirelessly to protect youth from the ravages of human trafficking and exploitation. Our mission is clear - to create a world where no child ever has to live in fear of being trafficked or exploited. We don't wait.Today -- a child is waiting to be found.I'm personally asking you: will you help me rescue one before midnight? Friend, the facts continue to haunt me and tear me apart every day: Most victims are only 12 years old 35-40 million suffer in sex trafficking worldwide every single day Less than 0.04% are ever found - but we can change that We can't continue to stand by and let these children live in fear and terror.Your gift today goes straight to the next rescue: $25 keeps our 24/7 rescue hotline open one more shift $50 provides transportation to a safe house $100 gives one rescued child 72 hours in a safe house with a warm bed, food, and someone to hold them while they cry I wish I could do this alone, but I can't.I need you with me today. Please don't close this email without helping. One child's future -- one little boy or girl who still believes someone is coming -- is hanging on what we do in the next few hours.Click below to give today - Every single dollar lands instantly where seconds save lives. From the bottom of my heart, thank you. Eduardo Verastegui Sound of Freedom, Producer For the Sound of Freedom Foundation "Let the little children come to me." -- Jesus 2024 National Center for Missing & Exploited Children 6671 Southwest Freeway, Suite 700, Houston TX 77074

A new study found that we’re paying 96% of the costs.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123933907/597064725/-153530995?refcode=EM_F_260122tariffs_N_TSB_90DO_5_NG_N_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjODMxYTAxNC0yZmY5LWYwMTEtOGQ0Yy0wMDIyNDgyZDI3OWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LwgvGcPXiuce_cttOHoTJyEom5vD6DG-X3TJwpNww5M=) Ever wonder why everything feels more expensive? According to a new study, **hardworking Americans absorbed 96% of the costs incurred by Trump’s tariffs in 2025.**

As found by the Kiel Institute for the World Economy, importers bore only 4% of the costs and passed the rest onto American consumers, while **US customs revenue surged by around $200 billion**. With so much going into his coffers, no wonder Trump thinks affordability is a fake word.

**On his so-called Liberation Day, Trump made the false promise that exporters would be footing the bill, and – even now – continues to threaten new tariffs on a whim. Once again, the people of our nation are paying the price of an unhinged administration that values its billionaire pals over the well-being of the country.**

While folks are being forced to pay surging healthcare premiums and skyrocketing costs for everyday goods, and facing the lowest job growth in decades, Republicans are proving that they are incapable of running our government. We must take back the House and put an end to the chaos.

[Mark as Spam](https://trk.americanmediawatchdog.com/?xul=6zs1j7t5dhe4avz97uxx7mw1thurrnz19nf9yhl6avck3hgmbe17x03mqayjhsqmsgt5qjv3ws89330m6rblzr8st43yry4d628cbso96gcj4zq5bp&__stmp=t9dh3v&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh) | [Unsubscribe](https://trk.americanmediawatchdog.com/?xul=6zs1j7t5dhe4avz97uxx7mw1thurrnz19nf9yhl6avck3hgmbe17x03mqayjhsqmsgt5qjv3ws89330m6rblzr8st43yry4d628cbso96gcj4zq5bp&__stmp=t9dh3v&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh)
Please read the message below from our sponsor.
* * *
**We're saying goodbye.** We've made the tough decision to retire our best-selling generator of 2025. The Patriot Power Generator 2500X has helped thousands of American families weather storms and power outages. But it's time to make room for what's new. We want to send it off with a BANG. So we are bundling our remaining inventory with a boatload of free upgrades to make this a no-brainer for you. When you grab one of the final units, we'll include absolutely free:
* Double the solar power (2 Free Panels)
* The heavy-duty Roll N' Go cart
* An extended 3-year warranty

This offer ends the moment our inventory hits zero. Don't wait until the lights go out. – Allen & Erin, Co-Founders [**Click right here to see it in action!**](https://trk.americanmediawatchdog.com/?xtl=jvadppm2cg7ltpihbtnkhtspeiug1stz8g1w4yfszq2nfeiwnapp2fccf963w6bja0greyfa9wp0ajj7df6k3vov4vv9493b0a4tbkk7ml94yi1ffndzgn2b7murbnnwb532moiv821qqpqxcvx3ezrzwedoxwwaa303upiazb6e6f59d94nk3sixor8fydzqla8m5sy4w31ehacj49xz6sdrhb6amkxytapqog0aq7aqa9jnxxda0w39tzp0xjqyotqqal9vncjvmvmcspa&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t9dh3v&__onlt=h) [](https://trk.americanmediawatchdog.com/?xtl=jvadppm2cg7ltpihbtnkhtspeiug1stz8g1w4yfszq2nfeiwnapp2fccf963w6bja0greyfa9wp0ajj7df6k3vov4vv9493b0a4tbkk7ml94yi1ffndzgn2b7murbnnwb532moiv821qqpqxcvx3ezrzwedoxwwaa303upiazb6e6f59d94nk3sixor8fydzqla8m5sy4w31ehacj49xz6sdrhb6amkxytapqog0aq7aqa9jnxxda0w39tzp0xjqyotqqal9vncjvmvmcspa&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t9dh3v&__onlt=h)

**_ ❌ The Supreme Court gets **PACKED**. ❌ The filibuster is **GONE**. ❌ Trump's America First agenda is **dead in the water.
