clean_body: | Peter, This is my I wouldn't be reaching out like this if the situation weren't critical. Let me explain: FIRST: While we're building a grassroots campaign in Georgia, Jon Ossoff and Chuck Schumer's machine is raking in MILLIONS from Hollywood, Wall Street, and Soros-backed groups. THEN: Schumer dumped another wave of dark money into Georgia, all to NOW: Our campaign is still short of our EOM goal, and If we fail in Georgia, Schumer takes control. And that means: ❌ The Supreme Court gets PACKED. ❌ The filibuster is GONE. ❌ Trump's America First agenda is dead in the water. That's why THIS EOQ deadline is EVERYTHING. I'm asking you, from the bottom of my heart as a trucker, a Georgian, and a conservative fighter: We don't have Hollywood billionaires. We don't have George Soros. We have YOU , Peter, grassroots patriots who believe Georgia must be RED again. | Together, we can end Schumer's schemes, flip Georgia, and defend America First. For America, Mike Collins PAID FOR BY MIKE COLLINS FOR SENATE PO Box 6491 Athens, GA 30604 If you would like to opt-out of important updates like this, please .

name: Josh Shapiro
subject: “You better win”
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHAPIRO FOR PENNSYLVANIA
body:
It’s on us to make them proud on Election Day

Hey there, it's Josh Shapiro — with a quick story for you. When I first ran for Governor back in 2022, my wife, Lori, would put her finger to my chest and tell me “You better win” every morning on my way out of the house. And Derek, she’s not the only one. Every family, every child, every teacher, and every worker is counting on this campaign right now. They’ve placed their faith in all of us to protect their freedoms, invest in their futures, and win this enormously important election on November 3rd. It’s on _us_ to make them proud on Election Day — because so much is on the line. [_**Please, will you chip in today to power our campaign throughout this uncertain, historic election year?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123936009/597071470/1156619579?refcode=email_012326_win&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTY5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNzIwODgxNC0zMGY5LWYwMTEtOGQ0Yy0wMDIyNDgyZDI3OWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TXAiT09_EaOigPnjPRUfL0xn7V_vUtqKU0MLsOlZRxM=) We cannot become complacent, Derek. Just fourteen months ago, Trump won Pennsylvania. It was a painful, disappointing night for so many of us. **Now, I’m determined to make sure history doesn’t repeat itself.** [_**Derek, there is no donation too small for our campaign. Because in a state like Pennsylvania, every dime could be the difference between victory and defeat. With all that said, can I count on your support? Our campaign is getting ready to make some tough finance decisions, so we want to raise as much grassroots money as possible in the next 24 hours.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123936010/597071471/1156619579?refcode=email_012326_win&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTY5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNzIwODgxNC0zMGY5LWYwMTEtOGQ0Yy0wMDIyNDgyZDI3OWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TXAiT09_EaOigPnjPRUfL0xn7V_vUtqKU0MLsOlZRxM=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | | [Donate $5 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123936011/597071472/1156619579?&amount=5&amounts=5,15,25,50,100&express_lane=true&refcode=email_012326_win&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTY5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNzIwODgxNC0zMGY5LWYwMTEtOGQ0Yy0wMDIyNDgyZDI3OWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TXAiT09_EaOigPnjPRUfL0xn7V_vUtqKU0MLsOlZRxM=)

Who wins and who loses could come down to a few hundred votes — so I need you in this fight with me now more than ever. National Republicans are already pouring MILLIONS of dollars into this race — and experts say this race could cost $100 million in total. | | Peter,
---
| | Charlie Kirk built a movement for truth -- but his final message pointed to something eternal.

It wasn't about politics... or elections... or even about the culture war.

His final book was deeply personal, and unlike anything Charlie had written before...

**It was about the Sabbath. **

About sacred rest. Reconnecting with God.

Charlie wrote this book because he knew what America was missing... and what he nearly lost himself.

He found that in a world addicted to busyness, noise, and scrolling...

_**The most radical act of resistance is to STOP. **_

To rest. To reflect. To return to God.

This book is his blueprint for how we do that -- as individuals, as families, and as a nation.

🔥 You'll discover how Charlie learned to honor the Sabbath in a culture that never stops
🔥 How setting aside just one day a week gave him clarity, peace, and strength
🔥 Why he believed this message could spark a spiritual revival across America

I know he would've wanted you to have this book.

**When you give today to Turning Point USA, you 're not just supporting the movement Charlie built -- you're helping pass on the message he felt most urgently in his final months. **

**[And we’ll ship you a copy of Charlie’s final book straight to your door.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=c4560444a4914c47986b617b2840c5e2&_e=uSQh1VBzyaZC2p2-kmHAMhuvRySZ6aSxAqjRlmMhsCGJOOPdXNwZI835DuBOxg5Qdf7DfOrBkG4IjEn10T4FuRi3bskolZQ0fgCseRZUaSbwGW73nlUUaQxA3iNIRPbqR2-eQevYbiJo4A5YZFkCoiySs2XHKXpo_Wwm2sOjN6ubE1Gluv4YYmxlBWqqrjd3JH2VGl7vW-bcNuyqOKjzdDqpuNaU94ERUwCICyqT5MaW-R9P7tzfV2j484BjzIN-WczkqOinbK1fSCPCcXeqNZQv8H9ys25E4xcjsH0F1yqofaZy9CLnZ0htdUunpTna_y0IOcHvg5gGSdULoyNNYYAx4lKAjPixfmvT538fyU7vFrJCkLR6phKQLr6GCM1D14aMpoSGZuhfVKY6S4uyBs5QSsvfwgpIUlleGPy0N-w7hvxB0og0ciNgrFMDDH0pR9n20ig21FwnSPj477luAUqL_BJo618skn0wi1FcezFzsNmxwzf-ZEsHIUE4hdywrQgv4CpI-nHXABttTILJQuLEpvwHt68j4sH_CMtbHNzrOZXYk_-08JJAYxs-4AJA6k6rGEIdkYOx71WQJLfbqjeleE20pYrsOhsWpIEgvbx53uhrKgimlyOGAZDWjbT8DHsYzfTEmLXcptmLvtmZ-TgNnF1g8Ah0e_6Bg2gIF80NjFWhRTgF51YMH0CYOn02)**

Peter, thank you, in advance, for helping reach the next generation with truth, faith, and moral courage -- _the very things Charlie gave his life for. _

And as you do, may the message of this book lead you -- just as it led Charlie -- to a deeper trust in God, a stronger love for your family, and a renewed peace in your own soul.
---
**For Charlie, **

**Justin Streiff **
Chief Operating Officer

clean_body: For the soul...| | | | | Peter, | | Charlie Kirk built a movement for truth -- but his final message pointed to something eternal. It wasn't about politics... or elections... or even about the culture war. His final book was deeply personal, and unlike anything Charlie had written before... It was about the Sabbath. About sacred rest. Reconnecting with God. Charlie wrote this book because he knew what America was missing... and what he nearly lost himself. He found that in a world addicted to busyness, noise, and scrolling... The most radical act of resistance is to STOP. To rest. To reflect. To return to God. This book is his blueprint for how we do that -- as individuals, as families, and as a nation. 🔥 You'll discover how Charlie learned to honor the Sabbath in a culture that never stops 🔥 How setting aside just one day a week gave him clarity, peace, and strength 🔥 Why he believed this message could spark a spiritual revival across America I know he would've wanted you to have this book. When you give today to Turning Point USA, you 're not just supporting the movement Charlie built -- you're helping pass on the message he felt most urgently in his final months. Peter, thank you, in advance, for helping reach the next generation with truth, faith, and moral courage -- the very things Charlie gave his life for. And as you do, may the message of this book lead you -- just as it led Charlie -- to a deeper trust in God, a stronger love for your family, and a renewed peace in your own soul. For Charlie, Justin Streiff Chief Operating Officer Turning Point USA P.S. Charlie Kirk's final book, Stop, in the Name of God, is a heartfelt call to slow down, remember what's eternal, and rest in God. 4940 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044

name: Kristen McDonald Rivet
subject: ICE must be held accountable. Here’s what I’m doing:
body:
|
#
Friend, Like many of you, I’ve watched in horror as ICE operations across the country have led to tragic outcomes – most recently the fatal shooting of Renée Good, a mother of three who was killed by an ICE agent in Minneapolis. What’s happened since has only made things worse. Federal authorities sidelined the Minnesota Bureau of Criminal Apprehension and instead prioritized investigating Renée’s spouse. **It’s outrageous. And it’s unacceptable.** That’s why I led 25 of my House battleground colleagues in demanding a full, impartial, and transparent investigation into this tragedy – and real accountability for ICE. We’re also demanding answers about how ICE recruits, trains, and oversees its agents – because government agencies are meant to support communities, not turn against the people who live in them. [**If you believe, as I do, that we must hold federal agencies accountable and insist on transparency and justice, please add your name to our petition calling for an independent and credible investigation into ICE practices and this deadly incident.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123942268/597084844/-462830333?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOTVkNTc4Ny0zNWY5LWYwMTEtOGQ0Yy0wMDIyNDgyZDI3OWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qm9Be47dMrePQJiEkr5tv6iK2AKrcSIeSJp2bwBxXJY=&emci=bc5d5787-35f9-f011-8d4c-0022482d279b&emdi=c95d5787-35f9-f011-8d4c-0022482d279b&ceid=27257697) | [Sign the petition](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123942269/597084856/-462830333?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOTVkNTc4Ny0zNWY5LWYwMTEtOGQ0Yy0wMDIyNDgyZDI3OWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qm9Be47dMrePQJiEkr5tv6iK2AKrcSIeSJp2bwBxXJY=&emci=bc5d5787-35f9-f011-8d4c-0022482d279b&emdi=c95d5787-35f9-f011-8d4c-0022482d279b&ceid=27257697)
---

clean_body: | Friend, Like many of you, I’ve watched in horror as ICE operations across the country have led to tragic outcomes – most recently the fatal shooting of Renée Good, a mother of three who was killed by an ICE agent in Minneapolis. What’s happened since has only made things worse. Federal authorities sidelined the Minnesota Bureau of Criminal Apprehension and instead prioritized investigating Renée’s spouse. It’s outrageous. And it’s unacceptable. That’s why I led 25 of my House battleground colleagues in demanding a full, impartial, and transparent investigation into this tragedy – and real accountability for ICE. We’re also demanding answers about how ICE recruits, trains, and oversees its agents – because government agencies are meant to support communities, not turn against the people who live in them. | Thank you, Kristen | We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . Thank you for supporting Kristen McDonald Rivet for Congress! Kristen for Michigan P.O. Box 854 Bay City, MI 48707 United States

name: Stop ICE via Our Revolution
subject: Tell Congress: Defund ICE NOW!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ]Our Revolution Logo

Peter Willis,

Shocking footage from Minneapolis shows ICE violently assaulting
protesters, setting off flash-bang grenades, and using teargas. Last week,
a family with six children trying to get home from their son’s basketball
game were tear gassed in their car. Their six month old had to be revived.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34959?source=email-20260124&t=1011&akid=10117%2E5885482%2E9Osfp3 ]Headline: 6-month-old revived with CPR after tear gas floods family's
SUV amid ICE protests

Rather than de-escalate, Trump is doubling down, sending in more ICE
agents and readying 1,500 active-duty soldiers to prepare for a possible
deployment to Minnesota.

It's all happening because Congress signed a virtual blank check to ICE,
sending a staggering **$28 billion** a year its way. Bernie is sounding
the alarm, warning that the American people do not want a “domestic army.”

Together let’s echo Bernie’s call and make it clear to Congress that it's
long past time we defund ICE and stop the terror it is unleashing on our
communities.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34959?source=email-20260124&t=1012&akid=10117%2E5885482%2E9Osfp3 ]Tell Congress: Defund Trump's "domestic army" and get ICE out of our
communities NOW. Click here to urgently send your message.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34959?source=email-20260124&t=1013&akid=10117%2E5885482%2E9Osfp3 ]ADD YOUR NAME

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34959?source=email-20260124&t=1014&akid=10117%2E5885482%2E9Osfp3 ]Headline: 'No' says Bernie Sanders, 'the American people do not want
Trump's domestic army'

Right now, ICE receives more money than the FBI, DEA, ATF, US Marshals
Service, and the Bureau of Prisons COMBINED.

Every dollar poured into ICE is a dollar that could help struggling
families, expand healthcare, or feed children. Instead, we're funding
attacks on members of our community, massive deportation sweeps at
workplaces, and the separation of parents from their children.

If enough of us raise our voices, Congress cannot ignore this moral
outrage. Across the country, local governments are already cutting ties
with ICE. The movement is growing – but it will only succeed if ALL our
members of Congress feel the heat.

Together let’s show that we REFUSE to let our government spend billions on
this violent fear machine.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34959?source=email-20260124&t=1015&akid=10117%2E5885482%2E9Osfp3 ]Add your name now to demand Congress defund ICE and invest in real
community needs, not terror squads. Click here to take urgent action.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34959?source=email-20260124&t=1016&akid=10117%2E5885482%2E9Osfp3 ]ADD YOUR NAME

We need to show every member of Congress that Americans are watching – and
we are done funding Trump’s domestic army. Let’s end this violence now.

When we organize, we win,

Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9?t=1001&akid=10117%2E5885482%2E9Osfp3 ]Facebook | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10?t=1002&akid=10117%2E5885482%2E9Osfp3 ]Twitter | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/11?t=1003&akid=10117%2E5885482%2E9Osfp3 ]Instagram | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2355?t=1004&akid=10117%2E5885482%2E9Osfp3 ]Youtube | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2356?t=1005&akid=10117%2E5885482%2E9Osfp3 ]Website |

**This is Michele Tafoya. **
**I wanted you to hear it directly from me: I'm running for United States Senate here in Minnesota.**
**I 'm not a politician, and I've never run for office before. But I made this decision because my state has fallen so far from grace in such a short amount of time. I know if every rational, commonsense, patriotic American comes together, we can pull off the unthinkable and win this seat.
[Will you become one of the FIRST donors to my Senate campaign?](https://links.trueamericanconservatives.com/s/c/8Yf1swiQOYM22TDOeeybV2et1vdgQPkEY---4CReV7cJNBOk2SuASmNLEPrkNrz4bYAtEgL9rDS5VPZvGWYfQIpSJAGqvDesz_wNltzJ8Dk0MwiMo6JT3xTnCt51Hm_f4u71fxvjYZVS4OZsf9rfQFYgus8ROh0s5g7B-lPPId-mxNX7r9j4EsLedQhAQnafAIB7_sB4Bm5Cn8cP-yK8Es1fDYIMqPvSehduaNlaoBR26KqSdmh0btl0nvQA387JRImvVREp7HrEdroiJWIQlyc44wkMjjt3WDVaobbeoapjGJAQtFJiK6erqtjr6QhOvVDNLREMTDMHtPb1UXvUbNIdb8iv8RDRtN5Rjshyn9SUAoD1m7tmXmOnuAdFRG1LQhVz7xTrAiHmw1qw_cL7U49i4xZUItRlvc2wrWYmJQo9eSzfaYjlq03DT506m754PYgvIYVrlhYh8d1cuMiltq1Djj3maaEvBgJXa06lNXRWCl4e9fbSlrlaRCVkXdNLRj1UGBFKC7aGO6KoK3JQEIfGCMYUqfudTTLT3uTyXcl9R2kAv8RYP0ihGrLXPwUpVAYD_ZAyh6-XZuJ7GR6Xp9fVUFIY81z8I0C1N7fUbNrwm0_Wz_kVgYrgAxC9cAQ80eABpt5mOSsBEKx2xK4EOEJMFMIv0zgGW6Sc97mFZ6lsOfj81ZkdZ5yS0y0nsYsIBZHKnHdQ66R7GNiTRecioapIJIgif0VPMFHtMWzDk27XuWGZEdXM/ow26beQcrGkqX3oS6iVuTd1fV3RNDN26/17)[BECOME A FOUNDING DONOR
](https://links.trueamericanconservatives.com/s/c/L_wtopciORGlPvSgX0K5ycE__qmYCuTeUffP_-yzJ9ej8Eq-UkskKgCMBnKbfW79QiWZbHoSDdRH6uTm_z2LijZM-0z6kO6ii1x5so85qfG5Yw0k5MLgMtUco5fZcSws1pEQKtW8NxiQvGXQ6UykhDao6VqIhDwfVWQhr-4v2NMwGfshjdSnr89AU9XH0Mcxv8d5N3iAUyfrvFACkzUESGusLa08Y3cBq2A_Oqq6O2BPHf58GedL810sVsE-0VK2NE05A88AWgAADxUZEqK9uY_5D2zeGgLu5BaCL1SrvpOlw9C8DAyCdWVJY8aamd0zIvS2f0Z7aORmX_gijVdqdXOZfOyognWnEeTNX4CaEuYTjuiFGw7K0hk35qdn6Zu7qqYv600-jXdvl7brm1I5ZYc1LI0HO8uYXy-GkRTqOJCBTRj8mRCMNvgf30dV4Edv0as5W0zAPVk4ymO4hVe8_mZmryRZ2xIE9jKTaoOaJsxH55ZTvwIpNTR4TF1QoH3GqS1qYfJkU9gvO_H3Lo6Fpdt6242aj97wjDZP_QaC1M5CrGwWFT2uV-AX42WbwBYPEbCMaFwcN56NUaDTk8BdsnfyvT4rsbBwQwaAt_OWAPIW3F9p5daBy5Mh1Uv8wbvGxq7j42B4YGPISIk-u4ljekQAhrreAfGKGQ0rzanZuFPdZMep5rVugQBvmslVpxJExanLZqp8yDB0-NNFVHp5GVK__OKoHjN5OgiAZr6BdaYZWYjlyhYw/2LRIW96prD8n79fofyToSZzJkBJLCzuY/17)Imagine the look on Tim Walz's face when voters reject his handpicked candidate and elect a Republican for the first time in 20 years!
Here's what I'm picturing... [](https://links.trueamericanconservatives.com/s/c/YoxcuAgW7zt9OUYEViWtB_IjT0EaFRlV_1IUqmPwM03koY_laV8UM5K0LJmDszh9D70FAq1BULMoH0R2h5AmqNUS138gci9t4jhgYdADfTTDj6h94dfYGZJb4JKryPWmPVcTqMzsdLuG93OqylG7Y51qqUmILW-O3i-B-hLs0YBmcWg6U42ivdDNdSUDZd2ciSrVZH3J8Atv7akSeI5NaPUXIHR3WPf7Ith8zNxitsxwP8IZ3NQfB4VF7O5or5_RoFxojTPuxEp_3koLrV6BWi_g4ZnyNyCTiZwPgND8oQw-hqD2tXwtNWR3oXYeAcpzfOalAcvU4UuiNbbM3pEW_pJNMFvgOTuIc4rJ44OJXb8guHJzt3KQv_gDlPaori0tzrAMHQ0Eeki1EPSYvj03Qguvh9HD8gVB2hgUgrrQsbczf3ev0v1iwn2eXAqEM0HlvkUdqpQ54RyC8atrdwyFhtNaS9F7bOy6L3znfYrifCjuuvVjSYGhBqifQ8NVihw-6d5Wf96BiXg5HN2ugGwLcqA3jBCtH-AkkGhIqY3GvlEJTXTWRvoUJY-STVbEd-23xL-hUL9n7qbLOfdZpsocyAZPaRUcJ5T7rkwIin5LOUzcpBDU5NYjoj6a4IQ0R9MjKpQdm3S8-IJxGfZngR6uc-Ws4lpdBTlAyT6ajU3UHsppcRUPqRYxWctvu_Gh3vT03crB2WD8V5P9vmOe6bNrnC5on5OWsPkSSLYDUMZXlLdbRHyNQ3WX/Hm3rrk0ixGFmg9a5GBQK-o7glWms0U7U/17)It won't be easy going toe-to-toe with the DC power brokers and career politicians, but it'll be worth it when we make history together. Trust me. We have the opportunity of a LIFETIME to flip this seat, and I've never been one to give up when the going gets tough. **
**I have a hunch you aren 't either. **
**That 's why folks like you will make the difference between a disappointing defeat and a historic victory. **
**[I’d be honored to have you become a founding donor to my campaign.](https://links.trueamericanconservatives.com/s/c/rhmoeEU6GqGZKnW0SLxV2wz1tf1pRqqmG8qqsR9hJ_t7_f3vQsB-kurkdivWaffAzW-3AqzDYMMktY3TG8mEdsLMFfCr7sc_2a6DejreR74Klmvna44PWwqPNNy6oDqI1J0Mm5bOeJ2NCZS807rsVaND13kqxhrg_cHOpIAI7pTYp2Hdxb2J6mO9vtHQT7UuLhmErtxqs-fbGozsm_BxLQDtfV_86SN5j3YDJNpug_DWFTCtZeZWJg-dZZ_dacE7rwWVT5TCcuP6bz4yceDGZXralAYfhMG_G9IKl1XKj25mbyfldmNrN279jFs5TAF4fuXao3RwHgBxhZiGNEO-sxiFXCQEykXizTjR04H2LDTKn9Txu6V60AL8AlWDW5FEr7UrbnFiB-LXvIelwouJMCmkQceQ339e5UlYgsj6NsQCS8Iw3n6rHIFH2rPYh3ekUsQfpoHk9UvoZDd5IPctqPEs530KXOG18Je-4GMRcd5NozfnJEkAZbMBMfPMXIQkIP1u_tFmrm7GnG81zFlUm1j0NU8k6ykRveBAiC7bUYXUdwY7R0V6E3mjGO5Quix_Zx-xDzjR4StR41Fdu2pLk-wx32KTPvMn5FLrwxdesCT78SUZsdrgHBORWUwX_9jN-uDzG0EGQ1N8PIlX4mZcI_RTmTzh2sSEjudfV9nTvCfWuAVf3ILu7tmtViJXzXP2fmS-pbU2EAXe9tKJVgbaPT8RIHaeXWbvrdOq_45SYgZwZo8I-shB/4eD2xH5DCh4L7tPX5cjolDPOVwviQFwi/17)**

clean_body: I’m running for the United States Senate here in Minnesota. - This is Michele Tafoya. I wanted you to hear it directly from me: I'm running for United States Senate here in Minnesota. I 'm not a politician, and I've never run for office before. But I made this decision because my state has fallen so far from grace in such a short amount of time. I know if every rational, commonsense, patriotic American comes together, we can pull off the unthinkable and win this seat. the look on Tim Walz's face when voters reject his handpicked candidate and elect a Republican for the first time in 20 years! Here's what I'm picturing... won't be easy going toe-to-toe with the DC power brokers and career politicians, but it'll be worth it when we make history together. Trust me. We have the opportunity of a LIFETIME to flip this seat, and I've never been one to give up when the going gets tough. I have a hunch you aren 't either. That 's why folks like you will make the difference between a disappointing defeat and a historic victory. Thanks for all you do! Be brave. Do good. - Michele TafoyaRepublican for Senate, Minnesota official - Michele Tafoya is running for U.S. Senate in Minnesota! Endorse her here:**| | Paid for by Tafoya for Senate 3500 Vicksburg LN N, STE 267, Plymouth, MN 55447 If you would like to opt-out of important updates like this,

name: Tim Walz
subject: They’re not stopping with me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| Friend,

I wanted to emphasize just how serious of a moment we are in.

Donald Trump’s federal agents are going door to door in Minnesota looking for folks based on their accent or color of their skin. Kids are afraid to go to school, small businesses are hurting, a mother is dead, and the people responsible have yet to be held accountable. Instead, Donald Trump’s DOJ is investigating me.

Why? Because my focus has always been protecting the people of Minnesota.

They’re trying to scare me and our state — but Minnesota will not be intimidated into silence and neither will I. This legal battle will be expensive, that’s why they’re doing this. They want me to back down and surrender, but I won’t.

[**I need your help in this fight. If you’re able, please split a donation between our Legal Defense fund and the Voter Protection Project and make sure we can continue to stand up to Donald Trump and his DOJ?**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/101786?t=6&akid=22712%2E878179%2EIOx2D8)

I’m grateful,

Tim Walz If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between DGA Legal Fund and VPP will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/101787?t=7&akid=22712%2E878179%2EIOx2D8)

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=22712%2E878179%2EIOx2D8). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=22712%2E878179%2EIOx2D8).**

subject: wait... you're ignoring us???
disclaimer_text: paid for and provided by End Citizens United Nonfederal, P
body:
| Fight for Reform is dedicated to electing Democrats, transforming our broken campaign finance system, and ending _Citizens United_ state by state. If you would like to get fewer emails, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59469?t=1&akid=23854%2E4449941%2EnyjHSa) If you would like to unsubscribe, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59470?t=2&akid=23854%2E4449941%2EnyjHSa) Listen, this is your final notice.

We’ve reached out to you over and over again. It’s probably time to give up, but we had to try and reach you one more time.

All we’re asking for is your signature on our petition to support the Constitutional Amendment to [**END _Citizens United_**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/72836?t=3&akid=23854%2E4449941%2EnyjHSa) before the Supreme Court ruins all of our progress... but you don’t seem to care?!

We thought after we told you how IMPORTANT this was, you would listen — but [**STILL, NOTHING.**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/72836?t=4&akid=23854%2E4449941%2EnyjHSa)

[**The deadline for our petition is TONIGHT at 11:59PM**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/72836?t=5&akid=23854%2E4449941%2EnyjHSa) [**and you are the only Democrat in your area who hasn't responded.**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/72836?t=6&akid=23854%2E4449941%2EnyjHSa)

[ **Will you PLEASE add your name to our petition to support the Constitutional Amendment to end _Citizens United?_ >> ** ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/72836?t=7&akid=23854%2E4449941%2EnyjHSa) | [SIGN NOW →](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/72836?t=8&akid=23854%2E4449941%2EnyjHSa)
---
Hoping to see your name,

Fight for Reform

**\------ FORWARDED MESSAGE ------
From: Horrible Supreme Court news (Fight For Reform)
Subject: Republicans are thrilled...
To: YOU **

[**HORRIBLE BREAKING NEWS FROM THE SUPREME COURT:**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/72836?t=9&akid=23854%2E4449941%2EnyjHSa)
[**“Supreme Court agrees to hear Republican-backed effort to lift caps on campaign spending”**

_CNN_ ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/72836?t=10&akid=23854%2E4449941%2EnyjHSa) | [](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/72836?t=11&akid=23854%2E4449941%2EnyjHSa)
---|---

[SIGN NOW TO HELP OUR EFFORTS TO END _CITIZENS UNITED_ →](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/72836?t=12&akid=23854%2E4449941%2EnyjHSa)
---
Friend – this could change everything in a TERRIBLE WAY.

This case (backed by Vice President J.D. Vance) would allow BILLIONAIRE DONORS to drop TENS of thousands of dollars into party committees without any caps.

The Supreme Court has already ruled in FAVOR of _Citizens United_ and money in politics. So it’s never been so CRUCIAL that we show WIDESPREAD SUPPORT for getting money OUT of politics once and for all.

That’s why Amy Klobuchar is sounding the alarm:
[](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/72836?t=13&akid=23854%2E4449941%2EnyjHSa)
[**So please Friend, before it’s too late: Sign our petition to support the Constitutional Amendment to END _Citizens United_ and stop billionaire donors from rigging our elections →**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/72836?t=14&akid=23854%2E4449941%2EnyjHSa)
[SIGN THE PETITION →](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/72836?t=15&akid=23854%2E4449941%2EnyjHSa)
---
Thanks,

_Fight for Reform_

name: Team Chris Pappas
subject: Your Supporter Record
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Pappas for Senate
body:
We’re getting ready to close the books on January.
# [](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/126?t=1&akid=4750%2E582294%2Epysd9_)
We had a strong FEC report last quarter. But that’s not enough to keep this campaign going through November.
If we’re going to win, we need to sustain this energy by garnering as much support as possible from folks like you.
Before we close the books on January, we want to make sure that we have the right data on file. _Does this look correct to you?_
**_CHRIS PAPPAS SUPPORTER RECORD_** **Email:** [dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20260124_1.6iEb4z&refcode=em20260124-1&t=2&akid=4750%2E582294%2Epysd9_) **January Donor?** No — not yet! **Suggested Donation:** $5 **[Donate $5 »](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20260124_1.6iEb4z&amount=5&refcode=em20260124-1&t=3&akid=4750%2E582294%2Epysd9_)** _If you’ve donated recently, by check, or using a different email address, thank you! Our records take time to update, but thank you for the support!_
---
With polling showing our race is tied, we need to double down on our fundraising efforts.
Our Republican opponent John Sununu is rolling in piles of cash from big donors as he and his allies try to flip this seat. **They’ll stop at nothing, but we can keep them from winning.**
That’s why we need your support right now. **[Rush a donation of any amount today so we can continue proving this grassroots team has what it takes to keep NH blue.](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20260124_1.6iEb4z&refcode=em20260124-1&t=4&akid=4750%2E582294%2Epysd9_)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20260124_1.6iEb4z&amount=5&refcode=em20260124-1&t=23&akid=4750%2E582294%2Epysd9_)**
Thank you for your support,
Team Pappas
**New Hampshire is poised to be one of the closest Senate races in the country in 2026. Will you chip in today to help Chris stop the Republicans from flipping the Granite State red and expanding their Senate majority?**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_footer?refcode=em20260124-1&t=24&refcode2=4750_582294_pysd9_&akid=4750%2E582294%2Epysd9_)**

* [Unsubscribe](https://act.chrispappas.org/unsubscribe/cps_unsubscribe/?t=27&akid=4750%2E582294%2Epysd9_)

Email us: [teampappas@chrispappas.org](mailto:teampappas@chrispappas.org)

name: Ilhan Omar
subject: Let’s send a message
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=2039%2E791427%2E-DGq3Y)
Friend —
With all the chaos unleashed by Trump and ICE here in Minnesota, I’ve had to take some time away from my campaign for reelection. We’ve had bigger fish to fry over the last month or so.
That said, I finally had a moment to meet with my finance team recently. We reviewed some proposed investments in voter outreach for the campaign; ads, mailers, canvassers, and more.
The problem is that right now, the money for these investments just isn’t in the budget right now. **But I made the difficult decision to move forward anyway,** hoping that this incredible team could help us close any fundraising gaps.
It’s my hope that I can stay on top of the fight against this administration, from the streets of Minneapolis to the halls of Congress, and that supporters like you will have my back.
If you’ve been waiting for the perfect time to make your first contribution to our campaign, I’m here to tell you that this is the moment.
I’m counting on this grassroots movement to help us send a message that Trump’s ICE crackdown will not throw us off course as we work to defeat MAGA’s majorities in the midterms.
[**So please: As we keep up the fight for our civil rights in the face of Trump’s all-out authoritarianism, I need your help to keep our campaign on track. Chip in $10, $25, or whatever you can afford today:**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-jan26.B2OwkJ&refcode=em260124-1-180&t=2&akid=2039%2E791427%2E-DGq3Y)
_If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your contribution will go through immediately:_
| | **[Donate $10](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/771?c0=io-em-jan26.gywq2d&refcode=em260124-1-180&t=21&akid=2039%2E791427%2E-DGq3Y)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/15?c0=io-em-jan26.dS-adh&refcode=em260124-1-180&t=22&akid=2039%2E791427%2E-DGq3Y)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/8?c0=io-em-jan26.TKu-kl&refcode=em260124-1-180&t=23&akid=2039%2E791427%2E-DGq3Y)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/9?c0=io-em-jan26.OP2s0e&refcode=em260124-1-180&t=24&akid=2039%2E791427%2E-DGq3Y)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/10?c0=io-em-jan26.j47FvI&refcode=em260124-1-180&t=25&akid=2039%2E791427%2E-DGq3Y)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/13?c0=io-em-jan26.srVoGY&refcode=em260124-1-180&t=26&akid=2039%2E791427%2E-DGq3Y)**
---
****
Thank you in advance for anything you can chip in, and thank you for being a steadfast part of this movement for progressive change across our nation.
In solidarity,
— Ilhan

PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can **[unsubscribe here](https://act.ilhanomar.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?source=em-footer&t=27&akid=2039%2E791427%2E-DGq3Y)**. You can also **[sign up to receive fewer emails](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/fewer-emails/?source=em-footer&t=28&akid=2039%2E791427%2E-DGq3Y)**.
Submit this form to [**update your contact information**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/update-contact-info/source=em-footer?t=29&akid=2039%2E791427%2E-DGq3Y)
Ilhan is counting on our people-powered grassroots movement to fund this campaign. If you can, stand with us by **[making a contribution today](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/io-em-footer/?refcode=em-footer&t=30&refcode2=2039_791427_-DGq3Y&akid=2039%2E791427%2E-DGq3Y)**.
Ilhan for Congress

Washington D.C., 20033

name: Texas Update (via JanePAC.com)
subject: We’re 7 days from a critical runoff in Texas.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
It’s our first real chance to beat Trump in 2026.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123944615/597091262/1328794144?refcode=ea.83ba8079-37f9-f011-8d4c-0022482d279b&ms=ea.83ba8079-37f9-f011-8d4c-0022482d279b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjgzYmE4MDc5LTM3ZjktZjAxMS04ZDRjLTAwMjI0ODJkMjc5YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=afH5wWusT_6-H6ykloKK2ui34E4sMKoRBVIz7UyIR24=&emci=550aef7f-75f8-f011-8d4c-0022482d279b&emdi=83ba8079-37f9-f011-8d4c-0022482d279b&ceid=4823105)
---
We hate to bother you on a Saturday, but this truly can’t wait. We’re exactly one week out from the critical runoff election for Texas’s 18th Congressional District, and our JanePAC-endorsed climate champion, Christian Menefee, has just seven days to reach and turnout undecided voters before Election Day. **[Christian fought his way through a crowded field to make it to this runoff. He’s exactly the kind of bold, brave leader we need in Washington right now — and he’s counting on grassroots supporters like you to power his campaign through this final stretch. Will you chip in today to help him win on January 31?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123944616/597091263/615746269?refcode=ea.83ba8079-37f9-f011-8d4c-0022482d279b&ms=ea.83ba8079-37f9-f011-8d4c-0022482d279b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjgzYmE4MDc5LTM3ZjktZjAxMS04ZDRjLTAwMjI0ODJkMjc5YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=afH5wWusT_6-H6ykloKK2ui34E4sMKoRBVIz7UyIR24=)** | [**DONATE**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123944617/597091264/615746269?refcode=ea.83ba8079-37f9-f011-8d4c-0022482d279b&ms=ea.83ba8079-37f9-f011-8d4c-0022482d279b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjgzYmE4MDc5LTM3ZjktZjAxMS04ZDRjLTAwMjI0ODJkMjc5YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=afH5wWusT_6-H6ykloKK2ui34E4sMKoRBVIz7UyIR24=)
---
We know we’ve reached out before about how important this race is — but it bears repeating, because the stakes are enormous:
**1️⃣ This is the first electoral fight of the 2026 midterms.** A win in Texas will protect this seat in the House and give us another climate champion in Congress who can help block Trump’s fossil fuel giveaways.
**2️⃣ Early voting is already underway** , which means every hour we wait is another hour Christian's opponent could be reaching voters we need.
**3️⃣ Runoff turnout is notoriously low.** Sometimes half of what we see in November. That means your donation today makes a real, tangible difference. It funds the texts, the door knocks, and the calls that get people to the polls who might otherwise stay home.
Christian has already proven he can take on powerful interests and win. As Harris County Attorney, he’s sued Big Oil, cut emissions, and fought for communities harmed by pollution. He’s fearless — and he’s _exactly_ the kind of leader we need in Washington right now.
**[But he can’t get there without you. We have just seven days left. Will you chip in any amount to help Christian reach undecided voters and win on January 31?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123944618/597091265/615746269?refcode=ea.83ba8079-37f9-f011-8d4c-0022482d279b&ms=ea.83ba8079-37f9-f011-8d4c-0022482d279b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjgzYmE4MDc5LTM3ZjktZjAxMS04ZDRjLTAwMjI0ODJkMjc5YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=afH5wWusT_6-H6ykloKK2ui34E4sMKoRBVIz7UyIR24=)**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

clean_body: It’s our first real chance to beat Trump in 2026. | We hate to bother you on a Saturday, but this truly can’t wait. We’re exactly one week out from the critical runoff election for Texas’s 18th Congressional District, and our JanePAC-endorsed climate champion, Christian Menefee, has just seven days to reach and turnout undecided voters before Election Day. = | = We know we’ve reached out before about how important this race is — but it bears repeating, because the stakes are enormous: 1️⃣ This is the first electoral fight of the 2026 midterms. A win in Texas will protect this seat in the House and give us another climate champion in Congress who can help block Trump’s fossil fuel giveaways. 2️⃣ Early voting is already underway , which means every hour we wait is another hour Christian's opponent could be reaching voters we need. 3️⃣ Runoff turnout is notoriously low. Sometimes half of what we see in November. That means your donation today makes a real, tangible difference. It funds the texts, the door knocks, and the calls that get people to the polls who might otherwise stay home. Christian has already proven he can take on powerful interests and win. As Harris County Attorney, he’s sued Big Oil, cut emissions, and fought for communities harmed by pollution. He’s fearless — and he’s exactly the kind of leader we need in Washington right now. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = – Team JanePAC | Follow along: | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|--- Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Jane Fonda Climate PAC 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States

Folks – Michele Tafoya here! I never really considered running for office. Ever.
[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=c75756851add45129359b33432b9623b&_e=w_gNDf9zKBmspVJMV_QTHh-DnsAQtZk7PMfUCx6wkFpUc0gCXVekwv8XrZek7XWL-wbZW0l9djzIqQYxBb9G2NrIh1cvaTp73JNXbSTifrL_wzVX2V8on9gYVEX22Fyb8ex2kvB6ov_-dQgfjapgofoxE87xVrZIQQ-U_06s8hwLSJI8LDNYES0_Jimp-t9vzXm4uTq2WGbDAtLVy2vz6TQwHe21JzZWtpGyLoXpxj1OYfFQqXpTRwcCDfMG9xVRLVSEvn-EBC-m7ZJfq035MzuyEQ6hj1-8P_BYQate_bR1urwpbLknrf-Jadd1mfHbZp-Nmtk14GQl42IYT4AhgZHq6PHS4O64ZKNuwFkk8KTwdC_fb7MbZgL_g3s3UGc_XoVKb5_d7DGFTxD-BRgfOtG1CqDt2eEiiE380rQi8rRuoQPRKHAntqv7ff-m4pHffFMAXydQCIuY_fXL1EassVY-lpilzIRz3G_GIglHhapC5ZL2asIzO3GRQ360KiCMSANm6O8DvcSH1WjpcopeselAHj36FZ-vtZxq6UlwjfQwHk5LSJVSXW0oCJUHtMfx3tg61kcIfH5XntQMDD1HekLA3WsfBRRKl09-mba9qLJ7xnZ7SkaJakz471Y9ch7xV8KuZ5PbxOGBt0KE2I6ETs8NYOm67p4BneFayAJEkTDBX0tGChMVtX2UlzZGU3hJa5nfrptc2BSZ8L8jjyiG4vaxOtcv5s8DGIQqlrChnNpzws9fpqJ7Uc4jib3TDecb4nlzSAhlEXkCeNSYXX2Tyq6Bh90TpCKOaRHnQ70aQDRaXIxAgeIYNtrdxiMWCglmzZ0KdxLjLuX602RRpShGGA%3D%3D)Folks - Michele Tafoya here!**
**I never really considered running for office. Ever. I was too focused on raising my family, and being the best football sideline reporter I could be.**
**But even in the last few weeks, Minnesota has become the embodiment of everything wrong with politics today. Tim Walz, his inner circle, and the corrupt political class are too busy:**
**
* Wasting billions of our tax dollars on fraudulent daycares
* Failing to condemn the activists storming churches
* Raising prices on hardworking families
* Sabotaging anything the President wants to do
* Forcing men into women's spaces
* Pitting Americans against each other

**
**I can 't sit on the sidelines anymore. That's why I'm throwing my hat in the ring and announcing my candidacy for U.S. Senate!
[Is there ANYTHING I can say to convince you to become one of my first donors? The far is already racing to destroy my campaign before it even gets off the ground. I can’t shock the political world and flip this seat without your help.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=c75756851add45129359b33432b9623b&_e=w_gNDf9zKBmspVJMV_QTHh-DnsAQtZk7PMfUCx6wkFpUc0gCXVekwv8XrZek7XWL-wbZW0l9djzIqQYxBb9G2NrIh1cvaTp73JNXbSTifrL_wzVX2V8on9gYVEX22Fyb8ex2kvB6ov_-dQgfjapgofoxE87xVrZIQQ-U_06s8hwLSJI8LDNYES0_Jimp-t9vzXm4uTq2WGbDAtLVy2vz6TQwHe21JzZWtpGyLoXpxj1OYfFQqXpTRwcCDfMG9xVRLVSEvn-EBC-m7ZJfq035MzuyEQ6hj1-8P_BYQate_bR1urwpbLknrf-Jadd1mfHbRW0eQ3TcQFKCPHQ7AmvFA3Z5oWaD8enPU2BWUlty6GSfYKk_wLQpxA6ugTE1k3pHFf3I8-6mn6an2Ju3KYxye0LarAWwP3jRnNYcyBpBEyAbREyWSgBUiEQabMMOFvnjy6U3Wg-YdYJexR5d0eOgNjLzvWA0vRT6epgUtne_biXxquZrKMbc3IKe5HsynvE_TSxRXWWHZRKcu4_76HksH5Q_o1dsLjFHW5re0nOA7WbIAsg__oNVLexHpXsJqM3wrf1nAlGWLIsw_H2VcjjmxF745AoZtdlRnQXAFzJ0hJGjY2_FgCy-lloE8Y8oUY6xpwKDsKrKIINpGJ9YKQP_k5LRpEOjC9SC4GwU9B3n_cN_Q1q3TItOJqn1zbhtMEAnEnrju6QChDM2gqB7oX5b3HQGVn7L2-JAAF5OFedD5sbJOt5nRrD1LijzHhmZyZmADLbkOsGXoT6uBUhojL0O_aViTzq8iabYdw1NZJZ3ockwM7qxcLOm-dbTDTKMZNaLwGSi1qQh9n1xdBxErL6mmw%3D%3D)[BECOME A FOUNDING DONOR
](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=c75756851add45129359b33432b9623b&_e=w_gNDf9zKBmspVJMV_QTHh-DnsAQtZk7PMfUCx6wkFpUc0gCXVekwv8XrZek7XWL-wbZW0l9djzIqQYxBb9G2NrIh1cvaTp73JNXbSTifrL_wzVX2V8on9gYVEX22Fyb8ex2kvB6ov_-dQgfjapgofoxE87xVrZIQQ-U_06s8hwLSJI8LDNYES0_Jimp-t9vzXm4uTq2WGbDAtLVy2vz6TQwHe21JzZWtpGyLoXpxj1OYfFQqXpTRwcCDfMG9xVRLVSEvn-EBC-m7ZJfq035MzuyEQ6hj1-8P_BYQate_bR1urwpbLknrf-Jadd1mfHbixMHFSck4cbEapFiCsPGsUJv1i9z49Ip5uv1iSflOk8aRo9rqnrH_uPUL9kt8ndWL82K0Wr_XE9qowLOq8wvvfZ_bNVfidKKIUEVFD65SQoezmawynKlvD6hS2EsJfzjrCaacY_Pj2xhjpnPlM3ppQFYGgD1ugpvL4UGl3ZDoULC96RDZ3_KkCo0tSOsgxR7afMSkaMw-c1BaYM-gi8-bPbt5JJ_KUG0pAj5QJqaL_uStI3TTeHhUJkV-3em6H7lVMdLfY0KPnom60woxyRqGwaRGMK74J3m5f81Z0MOc0AZWHllkyULvwCjZ8X175VNCNILrl4K0KrJi3fyaFjW5PhxGyQQk6voBydji342SClUornfkOqbxEUKh4_ochrbI8SHAvDBTZKWxO7TyLdyUIQ1xFFy3XlmuR91BJmJVtvPgrLzyLEUZe_kQEdPycUOb7qebydJZdlkhXurK7PDI_gOZv_QWl9CnLTPMJFO4tWWABfQJYeYDmXaFwPdTVErMQsGWzx5Xz94WBf4LUuRzA%3D%3D)I've thought long and hard about the dynamics of this race before jumping in. **
**Minnesota has long been considered simply out of reach for Republicans. The last time it voted for a GOP President was Nixon. The pundits and political experts say a Republican could never win here. **
**But this year is going to be different for three key reasons:**
**FIRST - I'm running against Tim Walz's right hand. All the rampant fraud that took place here happened under Peggy Flanagan's nose as much as it did under his. We will remind voters about that fact every single day. **
**SECOND - The President has increased his voter share each time he has run. He nearly flipped this state in the last election, and Kamala Harris' running mate was our sitting Governor! Momentum is on our side. **
**THIRD - I'm a different kind of candidate, and I know how to win. I didn't reach the top of my industry by pulling my punches. I put in the work. I never backed down. And I kept fighting, no matter what the naysayers said.**
**In my years on the sidelines, I 've seen a LOT of underdogs win football games that the "experts" said were impossible. **

clean_body: Folks – Michele Tafoya here! I never really considered running for office. Ever. - Michele Tafoya here! I never really considered running for office. Ever. I was too focused on raising my family, and being the best football sideline reporter I could be. But even in the last few weeks, Minnesota has become the embodiment of everything wrong with politics today. Tim Walz, his inner circle, and the corrupt political class are too busy: Wasting billions of our tax dollars on fraudulent daycares Failing to condemn the activists storming churches Raising prices on hardworking families Sabotaging anything the President wants to do Forcing men into women's spaces Pitting Americans against each other I can 't sit on the sidelines anymore. That's why I'm throwing my hat in the ring and announcing my candidacy for U.S. Senate! thought long and hard about the dynamics of this race before jumping in. Minnesota has long been considered simply out of reach for Republicans. The last time it voted for a GOP President was Nixon. The pundits and political experts say a Republican could never win here. But this year is going to be different for three key reasons: FIRST - I'm running against Tim Walz's right hand. All the rampant fraud that took place here happened under Peggy Flanagan's nose as much as it did under his. We will remind voters about that fact every single day. SECOND - The President has increased his voter share each time he has run. He nearly flipped this state in the last election, and Kamala Harris' running mate was our sitting Governor! Momentum is on our side. THIRD - I'm a different kind of candidate, and I know how to win. I didn't reach the top of my industry by pulling my punches. I put in the work. I never backed down. And I kept fighting, no matter what the naysayers said. In my years on the sidelines, I 've seen a LOT of underdogs win football games that the "experts" said were impossible. The Minnesota Senate race will be another chapter in that storied history. | | ---|--- Thanks in advance for your support. I'll never forget the good folks who stepped up in the opening days of this campaign. You and I are going to do great things together. I can feel it. Be brave. Do good. - Michele Michele Tafoya Republican for Senate, Minnesota It's official - Michele Tafoya is running for U.S. Senate in Minnesota! Endorse her here:** | Paid for by Tafoya for Senate 3500 Vicksburg LN N, STE 267, Plymouth, MN 55447

Peter,

I’m going to be brutally honest with you.

Arizona is _ground zero._

If Democrats get even a little bit of power back in 2026, they’re going to turn our state into a political punching bag and a testing ground for their next wave of insanity. And that starts with flipping seats like this one. They don’t hate me because of my “tone” or because I’m “too conservative.” **They hate me because I’ve done the job they refuse to do:**

I fought cartels.
I chased fentanyl traffickers.
I watched families get ripped apart because politicians in D.C. turned the border into a joke.

body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123944892/597092188/38783915?refcode=em-1.24.26-all-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZjE5YWMyZS0zOGY5LWYwMTEtOGQ0Yy0wMDIyNDgyZDI3OWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_aplHq7X8S-xNrphXTlQNEe-MdTCjboYX3VR70dr3O0=) Hi there, it’s Marc Elias. I’m proud to be one of the leading lawyers in the ongoing fight to defend democracy and protect voting rights in the face of Republican extremism. Right now, we’re seeing Donald Trump and his cronies launch an assault on our government and the rule of law. They’re spreading dangerous lies, attacking our institutions, and working to undermine our democracy for _their_ own gain. **But here’s the truth: We’re not going to let them get away with it.** My friends at the Democratic Association of Secretaries of State are standing up to these ongoing threats, but they can’t do this alone. They need Democrats like you in this fight, friend. That’s why I’m asking you to make a donation to DASS today. Your support – right now – will help Democrats defend democracy in the courtroom and stop attacks on our elections. Here’s a good link to donate: [**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-q1-2026**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123944893/597092243/38783915?refcode=em-1.24.26-all-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZjE5YWMyZS0zOGY5LWYwMTEtOGQ0Yy0wMDIyNDgyZDI3OWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_aplHq7X8S-xNrphXTlQNEe-MdTCjboYX3VR70dr3O0=) __If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: __ | | | **[Chip in $10 Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123944894/597092244/38783915?refcode=em-1.24.26-all-rs&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZjE5YWMyZS0zOGY5LWYwMTEtOGQ0Yy0wMDIyNDgyZDI3OWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_aplHq7X8S-xNrphXTlQNEe-MdTCjboYX3VR70dr3O0=)**

body:
The past few weeks have been a whirlwind of activity with America's involvement in Venezuela, ICE/community clashes| | | [](http://links.johnkasich.com/s/c/z9-tBgVhv2mSjpKo7NPwLQZM4aF46zqS3c8nRGuLwk6V9J0mZXs99slnnj8_YtzefiKY2D_AJMDH_1buMWW_J4a00RkSzETEOduhsqHpo-jqLKdanGicyOgEVeKqlglS_Cj37hCdkDwvFoUNiuynWACK_5FuXkFxCPZDJgFSrkdXh0Y5d77Q4zbmDTBSZy3WgLPBBt5RznELSrxow0D0VWnxbcJoEoQOXBE29q23x9Fpz6HDX9ReElBQEL9TpnqqHydOJpL2gvpCpJlY_z-sqGUpAoK7uBL3LjAq7QvSqARyF2u9bylTI_KNSOu0a4TGJLHu4CcrZ9-VV13w2bvRcqlYkWkXtCrR1myqiEM6TQEQyr1hdhdsYjg5XbQ2/0T9TIeQLOIr6NjeBHxEJts8iLIMg3ZBU/17)

Peter, The past few weeks have been a whirlwind of activity with America's involvement in Venezuela, ICE/community clashes, the President's comments/actions about Greenland, how the United States was represented at the Davos conference and so on. Throughout all of it, one of the most surprising and disappointing things to me has been the lack of action from Congress. Where are the leaders working on legislation to address our country's many issues and to preserve their constitutional authority as one of the three co-equal branches of our government? As an analyst on MS NOW, I’ll keep sharing my perspective and calling for the kind of solutions that can help heal our country. I hope you’ll follow along on social media to stay connected. I also recently shared with you that I launched a [Substack newsletter, where I host conversations with interesting people](http://links.johnkasich.com/s/c/ujcbE0P9lte9gGyqV-rxCzyRrIcnOfZ2I0G_Gz4CWtlZ7GtxT-nLdNlFcaB_7zy1_IEQpxTtNCzeSn7_KqnqYZBzVk7f7hpspB0tiwt1JWl6-rVCvs7c5Ir_-Ji1scSV2uLMA_pGH-EQk6LbDXOLegJiHKzEyCvADywLpL902JA7NPjXETfyGxwElcjq6cvlxVDkDh06vY-e-eM1XK649grwvUAcTpL5MpnA-C6Qwt7ykybQbvQOJ8IKi_X7Oa1ubKkV3cw_fvEYS3SmnpDewQA4NKiYmMeF7EvnIwVnHAATN7afkiRkulkLUGA3LeXG55YGxi6xQucha3v_eF9dRts1hf-y4Yjs69yea65LAR6wfsjT8CbHKI9_Vuyb/Pgt_fUBJL5xVBjOo66SJC07awQsoIRbb/17). Like all of my interviews, these conversations are meant to be a place where you’ll hear fair, honest, and direct thinking from people who truly know the subject, without talking points or ideological spin. The goal is to offer context and clarity you don’t often find elsewhere, grounded expert insight that helps make sense of what’s actually happening in the world and why it matters. [**If you're interested in learning more or subscribing to my free newsletter, you can sign up here**](http://links.johnkasich.com/s/c/QC8ldsSyHb8Z57dhPxfbKzx_31ZLJhBDhzvKrvE4YXp7AqilljP_q-gwjbjRkLezsdsCOzo2YEyyS1ojgigqoUYBCWU-wvtAPu6KSq_myEkbKkepStlL_Jc4s3cvBG1RV9V_nrEASh55878KaWHetS8tqPwoupNbFrJEwU_QIqS1RaeZO1celVaU7g87TfiCavX0ohsCZqaF2JNeWWOcXNzGFZc54ri-xOXOBqkQbe5mhWQi6aFXAjUMgo9qpbpPpgVruGW0JXcm04HcaQM8Ttf5uvOfzceqctssj4OKAsa8FKKn0z3-OY-bynAwMoq2ctpEv_O8u4jVNAc6shIgpTakUzhbxekAlBv3LfspvHpFcFv7N9W8MJiWhoit/FaqIdIqdLfYjEgArD966w5L3I2L8_xXU/17). While you can download the mobile app, it is not required to view my newsletter. Please also see below for a preview of what I've been creating for you. I welcome your feedback! -John

clean_body: The past few weeks have been a whirlwind of activity with America's involvement in Venezuela, ICE/community clashes| | | Peter, The past few weeks have been a whirlwind of activity with America's involvement in Venezuela, ICE/community clashes, the President's comments/actions about Greenland, how the United States was represented at the Davos conference and so on. Throughout all of it, one of the most surprising and disappointing things to me has been the lack of action from Congress. Where are the leaders working on legislation to address our country's many issues and to preserve their constitutional authority as one of the three co-equal branches of our government? As an analyst on MS NOW, I’ll keep sharing my perspective and calling for the kind of solutions that can help heal our country. I hope you’ll follow along on social media to stay connected. I also recently shared with you that I launched a . Like all of my interviews, these conversations are meant to be a place where you’ll hear fair, honest, and direct thinking from people who truly know the subject, without talking points or ideological spin. The goal is to offer context and clarity you don’t often find elsewhere, grounded expert insight that helps make sense of what’s actually happening in the world and why it matters. . While you can download the mobile app, it is not required to view my newsletter. Please also see below for a preview of what I've been creating for you. I welcome your feedback! -John | | | | | | While I don't enjoy asking for donations, it's a necessary part of our effort to fight for a better America. Any amount that you're able to goes directly into paying for the tools and resources that allow us to communicate with you and so many others about pressing issues impacting the future success of our country. . Let’s keep the faith together! Thank you. -John | | | Get the Latest Updates: | | | | ---|---|---|--- | | | | Paid for by Kasich for America, not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.JohnKasich.com

name: The Democratic Party
subject: First deadline of the year…
body:
---
Derek, In just a second, we’ll be asking you to [**make a contribution to the DNC before our end-of-month fundraising deadline.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-january-2026-member-card?amount=7&refcode=em_20260124_5888_fr&refcode2=5888_22930333_Dr20o6&akid=5888%2E22930333%2EDr20o6) But first, we want to explain exactly why your support is so critical right now. **This is the first deadline of the new year. When it passes, we’ll be required to report how much we’ve raised since 2026 began.** All eyes will be on that number. We’ve got major elections coming up in a matter of months. If we’re able to submit a strong fundraising report with lots of donations so early in the year, we’ll be sending Trump and his allies a powerful message: _We are coming for you in the midterms._ Not only will your donation help us send that message, but it will help us make early investments in state parties. It will help us register more voters. It will help us ensure people are hearing Democrats’ message _early_ , well before Republicans inevitably blanket our TVs with attack ads. **Plus, when you donate to the DNC right now, you’re reserving your Official 2026 DNC Member Card to carry with you — your reminder that you’re an essential part of our team.** Here’s what this year’s design looks like: [](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-january-2026-member-card?refcode=em_20260124_5888_fr&amount=7&refcode2=5888_22930333_Dr20o6&akid=5888%2E22930333%2EDr20o6) **[RESERVE YOURS NOW](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-january-2026-member-card?refcode=em_20260124_5888_fr&amount=7&refcode2=5888_22930333_Dr20o6&akid=5888%2E22930333%2EDr20o6)** Winning the House and the Senate is the most impactful way to stop Trump from doing more harm to our country. We need you with us for the work ahead. [**So, Derek, are you ready to join us? The DNC is the organization best positioned to distribute resources when and where they’re needed most. Can we count on you to chip in $7 and help us elect Democrats up and down the ballot nationwide this year?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-january-2026-member-card?amount=7&refcode=em_20260124_5888_fr&refcode2=5888_22930333_Dr20o6&akid=5888%2E22930333%2EDr20o6) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $7](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-january-2026-member-card?express_lane=true&amount=7&refcode=em_20260124_5888_fr&refcode2=5888_22930333_Dr20o6&akid=5888%2E22930333%2EDr20o6)**

name: Matt Maasdam
subject: Can I share something I’m really proud of?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MATT MAASDAM FOR CONGRESS
body:
I truly believe in the power of grassroots movements | | Matt Maasdam is a husband, a father, and a Navy SEAL. He carried the nuclear football for President Obama — now he's running as a Democrat to flip Michigan's 7th congressional district. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3-gP0Xd1LL-Lub7Gk22PHy94BMEtGC6mHTmQqNdHOJWNbdJJrdzqEfpr1Cg3-BFcDAgssMiynuTPcIBRxFzq5HdoHDxZp8sIkRxw0WaBo_5kSDSqWX0IogHj1klaqGd6fJZoyVFugLmikHZNFa11Szgbgx7dX8wVZoUte-zfF92wBhToH9RjwPwUrkkIUGeMPaiYwJ_2-5zmopS6THFWJjUiSq3bRG9jo_DDI8NYhmuQfRyabOeds7OOn_It9g_UrhDfDNV1w1fxcBxdl_BFoa5hSRf7U6JGeiZLAhzvd_Y8GRZXY5yCLB69nUTgU0fak4DxWLxXlwJRC3taOk7SWQFSyJlCJTDFBjL_xAFU4rxodSYgPUmbjpx7ieoSBFpLf0/4nk/el0MZqgPRnuhCil8kXan_w/h0/h001.DouNzrlTJmy13TZWuBjJ8tym0BN-RvRmYhWT3V6hR2Q)

I want to share something I’m proud of with you. $25.81 Since I announced this campaign to flip MI-07, that’s the average donation we’ve received to emails like this one. That may not sound like a lot – but when people all across the district pitch in, it all adds up. [**We’re powered by people chipping in around $25.81 at a time to bring back common sense leadership. Can I count on you to join them by pitching in $25.81 now?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqv2VnP90fG31OLpl0iHJFp0w4SjhiIC7jO8v_vg14a85J7KK8OIYIceCH5j5VNv_qe3JP8OAyR67JlfzYUIz4UKfgyyp8K7FNH5GhBLUhm-h5XcGatkSzYMI2N97d1aeyAZBNKUNjXF4GflcZcVPXtv_MeSD10ArRV-QZHlSDqHvWf16W3g-KJQEywlZk59hz8570QLFZoqjX875JOeroEQ04qPI25RXjTjtJcyP7u_AfWQnyz2AmUuqDiz5XTx4WFewDIU4iBMsNsZgdODnf9fZOFMkDRdABlGTNKd0GnvgA93YumwQRXL4oYe0IW6P4Z_4bmbmT8_d78yPM372m0V/4nk/el0MZqgPRnuhCil8kXan_w/h2/h001.bFWUgGSTLIAuO1ubTySRlzb0LL7YMXMDN61trFhC2-g) | | [DONATE $25.81 »](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqv2VnP90fG31OLpl0iHJFp0w4SjhiIC7jO8v_vg14a85J7KK8OIYIceCH5j5VNv_qe3JP8OAyR67JlfzYUIz4UKfgyyp8K7FNH5GhBLUhm-h1VsIynnFUryUUUa8lvW9-64YSVDBQmskwHNvCJctHt-KtfdG3P5jRPxiKkRaTkOog0hnlbwrrcB7vA2gIWtAG8edOQgLTRM7o8ew32FucNHSDW2q-5f2wzPQeewMKDXBZz_nT-X9UW4AKPdsJMwQK84THn9czwvwi_yM-1lFGLFNJ89nUPGJDErV-mU5ew20D9RjiTNKClt9Yqqw7aSejSZq38bqcoN8yEHs9YTEh4p/4nk/el0MZqgPRnuhCil8kXan_w/h3/h001.fuQdoWKG3KmycvZF87PcbnGFa7bfAW2OhaBJvmZ4GZQ)

You might be thinking that $25.81 is too low. After all, my opponent, Tom Barrett, has brought in JD Vance and even Republican TV personalities to help coordinate national dark money.
But I truly believe in the power of grassroots movements.
It means something to me that our campaign isn’t powered by corporate PAC checks or DC insiders. We’re funded by everyday people chipping in what they can afford, when they can afford it, because they’re passionate about our community.

body:
https://rokhanna.com [https://rokhanna.com]
Peter,
I just voted no on the $838.7 billion defense budget for 2026, which provides for arms sales to Israel.
Sending Israel bombs to kill Gazans does not make us safe. It only perpetuates the terrible conflict in Gaza and destabilizes the region.
Tell Congress: No military sales to Israel. name: Donavan McKinney
subject: My opponent voted with Donald Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Justice Democrats
body:
We have to do something about this
#
Peter,
**My opponent doesn't want you to know he joined hundreds of Republicans to vote to:**
❌ Give billions to Israel
❌ Enable billionaire tax evasion
❌ Fund the Trump regime's international campaign of terror
Michigan's Mighty 13th shouldn't be represented by a MAGA-backed opportunist who deceives us while actively stabbing us in the back.
It's why our campaign has earned support from local, state, and federal leaders who all agree: _Shri Thanedar is not a partner to us in this work._
**Shri survives because he can use his immense wealth and office to hide the truth from voters. So we can only change the conversation through our own grassroots outreach operations.**
**[Can you help us deliver the truth to the Mighty 13th by donating to my campaign and Justice Democrats today?](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20260124-dm.EglxCE&refcode=em20260124-37394&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=2&akid=37394%2E1203867%2EPz5AEe)**

In solidarity,
Donavan McKinney

name: Squad Victory HQ
subject: This is shameful
body:
[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/18910?refcode=em20260124-1858-foote&t=1001&akid=1858%2E342411%2EAns7mU ]Squad Victory Fund

Peter,

Across the country, ICE is escalating its operations — and the
consequences are devastating.

Families are being ripped apart. Communities are living in fear. And lives
are being lost in the name of “enforcement.” This is scary and cruel, and
it shouldn't be happening.

Instead of taking responsibility or working to prevent these tragedies,
the Trump administration is doing what it always does: closing ranks and
protecting itself.

The Department of Homeland Security and the Department of Justice are
brushing this violence under the rug, spinning the story to defend their
own power rather than telling the truth or standing up for the people
they’re supposed to serve. It’s shameful.

But the Squad is fighting back — demanding accountability, calling out
abuses of power, and pushing for bold, progressive change that centers
human dignity over cruelty. They refuse to accept a system that terrorizes
communities and treats immigrant lives as expendable. But they can’t do
this alone.

Even in
moments like this, we’ve seen something powerful. People across the
country are rising up to demand accountability. Thousands of grassroots
supporters, families, neighbors, and people refusing to stay silent have
joined the call to abolish ICE and fundamentally rethink a system that
profits from cruelty and punishment.

We’re under no illusions: real change won’t come easily. It will take
collective power — sustained organizing, political courage, and resources
— to force accountability and win justice. That’s where you come in.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20260124-movement.6Tybb9&refcode=em20260124-1858&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=1858%2E342411%2EAns7mU ]Will you step up today with a $3 contribution to
strengthen the people-powered movement backing the Squad as they fight for
our communities, challenge unjust systems, and push for bold solutions
rooted in dignity and humanity?

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20260124-movement.6Tybb9&refcode=em20260124-1858&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=1858%2E342411%2EAns7mU ]Contribute ››

Thank you,

Squad Victory HQ

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.squadvictoryfund.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1858%2E342411%2EAns7mU

Paid for by The Squad Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, and Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.

In addition to what’s legally required, The Squad Victory Fund does not accept contributions from: (1) corporations, associations, or their PACs; (2) individuals registered as federal lobbyists or under FARA; (3) from the PACs, lobbyists, or SEC-named executives of fossil fuel companies; or (4) from the Fraternal Order of Police.

Contributions or gifts to The Squad Victory Fund are not tax deductible.

Contributions to The Squad Victory Fund will be allocated equally among: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, and Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.

Any contributor may designate their contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if any contributor makes a contribution that, when allocated, would exceed the amount that the contributor may lawfully give to any participant.

After contributing to The Squad Victory Fund, you will automatically be signed up to receive email updates from Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, and Rashida Tlaib for Congress. You may of course opt-out by unsubscribing at any time.

To contribute via check, please address to The Squad Victory Fund c/o MBA Consulting Group, PO Box 15845, Washington D.C., 20003

Email us: info@squadvictoryfund.com

name: Tafoya, Michele
subject: It’s official – off the sidelines and into the game

body:

Friend,
**[This is a final notice regarding our 2026 Audit.](https://link.email.mikerogersforsenate.) **We are just hours away from the final deadline, and our records show that your file is still[ ](https://link.email.mikerogersforsenate.)**[incomplete](https://link.email.mikerogersforsenate.).**

Hundreds of patriots across the country have already responded. We need your response to help us with our critical strategy to defend and expand our majority.

[**If we don't hear from you by the deadline, your record will be archived, and you will be removed from our active list of supporters.**](https://link.email.mikerogersforsenate.)

Don't be left behind. This is your last chance to ensure your record is current and that you remain a vital part of our movement.

[CONFIRM YOUR DATA NOW](https://link.email.mikerogersforsenate.)

— GOP Command

name: Troy Downing
subject: Hey you!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
body:
Peter, do you consider yourself a true Patriot? If you do, I’m BEGGING YOU to read this email...

[](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)Hey you!
Yes, you, Peter.
No, not your laptop. The person looking at it!
I was really hoping to reach you today.
This is Congressman Troy Downing, and I want to thank you for opening my message. Can I borrow just one more minute of your time?
**President Donald J. Trump and House Republicans have accomplished a historic one-year run unlike anything in modern American history.**
_🇺🇸 We secured the border 🇺🇸_ _
__🇺🇸 We brought back American jobs 🇺🇸_ _
__🇺🇸 We cut taxes for working Americans 🇺🇸_ _
__🇺🇸 We reduced government waste 🇺🇸_ _
__🇺🇸 We eliminated the woke agenda 🇺🇸_ The tide has turned in our favor.
**_BUT!!! BUT!!! BUT!!!_**
**WE CAN’T REST ON OUR LAURELS NOW!!!**
The Democrats are more desperate than ever.
They’ve doubled down on extremism with their unhinged socialist economic policies, woke DEI agenda, and aggressive climate change plan.
They’ve become a dangerous cabal that **CANNOT BE TRUSTED** with America’s future.
If the pro-Trump GOP can hold the majority through 2028 and solidify America’s Golden Age.
But we need the funds to make it happen NOW!
The further we fall behind the Democrats in fundraising, the closer we get to losing our chance.
**_Peter, do you consider yourself a true Patriot? It’s time to prove it._**
I’m not asking you to risk life and limb for your country (though I think you would). I’m just requesting $17 to lock in a Republican House Majority for two more years. [Is it worth it to you?](https://trk.emails.troydowning.-s1-m6pwXfyDl1g)[CHIP IN $17 RIGHT NOW
](https://trk.emails.troydowning._L-Jhw)–Troy| |

body:
Rapidly expanding data centers are threatening our health, our water, and more. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.X6XUC7u8ppFLNtMO_55SZlNseb7gEYIOhm_EWnhzEOZKmTtnV3k2h4V2x_O3H7rdW2az5rgktBwzxQ8Ml9Wgkmv85qW-UsBonL4KRa0bcNqdICU6T3NBDdNIZG7w7wEWsknpqwfQ9dzp305RKTwUVUx6jowP9ctN-qPA1OKeSvqQi6ZuWSAOrfd_-PjGhpIW0DD0HB0eO6lh-3Enc0T9RBa_h7NI44ZuCfrtAF5qF1TPkGSwMbzr038UtBC3Fz1sQ5u865Ow-XgSi19fo0jq7qk6so4ZZt0ixGG0EV1gROL-TbMP5eamwXxE1viROZtNktzFksyC96mpj_mzs-5UBiA3q4TVLn8Ux2dllE4676z7waxw8q6i8fgC4vm8SU3WogDXFlhKal4AXQTbdntVvF4XX23tKHKsPBdit_x1DaE/4nk/6C8j4vrvTVGQ5lEgh7Yjfg/h0/h001.ckfvfitYxlqKu4nRf344u5pUZ-AEKo93Vlgyi-SL8Ao)

Friend, Big Tech billionaires are raising our utility rates and stealing our water and land. They’re rapidly expanding data centers across the country to profit from AI at our expense. These data centers use up massive amounts of electricity and millions of gallons of water each day. They’re driving up local energy prices by nearly 270%! **People who live near data centers are speaking up against growing water, air, noise, and light pollution.** Some communities near data centers are seeing huge increases in cancer rates, as well. Often, these projects move too fast for true community input, so our leaders need to hear from us now. [**Please add your name to demand your local and state leaders block Big Tech data centers near you.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38h9nrsCCiMen3CGd5zila9oqx6ruUh5S-q5KN4lht45jx5Sirt49HA6-icPSc5wiAMswteHPyCi3dLHYk53IisB-697YNcB2f6g1TrxU4F4GGOceCZLY_wpFy6Tp5fshMZ5saynwyr_zrWbW1P7vUHZzoon1uPhtC7w54OaqEGNa6OycBAIPajkLfsZ2SvY0YVRoS79yfd9HewJHy_E7yBIcWGs89hZcJw9UxQ5eDH4OfBb3kdd5Nyn0ulHa9ThpwIAPbYnooTwXDYL-WOwAyK4-iLvH4wNjsJVf3xIFujhgf8DR06YrQrqS5WwQH18_7mBHxvYNcCZ4TU8tJIEQ71n-VA8GspZPa0_giAtNV-Y8uJBu4yupGIhrcfv5kcmPa8aee79U8uyXFZ4U_NXAWTd-dlBMpQegZmu-5uoVppOSzQ4IoyVnKjrU7weN63eUbBKOQSnQiECs5QV7iatur2aOwcR3LXQnJHlb2zO0Y1rg/4nk/6C8j4vrvTVGQ5lEgh7Yjfg/h1/h001.csPFt_2SQUCcCtyhDFL15Vc_Bl0WmHHRFZBPezMTtlc) | [SIGN ON](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38h9nrsCCiMen3CGd5zila9oqx6ruUh5S-q5KN4lht45jx5Sirt49HA6-icPSc5wiAMswteHPyCi3dLHYk53IisB-697YNcB2f6g1TrxU4F4GGOceCZLY_wpFy6Tp5fshOqMr4AHkY7yQhVAvxEXr-qhzKOmOVv_ajD9jFVWMhNVzIB7wmNImarNY3Vz4UZwhnW73k1H5mroK0VREDHXZAWq8wtai_L05bfGQFxsIDQ_CsuURvtXej9NojqQw_4AUlQD_pG9FjPICKX1mEs5yqAVmOJ7T4AYrtk76ZbCsDqBeVqR2TBfc0NlvkvS0HkvwY7SeQg3Gi2Am4z3SM4ShWliipk2dbz0miwU4M8OD8Z58vY6vKlS8YdsLn95Vi3KZqKbkJczer4rAmhPfM76ljDZ0MVjzT2vOA_m-DEq6sWrPdVxR2tk1x-yUVZtzxzqsFLOuPMTA0AbWUrHe3bNp4a3diMoe5fbo6HiQ_Q1uIIYw/4nk/6C8j4vrvTVGQ5lEgh7Yjfg/h2/h001.JKuZK7JW2bdu5hdaB5N5ejpwghVrdmXDfyMPh1V56SI)

Date: Fri, Jan 23, 2026
Subject: Stop companies from stealing and polluting our land, water, and air for profit
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com
Friend,
This weekend, a huge winter storm will impact half of the country. Power outages are expected, so prepare if you can!
Power outages are increasing with climate-change-fueled storms, and at the same time, prices for electricity and other utilities are soaring.
That’s why I’m leading the fight in Congress to erase utility debt and bring down the cost of life-saving utilities. This involves challenging Big Tech billionaires.
**Did you know that Big Tech companies’ AI data centers are driving up local energy prices by nearly 270%?**
These rapidly expanding data centers also take up a lot of land, and **each one requires millions of gallons of water every day** to cool servers and other equipment. This water evaporates, and what’s left often pollutes local drinking water—sometimes leading to massive increases in cancer rates near data centers.
[**Please sign to demand your local and state leaders block Big Tech data centers near you.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38h9nrsCCiMen3CGd5zila9oqx6ruUh5S-q5KN4lht45jx5Sirt49HA6-icPSc5wiAMswteHPyCi3dLHYk53IisB-697YNcB2f6g1TrxU4F4GGOceCZLY_wpFy6Tp5fshMXdckw7B3CsjK7rMSonmzlsQ12hcTqMNhJuD8RIl6REEdsTeVa70BmtiwCXWqa4xN10AqDMF-UcNqMZXemH6kmlWjB_T2_YzjSqMVrTmCL2DhxOEtXi7yESL0Qf68SrkVGthLdEBGUBz7MTAnsaKzOlEoz4fT4mu1QSQBkqueN5Ld2UsjVFnpKqW_2Ud34VuVipmQxZC_oZ2U_N5BXqOZwYpQbfeutmerczkXwjiQO3eqwhXLyz-80BV3ZsKZVAiH0dq_WcMrxemitNkMr2oTkHjRooiqDzDa3szE1394rmtv0tmj6sdpgma3TNKH2iiL6AC_VaRruEZhYfYvOhIc1m3voLUtxyqld564tf69f6w/4nk/6C8j4vrvTVGQ5lEgh7Yjfg/h3/h001.1-lr8EJKyvOALIEIjflypssOBa3CYT8bW7jEDA3TFas)

Powered by dirty fossil fuels, these data centers are contributing further to the climate crisis. People living near these centers are speaking up about not only water pollution but also air pollution and toxic smells, as well as noise and light pollution.
**Many of my constituents are trying to stop multiple proposed data centers in my district. They don’t want for-profit companies to steal and pollute our land, water, and air.**
Despite public outcry, local leaders in my district are moving ahead with the plans anyway.
Some officials believe that new data centers bring jobs, but that only happens during a brief construction period. Only a few people stay on to run each data center long-term.
But the tech industry lies, and they are often given tax breaks for constructing these centers. That means our communities are subsidizing these polluting projects with our tax dollars.
Our leaders should understand the threats these data centers pose, and prioritize protecting their communities rather than helping Big Tech profit at our expense. But many don’t yet understand, so we need to get louder.

name: James Talarico
subject: About to take the debate stage
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Talarico for Texas
body:
#
Peter — I’m about to step on the debate stage with Jasmine Crockett.
This is a big moment for our campaign as Texas voters are still making up their minds as we head into early voting soon.
In this debate, I’ll make my case directly to them — how I’ll flip this Senate seat and fight for working people in the U.S. Senate. I’ll share my record of taking on corruption in Texas and my history flipping a Trump district in a red county.
We need to be ready for anything that comes our way after the debate and make sure we have the resources to make our case to every voter in Texas.
And one thing about debates is that they require time, which means less time for fundraising. My team will tell you there were no complaints from me on that. I hate that part of the job.
But it does mean I am hoping I can lean on supporters like you to help us make up that ground. So I’m personally asking:
**[Will you please contribute $5 to our movement to take back Texas and the U.S. Senate majority? It’d mean a lot to have your support today to know that I’m not alone when I take the stage.](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/512?c0=jt-em-2026q1.AKJ3HX&refcode=em260124-1-ak&t=1&akid=406%2E1347274%2EWrbE0D)**

name: Team Haley Stevens
subject: Donald Trump has been back in office for a year now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate
body:
We need to know what you think

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=1&akid=2022%2E49239%2Erwakgr)

Null, this is important:

We've officially passed the one-year mark of Donald Trump being back in office, and we need to know what this grassroots team thinks of the Trump administration's first year in office. **[We launched a one-click poll, and we need 5,000 responses by midnight tonight:](http://act.haleyformi.com/go/12600?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=3&akid=2022%2E49239%2Erwakgr)**
**DO YOU APPROVE OF DONALD TRUMP?**
| | | [YES](http://act.haleyformi.com/go/12600?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=4&akid=2022%2E49239%2Erwakgr)
---
| [NO](http://act.haleyformi.com/go/12600?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=5&akid=2022%2E49239%2Erwakgr)
---
Whether it’s the government shutdown, refusing to extend the Affordable Care Act tax credits, the Epstein files, skyrocketing costs, the military tactics in Venezuela, out-of-control tariffs, or destroying the East Wing, the polls show voters are increasingly fed up with Trump’s chaos.
But polls don't tell the whole story, and it's critical we know where our grassroots supporters stand, null.

That's why this presidential approval poll is live: **[Will you click below and be one of the 5,000 responses we need by 11:59 p.m.?](http://act.haleyformi.com/go/12600?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=6&akid=2022%2E49239%2Erwakgr)**
**DO YOU APPROVE OF DONALD TRUMP?**
| | | [YES](http://act.haleyformi.com/go/12600?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=7&akid=2022%2E49239%2Erwakgr)

|
* * *
**A note from Haley Stevens:** null, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. [**If you’re in this fight with me, will you add your name to endorse my campaign?**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/12601?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=10&akid=2022%2E49239%2Erwakgr) | | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/12599?t=11&akid=2022%2E49239%2Erwakgr)

Haley
