name: Jon Ossoff
subject: A year of bullshit
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
If you’re outraged by what’s happening to our country — and you’re ready to fight for the future of this Republic — please don’t wait until 2028
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/99963?refcode=em20260124-9974&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9974%2E614464%2EzEw-db)
See, I get why some folks voted for Trump.
He promised to attack a broken system. And it’s a ripe target.
Even before Trump came on the scene, America had one of the most corrupt political systems in the Western world.
It’s been running on corporate money, secret money, billionaire money.
And it’s worse than ever now.
Citizens United was the worst court decision in modern American history.
When Members of Congress aren’t begging for money from Washington lobbyists, they’re trying to dodge getting carpet-bombed by super PACs.
Senators get threatened with millions of dollars of attack ads over the votes they take.
And see, that is why things don’t work for ordinary people.
It’s because the people’s elected representatives don’t represent the people. They represent the big donors!
That corruption is why they defunded nursing homes to cut taxes for the rich.
Corruption is why you pay a fortune for prescriptions.
Corruption is why your insurance claim keeps getting denied.
Corruption is why hedge funds get to buy up all the houses in your neighborhood, and then your corporate landlord ignores your calls during a gas leak.
Corruption is why that ambulance costs $3,000 after you just had to get your choking toddler to the hospital.
Yes, the system really is rigged.
But Trump’s not unrigging it. He’s re-rigging it for himself!
He’s a crook and a con man, and he wants to be a king.
You can’t claim to be for ordinary men and women when you defund their hospitals and nursing homes.
You can’t claim to be for ordinary men and women when you defund school lunch programs to help feed little boys and little girls whose hard-working parents are struggling to fill the fridge.
You can’t claim to be for ordinary men and women when you do these things so you can cut taxes for the richest people in the country while you and your family business rake in massive sums from around the world.
Donald Trump’s second term has already done unfathomable damage to our country and the lives of millions of people.
And the people are beginning to see it.
But only by regaining Congressional power can we stop him.
Really.
The upcoming 2026 midterms are our last chance to restore checks and balances.
And my Senate race in Georgia is the single most critical contest: I’m the only Democratic Senator up for reelection in 2026 in a state Trump carried in 2024.
So if you’re outraged by what’s happening to our country — and you’re ready to fight for the future of this Republic –– please don’t wait until 2028: Split a donation of $10 between Heartland Patriots and my reelection campaign in Georgia right now.
Here’s the link to donate: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hp-ossoff-email-20260124?refcode=dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/99963?refcode=em20260124-9974&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9974%2E614464%2EzEw-db)**
The average online donation to our campaign is around $30.
Please give what you can.
All that matters is that lots and lots of people are contributing what they can to power our grassroots campaign before the end of the year.
Please, contribute today.
Jon Ossoff

| [](https://www.facebook.com/lucaskuncemo/) | [](https://twitter.com/lucaskuncemo) | [](https://www.instagram.com/lucaskuncemo/)
---|---|---
Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce.com). Not authorized by any federal candidate or candidate committee.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you. But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.lucaskunce.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails_heartland-patriots/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.lucaskunce.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe_heartland_patriots/?t=3&akid=9974%2E614464%2EzEw-db). Mail us: PO BOX 1240 Independence, MO 64050.

Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

* The heavy-duty Roll N' Go cart

name: Jon Ossoff
subject: $5 to win in Georgia
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
body:
#

**$5,** Peter.
That is the contribution I’m asking you to make — today — to my reelection campaign here in Georgia.
**$5** because winning in 2026 is our only hope to regain Congressional power and reverse this descent toward one-man rule.
**$5** because if the GOP flips this seat red and turns Georgia red, they will lock in control of the Senate for years to come.
**$5** because there is no path back from the brink of authoritarianism without defending this seat — the very seat that secured the Democratic majority in 2021.
You might think that a single $5 contribution can’t make a difference in an election as expensive and competitive as this one.
But as you read this, lots and lots of people are chipping in their own $5 — and it adds up fast when lots of people chip in.
[**Please use this link to make a $5 contribution to my reelection campaign today. My team and I will put your donation right to work WINNING this U.S. Senate race.**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-jan26.wPRyEn&refcode=em260124-2-f&t=1&akid=1504%2E5691347%2E7oYIm8)
**[DONATE](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-jan26.wPRyEn&refcode=em260124-2-f&t=2&akid=1504%2E5691347%2E7oYIm8)**
Gratefully,
Jon Ossoff

Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate

Now, he's taking that work to the next level by serving as your Congressman, representing New York's 16th District. clean_body: My re-election campaign is in full swing and I would be so grateful to have you on my team. George Latimer is a lifelong Westchester resident who has built a career in public service by delivering unparalleled progressive results for local residents. Now, he's taking that work to the next level by serving as your Congressman, representing New York's 16th District. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | Peter, It's hard to believe that it's already been over one year since my inauguration, and it's the greatest honor of my life to represent the folks of NY-16. I'm proud to say that my campaign is built on grassroots support from all corners of NY-16, but my re-election campaign is ramping up and I need your support to keep delivering results for Westchester and the Bronx. | November is our chance to elect a Democratic majority that will serve as a real check on Donald Trump — and stop House Republicans from rubber-stamping a destructive agenda that hurts working families, threatens our rights, and puts chaos over common sense. At a time when politics often seems divisive, I take pride in leading with integrity, working across the aisle, and fighting for results that benefit our entire community. The truth is, political campaigns aren’t won with money, they’re won because everyday people like you make your voices heard. | | Lifе and death Son of Mykhailo Sulyma, Ivan came from a petty noble (szlachta) family. He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw
---
Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18]

clean_body: Prime members may have access to a welcome bonus worth hundreds. No annual fee, no complex requirements, and approval takes just seconds. | | | Don't want to receive our publications? | | | Lifе and death Son of Mykhailo Sulyma, Ivan came from a petty noble (szlachta) family. He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18] | | | | | | Hi, Prime members may have access to a welcome bonus worth hundreds. name: Cori Bush
subject: Roe was a promise, and I’m still fighting for it
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cori For Us
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-26q1?refcode=x_260124_roeanniversary_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-26q1?refcode=x_260124_roeanniversary_act]
Republicans are openly ignoring the will of Missouri voters—and if we don’t fight back immediately, they will get away with it. Will you donate today to help me stop these attacks before more damage is done? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-26q1?refcode=x_260124_roeanniversary_act]
This week marked fifty-three years since SCOTUS affirmed the constitutional right to abortion via Roe v. Wade . That ruling was a promise that our bodies and our futures belong to us. For forty-nine years, it protected us—until the Trump-packed Supreme Court overturned it in June of 2022.
In Missouri, voters did their part to protect abortion access in-state. In 2024, we enshrined abortion rights into our state constitution. But Republicans in Jefferson City and Washington are refusing to accept the results. They are escalating their attacks anyway, and too many leaders in D.C. are choosing not to fight back.
I have been on the front lines of this fight, working to enshrine gender equality and bodily autonomy into the Constitution through the Equal Rights Amendment. I was a former co-founder and co-chair of the ERA Caucus in Congress and the lead sponsor of the ERA Now Resolution.
As for my opponent? He is a former Republican campaign manager for an anti-abortion extremist.
These attacks are happening now. Our bodies are being legislated by Republicans who want to control us. And our leaders are letting it happen.
We can’t sit by while this happens. If you believe Roe’s promise is worth fighting for, donate right now to help us protect abortion care, defeat extremist money, and send a true reproductive champion back to Congress. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-26q1?refcode=x_260124_roeanniversary_act]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
DONATE $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-26q1?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=x_260124_roeanniversary_act] DONATE $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-26q1?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=x_260124_roeanniversary_act]

DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-26q1?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=x_260124_roeanniversary_act] OTHER [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-26q1?express_lane_other=true&refcode=x_260124_roeanniversary_act]
Thank you,
Cori
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-26q1?refcode=x_260124_roeanniversary_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-26q1?refcode=x_260124_roeanniversary_act] Cori Bush is a pastor, nurse, survivor, and formerly unhoused single mother of two who knows what it means to struggle and what it means to rise .
As a Congresswoman, she has always shown up when it’s hardest: securing disaster relief, lowering insulin costs, and delivering millions for our communities.
Across St. Louis, families are being priced out and pushed out. Cori Bush is fighting back for affordable housing, fair wages, and utilities as a human right. Be part of this people-first movement. Visit CoriBush.org [https://www.coribush.org] to learn more.

name: Catherine, Republican Advisory Board
subject: I don’t want us to have to break up.

| _You may be receiving this email because of your support for Democrats in Texas and across the country. Bobby Pulido is a business owner, father of four, award-winning Tejano artist, and lifelong South Texan running for Congress in TX-15, one of the country’s most competitive districts. But we’re also heading into a critical moment.

clean_body: We have one week left until our end-of-month deadline, and this deadline matters more than most. It marks another deadline that gets us closer to defeating Monica de la Cruz and flipping this seat for South Texas. | You may be receiving this email because of your support for Democrats in Texas and across the country. Bobby Pulido is a business owner, father of four, award-winning Tejano artist, and lifelong South Texan running for Congress in TX-15, one of the country’s most competitive districts. We need your support to elect Bobby, but if you’d prefer not to receive emails from our campaign, you can here. = | Peter, Bobby was back out in the district this week, meeting with voters across South Texas and having real conversations about the issues that matter most to us. = | = This is what this campaign is all about. Showing up early, staying late, and doing the work to connect with voters and make life more affordable. But we’re also heading into a critical moment. # _Opinion:_
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/b860946e-018b-4b9a-a47f-99e2241f2f44?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|

* * *
### **Help us replace the mainstream media by becoming a PolitiBrawl Member:**
[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack..m6FUO85qouzxS1HZhA5HavUT-5DEe08T-sTEY8gzbIU?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=185646634)
* * *
**This past Sunday saw one of the most worrying escalations from far-leftists in their fight against the Trump administration and federal immigration operations.**
Not satisfied with targeting federal agents, local activists in the Twin Cities decided to crash a Sunday church service in Saint Paul because one of the pastors is apparently an agent with U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement. Instead of taking their grievances directly to him, which would still be disturbing, the activists decided to put the congregation in their crosshairs as well.
In a livestream from former CNN host Don Lemon, who was invited by the agitators to be with them during their stunt, it can be seen the crowd not only interrupted the service, which is against federal law, but they directly harassed people who either asked them to leave or harassed the congregants who decided to exit the church.
The reason for such a blatant violation of the right to assembly and religion is because, according to the left-wing radicals, the church goers are fake Christians for tolerating an ICE agent being in a leadership position.
_**A message from our sponsor (piece continues below)**_
* * *

# **[Silver is no longer playing second fiddle to gold...](https://substack.com/redirect/5c91361e-aa5d-4f1a-95e2-0f86ee82ad76?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/5c91361e-aa5d-4f1a-95e2-0f86ee82ad76?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
**After 2025 's historic 150% surge, silver is taking the spotlight** -- and doesn't look to be slowing down anytime soon.
* There's a massive global supply deficit.
* Insatiable demand fueled by A.I. and green energy,
* This has pushed the silver market to a breaking point.

With analysts forecasting an imminent move toward triple digits, the cost of waiting has never been higher. Help secure your position now, or watch from the sidelines as the most significant metal cycle in a generation potentially leaves you behind.
**The window is closing fast, so there 's no time to wait.**
[Learn More](https://substack.com/redirect/5c91361e-aa5d-4f1a-95e2-0f86ee82ad76?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
_**(Piece continues)**_
What is notable is in the aftermath of thousands of immigration agents being deployed to the Twin Cities, the street activists are going after indoor and soft targets. You have to remember, these liberals are used to the local police being handcuffed by progressive policing policies. The federal agents are under no such restrictions and have brought the hammer down on attackers and people impeding operations.
The much colder winter weather is also incentivizing direct action happening indoors. Their efforts to hamper operations outside the Whipple Federal Building have been stymied by the Hennepin County Sheriff's Office acting as a buffer between protesters and federal property.

It should be no surprise the elected Democrats in state and local offices have excused away the church mobbing. Minnesota Attorney General Keith Ellison justified the bigotry by claiming, "People have the right to lift up their voices...None of us are immune from the voice of the public."

@greg_price11
🚨 Minnesota Attorney General Keith Ellison justifies the anti-ICE protesters storming a church service in Minneapolis yesterday: "None of us are immune from the voice of the public."
| 10:38 PM * Jan 19, 2026 * 733K Views869 Replies * 587 Reposts * 1.55K Likes

Governor Tim Walz put out a measly statement, but at least it was something because St. Paul's mayor hasn't even put out a statement condemning the intrusion.
All of this will ensure that more activists are emboldened to do something similar, until the original group is held accountable by the Department of Justice. The DOJ is bringing its full weight against the protesters and it will be interesting to see what comes of their investigation.
In the meantime, the non-crazy people in the Twin Cities need to prepare in case the far-left views them as a soft target.

Governor Tim Walz put out a measly statement, but at least it was something because St. Paul's mayor hasn't even put out a statement condemning the intrusion. All of this will ensure that more activists are emboldened to do something similar, until the original group is held accountable by the Department of Justice. The DOJ is bringing its full weight against the protesters and it will be interesting to see what comes of their investigation. In the meantime, the non-crazy people in the Twin Cities need to prepare in case the far-left views them as a soft target. | A guest post by| Reporter at MostlyPeaceful.media. Subscribe to my newsletter for original and groundbreaking news content as I travel the United States and beyond. You're currently a free subscriber to . Friend,

Like so many of us, I’ve watched in horror as ICE has ripped families apart, illegally detained citizens and children, and even fatally shot a woman in Minneapolis.

It’s deeply disturbing, and I’ve been speaking out for months -- _and I was called out directly by Trump for doing so._

clean_body: | = 🔔 From the EMILYs List Campaigns team: Three major updates on the state of our 2026 races, and what they mean for EMILYs List women running for the U.S. House nationwide. = | = Peter, we have three critical updates for you about our fight to elect Democratic pro-choice women and take back power in the House: 1\. Political experts just shifted 18 House races in Democrats' favor. 2\. We only need to flip THREE seats to reclaim our House majority and stop the chaotic, dangerous Trump agenda in its tracks. 3\. Republicans' billionaire donors are reaching deep into their pockets for the midterms, rushing $136 MILLION to Mike Johnson’s personal war chest to grasp onto their razor-thin majority. Peter, we can't let Republican mega-donors drown out our momentum or silence the voices of our communities across this country. That's why we need our strongest supporters to help close our fundraising gap, rush resources to battleground races where Democratic women can win, and hand MAGA Republicans and their anti-choice agenda a massive defeat. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thanks, the EMILYs List Campaigns team = | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. name: Gavin Newsom
subject: Last chance
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CAMPAIGN FOR DEMOCRACY PAC
body:
I'm not sending this message to millions of people.

**I'm writing with a bit of a crazy idea. One last try.**
I'm not sending this everyone on our email list ... because, frankly, this is an idea that a few folks have told me is a bit out there and I am not entirely sure how it's going to go.
There are two things going on right now:
I've mentioned this before, but I have a book coming out in a few weeks. It's called "Young Man in a Hurry." It's a good book. Very personal. Not your normal political book at all. But of course, there will be a bunch of political stories you'll enjoy. I think you'd like it.
At the same time, we just spent a bunch of money on passing Prop 50, so now I need to refill that coffers at my Campaign for Democracy for the fights ahead -- including helping other states pass redistricting to stop Trump from rigging the next election.
So here's the part that may be a little crazy.
If you make a contribution of ANY AMOUNT, I'll send you a copy of my new book when it comes out. The average cost per book is $22.45 including shipping. If you can give that, great. If you can only give $5, great. If you want to cover the cost for a few folks who can only give a few bucks, great. But this is likely the last time we're going to send out this email before the book is public.
[**Make a contribution of ANY AMOUNT today and I will send you a copy of my new book, "Young Man in a Hurry." If we raise more than costs, every dollar will go toward helping Democrats fight back against Trump's effort to rig the next election.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ggn-book-any?refcode=em260124&refcode2=2832_4767699_CwFmMX&akid=2832%2E4767699%2ECwFmMX)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ggn-book-any?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em260124&refcode2=2832_4767699_CwFmMX&akid=2832%2E4767699%2ECwFmMX)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ggn-book-any?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em260124&refcode2=2832_4767699_CwFmMX&akid=2832%2E4767699%2ECwFmMX)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ggn-book-any?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em260124&refcode2=2832_4767699_CwFmMX&akid=2832%2E4767699%2ECwFmMX)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ggn-book-any?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em260124&refcode2=2832_4767699_CwFmMX&akid=2832%2E4767699%2ECwFmMX)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ggn-book-any?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=em260124&refcode2=2832_4767699_CwFmMX&akid=2832%2E4767699%2ECwFmMX)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ggn-book-any?express_lane=true&refcode=em260124&refcode2=2832_4767699_CwFmMX&akid=2832%2E4767699%2ECwFmMX)**
---
****
Thank you. This means a lot to me. I really want you to read this book, and I really think we can make good progress with the resources to keep fighting in the year ahead.
Gavin Newsom

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.gavinnewsom.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1&akid=2832%2E4767699%2ECwFmMX).
PAID FOR BY CAMPAIGN FOR DEMOCRACY PAC
1787 Tribute Road, Suite K
Sacramento, CA 95815

| | Fellow Patriot,
---
| | Charlie Kirk built a movement for truth -- but his final message pointed to something eternal.

It wasn't about politics... or elections... or even about the culture war.

His final book was deeply personal, and unlike anything Charlie had written before...

**It was about the Sabbath. **

About sacred rest. Reconnecting with God.
---

This book is his blueprint for how we do that -- as individuals, as families, and as a nation. 🔥 You'll discover how Charlie learned to honor the Sabbath in a culture that never stops 🔥 How setting aside just one day a week gave him clarity, peace, and strength 🔥 Why he believed this message could spark a spiritual revival across America I know he would've wanted you to have this book. When you give today to Turning Point USA, you 're not just supporting the movement Charlie built -- you're helping pass on the message he felt most urgently in his final months. | | Thanks to **YOU** , a year ago I was inaugurated as the 47th President of the United States.

We’ve done **SO **much, and it’s truly been a** HELL OF A RIDE**.

Our border is **SHUT** , gas prices have hit a **FIVE-YEAR LOW** , inflation is **UNDER CONTROL** , the economy is **BOOMING** , and the USA is finally **RESPECTED** again.

The Democrats **CAN’T STAND** that the American people are winning again, and they’ll **USE** **EVERY DIRTY TACTIC** possible to destroy our progress.

And make no mistake, Patriot: when they come after me, they’re really coming after **YOU**!

I’m just standing in their way.

We’ve been through **HELL** together, and** NOTHING** has torn our bond apart.

Unlike the Democrats, I **UNDERSTAND **how much you love our country and how hard you work every day to live the American dream.

I wanted you to hear this DIRECTLY from me! | | Thanks to YOU , a year ago I was inaugurated as the 47th President of the United States. We’ve done SO much, and it’s truly been a HELL OF A RIDE. Our border is SHUT , gas prices have hit a FIVE-YEAR LOW , inflation is UNDER CONTROL , the economy is BOOMING , and the USA is finally RESPECTED again. The Democrats CAN’T STAND that the American people are winning again, and they’ll USE EVERY DIRTY TACTIC possible to destroy our progress. And make no mistake, Patriot: when they come after me, they’re really coming after YOU! I’m just standing in their way. We’ve been through HELL together, and NOTHING has torn our bond apart. Unlike the Democrats, I UNDERSTAND how much you love our country and how hard you work every day to live the American dream. And I NEVER forget who I’m fighting for: YOU, Patriot! Together, we will finish what we started. Together, we will keep MAKING AMERICA GREAT AGAIN. — President Donald J. name: Powered by People
subject: This work isn’t flashy but it wins elections
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Powered by People, [poweredxpeople
body:
# [](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/43706?t=1&akid=240633%2E444211%2Eywfqw2)
Democrats all across Texas are tuning in to watch today’s debate between Jasmine Crockett and James Talarico—the two great Senate candidates who are running in the March primary.
It’s a big moment, full of energy, ideas, and conversations that will shape the race ahead of November.
As they debate, Powered by People volunteers and organizers are out in communities across Texas, registering new voters, signing up more volunteers, and building the on-the-ground infrastructure needed to turn excitement into wins up and down the ballot.
We’re training volunteers, hosting community events, and connecting with voters so that whoever comes out on top of this primary has the power on the ground to turn momentum into victory.
This work isn’t flashy and it’s not something broadcast on TV, but it’s what decides elections and changes Texas for years to come. And to be successful, it has to happen BEFORE the general election fight even begins.
**Our grassroots team is the backbone of this organizing effort—and they need your support to expand it.**
[**Will you chip in $3 to Powered by People today? Every dollar you give goes directly to fueling our organizing work and registering voters across Texas. This is people-powered work in action, and it’s what wins elections.**](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20260124.WF4g8M&refcode=ema20260124-240633&t=3&akid=240633%2E444211%2Eywfqw2)
**[Donate $3](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20260124.WF4g8M&refcode=ema20260124-240633&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=240633%2E444211%2Eywfqw2)**
Thank you,
Powered by People
Thanks to this grassroots team, we're running incredible voter registration and organizing programs—reaching Texans where they are and building real power from the ground up.
**But scaling up to meet this moment ahead of Election Day in November will take sustained work, people power, and real resources.**
[**That’s why we’re asking if you’ll become a monthly donor today. Monthly contributions give us the stability to plan ahead, expand our reach, and keep showing up—every week, every month, all the way through November.**](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/57091?c0=pbp-em-20260124.oKJb-z&refcode=ema20260124-240633&t=23&akid=240633%2E444211%2Eywfqw2)
**[BECOME A MONTHLY DONOR](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/57091?c0=pbp-em-20260124.oKJb-z&refcode=ema20260124-240633&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=24&akid=240633%2E444211%2Eywfqw2)**

[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pbp-em-2023-footer?refcode=em20260124-240633-footer&t=25&refcode2=240633_444211_ywfqw2&akid=240633%2E444211%2Eywfqw2)

name: Team Taylor
subject: Former GOP Governor Scott Walker is meddling with our Wisconsin Supreme Court race
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Taylor for Justice
body:
Scott Walker and his allies have spent years trying to reshape Wisconsin’s courts to serve their political agenda. Now, they see this race as their next opportunity.
# [](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/18?refcode=em20260124-1045&t=1&akid=1049%2E294397%2E03oqMd)
Folks,
Former GOP Governor Scott Walker is meddling with our Wisconsin Supreme Court race.
He’s helping our extreme opponent fundraise, opening the door to his national donor network of right-wing special interests.
Scott Walker and his allies have spent years trying to reshape Wisconsin’s courts to serve their political agenda. **Now, they see this race as their next opportunity.**
The only way we can fight back is by generating grassroots support from folks like you.
Contributions from this team allow us to reach Wisconsinites before right-wing special interests do, and make sure they know the stakes of this race.
**But with our April election fast approaching, we can’t wait to take action. We have to build the resources _now_ to counter this wave of outside money.**
[**If you’re able, please chip in $10 to help us stand up to these far-right interests and elect Judge Chris Taylor.**](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/31?c0=em_ms_jct_20260124_1_ak.HMWzos&amount=10&refcode=em20260124-1045&t=3&akid=1049%2E294397%2E03oqMd)
**[Donate $10 ››](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/31?c0=em_ms_jct_20260124_1_ak.HMWzos&amount=10&refcode=em20260124-1045&t=22&akid=1049%2E294397%2E03oqMd)**
Thank you,
Team Taylor
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_jct_footer?refcode=em20260124-1045&t=23&refcode2=1049_294397_03oqMd&akid=1049%2E294397%2E03oqMd)**

Team, _I've had it._

I've had it with an anti-science quack with zero medical knowledge spreading absolute lies and conspiracy theories to the American people.

name: Gina Hinojosa
subject: I’ve never believed in wasting money
body:
Here’s how this campaign really operates.
# [](https://ginafortexas.com/?refcode=em_ms_gh_header)[](https://ginafortexas.com/?refcode=em_ms_gh_header)
Peter, I want to tell you a little about how this campaign actually operates — because it says a lot about how I’ll lead as governor.
I’ve never believed in wasting money. That’s not a campaign talking point, it’s how I’ve lived my whole life. When you grow up watching every dollar, you learn quickly that money represents someone’s time, sacrifice, and trust.
That mindset shapes every decision we make.
We’re building a campaign powered by people, not billionaires.
We focus on what helps us win: organizing communities, talking directly with voters, and showing up everywhere — not just where it’s convenient.
Sometimes that means long drives instead of flights. El Paso to Austin? No problem. It means reusing placards after events, meeting in libraries or community centers instead of expensive venues. Most of all, it means knowing we’re accountable for how we spend what supporters like you give.
I know how much a contribution can mean — especially right now. When someone decides to give, that’s an act of trust. I don’t take that lightly for a second.
**[Peter, if you’re able to pitch in $5 today, you’ll be helping us keep building a campaign that’s disciplined, people-powered, and strong enough to defeat Greg Abbott.](https://act.ginafortexas.com/go/625?c0=em_ms_gh_20260124_1_thrifty.TcO20w&refcode=em20260124-473&amount=5&t=1&akid=473%2E299639%2EU6a1Ke)**
[Donate $5 »](https://act.ginafortexas.com/go/625?c0=em_ms_gh_20260124_1_thrifty.TcO20w&amount=5&refcode=em20260124-473&t=20&akid=473%2E299639%2EU6a1Ke)
Thank you for standing with me. I’m truly grateful to be in this fight with you.
— Gina

[ Donate » ](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_gh_footer?refcode=em20260124-1&t=21&refcode2=473_299639_U6a1Ke&akid=473%2E299639%2EU6a1Ke)
---
Email us: [info@ginafortexas.com](mailto:info@ginafortexas.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ginafortexas.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails_gov/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ginafortexas.com/signup/update-your-information_gov/?t=22&akid=473%2E299639%2EU6a1Ke)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ginafortexas.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe_gov/?t=23&akid=473%2E299639%2EU6a1Ke)

Pol. Ad. paid by Gina Hinojosa Campaign

name: Team Pramila
subject: Join our first Resistance Lab of the year tomorrow
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Tomorrow’s Resistance Lab will be held in honor of Renee Good.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20260124-5847-footer&t=1&akid=5847%2E420207%2EoZkHKR)
**Trump has sent 600 children into ICE Detention, Peter.**
They are not going after the “worst of the worst”. They’re walking into schools, taking children, and ripping families apart. It’s moments like these that make it very clear that we can’t look away, and we need to work together to do something about it.
If you want to turn your anger into action, Pramila invites you to personally join her first Resistance Lab training of the year **tomorrow, January 25th, at 11 a.m. PT / 2 p.m. ET** — with special guest Minnesota Attorney General Keith Ellison speaking from ground zero in Minnesota. [**If you haven’t signed up yet, RSVP here to secure your spot!**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/51856?utm_source=em20260124-5847&t=2&akid=5847%2E420207%2EoZkHKR)
[****](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/51856?utm_source=em20260124-5847&t=3&akid=5847%2E420207%2EoZkHKR)
**[RSVP](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/51856?utm_source=em20260124-5847&t=4&akid=5847%2E420207%2EoZkHKR)**
This special edition Resistance Lab, **Stand For Good** , will be held in honor of Renee Good and the many communities brutalized by ICE’s reign of terror. We cannot sit by idly while our neighbors endure pain, fear, and sacrifice. Instead, we will help you learn how to take action and create real change in your community.
This special session features non-violent resistance tactics designed to weed out the authoritarianism already taking root in our country. Together, we’ll brainstorm ways to support immigrant communities, hold space to process the pain from recent ICE murders, and build our community of resistance. This special Resistance Lab will culminate with regional breakout groups to create action plans with your community, and finish strong with actionable next steps directly from Pramila.
Authoritarianism is on the rise, and history shows that everyday people, organized together, are the ones who stop it. That’s what Resistance Lab is about. [**RSVP today, Peter.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/51856?utm_source=em20260124-5847&t=5&akid=5847%2E420207%2EoZkHKR)
**[RSVP](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/51856?utm_source=em20260124-5847&t=6&akid=5847%2E420207%2EoZkHKR)**
We hope you’ll join us tomorrow!
Team Pramila
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20260124-5847-footer&t=7&refcode2=5847_420207_oZkHKR&akid=5847%2E420207%2EoZkHKR)**

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

clean_body: Tomorrow’s Resistance Lab will be held in honor of Renee Good. Trump has sent 600 children into ICE Detention, Peter. They are not going after the “worst of the worst”. They’re walking into schools, taking children, and ripping families apart. It’s moments like these that make it very clear that we can’t look away, and we need to work together to do something about it. If you want to turn your anger into action, Pramila invites you to personally join her first Resistance Lab training of the year tomorrow, January 25th, at 11 a.m. PT / 2 p.m. ET — with special guest Minnesota Attorney General Keith Ellison speaking from ground zero in Minnesota. This special edition Resistance Lab, Stand For Good , will be held in honor of Renee Good and the many communities brutalized by ICE’s reign of terror. We cannot sit by idly while our neighbors endure pain, fear, and sacrifice. Instead, we will help you learn how to take action and create real change in your community. This special session features non-violent resistance tactics designed to weed out the authoritarianism already taking root in our country. Together, we’ll brainstorm ways to support immigrant communities, hold space to process the pain from recent ICE murders, and build our community of resistance. This special Resistance Lab will culminate with regional breakout groups to create action plans with your community, and finish strong with actionable next steps directly from Pramila. Authoritarianism is on the rise, and history shows that everyday people, organized together, are the ones who stop it. That’s what Resistance Lab is about. We hope you’ll join us tomorrow! Team Pramila | | Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com

name: Campaign Wheeler
subject: WEATHER DELAY - See you Next Weekend or Another Event - Mike Wheeler for Congress
body:
WEATHER DELAY - NO BLOCK WALK TODAY but you can still make calls from Home or Join us next Weekend! Or [Check our Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/profile.php?id=61558514117072) on how to See Mike at Upcoming Public Events! Email us if you are ready to make Calls From Home on our Numinar App!

\----------------

Dear Kendall County GOP Leader,
Texas needs leaders who don’t just talk about conservative values—they live them.
From his working-class roots to his time leading global investment teams and serving as a Senior Advisor to President Trump in the Small Business Administration, **Mike Wheeler** has spent his life solving complex problems with grit and fiscal responsibility.
As our former Kendall County GOP Chairman and SREC Committeeman, Mike has been on the front lines of the grassroots movement. Now, he’s ready to take that fight to Washington, D.C., to represent the Texas Hill Country.
**We want you to be a part of this mission.** \---

### **_Join Us at Our New Boerne HQ_**
Come meet Mike, hear his vision for our district, and learn how you can help us keep Texas strong. Whether you are a long-time supporter or looking to get involved for the first time, your voice matters.
* **WHEN:** NEW DATE: Saturday, January 31, 2026 and EVERY Saturday After until March 3 Election! [RSVP / Invite Friends on Facebook here](https://www.facebook.com/profile.php?id=61558514117072&sk=events).
* **COFFEE HOUR:** 9:30 AM – 10:00 AM and 2:00 pm - 2:30pm (Meet & Greet)
* **DOOR KNOCKING:** 10 AM – 2 PM (Volunteer Action) and 2:30 PM to 5:00 PM
* **WHERE:** 624 N Main St #102, Boerne, TX 78006

### **Why Mike Wheeler?**
Mike isn't just a candidate; he’s a proven job creator and business leader with over 25 years of experience in high-level finance. He understands the economic challenges facing families today. Having served as a **Senior Advisor to President Trump** , Mike knows how to navigate the federal landscape to deliver results for small businesses and hard-working Texans.

* * *
**
**
**_[SIGN UP TO:](https://mikewheelerforcongress.com/)_**
* Volunteer
* Endorse Mike
* Phone Bank
* Door Knock
* Host/Attend Event

**
Questions?**
* **Text or Call Mike Direct:** 210-505-5210 or [mwheeler01@gmail.com](mailto:mwheeler01@gmail.com)
* **Text/Call the Campaign:** (830) 446-3808
* **Email the Campaign:** [info@mikewheelerforcongress.com](mailto:info@mikewheelerforcongress.com)

Let’s keep the Hill Country conservative. We look forward to seeing you there!
Best regards,
**Team Wheeler** _
Mike Wheeler for Congress_

[www.mikewheelerforcongress.com
](http://www.mikewheelerforcongress.com)

name: Sharif Street
subject: Trump Is Tearing Down Our History
disclaimer_text: Paid for By Sharif Street for Us
body:
A lifelong Philadelphian, public servant, and fighter for justice. Join Sharif as he brings bold, thoughtful leadership to Washington. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/RNlM66BHF0WVUQpwM4Eu2g2?unsubscribedata=Z8poxa4e2NdQb%2BLBzmQvw8RsUS17q6DqdlMIqkPWKOlRtYX1jJbsNk8OejTL%2FxFqF00lcTLr2DfbGPXtXxAtrT%2FXby4h4S3WuD2gL%2FjI8V63c52zlYEmcvgsqcJRMYwsGBzprBno9ZJTrG5ggLTsJOXY0bUtHctiLz%2BT%2B%2BEAui8PzH214Rl8NZhiNSBBkVHLho3I0kZvH26LU4Xm1NrQT%2BdGkBhi7aXZcglP2y%2FLVq9JZUo6%2B7wp2LDE5cmJgGabuq1P0mEkEm3lJmecugUBcjoklpl8gYQonVgklhuQ0FE21vvk%2BivQ%2FkzWoxfAwe%2FwE%2Bkb3EdoOgPoXx0zKht08yuySM9PyTiXzJK3ZJOqp2FBvJoO%2Fo8pzJUkfgQfv8SMS7b%2BGiaPOMBkIvsPURNEiem5mEFNpORJNHmzoIMaL88FTFsHMmrlWDWWg24GqXID)
---
| |
---
Peter,

Right now, Donald Trump’s administration is trying to erase American history — in plain sight. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123961652/597129638/-1231493919?source=EM_NBI_SFU_20260123_PT_Housememorial_0_1MO_sharifstreet_NA_NA_Housememorial&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84MzEwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMTZmYzYwNC00Y2Y5LWYwMTEtOGQ0Yy0wMDIyNDgyZDI3OWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TerS4QlQDcW0I4JFheu5MlEDV6iX4YBiU2MMU4Wp0FU=&emci=edbe6f4d-a3f8-f011-8d4c-0022482d279b&emdi=e16fc604-4cf9-f011-8d4c-0022482d279b&ceid=15053672)
**Last week, under orders from Washington, the National Park Service dismantled the memorial and exhibits at Philadelphia’s President’s House that tell the truth about slavery and the enslaved people George Washington held there. Panels were torn down with wrenches and crowbars. Exhibits titled “ _Life Under Slavery_ ” and “ _The Dirty Business of Slavery_ ” were removed as shocked Philadelphians looked on.**

That memorial exists because leaders in Philadelphia understood something fundamental: **you don’t get to whitewash the past.** My father understood that when he required its preservation as a condition of the City’s support. The federal government understood it then, too.

That’s why I’m proud that the City of Philadelphia is suing the Trump administration for taking it down — and why I stand fully behind that fight. I’ve sued Donald Trump over a dozen times — and won. And I know this: **we can sue him, and we can beat him again.**

This is about telling the truth. Slavery is not just Black history — it is American history. And we can only understand how far we’ve come if we are honest about where we started.

[If you agree that the Trump administration must stop erasing our history — and that the President’s House memorial should be restored immediately — add your name to stand up for truth and accountability. ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123961655/597129641/-1231493919?source=EM_NBI_SFU_20260123_PT_Housememorial_0_1MO_sharifstreet_NA_NA_Housememorial&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84MzEwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMTZmYzYwNC00Y2Y5LWYwMTEtOGQ0Yy0wMDIyNDgyZDI3OWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TerS4QlQDcW0I4JFheu5MlEDV6iX4YBiU2MMU4Wp0FU=&emci=edbe6f4d-a3f8-f011-8d4c-0022482d279b&emdi=e16fc604-4cf9-f011-8d4c-0022482d279b&ceid=15053672)
| **[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123961657/597129644/-1231493919?source=EM_NBI_SFU_20260123_PT_Housememorial_0_1MO_sharifstreet_NA_NA_Housememorial&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84MzEwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMTZmYzYwNC00Y2Y5LWYwMTEtOGQ0Yy0wMDIyNDgyZDI3OWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TerS4QlQDcW0I4JFheu5MlEDV6iX4YBiU2MMU4Wp0FU=&emci=edbe6f4d-a3f8-f011-8d4c-0022482d279b&emdi=e16fc604-4cf9-f011-8d4c-0022482d279b&ceid=15053672) **
---

Thank you for standing with me, with Philadelphia, and with the belief that our history must be taught honestly — _warts and all._

In solidarity,
Sharif Street

[P.S. If you’re able, chip in today to help fuel this fight, defend our history, and hold Donald Trump accountable once again. Every contribution helps us keep pushing forward.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123961659/597129646/366441005?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_SFU_20260123_PT_Housememorial_0_1MO_sharifstreet_NA_NA_Housememorial&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84MzEwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMTZmYzYwNC00Y2Y5LWYwMTEtOGQ0Yy0wMDIyNDgyZDI3OWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TerS4QlQDcW0I4JFheu5MlEDV6iX4YBiU2MMU4Wp0FU=)
* * *

That memorial exists because leaders in Philadelphia understood something fundamental: you don’t get to whitewash the past. My father understood that when he required its preservation as a condition of the City’s support. The federal government understood it then, too. That’s why I’m proud that the City of Philadelphia is suing the Trump administration for taking it down — and why I stand fully behind that fight. I’ve sued Donald Trump over a dozen times — and won. And I know this: we can sue him, and we can beat him again. This is about telling the truth. Slavery is not just Black history — it is American history. And we can only understand how far we’ve come if we are honest about where we started. | Thank you for standing with me, with Philadelphia, and with the belief that our history must be taught honestly — warts and all. In solidarity, Sharif Street = * | | | ---|---|---|--- | A lifelong Philadelphian, public servant, and fighter for justice. Join Sharif as he brings bold, thoughtful leadership to Washington. = Paid for By Sharif Street for Us Sharif Street for Us | P.O. Box 4617 | Philadelphia, PA 19127 | =

| Winning the House in 2026 isn’t about guessing where the battleground will be.

**We already know where it is.**

_**Michigan.**_

Michigan is one of the few states with multiple truly competitive House races, and the balance of power will be decided by what happens here. **Holding West Michigan and winning additional seats across the state is how Democrats take back the majority.**

That’s why Hillary created Majorities Are Made in Michigan.

Every dollar you give helps support organizing, voter outreach, and coordination across the most competitive seats in the state. That kind of shared infrastructure is how we win close races and protect effective, common sense leadership.

name: Katie Porter
subject: Poppy is curled up by my side
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
Peter,
I’m taking a break from call time with my dog Poppy by my side:
[](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20260124_1_ak.cwitTf&refcode=em20260124-40748&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=40748%2E3422442%2E3gKnyf)
I have to spend more time than I’d like on the phone fundraising because running a statewide campaign in California is _expensive._ We have to reach voters in every corner of the state with some of the most expensive media markets in the country.
We’re facing two Republican opponents and a self-funding billionaire who’s spent more than $17 million on ads.
I need your support to become the first woman governor of California. Will you help me make history?
**[Can you make a $5 donation right now? You’ll help make sure we have the resources to reach more voters and win this race.](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20260124_1_ak.cwitTf&refcode=em20260124-40748&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=40748%2E3422442%2E3gKnyf)**

Katie Porter

name: It's Over
subject: We’re saying goodbye.
body:
We've made the tough decision...
[unsubscribe](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?xul=o5pvyewrzrxe8xiau9slbgewg000i9jb9o18wcs4u4lbb4p6ljpinsga4z8t50cnbmw6q3folmmou26abbrnhvvriz1btxqxal8dopk&__stmp=t9dqyv&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh)
Please read the message below from our sponsor.
* * *
**We're saying goodbye.** We've made the tough decision to retire our best-selling generator of 2025. The Patriot Power Generator 2500X has helped thousands of American families weather storms and power outages. But it's time to make room for what's new. We want to send it off with a BANG. So we are bundling our remaining inventory with a boatload of free upgrades to make this a no-brainer for you. When you grab one of the final units, we'll include absolutely free:
* Double the solar power (2 Free Panels)
* The heavy-duty Roll N' Go cart
* An extended 3-year warranty

This offer ends the moment our inventory hits zero. Don't wait until the lights go out. – Allen & Erin, Co-Founders [**Click right here to see it in action!**](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?xtl=3efmmrhj1hh045qwdxi03gr541pvmbtol7kgl05w8vlax3lx9rb83jflj8u4ft6nbvse0txd5ay6xvofbc1hdaehi75riu5o5wgb3qqdneqo2ffigzpknc42emkdhafkzdr1jnqtretl2s4w6yl92cg36kabb4qczwr0mxlnhonty66ne8b2n47yf1667p7jql3tc5y1qvqt7qz9tzj2qsf1fsht2on4fukym1djlkxxpjurpuhy6s3z3aqqzz7az14ei5rg59&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t9dqyv&__onlt=h) [](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?xtl=3efmmrhj1hh045qwdxi03gr541pvmbtol7kgl05w8vlax3lx9rb83jflj8u4ft6nbvse0txd5ay6xvofbc1hdaehi75riu5o5wgb3qqdneqo2ffigzpknc42emkdhafkzdr1jnqtretl2s4w6yl92cg36kabb4qczwr0mxlnhonty66ne8b2n47yf1667p7jql3tc5y1qvqt7qz9tzj2qsf1fsht2on4fukym1djlkxxpjurpuhy6s3z3aqqzz7az14ei5rg59&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t9dqyv&__onlt=h)

subject: My race just shot to the top of every list
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123963706/597134616/-1429052514?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3ODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiM2NlNzlhMDItNGZmOS1mMDExLThkNGMtMDAyMjQ4MmQyNzliIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ajiRUgpPsU-upuxlVSheMH8gaZJLf_rGYRtC3z7iUrQ=)
Hi friend,

We’re heading into the final stretch of January, and our first end-of-month fundraising deadline of the election year is just days away.

It couldn’t come at a more impactful time: Last week, the _Cook Political Report_ released updated ratings of the most competitive races nationwide -- and CA-45 is now the **most vulnerable Democratic-held seat in Southern California.**

That’s not speculation -- it’s a reflection of how competitive this race is, and how determined Republicans are to take it back.

When I launched this campaign, I knew it wouldn’t be easy. We flipped this district by 653 votes -- one of the closest margins in the country. I ran because families like mine needed someone willing to fight for them, and I’ve carried that same urgency with me into Congress every day since.

But now, national Republicans are lining up behind multiple challengers, clearing the field for a big-name opponent, and preparing to flood this district with outside cash.

With the House majority hanging by a thread, holding CA-45 is essential to stopping the MAGA agenda and protecting the progress we’ve made.

**[The stakes couldn’t be higher. Can you chip in $3 to help us hit our January goal and send a clear message that CA-45 is not up for grabs?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123963707/597134617/-1429052514?refcode=em-1.24.26-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3ODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiM2NlNzlhMDItNGZmOS1mMDExLThkNGMtMDAyMjQ4MmQyNzliIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ajiRUgpPsU-upuxlVSheMH8gaZJLf_rGYRtC3z7iUrQ=)**

But now, national Republicans are lining up behind multiple challengers, clearing the field for a big-name opponent, and preparing to flood this district with outside cash. With the House majority hanging by a thread, holding CA-45 is essential to stopping the MAGA agenda and protecting the progress we’ve made. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thank you, Derek | www.derektranforcongress.com Use of Derek Tran's military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Dept. of Defense or U.S. Army. Derek Tran is a veteran, consumer rights attorney, and Member of Congress representing California's 45th District. subject: Charlie’s final book wasn’t about politics...

| | Peter,
---
| | Charlie would have wanted you to have this.

Before his September 10th assassination, Charlie had just put the finishing touches on a very important book. His final book.

The topic is one that Charlie found to be crucial for every human to understand and practice.

This isn't a book about public policy or political discourse, nor is it simply about passing on values of patriotism to young Americans.

**Instead, this book is about something far deeper and more personal -- the importance of honoring the Sabbath and resting in God's grace. **

Despite his hectic schedule and full life, Charlie was committed to setting aside an entire day each week to rest, to pray, and to give undivided attention to God, Erika, and his children.

By honoring the Sabbath, Charlie lived out a powerful message: _**" God, You are enough. And because You are enough, I need not carry the weight of a world that was never mine to hold." **_

His book, _**Stop, in the Name of God**_ is the fruit of that conviction.
---
[](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=69ee35cd14204dafbe74e44f8b8c3a62&_e=IoTFDPIm_niO6yVtB4jpsFRbyoO8PAldSpE4Q-o9mMzcPtOnHuPCCLDTMIO3K4gyZfHw-FBhwO3y3HwHopw5WbBzZWmAxnbzpvg1sZtj78IhmDcZJ8ctyX5KqTT5IrK9uA8CdkZNVJJ2mRxeQBuzC5VlLKjOg4ER_V-JpXtX1Y8t1oXQgMkkJ1R2HsWsrhdulLURK6WASsSz-6eJJw_aAoSz4P6vIz3vPN_qR2bcURjLzETGJVyF25PzyXPP2EXE9fczX_PJriwI2vpWwk6YbqSf3-xNHI-w77VzsK9dEl4qICRUW-dXk0eOaWpad72FmN6D6hkQXlqkZwzP_ZHGENOmKqeck0hTZ1-xXTVQOJ6hKbbuaSjToCwuqbaa7E_x9sYWmIBe_ejqq3ffa7NVvx-bT6xYsPtwTd2AXSpfVzNg91K6NaZy7D6Ao4Kga7gTPvj432NaoOXir36SuDruL8acNWgzvbLxa69yjvA9GCWZmXe265CoQTYS7Vhf00YSCOLJ-4MxBT75sLOBU8dKip-2RSECcUk6GuAIUIjWkGFF9GNCCUY0f-hnElWvNquDY5IXoBM80vjl9wGSh776Jri6UJb6Nx1ZBKa1-jFUny-M6ChqpW9pLCs4LP2w6tQf1xBR7m9w_ab_aN4d_ucMGR8mdojBdgePpbwyEJaTweJpctn0YTuvDjDrIsxA7Pu1)
---
When you read it, you will hear Charlie's voice inviting you to reclaim something our fast-paced culture has essentially erased: a time for rest, a time devoted to God, and time with family.

Charlie's hope was for each of us to rediscover the Sabbath as he did: not as a burden to bear, but as a gift to receive...

A sacred routine meant to draw us nearer to God, to steady our hearts with His peace, and renew our strength for the battles to which He calls us.

I believe you will find this book inspiring.

Charlie wanted everyone to have this book because its message meant so much in his own life.

**[To claim your copy of this life-changing book, simply make a generous gift in any amount to Turning Point USA today.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=69ee35cd14204dafbe74e44f8b8c3a62&_e=IoTFDPIm_niO6yVtB4jpsFRbyoO8PAldSpE4Q-o9mMzcPtOnHuPCCLDTMIO3K4gyZfHw-FBhwO3y3HwHopw5WbBzZWmAxnbzpvg1sZtj78IhmDcZJ8ctyX5KqTT5IrK9uA8CdkZNVJJ2mRxeQBuzC5VlLKjOg4ER_V-JpXtX1Y8t1oXQgMkkJ1R2HsWsrhdulLURK6WASsSz-6eJJw_aAoSz4P6vIz3vPN_qR2bcURhNPcR7KITqPcpvamSwdJFN46HFX0NyuFuFol5kWcKwU7EVnXphdJAV5jeMiEzyD3tMDwmaMVG_h3plA0066W_cxFYcYVPtEkLZL_nfY_kW4Zc7p5n9w2IOtfW7hcdD6InqWmynS18xTZILHuMQ2UpXHTExlmetN7WbHGGjYhZ0KWOQGzZqdARt8pOqQMporbhB-89JIpbMoHw7M6sBKAGXXg5xsXWN2cDa6V5d8qWhzPjUnYTK4P4MEAQMM9LgpM6YGamm1EhakuSvym8VCgmoukrtyJkln9dkSsf_reypBzdWyPIoqoksgvd8ux7a6wwiR9HjkV3WDV4AfwzR_o7tniFQNB9eVs4V3kAIF7uBqzIDWkLBZ1T87P1yycNzUCB7VnKPp_TxagKKoficbUtWLO-5viiyl93yUlG3cds9eSjDZ77LVonXn8tNGCTLf7c_V_y0m_lqVaHEJE3OrmsW)**

---
In the months since Charlie's assassination, there has been a massive surge of interest in Turning Point USA's message among young Americans...

...and it's not just the conservative message as a whole -- _**it 's the message of FAITH! **_

In recent months, I have heard countless stories of people who have answered Charlie's call to attend a Bible study, start a family, and pray to God.

Charlie devoted so much of his time urging people to build strong families, to go to church, and to stand up for America. _And it 's happening. _

After years of witnessing declining church attendance, we are now seeing Americans filling the pews in huge numbers across the country.

What we're witnessing is not just growth --**it 's revival. **

At Turning Point USA, we are dedicated and honored to continue strengthening the faith of Americans, young and old.

We are building a coalition of truth-preaching churches that stand firm against cultural compromise, defend biblical values, and strengthen families.

We are training pastors, uniting congregations, and, of course, reaching the next generation on campuses across the country with this same message.

You might feel disheartened by the evil in our culture and by the unthinkable assassination of Charlie.

**But America 's faithful are waking up. The youth are waking up. America is waking up. **

All across this nation, pastors are linking arms, young believers are finding their voice, and families are saying, _" We're not backing down." _

This is what Charlie prayed for.

I see this book as one of Charlie's most enduring gifts to the world, and I know you will too.

None of us knew how brief his time on earth would be. But the truths written in this book are timeless. They will outlive us all, and most importantly, **_so will the legacy of Charlie 's faith. _**

Charlie lived life at a relentless pace, but he also understood the sacred value of stillness. Through it all, his gaze was fixed on eternity with God.

Charlie wanted everyone to have this book because its message meant so much in his own life. In the months since Charlie's assassination, there has been a massive surge of interest in Turning Point USA's message among young Americans... ...and it's not just the conservative message as a whole -- it 's the message of FAITH! In recent months, I have heard countless stories of people who have answered Charlie's call to attend a Bible study, start a family, and pray to God. Charlie devoted so much of his time urging people to build strong families, to go to church, and to stand up for America. And it 's happening. After years of witnessing declining church attendance, we are now seeing Americans filling the pews in huge numbers across the country. What we're witnessing is not just growth --it 's revival. At Turning Point USA, we are dedicated and honored to continue strengthening the faith of Americans, young and old. We are building a coalition of truth-preaching churches that stand firm against cultural compromise, defend biblical values, and strengthen families. We are training pastors, uniting congregations, and, of course, reaching the next generation on campuses across the country with this same message. You might feel disheartened by the evil in our culture and by the unthinkable assassination of Charlie. But America 's faithful are waking up. The youth are waking up. America is waking up. All across this nation, pastors are linking arms, young believers are finding their voice, and families are saying, " We're not backing down." This is what Charlie prayed for. I see this book as one of Charlie's most enduring gifts to the world, and I know you will too. None of us knew how brief his time on earth would be. But the truths written in this book are timeless. They will outlive us all, and most importantly, so will the legacy of Charlie 's faith. Charlie lived life at a relentless pace, but he also understood the sacred value of stillness. Through it all, his gaze was fixed on eternity with God. I'll personally ensure your copy is sent to you as soon as possible. Thank you in advance for carrying on Charlie's mission and supporting his legacy. For Charlie, Justin Streiff Chief Operating Officer Turning Point USA P.S. When you read Stop, in the Name of God, you will discover what Charlie found in the Sabbath: a holy rest that steadies the heart, renews the soul, and gives strength for the road ahead. 4940 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044

name: Jeff Merkley
subject: Trump’s Greenland obsession is a power grab, plain and simple
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon
body:
It’s about ego.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123964394/597137070/150430950?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYzdkZGMzNS01MGY5LWYwMTEtOGQ0Yy0wMDIyNDgyZDI3OWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3MZIKUOQEdXjAonHlLDB-wFbjpN8GUOL58Wpp98zD7E=&emci=d5f5deec-a4f8-f011-8d4c-0022482d279b&emdi=2c7ddc35-50f9-f011-8d4c-0022482d279b&ceid=7731215)
---

| | While families are worrying about the cost of groceries, rent, and health care, Donald Trump is spending his time talking about taking over Greenland. I want to be clear about what's driving this because it has nothing to do with protecting America or making life more affordable for anyone. **_This is about ego. Trump's ego._** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123964395/597137071/-1850978366?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYzdkZGMzNS01MGY5LWYwMTEtOGQ0Yy0wMDIyNDgyZDI3OWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3MZIKUOQEdXjAonHlLDB-wFbjpN8GUOL58Wpp98zD7E=&emci=d5f5deec-a4f8-f011-8d4c-0022482d279b&emdi=2c7ddc35-50f9-f011-8d4c-0022482d279b&ceid=7731215) Trump sees Greenland on a map, blown up by projection, and wants to slap his name on a massive chunk of land to feed what may be the biggest ego on the planet. This has nothing to do with reality on the ground or the needs of the American people. You may hear scare stories about Chinese or Russian ships and submarines swarming Greenland. Those claims are unfounded. The United States already has a military presence there — Pituffik Space Base on Greenland's western coast — and our allies are fully engaged in Arctic security. There is no emergency that justifies saber-rattling or talk of taking over another country. Greenland is a self-governing territory, and its people have made clear they are open to cooperation, including the responsible development of strategic minerals. That's how international relationships work — through partnership and respect, not imperial-style power grabs. **Trump's Greenland obsession is a power grab, plain and simple. It's about him — not what's best for America.** I don't believe Congress will go along with it. I hope Democrats and Republicans alike say, clearly and forcefully: hell no. I'll keep speaking out, because our foreign policy should be grounded in reality, respect for sovereignty, and a focus on actually improving people's lives here at home. Onward! _Jeff_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Jeff Merkley instantly:

name: The Real Texas PAC
subject: BREAKING: ICE executes another protestor in Minnesota
body:
🚨🚨🚨🚨🚨🚨
BREAKING OUT OF MINNEAPOLIS
ICE tackles, publicly executes protestor in broad daylight
Just over an hour ago, ICE agents in Minneapolis tackled a protestor on a sidewalk and shot him point blank in the head. He died at the scene.
The horror you felt reading that sentence is justified and correct. We feel the same. The question now is - what do we do next?
We have a saying around here:
OUTRAGE. Then, action.
We're doubling down on raising funds for candidates who are committed to:
1: Holding EVERY Republican who allowed ICE to run rampant in our streets accountable, and
2: Voting to ABOLISH ICE once and for all
If you want someplace to channel your outrage - join us now by chipping in to help REMOVE as many ICE supporters from office as possible. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/outrage-then-action?refcode=122625_4]

name: Demand Justice PAC
subject: Before Trump’s revenge tour escalates…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Demand Justice PAC
body:
[ https://act.demandjustice.org/go/54940?refcode=em20260124-61113&t=1001&akid=61113%2E1407376%2E7lBOoI ]Demand Justice PAC[ https://act.demandjustice.org/go/54940?refcode=em20260124-61113&t=1002&akid=61113%2E1407376%2E7lBOoI ]Demand Justice PAC

Trump promised revenge — and he’s delivering it with a vengeance.

Since returning to the White House, Trump has turned the Department of
Justice into a personal instrument of retaliation, targeting anyone who
dares stand in his way.

New York Attorney General Letitia James? Targeted not for breaking the
law, but for holding Trump accountable for civil fraud.

Former FBI Director James Comey? Targeted for refusing to bow to Trump’s
lies and corruption.

Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell? Targeted simply for doing his job and
following the facts, rather than bending them to Trump’s political will.

It’s authoritarianism in real time. He’s weaponizing the government and
the justice system to intimidate, punish, and silence anyone who refuses
to play by his rules. And if we do nothing, no one is safe.

Demand Justice PAC refuses to stay silent. We are sounding the alarm and
calling out this abuse of power before it becomes normalized. We’re
calling on everyone who believes in justice, democracy, and accountability
to act — before Trump’s revenge tour escalates further.

[ https://act.demandjustice.org/go/55459?c0=dj-em-20260124.7QhLL5&refcode=em20260124-61113&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1003&akid=61113%2E1407376%2E7lBOoI ]Stand with us. Chip in $5 to Demand Justice PAC today
and say no to a justice system twisted into a tool of revenge.

[ https://act.demandjustice.org/go/55459?c0=dj-em-20260124.7QhLL5&amount=5&refcode=em20260124-61113&t=1022&akid=61113%2E1407376%2E7lBOoI ]Donate $5 ››

In solidarity,

Demand Justice PAC

name: Mike Johnson, 56th Speaker of the House
subject: Peter, we’ve made a unanimous decision.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Peter, I'm not alone in believing you truly deserve this. My colleagues and I at House GOP Headquarters were all in agreement.

clean_body: Peter, I'm not alone in believing you truly deserve this. My colleagues and I at House GOP Headquarters were all in agreement. In fact, we've made a unanimous decision. If there's anyone who has a record worthy of this, it's you. First of all, Congratulations! This is reserved only for top supporters of our movement. But I have to say, you've been so outstanding in your record of support that you've built up a profile that falls within the TOP Tier of GOP Patriots. one of House GOP's most trusted patriots, and you deserve to have the status to reflect that! And before you click, I want to let you know that we'll be leaning on you for your opinion on matters as we move forward. I'm putting this deal on the table because we can't afford to lose our most trusted allies when our majority is as thin as it is right now! You, God Bless You and God Bless America!
