name: Pure panic
subject: Desperate MAGA begging for reinforcements in WI
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DEFEND OUR COURTS, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE
body:
| | | | | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ru8Uz2VEhqDODdaIaVcLziJO0WMJY2DnL-GomM3Asave8ad0ameaE2DcoKyTsOIprfzfIK24j-GTXQ2g3TjCFZWKpU0fqwciv29wxD_BV-jtr-QgdjdLxhZStbMBTQ5RltM1w5_oDzX6tlE_DsKM24z41-ajraoHwseX0K0_3Y00KSx9o8uQAPgpYYj-dJQFcql6FQwYrir4-ukZel0OoAtWPf8xvKbb4m0x5qVHFH8=&c=ZtddGkFYINuG9zigkqYVRrxWtNrW1rnUESSD6BYPekjKKJyumel2_w==&ch=ARtxONoLYk3CQyR3xA44mLRLNMx2C5DV71b5p56vpPyL8YBF7ZjuAw==)
---
| Peter,
Right now, MAGA is having a meltdown over the upcoming April Wisconsin Supreme Court race. This is the first major election for Democrats of the '26 election cycle and a must-win for MAGA.
MAGA's handpicked judge, Maria Lazar, supports an extreme abortion ban and has connections to election deniers. And with that record, it's no surprise her campaign is off to a horrible start.
Liberal judge Chris Taylor just outraised Lazar 10 to 1--Oof.
After last year's win, Democrats now hold a 4-3 majority on the WI court. With a seat up for grabs again this year, we now have a chance to expand our majority to 5-2.
More importantly, a win here would lock down the WI Supreme Court for Democrats until at least 2030, securing a key swing state court for the rest of Trump's presidency.
That's why MAGA is freaking out:
---
| [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ru8Uz2VEhqDODdaIaVcLziJO0WMJY2DnL-GomM3Asave8ad0ameaE2DcoKyTsOIprfzfIK24j-GTXQ2g3TjCFZWKpU0fqwciv29wxD_BV-jtr-QgdjdLxhZStbMBTQ5RltM1w5_oDzX6tlE_DsKM24z41-ajraoHwseX0K0_3Y00KSx9o8uQAPgpYYj-dJQFcql6FQwYrir4-ukZel0OoAtWPf8xvKbbEGSD1CCTNoI=&c=ZtddGkFYINuG9zigkqYVRrxWtNrW1rnUESSD6BYPekjKKJyumel2_w==&ch=ARtxONoLYk3CQyR3xA44mLRLNMx2C5DV71b5p56vpPyL8YBF7ZjuAw==)
---
Our team has been around politics long enough to know what a statement like this from a conservative radio host actually means:
MAGA is sending an S.O.S. to MAGA billionaires and dark money groups to help save Lazar's campaign.
While their desperation is amusing, MAGA billionaires and dark money groups can dump millions of money into a race in a blink of an eye. It's no joke. And it is definitely going to happen.
That's why Defend Our Courts is jumping in this race to help WI Dems defeat Lazar.
Last year, we helped lead the defense of Pennsylvania's Supreme Court and lockdown a dem majority on that court until 2029. Now, we are taking our winning formula national and Wisconsin is our first major test.
MAGA billionaires and dark money groups are going to start dumping millions in this race any day now. Democrats' early edge in this race won't last for long and if we are going to stop them we have to start building the warchest to be in position to counter them immediately.
That's why we are sending our own S.O.S. to Dems to rally to our aid once again. With over 100,000 supporters nationwide, Defend Our Courts is one of, if not, the largest organizations defending state courts across the country. We have the power to be the difference in this race. We just need you:
[Please, will you rush a contribution of $50, $25, or whatever you can spare to help secure the WI Supreme Court for Dems until 2030?](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ru8Uz2VEhqDODdaIaVcLziJO0WMJY2DnL-GomM3Asave8ad0ameaE2DcoKyTsOIpGtb70uD--OdLDXHv37j_FG7olN1wX22vVnKRHwXg3ekoDM4gHbDtcEZdYg1KmPmKsrqvNxI-y04Q-vgtiovCleoVC0OfTNobz-ekzF56x8ji0i9pDKw58RpGL28qQdt_9vQiYxC4C5fNN1Q1mBfBX3pWks-2eh_lM2RL9HdwR7ddiDPX5inshAOWkelhEZ8W&c=ZtddGkFYINuG9zigkqYVRrxWtNrW1rnUESSD6BYPekjKKJyumel2_w==&ch=ARtxONoLYk3CQyR3xA44mLRLNMx2C5DV71b5p56vpPyL8YBF7ZjuAw==)

clean_body: | | | | | == | Peter, Right now, MAGA is having a meltdown over the upcoming April Wisconsin Supreme Court race. This is the first major election for Democrats of the '26 election cycle and a must-win for MAGA. MAGA's handpicked judge, Maria Lazar, supports an extreme abortion ban and has connections to election deniers. And with that record, it's no surprise her campaign is off to a horrible start. Liberal judge Chris Taylor just outraised Lazar 10 to 1--Oof. After last year's win, Democrats now hold a 4-3 majority on the WI court. With a seat up for grabs again this year, we now have a chance to expand our majority to 5-2. More importantly, a win here would lock down the WI Supreme Court for Democrats until at least 2030, securing a key swing state court for the rest of Trump's presidency. That's why MAGA is freaking out: | == Our team has been around politics long enough to know what a statement like this from a conservative radio host actually means: MAGA is sending an S.O.S. to MAGA billionaires and dark money groups to help save Lazar's campaign. While their desperation is amusing, MAGA billionaires and dark money groups can dump millions of money into a race in a blink of an eye. It's no joke. And it is definitely going to happen. That's why Defend Our Courts is jumping in this race to help WI Dems defeat Lazar. Last year, we helped lead the defense of Pennsylvania's Supreme Court and lockdown a dem majority on that court until 2029. Now, we are taking our winning formula national and Wisconsin is our first major test. MAGA billionaires and dark money groups are going to start dumping millions in this race any day now. Democrats' early edge in this race won't last for long and if we are going to stop them we have to start building the warchest to be in position to counter them immediately. That's why we are sending our own S.O.S. to Dems to rally to our aid once again. With over 100,000 supporters nationwide, Defend Our Courts is one of, if not, the largest organizations defending state courts across the country. We have the power to be the difference in this race. body:
When Pete Hegseth removed me after 35 years in the Navy, I learned the real value of integrity.
_[unsubscribe](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/uV0Vq92dx0WQWrAIt9AKkw2?unsubscribedata=XqUlX3P15dn9BJY4fZ6PDWzHvrENWP7KL51GYJhh6VneTtsLNHN6E4EMfA555ROUJA%2BNNtDlRJbpyZjXCbs1qb5WckkyI1%2Bw7XJGLx%2BRx6D6flPfHGrmtZ2KB4ZcrIxu9ieZBgTkacGc7TZ83Auo8iRIXOyNfGYlNIl2hQzGKxkI4hd85BSn3%2BbUIlwCaQUwHV8Rze7aVVyVD0B4l%2B1CmjWJLJjcPfppB00duJeNxKuWbLMU9V8WMOeJfzuMjI5hJXjHtsQbQ204xvPjOQdi9XCsCcEEafcI8VPmZtAy0YkGIBGFDa%2FJbiNKMUVwUE5a0XuUchDZTRdO%2FTZioaxHxzs48TZWMvrlVyPt%2BESYdaaROZW3tpCJiVjnbmqYSiH6zBakzWAZo%2F2CiUn9J4DpO3DdTjehwYRHHHgiNud83TGVs1S%2B4UJdVFFNTM7P%2Fs0a)_

Hi – my name is Nancy Lacore, and I’m running for Congress in SC-01.
When Pete Hegseth removed me after 35 years of serving our country in the Navy, I learned this the hard way: **when leadership loses integrity, real people pay the price.**
South Carolinians are facing that same reality under Nancy Mace. I’m running for Congress because I refuse to accept that this is just “how things work now.”
_I’m running because integrity matters._
[**We have a tough path ahead of us, but I’m confident we can win with your support. Will you split a donation between my campaign and Eileen Laubacher's today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123966024/597140723/-1420152198?refcode=20260124-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTgxNzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzRlY2FhZTgtNTZmOS1mMDExLThkNGMtMDAyMjQ4MmQyNzliIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=_wPhJ6zpS8swhRbtfHsW-MHueSV1lZVje3HqLRmJKcU=)
I’ve served our country at the highest levels of government. I’ve seen leadership done right: principled, accountable, and results-oriented. But I’ve experienced firsthand what happens when experience is sidelined without explanation.
That kind of leadership doesn’t just hurt institutions. It hurts families, communities, our nation, and it erodes hard-earned trust.
Over the course of Mace’s term, integrity hasn’t just taken a backseat – it’s been replaced with chaos, negligence, and political theater. She’s verbally abused constituents, fueled reckless conspiracy theories, and used the halls of Congress to air personal grievances.
_We can do better._
I promise to put our communities before ambition and be accountable to the people I serve. I lived it for 35 years, and I don’t plan to stop now. [**If you believe in doing the job the right way and setting a higher standard, please consider splitting a donation between my campaign and Eileen Laubacher's.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123966025/597140730/-1420152198?refcode=20260124-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTgxNzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzRlY2FhZTgtNTZmOS1mMDExLThkNGMtMDAyMjQ4MmQyNzliIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=_wPhJ6zpS8swhRbtfHsW-MHueSV1lZVje3HqLRmJKcU=)
With my deepest respect and gratitude,
Nancy Lacore
Democratic Candidate for Congress
South Carolina’s First District

clean_body: When Pete Hegseth removed me after 35 years in the Navy, I learned the real value of integrity. Hi – my name is Nancy Lacore, and I’m running for Congress in SC-01. When Pete Hegseth removed me after 35 years of serving our country in the Navy, I learned this the hard way: when leadership loses integrity, real people pay the price. South Carolinians are facing that same reality under Nancy Mace. I’m running for Congress because I refuse to accept that this is just “how things work now.” I’m running because integrity matters. = I’ve served our country at the highest levels of government. I’ve seen leadership done right: principled, accountable, and results-oriented. But I’ve experienced firsthand what happens when experience is sidelined without explanation. That kind of leadership doesn’t just hurt institutions. It hurts families, communities, our nation, and it erodes hard-earned trust. Over the course of Mace’s term, integrity hasn’t just taken a backseat – it’s been replaced with chaos, negligence, and political theater. She’s verbally abused constituents, fueled reckless conspiracy theories, and used the halls of Congress to air personal grievances. We can do better. I promise to put our communities before ambition and be accountable to the people I serve. I lived it for 35 years, and I don’t plan to stop now. = With my deepest respect and gratitude, Nancy Lacore Democratic Candidate for Congress South Carolina’s First District ** Paid for by Eileen for Colorado Eileen for Colorado 9249 S Broadway #200-172 Highlands Ranch, CO 80129 United States Contributions or gifts to Eileen for Colorado are not tax deductible.

Our border is **SHUT** , gas prices have hit a **FIVE-YEAR LOW** , inflation is **UNDER CONTROL** , the economy is **BOOMING** , and the USA is finally **RESPECTED** again.

The Democrats **CAN’T STAND** that the American people are winning again, and they’ll **USE** **EVERY DIRTY TACTIC** possible to destroy our progress.

And make no mistake, Patriot: when they come after me, they’re really coming after **YOU**!

We’ve been through **HELL** together, and**NOTHING** has torn our bond apart.

name: George Whitesides
subject: We need to be ready for anything.
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123966397/597141875/336227065?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OGI3MTAzZi01N2Y5LWYwMTEtOGQ0Yy0wMDIyNDgyZDI3OWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_otdS4RLrFszcsCI35QA2x8E8UaN30JOBWKiWg19j_M=)
Peter,

This year has already presented many challenges -- costs on everything from housing to health care are rising, while the Trump administration threatens more tariffs and kowtows to GOP billionaire donors.

It’s chaos. And it does nothing to better our communities.

**While it seems far off now, November’s midterm elections are the best opportunity to make our voices heard. Only a few seats separate House control, and a Democratic majority would finally hold the MAGA agenda accountable.**

This election is unprecedented. After the passage of Proposition 50 in California, thousands of voters who have never seen my name on the ballot were folded into my district -- and CA-27 is still listed by political experts at _Sabato’s Crystal Ball_ as one of the most competitive races nationwide.

**[We need to be ready for anything -- right now. We've endorsed a strong slate of attorney general candidates this cycle, and will have even more in the coming months. Meet some of the extraordinary women ready to take on Trump:

**Attorney General Kris Mayes (AZ)** has emerged as a key leader in the fight against Trump. When the Trump administration attempted to slash funding for medical and public health research, she pushed back. She also went after corporations that were unfairly and illegally raising prices, and she is ready to continue her fight for Arizona families.

**Karen McDonald (MI)** is Michigan's Oakland County prosecutor and a former teacher and judge. She grew up in a working-class Michigan family and has spent her life fighting for her community. From the classroom to the courtroom, she has a proven record of fighting to protect Michigan children and families and making her state safer.

**Nicole Cannizzaro (NV)** is a lifelong Nevadan, mom, and the first woman to serve as majority leader of the Nevada state Senate. She has led the fight to permanently protect abortion rights and IVF in Nevada while shielding women and doctors from out-of-state legal attacks. As a prosecutor and legislator, she’s spent her career protecting families, expanding education, and making Nevada safer for everyone.
****[**These EMILYs List women need your support. clean_body: Attorneys general are standing up to Trump and WINNING | = Peter, We know that Donald Trump has been working to overhaul the U.S. government since he took office. His administration has cut funding, fired thousands of workers, and is systematically dismantling entire federal departments. But while Republican lawmakers in Congress have failed to act, Democratic attorneys general have stepped up to the plate. = | = We've endorsed a strong slate of attorney general candidates this cycle, and will have even more in the coming months. Meet some of the extraordinary women ready to take on Trump: Attorney General Kris Mayes (AZ) has emerged as a key leader in the fight against Trump. When the Trump administration attempted to slash funding for medical and public health research, she pushed back. She also went after corporations that were unfairly and illegally raising prices, and she is ready to continue her fight for Arizona families. Karen McDonald (MI) is Michigan's Oakland County prosecutor and a former teacher and judge. She grew up in a working-class Michigan family and has spent her life fighting for her community. From the classroom to the courtroom, she has a proven record of fighting to protect Michigan children and families and making her state safer. Nicole Cannizzaro (NV) is a lifelong Nevadan, mom, and the first woman to serve as majority leader of the Nevada state Senate. She has led the fight to permanently protect abortion rights and IVF in Nevada while shielding women and doctors from out-of-state legal attacks. As a prosecutor and legislator, she’s spent her career protecting families, expanding education, and making Nevada safer for everyone. **=** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you for being in the fight with us. – the EMILYs List Campaigns team = | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. name: James Talarico HQ
subject: How to watch the debate and support James:
body:
Today’s debate starts at 2 PM CT, and James wanted to make sure you had
the link to watch it live! [ https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/1698?t=1001&akid=409%2E1347274%2Eew3876 ]You can get the link and instructions for
how to watch here. Please join us to cheer on James soon!

WATCH THE DEBATE

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

[2]Talarico for Texas

Peter —

At 2 PM CT, James will debate Jasmine Crocket one-on-one.

It’s a huge moment for our movement. Everybody will be watching. Our
campaign is surging, and voters, the media, and our opponents are all
asking if James has what it takes to win on March 3.

We can’t falter now. [ https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/512?c0=jt-em-2026q1.AKJ3HX&refcode=em260124-2-ak&t=1002&akid=409%2E1347274%2Eew3876 ]If you believe James is our best chance take back
Texas, please consider making a contribution to let him know you have his
back before he takes the stage.

Right now, the corporate media, pundits, and national Republicans are
waking up to the fact that James has a path to victory — on March 3 and in
November. John Cornyn just admitted that himself, calling James
“dangerous” and a threat to Republicans’ Senate majority.

The attacks are escalating and will only get worse from here. The
corporate and billionaire mega-donors who fund our opponents want us to
fail.

So whatever happens, we need to be ready to respond. It’s critical that we
have the resources to make our case to voters in every corner of Texas.

So we need a lot of donations before the debate. Each one will help us
send a powerful message that our movement has the momentum and is only
growing stronger.

[ https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/512?c0=jt-em-2026q1.AKJ3HX&refcode=em260124-2-ak&t=1003&akid=409%2E1347274%2Eew3876 ]That’s why we are humbly asking you to make a contribution to James
Talarico’s campaign for the U.S. Senate before the debate. Please help put
us in a position to win the primary and prove our movement is Democrats’
best chance to flip Texas.

If you've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution
instantly.

[ https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/506?c0=jt-em-2026q1.uoly08&refcode=em260124-2-ak&t=1022&akid=409%2E1347274%2Eew3876 ]Donate $5

[ https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/505?c0=jt-em-2026q1.TbKB0H&refcode=em260124-2-ak&t=1023&akid=409%2E1347274%2Eew3876 ]Donate $25

[ https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/498?c0=jt-em-2026q1.N0mCc7&refcode=em260124-2-ak&t=1024&akid=409%2E1347274%2Eew3876 ]Donate $50

[ https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/499?c0=jt-em-2026q1.2kKV7e&refcode=em260124-2-ak&t=1025&akid=409%2E1347274%2Eew3876 ]Donate $100

[ https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/500?c0=jt-em-2026q1.MJJTjD&refcode=em260124-2-ak&t=1026&akid=409%2E1347274%2Eew3876 ]Donate $250

[ https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/503?c0=jt-em-2026q1.jmBlL0&refcode=em260124-2-ak&t=1027&akid=409%2E1347274%2Eew3876 ]Other Amount

Team Talarico

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.jamestalarico.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=409%2E1347274%2Eew3876

name: The Liberty Ledger
subject: Family Member Comments On Influencer Who Apologized For Accident On Social Media
body:
Ms. Rachel occupies a unique space in modern media. To millions of parents, she is a cheerful, trusted entertainer for preschool-aged children, associated with early learning, speech development, and a carefully curated sense of warmth and safety. That carefully built image is precisely why recent political associations and family discord surrounding her have drawn heightened [...] | [](http://trk.libertyledger._ZD01In0/cOJeWM-J296NvsubeP508w)

# **[Tennis Star Amanda Anisimova Speaks With The Media](http://trk.libertyledger.)**
---
The post-match press conference at the Australian Open is usually a routine affair, a brief space where athletes reflect on form, fitness, and the next round. This week, however, American tennis player Amanda Anisimova’s appearance after her second-round win drew attention for a different reason. Rather than focusing on her performance, a line of questioning [...]

# **[Mexico Politician Statement Raises Eyebrows](http://trk.libertyledger._LVsR6XDrArEC89551tQ)**
---
Peter Schweizer’s The Invisible Coup doesn’t so much break news as it confirms what many Americans have long suspected—and what the ruling class has desperately tried to deny. At the heart of the book is a chilling revelation: elements of the Mexican government—up to and including its presidents—have openly and repeatedly embraced the idea of [...]

# **[Vance Address Photo From Minneapolis](http://trk.libertyledger.)**
---
Vice President JD Vance didn’t just set the record straight in Minneapolis yesterday—he dismantled yet another viral lie cooked up by the corporate press and served piping hot to the outrage-addicted corners of the internet. While former Special Counsel Jack Smith was being politically filleted in Washington over his collapsed case against Donald Trump, the [...]

[](http://trk.libertyledger.)
# **[Former Capitol Officer Speaks At Hearing](http://trk.libertyledger.)**
---
The spectacle at Thursday’s House Judiciary Committee hearing, which was supposed to center on former Special Counsel Jack Smith’s controversial investigation into President Trump, veered into something darker and more chaotic—thanks to former Capitol Police Officer Michael Fanone, whose conduct continues to outpace his credibility. Former Capitol Police officer Michael Fanone & Ivan Raiklin, Jan. [...]

[](http://trk.libertyledger._c2V5aWQ9In0/hchNssFlsQvnb6tJ6xxbBg)
# **[Appeals Court Rules On ICE Ruling](http://trk.libertyledger._c2V5aWQ9In0/hchNssFlsQvnb6tJ6xxbBg)**
---
A federal appeals court’s decision this week to pause a sweeping lower-court order restricting how immigration agents may respond to protests in Minnesota marks an important reassertion of constitutional boundaries between the judiciary and federal law enforcement. The controversy was never really about the right to protest. It was about whether a single district judge [...]

body:
#
This is MAJOR, Peter.
**Election watchers across the country just signaled that ALASKA could be one of Democrats’ top pick-up opportunities in 2026!**
**[If you’re ready to help us take advantage of this moment and elect Democrats across the country – especially in states we can flip like Alaska – please rush a donation of $5 or more today >>>](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/100212?refcode=em20260124-9989&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9989%2E614464%2EpngPFH)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $5](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/100213?refcode=em20260124-9989&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=5&t=2&akid=9989%2E614464%2EpngPFH) [Contribute $15](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/100213?refcode=em20260124-9989&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=15&t=3&akid=9989%2E614464%2EpngPFH) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/100213?refcode=em20260124-9989&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=4&akid=9989%2E614464%2EpngPFH) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/100213?refcode=em20260124-9989&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=5&akid=9989%2E614464%2EpngPFH) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/100213?refcode=em20260124-9989&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=6&akid=9989%2E614464%2EpngPFH) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/100213?refcode=em20260124-9989&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=7&akid=9989%2E614464%2EpngPFH) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/100212?refcode=em20260124-9989&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=8&akid=9989%2E614464%2EpngPFH)
---
Heading into the midterms, we were looking at a tough map for Democrats. But now, we’ve got Alaska. Ohio. Iowa. Texas. And MORE opportunities to pick up seats in the Senate AND in the House.
Now here’s why we need your help, Peter.
**Last year, Democrats gained unprecedented momentum.** We all saw the Trump administration + the GOP break promises, bulldoze over our freedoms, and enrich themselves while making life more expensive for the rest of us. And voters like you held them accountable for it at nearly every opportunity.
**But that doesn’t mean we can simply coast into this year.** We need to make sure Democrats across the country have the resources to put pedal to the metal and WIN in November. And that’s not possible without you.

body:
Let's take a look back on Republican control of Congress in 2025. Peter,

Let's take a look back on Republican control of Congress in 2025. Here are the highlights:

**1.** Republicans voted their "Big, Ugly Bill" into law, slashing healthcare for millions of Americans while handing tax breaks to the wealthiest few.
**2.** They led us to a historic 43-day government shutdown over their refusal to address the healthcare crisis they created.
**3.** Republican senators confirmed unqualified Trump appointees to his cabinet, including RFK Jr., who is using his power to rewrite science with conspiracy theories.
**4.** GOP members of Congress stood in lockstep with Trump on his disastrous tariffs that are harming farmers, raising prices, and causing an unnecessary burden on our families.

But the American people are fighting back, Peter. They are standing up and making it clear that enough is enough.

name: Tony Thurmond
subject: WE NEED TO ABOLISH ICE!

body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/thurmondforgovernor [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/thurmondforgovernor]
Dear Friends,
Our communities are under direct attack by Donald Trump and his personal military force, ICE!
Arresting a five-year-old.
Murdering American citizens.
Homicides in ICE detention centers.
Family separation.
We need to abolish ICE!
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=pzAPneLxBwQ [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=pzAPneLxBwQ]
Please listen to what I have to say about ICE in my new video! [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=pzAPneLxBwQ]
This is not who we are – and right now we need strong leadership that will stand up to this abuse of power and protect our immigrant communities, our schools, and our hospitals from this chaos. That’s why, as Governor, I’ll direct the California Highway Patrol to arrest ICE officers who break our laws.
In Solidarity,
Tony Thurmond

They carried it through war. You can carry it forward.| | | [](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=1a62d76d2fa74af199c416575bd98ce9&_e=gH4u9syJ26OVyOlkbVWhBPmIOnUf1S27VzcayvgdjVNjRnMZNp7eSD1wNLwcgXxhFEuWPeYKfbBE4Vt7LJ9BOHsh6l3qq5ILCIHgMqZeqilz7y_3JnZGbYUaiA0oaiK-FYggprsieigqOlhPGMvZSLgsrtOfuAseQA7kRANUG1Q6Fd2pgqy1LATwj6KjKVsBff61NKFHIaeCXCIVKSrZjM72ZMDysuqk7qvjb1rm9ot_FcFfi4eFul8oDJG4DnAq-q9dBqsoV1_ZUAw99uZf7BpeE1MZEdOTI6TcbjsciWUciVW_7Zq6uz7cU1F3JGdhBGyoS9W33ttBDyzC5rqdplvBrmRYcBKh-bG6hxJxiWCFWPOdx-XxXrXC6QHAQsmmVxtBo-ASXhPdGGJ1xfrRGBfSvJ0oKqeWJ3_nsrf1DbPje2B6TyilxSK4nwd-nNiPzJWOk1TXdoF4p7Fw137uVvcQDvLrbc_sJkYzYcRb8UxwyoAFg3yUzdHSywNiJ_rcq9rI3FvbDJk9JGXFPKcgE8TttpRz0qIlB4qkx4bs6T1Nykez2RcaYsQ4VhWC2U2qBptdFpXKwJAZShm3U2C5wcCTZEdfsDgFbHCP-_b1FkFDpv78yDdJGZ7kynAmvB8iwqzyKPIYBO8JSrNN57hXJKk--NlFF0jDorKy8ZkpB8UsLolIfor1a3jI3AjQsZR6hbSBsRhLVQNE_pltviCXWKu2Z7QTr0DcATt2wxtVatt7LcKqTGRwoOilBaZRTXuPunWLZvyq65pF1evcq_w7Rg%3D%3D)

Fellow Patriot, For more than two decades, American Veterans Center has been dedicated to honoring the sacrifice and preserving the legacy of our nation's heroes. Each year, we host the **National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C.** , bringing Americans together in a powerful display of remembrance and patriotism. We also proudly produce **" American Valor: A Salute to Our Heroes,"** a nationally televised tribute to the men and women who have served across generations.

But our work goes far beyond public events. At the heart of our mission is a commitment to **preserve the stories of veterans from every era of service** -- from the final voices of World War II, to those who served in Korea, Vietnam, and the post-9/11 generation. Through these efforts, we ensure that future generations understand the cost of freedom and the courage it has taken to defend it.

This year, American Veterans Center is marking historic military milestones: the 250th anniversaries of the U.S. Army, Navy, and Marine Corps...the 80th anniversary of the victories that won World War II...and key events in the Korean War 75 years ago, and the Vietnam War which ended 50 years ago this year.
---
[](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=1a62d76d2fa74af199c416575bd98ce9&_e=gH4u9syJ26OVyOlkbVWhBPmIOnUf1S27VzcayvgdjVNjRnMZNp7eSD1wNLwcgXxhFEuWPeYKfbBE4Vt7LJ9BOHsh6l3qq5ILCIHgMqZeqilz7y_3JnZGbYUaiA0oaiK-FYggprsieigqOlhPGMvZSLgsrtOfuAseQA7kRANUG1Q6Fd2pgqy1LATwj6KjKVsBff61NKFHIaeCXCIVKSrZjM72ZMDysuqk7qvjb1rm9ot_FcFfi4eFul8oDJG4DnAq-q9dBqsoV1_ZUAw99uZf7JdqF4NZTBAn1JTso9aDWMvMlWpNdJb6DkAgumw2ofVIPmkJ24HaKaNWAssJfJNT1IWzZuZphFjGHS1rDN4QIzmcSvfWTrfyTWcF1fLx7josukD4wSxlMD0ONb7tqiT61BNSQG9n_kda8JRfGISwejux8qnOY7Ig4coV8pM1hqXaGdV7scbBJiVfHV1ZqtxreyjD8qquDspFn72RtrHfMfySmcd3j018pFFFrGIN_ToxyFg6SwFhASmERSA3HksgG3geXjgYOgWGhdLc0fly-C66J_INq7Xv4m3dRi8YyMnr0l-p-WkS2TogAND36SJfZCd5AGeSsuL-_nkOQU_0t1xU2uUwmWCeikC70sUvbM9_8QQWukPv6Hxp7h-oUPpXJYvz35JBYTN0eQKTufVaWgOqLh4DhPKRaLexbcdkqXMV0mNzi7XqGQTxsIwe8LVr5WTSGF8s1zATT_Fzx_xqtkFPmtSP-3VvcNjfXGFpBsLXFz9wtJWlAD-wvepzdWDnPg%3D%3D)

**We may never have another opportunity like this to recognize their sacrifice on a national scale.**

[**To mark the occasion, I want to send you a full-size (3x5ft) American flag when you make a gift of $25, $50, $100 or more to support the American Veterans Center’s historic campaign: American Honor 2025.**](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=1a62d76d2fa74af199c416575bd98ce9&_e=gH4u9syJ26OVyOlkbVWhBPmIOnUf1S27VzcayvgdjVNjRnMZNp7eSD1wNLwcgXxhFEuWPeYKfbBE4Vt7LJ9BOHsh6l3qq5ILCIHgMqZeqilz7y_3JnZGbYUaiA0oaiK-FYggprsieigqOlhPGMvZSLgsrtOfuAseQA7kRANUG1Q6Fd2pgqy1LATwj6KjKVsBff61NKFHIaeCXCIVKSrZjM72ZMDysuqk7qvjb1rm9ot_FcFfi4eFul8oDJG4DnAq-q9dBqsoV1_ZUAw99uZf7HGa_OolR0cu3SNaU3V7-TxQuzxeJjngZ3nRG7oGeFXhT6i8ys2TsrNdxGe8vgV0jsL5SdlNpEEjleBNZYBGhtAvb-74kpDE1pN9Vr9NO-PhK9Xnu7CdiBiOHv63N8WaWqRm2kwYEhgK36LOziGdIkl4IpEBZMG-z02ddTsrS-6FtzZ4hiYhslpAB6L_BJ_VL5awNLal7X1kRxAe68m8tZOwbEmZJT5qCnoWEBeBQHihqz--Gl-JEq456vjlUfZPMj4A4p-Ip_yZa2pwCDDPVH-kot8jccwy8nz20Dglgq0Z24NN--_n9Xs7-yYhGHNq8O25flKtnid_FHFwwUI7O-dTChVzsaQY0B4KE2oBR3EXy-PO-7VfEFQYLv_kQPjSG9rilBkVMaVmryzcmIfh2rbR_uuUGPvS_3TM2BVOmQzP2k2txsug4E9KS_ulkRhqSvbetQ28rDIJYGyWV9JXuEIG4zX4QklKRgLY-bRrgPQvFR6t28bRo51hvDPpCZox-w%3D%3D)

This is one of our most ambitious efforts ever, Fellow Patriot -- a national salute to those who fought to make and keep America free.

**Together, we 're capturing the stories of WWII veterans before it's too late...and preserving seldom-heard accounts from those who fought in Korea, Vietnam, and the post-9/11 wars.**

And with your gift today, I'll send you a free, full-size American flag as my thank you.

To some, it may look like just a flag.

_But to those who served, it 's a promise kept._

It flew over the beaches of Normandy.

It sailed with the Pacific fleet.

It was stitched into the sleeves of every soldier who never made it home.

**This flag reminds us of all they sacrificed, and what we 're now called to defend.**

Let it fly proudly as a reminder that freedom isn't free -- and that this generation will not forget the sacrifices of the last.

[**So please, Fellow Patriot make your gift today. Help us preserve their legacy while there's still time — and proudly fly the flag they fought for.**](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=1a62d76d2fa74af199c416575bd98ce9&_e=gH4u9syJ26OVyOlkbVWhBPmIOnUf1S27VzcayvgdjVNjRnMZNp7eSD1wNLwcgXxhFEuWPeYKfbBE4Vt7LJ9BOHsh6l3qq5ILCIHgMqZeqilz7y_3JnZGbYUaiA0oaiK-FYggprsieigqOlhPGMvZSLgsrtOfuAseQA7kRANUG1Q6Fd2pgqy1LATwj6KjKVsBff61NKFHIaeCXCIVKSrZjM72ZMDysuqk7qvjb1rm9ot_FcFfi4eFul8oDJG4DnAq-q9dBqsoV1_ZUAw99uZf7EvQiOGTzX2jiZaDGC-5F0LYumWIONN5ZBC9FkdJjjefn8xW2XXKNyYknlnIrJ2q9z6ULSsuYb7tnIjNKwfMFgHL1P0YaovJaAZCql55GkKN9kOpmik19hFu2fi8w1b2PiejStvtATQndA0hRdoP0t2e62M10fKRcqp9pnyPEvtOkd_qENpcUGNPFmwjGmi7ArM9_HYLRYroP6dM7xOwk4JG6V9T7Vy86psWm7MP1l-rXSg5Yh_FB9ZRH6P0gnXZveBB_HB6xKA9bcQ6mVQi-ocuOFjeTJQjQHXAjkbCdQXcRl2BfveoWIcQkj7rar6d-R3nL7N8ak2udZpohGw9k1VepC40Niwa-6bxDjh60zYHqol07kPwgadleJp1g3zvYTHeO0_xdD8tB1cYLXQYfcB-oHCg7cD1tRP1g8CGbxL-sjJ5B-zus_kUVjqygihI7233ugZDwiW-TuBB4FIbzU_sRdYoGl8S57XnlWGmmEtO_hVGRrhOOM5He5nr4i5pTg%3D%3D)

**I hope you 'll take this opportunity to receive your American flag and fly it proudly, today and every day as a symbol AND promise of freedom.**

subject: The Voters Want Limited Government
body:
| | | [](http://give.statefreedomcaucus.org/ls/click?upn=u001.SSCAglCEkhp55PDWKhWTjk18vO7wfT-2FWuWGj5qYFNqYx7X5ohQ4dCOx5p85so2pLbxum_9XnTPLnaEjN9OHWhKYUffDeECIVzR9M-2B5LaO5RH8NVBZyx1SQGGYhOdwcjZYtHerzdurJKToUtbXzTeWIP1fMaKVBl-2BLwS9pgRNOLhP-2FofAfCQznoHZSccSSvSKER1lGvafAp1FeRaHASTuKg8l7C2Gaiqm-2BWzt4s-2F-2FgxWqDD-2FmheDtblAzLxB0fHN8qoXBxcnIW10EyBlaTHQ9jZG9ps7utMaDc7QiGU-2BfHv8EyCPMBY-2FTk-2BNYsAP2UmGLAFaR7qG00pZ6iIV2Jyi56GLSfEj98k2a86JmniFozRcQ224w-3D)

|
---
Dear Friend, Several legislative sessions are now fully underway, and across the country the contrast couldn’t be clearer.While most politicians settle into familiar routines of delay, deflection, and deal-cutting, State Freedom Caucuses are doing what voters sent them to do: force the hard fights early, expose bad ideas in the open, and begin rolling back bloated government that has grown far beyond its constitutional limits. Here’s what that looks like this week.
---
|
---
**WYOMING** Voters didn’t hand control of the State House to the **Wyoming Freedom Caucus** so government could be “streamlined” or “run more efficiently.” They did it because state government had grown bloated with waste, fraud, abuse, and spending that often can’t be squared with the Constitution.The Wyoming Freedom Caucus is responding accordingly. With Freedom Caucus members leading the Appropriations Committee, lawmakers have begun advancing serious budget reductions, including votes to defund Wyoming Public Media, reduce the University of Wyoming’s block grant, and eliminate corporate welfare. These actions represent a deliberate shift away from protecting entrenched interests and toward restoring fiscal discipline. The backlash was immediate. Big Government Republicans and Democrats are openly furious that the usual spending assumptions are being challenged. Political cartoons (like the one below) and media attacks have followed, aimed squarely at the WY Freedom Caucus for daring to cut instead of "manage".That reaction is the tell. **BOTTOM LINE:** Wyoming proves what happens when voters elect lawmakers to reduce the size of government, not cover up a broken system.
---
---
|
---
**IDAHO** In most statehouses, governors give their State of the State speeches, leadership applauds politely, and bad ideas quietly become the starting point for negotiations.State Freedom Caucuses refuse to play along.Across the country, Freedom Caucus members are laying out their legislative priorities at the very beginning of session and responding immediately to governors’ agendas. The goal is simple: warn the public early, force transparency, and deny the Swamp the luxury of hiding bad policy behind closed doors. In Idaho, our members known as the **“Gang of 8”** released a public budget pledge so voters know exactly where they stand before the fight begins. No backroom deals. No surprises at the end of session. Just clear commitments made in daylight.This approach flips the script. Instead of reacting to leadership’s agenda, our members force leadership to defend it. **BOTTOM LINE:** Our members don’t wait their turn. They expose bad ideas early and make the establishment answer for them.
---

**QUICK HITS** 👉 **Wyoming:** In a twist that could only happen in government, Governor Mark Gordon sued his own state to block a tax cut passed by the Freedom Caucus–led legislature. Pressure works.👉 **Maryland:** The **Maryland Freedom Caucus** is [posting daily reminders](http://give.statefreedomcaucus.org/ls/click?upn=u001.SSCAglCEkhp55PDWKhWTjiwkZmtXDP4u12gaI7rwUjbavRoJkhidagNKkMpCHTetFe-2FjVZR-2BooEsqLlsr-2FrW6JVUJlLvvgTb8NQwbtliQd4-3Dte2A_9XnTPLnaEjN9OHWhKYUffDeECIVzR9M-2B5LaO5RH8NVBZyx1SQGGYhOdwcjZYtHerzdurJKToUtbXzTeWIP1fMaKVBl-2BLwS9pgRNOLhP-2FofAfCQznoHZSccSSvSKER1lGvafAp1FeRaHASTuKg8l7C2Gaiqm-2BWzt4s-2F-2FgxWqDD-2FncwevFVqe-2BFc3AJRljpgR5w70sggpNpFD-2Bc2aG7Xlr-2Be6Pp-2BPP4vpjlDMVcZpz7uFx0rvd3e62kChHW0dv63urF3it4CSruUrc7tSGL8y0xqvDZqWSNb6ZcNQlh0Uw5Zg-3D) that an illegal alien arrested months ago is still on the voter rolls. clean_body: | | | | Dear Friend, Several legislative sessions are now fully underway, and across the country the contrast couldn’t be clearer.While most politicians settle into familiar routines of delay, deflection, and deal-cutting, State Freedom Caucuses are doing what voters sent them to do: force the hard fights early, expose bad ideas in the open, and begin rolling back bloated government that has grown far beyond its constitutional limits. Here’s what that looks like this week. | WYOMING Voters didn’t hand control of the State House to the Wyoming Freedom Caucus so government could be “streamlined” or “run more efficiently.” They did it because state government had grown bloated with waste, fraud, abuse, and spending that often can’t be squared with the Constitution.The Wyoming Freedom Caucus is responding accordingly. With Freedom Caucus members leading the Appropriations Committee, lawmakers have begun advancing serious budget reductions, including votes to defund Wyoming Public Media, reduce the University of Wyoming’s block grant, and eliminate corporate welfare. These actions represent a deliberate shift away from protecting entrenched interests and toward restoring fiscal discipline. The backlash was immediate. Big Government Republicans and Democrats are openly furious that the usual spending assumptions are being challenged. Political cartoons (like the one below) and media attacks have followed, aimed squarely at the WY Freedom Caucus for daring to cut instead of "manage".That reaction is the tell. BOTTOM LINE: Wyoming proves what happens when voters elect lawmakers to reduce the size of government, not cover up a broken system. | IDAHO In most statehouses, governors give their State of the State speeches, leadership applauds politely, and bad ideas quietly become the starting point for negotiations.State Freedom Caucuses refuse to play along.Across the country, Freedom Caucus members are laying out their legislative priorities at the very beginning of session and responding immediately to governors’ agendas. The goal is simple: warn the public early, force transparency, and deny the Swamp the luxury of hiding bad policy behind closed doors. In Idaho, our members known as the “Gang of 8” released a public budget pledge so voters know exactly where they stand before the fight begins. No backroom deals. No surprises at the end of session. Just clear commitments made in daylight.This approach flips the script. Instead of reacting to leadership’s agenda, our members force leadership to defend it. BOTTOM LINE: Our members don’t wait their turn. They expose bad ideas early and make the establishment answer for them. | | QUICK HITS 👉 Wyoming: In a twist that could only happen in government, Governor Mark Gordon sued his own state to block a tax cut passed by the Freedom Caucus–led legislature. After the Wyoming Freedom Caucus the absurdity, the administration quietly halted the lawsuit. Pressure works.👉 Maryland: The Maryland Freedom Caucus is that an illegal alien arrested months ago is still on the voter rolls. The Big Government Democrats in charge aren't confused with the concept of election integrity - they simply don't care. 👉 Oklahoma: The Oklahoma Freedom Caucus a new legislative pay raise, with OKFC Chairman Shane Jett stating, “This is the epitome of fiscal irresponsibility. We need to root out waste and fraud and see real cuts to wasteful spending, not give pay raises that mock the very taxpayers we are elected to serve”. 👉 Illinois: Illinois Freedom Caucus member Adam Niemerg a fiery floor speech exposing how illegal alien crime is being subsidized by taxpayers, with more than $3 billion in state funds flowing to support illegal immigration. 👉 Oklahoma: 76 Republicans in Congress sided with the Democrats to defeat a House Freedom Caucus amendment that would have stripped out earmarks for DEI activism, gender procedures on children, and other woke projects. The Oklahoma Freedom Caucus 👉 Illinois: Illinois Freedom Caucus member Adam Niemerg delivered a fiery floor speech exposing how illegal alien crime is being subsidized by taxpayers, with more than $3 billion in state funds flowing to support illegal immigration. 3 RINOs in their congressional delegation for voting NO. Every county in Oklahoma voted for President Trump in 2024 and this is how these RINOs repay their constituents? Shameful. | HELP US HOLD THE LINE This is the most demanding moment of the year. Legislative sessions are when bad ideas move fast and accountability is hardest to enforce. Our State Freedom Caucuses are meeting that moment head-on, but this work takes resources. From policy support and communications to expanding the Freedom Caucus model into new states, every dollar strengthens our ability to force these fights into the open.If you believe government has grown too large, too unaccountable, and too disconnected from the Constitution, we need your support now. We'll be back with another update soon. Until then, please be sure to our efforts so that we can support our State Freedom Caucuses!In Liberty, Andy RothPresident State Freedom Caucus Network | |

name: Ilhan Omar
subject: Another murder in Minneapolis.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=2043%2E791427%2E9C1Qgh)
There’s been another murder by immigration enforcement in my district today.
To say that I am absolutely horrified, disgusted, and angry doesn’t even come close. Another life that federal agents have taken. Another example of DHS targeting and executing our residents instead of protecting them.
This isn’t isolated. This isn’t accidental.
The Trump administration is trying to beat Minnesota into submission rather than protect us. They are tearing up constitutional rights under the guise of immigration enforcement. They are violently tearing down our democracy in real-time.
Minnesota was once a place of refuge, and Trump has turned it into a war zone where unchecked, unaccountable federal forces murder our neighbors.
ICE and CBP must leave Minnesota immediately. Kristi Noem must be impeached. DHS must not receive another penny of funding. Enough.
— Ilhan Omar

* * *

**Before you go:**
Trump’s immigration regime is out-of-control, unaccountable, and a clear danger to our communities. We are calling on Congress to stand tall in defense of our Constitution and block any and all funding for DHS and ICE. Please, **[add your name to our petition**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em-jan26-ice-3/?source=em260124-1-240&akid=2043%2E791427%2E9C1Qgh) and help us show a massive wave of resistance to the violence and civil rights abuses we are seeing in Minnesota and across the country:**
**[SIGN ON NOW](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em-jan26-ice-3/?source=em260124-1-240&akid=2043%2E791427%2E9C1Qgh)**

PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can **[unsubscribe here](https://act.ilhanomar.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?source=em-footer&t=2&akid=2043%2E791427%2E9C1Qgh)**. You can also **[sign up to receive fewer emails](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/fewer-emails/?source=em-footer&t=3&akid=2043%2E791427%2E9C1Qgh)**.
Submit this form to [**update your contact information**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/update-contact-info/source=em-footer?t=4&akid=2043%2E791427%2E9C1Qgh)
Ilhan is counting on our people-powered grassroots movement to fund this campaign. If you can, stand with us by **[making a contribution today](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/io-em-footer/?refcode=em-footer&t=5&refcode2=2043_791427_9C1Qgh&akid=2043%2E791427%2E9C1Qgh)**.
Ilhan for Congress
PO Box 33079
Washington D.C., 20033

body:
This is what gave Charlie strength| | | [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=f69120313875407db227878d598ddfdb&_e=qCLqIIc8U0eUL2vEoOhyaCvampWTIbaSe50DvTsHE7biqOBrcNfX-CQdARcbDWB_ZTaDbYGyRnjHriwKhRS7LrsZCTVpIX1zOgPsm-WrnqOIxr3s6TU_EtXk-ZVEa9XUWbAJj67nCb5TwmG2uIYp0xmQuB7viEavyXGrVgQPUxQfYDpTfEaHKcfXjuiF2rxhCx4Kcz-HsDIeVNu0PXx-ITxHnxW_TIoVRMSFRtHd7ye9OnB3BEgEsKNVKUbZ2d1NJTlJcfRS-toRfm2cqae88syrqu6b-AU3i_Ty2pZcRA5ZXKSORDkq9MLj4bqneN4X1BzApBeonay8BBHQ_04xsBg0K9CY0rDbPEanWD6FLBRdmYsmKCegIyadEC-gtp5EEW20qTPXNxfTwLS4SPbVK_wg9T06kTQJJpy_ZMtVqd4IuiXAgmb_LoKwD5ZutKxxa5lLwEzhSPV5cQFBIvhuBGHxHYqRswabT9VIaPiXN8qFu5O8yK1BdNBG8_6hO1NxBsserT8GRG3UpJeXKi95wXeOjjGKYjQsVtaqIJKRlI2PFARslUGfEXi5HFQ4mHqCERUaSCm-zRGVDRLPW7XD-UrHUZsMyfzYfY_bznXII0FDyKz52zCHcQigJc5GdoijW12DSBuo0_hyM8NkOnbbceEYCoIBQKqjZRh8fRy3a9qtbnhk311ySuKppIglNL2T)
---
| | Patriot,
---
| | Charlie would have wanted you to have this.

Before his September 10th assassination, Charlie had just put the finishing touches on a very important book. His final book.

The topic is one that Charlie found to be crucial for every human to understand and practice.

This isn't a book about public policy or political discourse, nor is it simply about passing on values of patriotism to young Americans.

**Instead, this book is about something far deeper and more personal -- the importance of honoring the Sabbath and resting in God's grace. **

Despite his hectic schedule and full life, Charlie was committed to setting aside an entire day each week to rest, to pray, and to give undivided attention to God, Erika, and his children.

By honoring the Sabbath, Charlie lived out a powerful message: _**" God, You are enough. And because You are enough, I need not carry the weight of a world that was never mine to hold." **_

His book, _**Stop, in the Name of God**_ is the fruit of that conviction.
---
[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=f69120313875407db227878d598ddfdb&_e=qCLqIIc8U0eUL2vEoOhyaCvampWTIbaSe50DvTsHE7biqOBrcNfX-CQdARcbDWB_ZTaDbYGyRnjHriwKhRS7LrsZCTVpIX1zOgPsm-WrnqOIxr3s6TU_EtXk-ZVEa9XUWbAJj67nCb5TwmG2uIYp0xmQuB7viEavyXGrVgQPUxQfYDpTfEaHKcfXjuiF2rxhCx4Kcz-HsDIeVNu0PXx-ITxHnxW_TIoVRMSFRtHd7ydUtTTTrLxOSo2P94GSS9UfeARoImW2LEmp_bc8WQMJ4AhFPQNSCQXqrWfxW4VTQgwYTqUTQakoNZEphdC3j6WaEg-WTls-Rd3J8XuVfz_qlEXOf06DJlHUjRktpEWnA5DBYotRFF5j695UTuj79YJaxZoi9uXonQYqhUb0AI8UvRGMkux_iKE2lvgzrVfr-4mvrhdrALKEbZaY9XWLLDzjDlt6BYpc1ifCS6TP7cOUmMmZiIiOrUZ-upAchukPyeMZw2aS02JgNZXelL5_M2m7gsQo5IwZUiocidaYdkCgkdhEbQ1WFx-m-ES3_QlVXqF3OfI6VwammZ5F1kesXssJL9cext-anVxW-C3P6vvQx7SFJ4W9uyAM5ykf9gEIXDJetF4zMa6qJJOK4P5FQ3cIAy27DYj3tKkfdh-rsuQWoBi2it813ScT_MBHU-QhMPHrRVCyiy-bM5j8gm-C9PD9)
---
When you read it, you will hear Charlie's voice inviting you to reclaim something our fast-paced culture has essentially erased: a time for rest, a time devoted to God, and time with family.

Charlie's hope was for each of us to rediscover the Sabbath as he did: not as a burden to bear, but as a gift to receive...

A sacred routine meant to draw us nearer to God, to steady our hearts with His peace, and renew our strength for the battles to which He calls us.

I believe you will find this book inspiring.

Charlie wanted everyone to have this book because its message meant so much in his own life.

**[To claim your copy of this life-changing book, simply make a generous gift in any amount to Turning Point USA today.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=f69120313875407db227878d598ddfdb&_e=qCLqIIc8U0eUL2vEoOhyaCvampWTIbaSe50DvTsHE7biqOBrcNfX-CQdARcbDWB_ZTaDbYGyRnjHriwKhRS7LrsZCTVpIX1zOgPsm-WrnqOIxr3s6TU_EtXk-ZVEa9XUWbAJj67nCb5TwmG2uIYp0xmQuB7viEavyXGrVgQPUxQfYDpTfEaHKcfXjuiF2rxhCx4Kcz-HsDIeVNu0PXx-ITxHnxW_TIoVRMSFRtHd7ye4kUzFxh7QUODl8cxTUPg1FzzihqmYdaUAmESBDdkj-itMGmtPi5BhPOKLcAPOtM-CbKzU89ECPazg_YLLLmT4Ga3ytK1wHi7yYH2PtuJZ0qlDDBvakod20XGKBydLPlztJYG4ABQSS35mY_SEec04lFC7TmRZ1vH13oUXZZjmG_urgDGO6-GfKUVVxIOjH_2m-JYyoiwSN1oObPXiHKvQMMsvJ23N6Qzdn_1quRmpFUOqQhTCLzU96rIwwOhBnLtRGQt9mrO4nngb7VjmWucKJIlfKgyCc-VeDNyytibNbvmr_qiYd6hqvwj5uahtYIZl1TWhyuh16BQVv_iktqMovYoK_92muP93OVZyWqNuQrsR4wnFNVQaPR2Un-sTwdUFRxzTtwk2xXfSSJzTOEa6YfevIlfWfVT1YkRQ2F0z4VwpPvDYSsiPIPJ3oBYVw6vFiYe2ZYrYfpPxM6z3DFAb)**
---
[ **Support Turning Point USA**
**& Receive Charlie’s Final Book**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=f69120313875407db227878d598ddfdb&_e=qCLqIIc8U0eUL2vEoOhyaCvampWTIbaSe50DvTsHE7biqOBrcNfX-CQdARcbDWB_ZTaDbYGyRnjHriwKhRS7LrsZCTVpIX1zOgPsm-WrnqOIxr3s6TU_EtXk-ZVEa9XUWbAJj67nCb5TwmG2uIYp0xmQuB7viEavyXGrVgQPUxQfYDpTfEaHKcfXjuiF2rxhCx4Kcz-HsDIeVNu0PXx-ITxHnxW_TIoVRMSFRtHd7yckXVPK2pNipxI1EkLtoiYu4UZQRCI2L8W-k_bWn_BHc3qUj5ekRvC5rn1cw9m6dr330Mw7KGZEYMIwnY-KklXU2jNasjn6CyBXqQzpUMe7PByXGP_ErBhzgwsqARn-SexcurJGU74ZQohhlapnnnAXhaEtccA_8cvnnwrNHo7U2cbkj7OLHKt1k_11Vh9xFoTc-Qu-7m9-ze2rl74MOBuXDO3QWdQmAj6D0hUHXVSmWN93VwioanynmOKRl1ApRA5Vskj14E00YCp-3tGCSCOFpFPULtajylz3L5WR1tXBbX3Kqf9vSoGZGYOMJfm9M5PX0pEa5RtFlzp7mP7x-vbhxtSAnWvP5zrkS0sGrXxu3nbmNoXSJxWW_Z57HUvaNq9oWlXf82ILMXr11jPufPM8fPgaUiY2WT_R4hB9TLNVQBIf7R2SxmuOIKjgRuQ5DAv5L_Ec7kZNvcxt5KD7bYoo)
---
In the months since Charlie's assassination, there has been a massive surge of interest in Turning Point USA's message among young Americans...

...and it's not just the conservative message as a whole -- _**it 's the message of FAITH! **_

In recent months, I have heard countless stories of people who have answered Charlie's call to attend a Bible study, start a family, and pray to God.

Charlie devoted so much of his time urging people to build strong families, to go to church, and to stand up for America. _And it 's happening. _

After years of witnessing declining church attendance, we are now seeing Americans filling the pews in huge numbers across the country.

What we're witnessing is not just growth --**it 's revival. **

At Turning Point USA, we are dedicated and honored to continue strengthening the faith of Americans, young and old.

We are building a coalition of truth-preaching churches that stand firm against cultural compromise, defend biblical values, and strengthen families.

We are training pastors, uniting congregations, and, of course, reaching the next generation on campuses across the country with this same message.

You might feel disheartened by the evil in our culture and by the unthinkable assassination of Charlie.

**But America 's faithful are waking up. The youth are waking up. America is waking up. **

All across this nation, pastors are linking arms, young believers are finding their voice, and families are saying, _" We're not backing down." _

This is what Charlie prayed for.

I see this book as one of Charlie's most enduring gifts to the world, and I know you will too.

None of us knew how brief his time on earth would be. But the truths written in this book are timeless. They will outlive us all, and most importantly, **_so will the legacy of Charlie 's faith. _**

Charlie lived life at a relentless pace, but he also understood the sacred value of stillness. Through it all, his gaze was fixed on eternity with God.

**[To claim your copy of Charlie’s final book, simply make a gift, in any amount, to support Turning Point USA today.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=f69120313875407db227878d598ddfdb&_e=qCLqIIc8U0eUL2vEoOhyaCvampWTIbaSe50DvTsHE7biqOBrcNfX-CQdARcbDWB_ZTaDbYGyRnjHriwKhRS7LrsZCTVpIX1zOgPsm-WrnqOIxr3s6TU_EtXk-ZVEa9XUWbAJj67nCb5TwmG2uIYp0xmQuB7viEavyXGrVgQPUxQfYDpTfEaHKcfXjuiF2rxhCx4Kcz-HsDIeVNu0PXx-ITxHnxW_TIoVRMSFRtHd7yfQvmtWIo_5U9DyTHaqCGSIoS5yqtnguKZ2zIGXhBA1XQ48NDuM4sIkSc_6cDQE_mhjW7fycGeIVvsM3McdrzJK7f6_IQfMAyC3nEbJR-w9JQ4Xnt8aMzDrTT4jQANCty97MnL3vu-pBrkVpDrTOfKafOfu8w-92mlCU5h9fyu3AfPw7u7qefCZmQnvx9Ej0ZxQnBB-gSHXXa1IK7xXbrK3waUVx7qOvKqze_KxYV2A_RxmfmDQmMbjvnC2Zn2VcSozPj77eXdqz0o66-DLryBArp3bQLQqlGaIf9JBZy1KSETLuJ2VIZ1DneKxOHoEf3PQ-OR1Ltw-m9_41OzZe6k_YnPklB95nMfm9tJolnk5J9Ul5NhwhscrGDrTT4-7Jj3hX8eEEmtdY70EQgTHYKxUDoOzQfTnZ50CWHUeGOjHnvWk0zLllfXPrTpfsmh0O3QydYvc7mP5somXj2s6T0gx)**
---
[ **Support Turning Point USA**
**& Receive Charlie’s Final Book**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=f69120313875407db227878d598ddfdb&_e=qCLqIIc8U0eUL2vEoOhyaCvampWTIbaSe50DvTsHE7biqOBrcNfX-CQdARcbDWB_ZTaDbYGyRnjHriwKhRS7LrsZCTVpIX1zOgPsm-WrnqOIxr3s6TU_EtXk-ZVEa9XUWbAJj67nCb5TwmG2uIYp0xmQuB7viEavyXGrVgQPUxQfYDpTfEaHKcfXjuiF2rxhCx4Kcz-HsDIeVNu0PXx-ITxHnxW_TIoVRMSFRtHd7yduILJr3KLJWyS4JmQocFSWEtRNDx7a3eGtsxXO5iynjTN15MwOVKoL1sN9b42OuNhOO-je_wHU4wYXj1za-9GdEy-43V81sR1Dn8ML6EmR3yZ94hMMK1GCSVsX3Z1jun2p6ob1yU4lvM4lYtA9Z8JQPDlKZ4jf-HSVOQQvB_GpNijV3QVpdE3a0aQ6uLCXz-SHNXLS-rJM9LKV5GuiId-SymDysc_8C-zM9Gbfj7iuiR44JPJTq8KSBVrf3tQoHiDG6yTnKzPwqB7xQLeiGXaXoxoP9GRhqPZwlG7AHmG_ND4rS92Zvb1qSWnCX-_1BPhOLDwCQ32mvQNGL0JR9m7gdplJanL1k6Q2Fse8DZTS9MUmK76cHMe_rwYaf25Ib37HbIyAXzZIBb4xJgSFEviaRpWn8_tm7DFhTu-HCoxxybF6L5PS8XIkOwC2jIcKzXTMbnTOFVG0-i-yeDtl0ZYX)

I'll personally ensure your copy is sent to you as soon as possible.

Thank you in advance for carrying on Charlie's mission and supporting his legacy.

**For Charlie, **

**Justin Streiff **

clean_body: This is what gave Charlie strength| | | | | Patriot, | | Charlie would have wanted you to have this. Before his September 10th assassination, Charlie had just put the finishing touches on a very important book. His final book. The topic is one that Charlie found to be crucial for every human to understand and practice. This isn't a book about public policy or political discourse, nor is it simply about passing on values of patriotism to young Americans. Instead, this book is about something far deeper and more personal -- the importance of honoring the Sabbath and resting in God's grace. Despite his hectic schedule and full life, Charlie was committed to setting aside an entire day each week to rest, to pray, and to give undivided attention to God, Erika, and his children. By honoring the Sabbath, Charlie lived out a powerful message: " God, You are enough. And because You are enough, I need not carry the weight of a world that was never mine to hold." His book, Stop, in the Name of God is the fruit of that conviction. When you read it, you will hear Charlie's voice inviting you to reclaim something our fast-paced culture has essentially erased: a time for rest, a time devoted to God, and time with family. Charlie's hope was for each of us to rediscover the Sabbath as he did: not as a burden to bear, but as a gift to receive... A sacred routine meant to draw us nearer to God, to steady our hearts with His peace, and renew our strength for the battles to which He calls us. I believe you will find this book inspiring. Charlie wanted everyone to have this book because its message meant so much in his own life. In the months since Charlie's assassination, there has been a massive surge of interest in Turning Point USA's message among young Americans... ...and it's not just the conservative message as a whole -- it 's the message of FAITH! In recent months, I have heard countless stories of people who have answered Charlie's call to attend a Bible study, start a family, and pray to God. Charlie devoted so much of his time urging people to build strong families, to go to church, and to stand up for America. And it 's happening. After years of witnessing declining church attendance, we are now seeing Americans filling the pews in huge numbers across the country. What we're witnessing is not just growth --it 's revival. At Turning Point USA, we are dedicated and honored to continue strengthening the faith of Americans, young and old. We are building a coalition of truth-preaching churches that stand firm against cultural compromise, defend biblical values, and strengthen families. We are training pastors, uniting congregations, and, of course, reaching the next generation on campuses across the country with this same message. You might feel disheartened by the evil in our culture and by the unthinkable assassination of Charlie. But America 's faithful are waking up. The youth are waking up. America is waking up. All across this nation, pastors are linking arms, young believers are finding their voice, and families are saying, " We're not backing down." This is what Charlie prayed for. I see this book as one of Charlie's most enduring gifts to the world, and I know you will too. None of us knew how brief his time on earth would be. But the truths written in this book are timeless. They will outlive us all, and most importantly, so will the legacy of Charlie 's faith. Charlie lived life at a relentless pace, but he also understood the sacred value of stillness. Through it all, his gaze was fixed on eternity with God. I'll personally ensure your copy is sent to you as soon as possible. Thank you in advance for carrying on Charlie's mission and supporting his legacy. For Charlie, Justin Streiff Chief Operating Officer Turning Point USA P.S. When you read Stop, in the Name of God, you will discover what Charlie found in the Sabbath: a holy rest that steadies the heart, renews the soul, and gives strength for the road ahead. 4940 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044

name: Joe Jaworski
subject: I’ll never sell you out
disclaimer_text: paid for by Joe Jaworski Campaign
body:
Thursday night in Dallas, during our debate, I criticized my opponent for voting to ban Pride flags in Texas public schools. His response was telling. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/jaworskifortexas.com/last-night-14192337?e=5d8d80652b)
---
| | [ ](https://jaworskifortexas.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e1f50319ad85f5f9e5c11ac9&id=3e6f256bdf&e=5d8d80652b)
---
| | , Thursday night in Dallas, during our debate, I criticized my opponent for voting to ban Pride flags in Texas public schools. His response was telling. He said the ban was worth it because it also prohibited swastikas and Confederate flags. **That statement sums up his political philosophy.** It falsely equates a Pride flag, a symbol of unity, love, and acceptance, with symbols of hatred, violence, and death. It treats vulnerable communities as bargaining chips and then explains it away as some kind of clever compromise. **I don’t see nuance in that answer.** I see someone willing to cut deals with MAGA extremists and then explain to you why you should be grateful for it. And I think to myself: “thankfully he can only do so much damage in the 31 member Senate, because I sure don’t want him alone in charge of the Attorney General’s office.” I’m Joe Jaworski, former mayor of Galveston. When racists and bullies tried to stop the rebuilding of storm-damaged public housing for working families, I stood my ground. I fought back. And we got it built. **That’s the same courage I will bring to this office.** I will protect the vulnerable. And I will not compromise and pretend that symbols of love and inclusion are the same as symbols of terror. I’m asking for your endorsement and your vote as we work to bring honest, unflinching leadership to the Attorney General’s office. [**If you believe in this fight, I’m asking you to help me continue it by making a contribution today.**](https://jaworskifortexas.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e1f50319ad85f5f9e5c11ac9&id=56573dd662&e=5d8d80652b) Thank you for standing with me. Onward!

**
**

name: Fred Wellman
subject: I’ve lost everything
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHAWN FOR GEORGIA
body:
| | [ ](http://clicksp.shawnharrisforcongress.com/f/a/_dfvsK3ZNE2EYGovijaC9A~~/AAPPABA~/5kOSCnppqaYZrWF-34wC0RAGn9AqXULb8bs-8EoFJJKkHHuF4izCm5-q23LbcYPcKFhr5s4xVSP_1F7tTgDbxZNEn-nGJzJQBeWwboZ7FGK7hkg82h4zyfdxe6ZfbTG9YdFD8cD-ULdzqI7pEA4s7O-woy05XoB0LDwonozTIpaJO4ukmsitxxKGnQ3zBdC3O_2NLNeK_aZheJRRzMsah_qxugUiUHwvUNEESBafk0fKmQ3ChFGytiOYzzNYoqgLeAIort_oWP83csAAnz1y0M4xTnTWJknSs-HsPcoSuys-bvFTFe3nBgl6PwJaVocf)
---
I lost everything in my life too many times to count. I lost my first wife and unborn child in a car crash. I've been through bankruptcy and a divorce. I've been to war four times and came back with the scars both mentally and physically that come with that. Just like so many Americans, I've been knocked down and gotten back up. **And now I 'm running for Congress in one of the most competitive districts in the country--against a Congresswoman who's done nothing other than sell us out. ** My name is Fred Wellman. I'm a 22-year Army veteran, entrepreneur, and dad running for Congress in Missouri's Second Congressional District. Ann Wagner hasn't held a town hall in years, she's tripled her net worth while in Congress, and she's been nothing other than a rubber stamp on Trump's agenda. **But I need your help to take this seat back for the people. Can you chip in $15, $5, or even just $3 to support my campaign?**

I've been to war four times and came back with the scars both mentally and physically that come with that. Just like so many Americans, I've been knocked down and gotten back up. And now I 'm running for Congress in one of the most competitive districts in the country--against a Congresswoman who's done nothing other than sell us out. My name is Fred Wellman. I'm a 22-year Army veteran, entrepreneur, and dad running for Congress in Missouri's Second Congressional District. Ann Wagner hasn't held a town hall in years, she's tripled her net worth while in Congress, and she's been nothing other than a rubber stamp on Trump's agenda. name: Sarah McBride
subject: What happened on the House floor

body:
How does trying to bully me help lower the cost of housing, child care, or health care?
#
[](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/go/1184?c0=mcb-em-20260124-1.4hALQj&refcode=em20260124-2726&t=1&akid=2726%2E21716%2ENSGu10)
Hi, Sarah McBride here.
A Republican member of the House referred to me as “the gentleman from Delaware,” and I just have some questions:
**How does this make things better for working people?** How does trying to bully me help lower the cost of housing, child care, or health care?
The answer? _It doesn’t._ Because they don’t care about those things.
Republicans aren’t interested in improving people’s lives unless those people are billionaires. They target me with anti-trans attacks in an attempt to distract you while they steal out of your pockets.
So all I have to say to these Republicans is _have at it._ I’m not going to slow down my _real_ work to improve the lives of my constituents and folks around the country
**If you’re with me, my campaign could really use your support right now as we push back against these hateful attacks.[Will you rush a donation of $5 today and help me keep fighting back against Republicans’ hatred, no matter what kind of personal insults and schoolyard taunts are thrown my way?](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/go/1184?c0=mcb-em-20260124-1.4hALQj&refcode=em20260124-2726&amount=5&t=2&akid=2726%2E21716%2ENSGu10)**

Thank you for all of your support,
— Sarah

subject: He had a CIA badge in one hand and a martini in the other. Now he wants $10 million.
body:
Two years ago, a CIA official sat across from our undercover journalist at a bar in Virginia. He ordered drinks. He flashed his badge. And then, unprompted.
[View in Web Browser](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e16277796/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3YvakF1Q3V5VzVqaA/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNjAxMjQ/LbmNsamtCUzdFcA/qP2hpZHM9bmN4MUJ0WW9naGJCQU5scw/gaXUp7g/sevb11f7d98)

| | | | | [****](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e16277796/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9saWJlcnR5LWd1YXJkL2xnLWNpYS1iYWRnZS1tYi1vbS8/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNjAxMjQ/LbmNsamtCUzdFcA/qP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9bGctY2lhLWJhZGdlJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09b20mdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPW1iJmFtb3VudD0yNSZ1dG1fdGVybT0yMjM0NV93cjE/gaXUp7g/s8n93f8f0d1)
[****](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e16277796/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9saWJlcnR5LWd1YXJkL2xnLWNpYS1iYWRnZS1tYi1vbS8/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNjAxMjQ/LbmNsamtCUzdFcA/qP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9bGctY2lhLWJhZGdlJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09b20mdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPW1iJmFtb3VudD0yNSZ1dG1fdGVybT0yMjM0NV93cjE/gaXUp7g/s8n93f8f0d1) Dear Patriot,

Two years ago, a CIA official sat across from our undercover journalist at a bar in Virginia. He ordered drinks. He flashed his badge. And then, unprompted, he started talking.

He admitted the CIA withheld intelligence from the sitting President of the United States.

He described how FISA was weaponized to surveil Trump and his team.

He said all of this on camera.

We published it. America watched. And now he's suing me for **$10 million.**

**[**Help me defend the 1[**st**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e16277796/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9saWJlcnR5LWd1YXJkL2xnLWNpYS1iYWRnZS1tYi1vbS8/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNjAxMjQ/LbmNsamtCUzdFcA/qP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9bGctY2lhLWJhZGdlJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09b20mdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPW1iJmFtb3VudD0yNSZ1dG1fdGVybT0yMjM0NV93cjE/gaXUp7g/s8n93f8f0d1) Amendment by donating to my legal defense fund.**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e16277796/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9saWJlcnR5LWd1YXJkL2xnLWNpYS1iYWRnZS1tYi1vbS8/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNjAxMjQ/LbmNsamtCUzdFcA/qP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9bGctY2lhLWJhZGdlJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09b20mdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPW1iJmFtb3VudD0yNSZ1dG1fdGVybT0yMjM0NV93cjE/gaXUp7g/s8n93f8f0d1)**

Let me be clear about what he's claiming: that our journalist committed "fraud" by using a dating app to meet him. That's it. A dating profile. Undercover investigative journalism is the same technique used by restaurant critics, investigative reporters, and 60 Minutes for half a century.

He also claims "wiretapping"—in Virginia, a one-party consent state where our recording was completely legal.

And the damages he's demanding? Compensation for "humiliation, depression, fear, and terror" caused by... the public hearing his own words.

This lawsuit isn't really about a dating profile or hurt feelings. **It's a message to every journalist in America: expose the intelligence community, and we will bury you in legal fees until you break.**

They've done it before. They'll do it again. [**Unless we prove it doesn't work**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e16277796/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9saWJlcnR5LWd1YXJkL2xnLWNpYS1iYWRnZS1tYi1vbS8/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNjAxMjQ/LbmNsamtCUzdFcA/qP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9bGctY2lhLWJhZGdlJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09b20mdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPW1iJmFtb3VudD0yNSZ1dG1fdGVybT0yMjM0NV93cjE/gaXUp7g/s8n93f8f0d1).

I'm not settling. I'm not backing down. I'm taking this to discovery—where we'll subpoena documents, depose witnesses, and expose even more of what they've been hiding. If we have to, we'll take it to the Supreme Court.

[**But I can't do it alone**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e16277796/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9saWJlcnR5LWd1YXJkL2xnLWNpYS1iYWRnZS1tYi1vbS8/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNjAxMjQ/LbmNsamtCUzdFcA/qP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9bGctY2lhLWJhZGdlJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09b20mdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPW1iJmFtb3VudD0yNSZ1dG1fdGVybT0yMjM0NV93cjE/gaXUp7g/s8n93f8f0d1).

Legal defense against a well-funded plaintiff—with what appears to be Deep State backing—costs hundreds of thousands of dollars. Every motion, every filing, every hour of attorney time adds up fast.

**[**Will you stand in the gap with me today?**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e16277796/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9saWJlcnR5LWd1YXJkL2xnLWNpYS1iYWRnZS1tYi1vbS8/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNjAxMjQ/LbmNsamtCUzdFcA/qP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9bGctY2lhLWJhZGdlJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09b20mdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPW1iJmFtb3VudD0yNSZ1dG1fdGVybT0yMjM0NV93cjE/gaXUp7g/s8n93f8f0d1)**

[**Your donation—whether $25 or $2,500—goes directly to legal defense**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e16277796/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9saWJlcnR5LWd1YXJkL2xnLWNpYS1iYWRnZS1tYi1vbS8/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNjAxMjQ/LbmNsamtCUzdFcA/qP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9bGctY2lhLWJhZGdlJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09b20mdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPW1iJmFtb3VudD0yNSZ1dG1fdGVybT0yMjM0NV93cjE/gaXUp7g/s8n93f8f0d1), keeping our investigators in the field, and ensuring that the cost of telling the truth doesn't become too high to bear.

[**Your gift through Liberty Guard funds our defense so that we can keep fighting.**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e16277796/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9saWJlcnR5LWd1YXJkL2xnLWNpYS1iYWRnZS1tYi1vbS8/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNjAxMjQ/LbmNsamtCUzdFcA/qP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9bGctY2lhLWJhZGdlJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09b20mdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPW1iJmFtb3VudD0yNSZ1dG1fdGVybT0yMjM0NV93cjE/gaXUp7g/s8n93f8f0d1)

He thought the camera would stay hidden. He thought his words would never see daylight. He thought wrong.

Let's finish what we started.

In Truth,
James O'Keefe
Founder and CEO
O'Keefe Media Group

**P.S.** Discovery is where the real fight begins—and where we often uncover more than the plaintiff bargained for. Your support today doesn't just defend this case. It funds the next investigation.

---

This email was sent to **[dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)** as part of your subscription to **America First War Room**

108 S Washington St. Suite 200
Alexandria, VA 22314

[Unsubscribe](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e16277796/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3N1YnNjcmlwdGlvbnMvdW5zdWJzY3JpYmU/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNjAxMjQ/LbmNsamtCUzdFcA/qP2hpZHM9bmN4MUJ0WW9naGJCQU5scw/gaXUp7g/s6j58ee4668)

clean_body: Dems have chance to flip seat BEFORE midterms | = | Did you hear the big news? Gov. Gavin Newsom has officially declared a special election in California’s First Congressional District. With the Republican U.S. House Majority essentially down to zero, flipping this seat from red to blue could give Democrats control of the U.S. House even before the midterms in November! = = = When you donate to the California Democratic Party you are investing in real, around-the-clock, year-round, grassroots organizing. We put paid field organizers on the phones and on the streets. And we mobilize volunteers to ensure every single voter in every single competitive district hears why they need to vote blue. We call it Forever Organizing, and it has a proven track record of success: ✅ Flipping three seats from red to blue in 2024; ✅ Passing Proposition 50 by a landslide; ❓ Flipping three (or more?!) seats in 2026. = = = = = = \- The Organizing Team at CADEM HQ | | = Our Democratic leaders are working hard to make California a better place to live. From fighting for good-paying jobs, combating climate change, to expanding healthcare access so all Californians can lead safe, healthy, prosperous lives — California’s Democratic leaders turn progressive ideas into meaningful action. clean_body: , it's Vivek - I need your help. This mission to revive American greatness can't be accomplished with money alone. It requires a movement - an army of patriotic Americans who are ready to take a stand and say "ENOUGH" to Big Government.**Here's what we're going to do: Cut red tape Slash taxes Empower families Unleash innovation And put you, the citizen, back in charge I'm not running to control you - I'm running to set you free. And now I'm asking you to take one small step with me: Yes - just a buck. Not because it will fund the whole campaign, but because it sends a powerful message: that you, and millions of other proud Americans, believe in what we're building TOGETHER. A campaign built by everyday citizens, not career politicians. That's how we win. Fellow Patriot,

I’m going to be brutally honest with you.

Arizona is _ground zero._

If Democrats get even a little bit of power back in 2026, they’re going to turn our state into a political punching bag and a testing ground for their next wave of insanity. And that starts with flipping seats like this one. They don’t hate me because of my “tone” or because I’m “too conservative.” **They hate me because I’ve done the job they refuse to do:**

I fought cartels.
I chased fentanyl traffickers.
I watched families get ripped apart because politicians in D.C. turned the border into a joke.

[**And now I’m running for Congress because I’m sick of watching career politicians talk tough on TV while Americans pay the price.**](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=e128a94f21554133adf4741aee884e10&_e=yaYfQAYuN6i4E0LHz2mgcCvHpiVTSObk1dUvbWYzELHaguOKcjB3ctsOjS4Hra-7XontKqwqZGCu2CP5WBDHDqoftXcGg0oCTBboh6J_Ec6s_Wz1iSe5CZG_1XrDcgvH_6S_zj7tGumNisy31QcljCsOGaV_Jfffif7yqdMgEYm8udKcePG5PmjtAtQ3qNLcG6row-zwO3C3BbPNTPx2hvN4ip-s4XeWoeviWC931PAMPMg8dTZEUqpd-J35t_LpIMta3aEpjldojyI_eBXkh1su7IsqAtfW5URD0oeXt4T44dcrNuMycouWhSviOxtIdxDxx0_2G2UGCqLvJYzmy9cfuXopLH0HnhWgn804fgoJtthwp5746byiLtFa_b8KYV7RrE42gpKkzL6YdneO4uriknucOk3JWDR7NgJNXszf_ESFfFfNon_i_LVmo2ZqhDG59OPEFNx800f00A2-iEy0UxEIxDI8xwwUoqU1PpXOM7FJkRO23NYJQ7twCaHgVN3GfX_MgqO7Fed06E6GhsxEzlzMHBma4ZhKfej2QDNBQnT9Rdj87OrEwVmccKzlJgvvohpaFHW96N6ipGkn_eFzwgqUnqX4VI9VB6vU60xrT521c18QJ9fkfhou9sb6BOnVlcqoDLEtTZqU-pkOVFT0DSTdRKSG2OJvUq-l8g8%3D)

**Here’s what the Democrats want:**

They want open-border chaos to keep going.
They want the fentanyl pipeline wide open.
They want Americans to stay overwhelmed, unsafe, and ignored.

And if they flip the House? They will come after EVERY SINGLE Republican who dared challenge their socialist policies.

**They’ll use the gavel to impeach President Trump, block the America First agenda, and spend two years doing investigations and political theater while our border continues to collapse.**

[**That’s why I’m asking: If you can chip in right now — even $10 or $20 — please do it.**](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=e128a94f21554133adf4741aee884e10&_e=yaYfQAYuN6i4E0LHz2mgcCvHpiVTSObk1dUvbWYzELHaguOKcjB3ctsOjS4Hra-7XontKqwqZGCu2CP5WBDHDqoftXcGg0oCTBboh6J_Ec6s_Wz1iSe5CZG_1XrDcgvH_6S_zj7tGumNisy31QcljCsOGaV_Jfffif7yqdMgEYm8udKcePG5PmjtAtQ3qNLcG6row-zwO3C3BbPNTPx2hvN4ip-s4XeWoeviWC931PBMEP_eo0_ujCIFq2iZwTFImLAQ5oKm9dpRuU6Sde-7dDsYAvklokZMB7h2K1dyLYxuW8FFEFJKMdyexsNGAU8hrzjelFlk-v3ZLSAS49y3mgwNJUvfKaVmBbYtOnKcDrzTWj19LIEG6UFxvOLKkgcJ4W3SmdXx9XzNc0D7EG7SOQdRgVKMuKi3c5HmvYxq-IdXUMia9YIvEroG668oxYq9UiivBWxNHL22z4cnfJQv_UeaQ-VTqRVYXZOQ-N4FCnaLi1zbTj1KSSu0Lp4Ldk7vhUglZGbdrmncRx0EM3xRQIuxwBhUmoC6pbcn5OnD1h4zrBCLx0Dts246CJ57Hsto6ojLFeeh8REggLkbG-djXLEwIOE102cFGyc9XF_KggtBE4q7N8MXFv95a7Wt-TCWyo_YX1dYUZYXuzAaIj_42P2DY6zp0k-xQ7LAa9qgUCg%3D)

Because the radical left is going to dump millions into Arizona—they already are. And I’m not backing down. I’m running to secure the border, crush the cartels, and finally put America First.

**But I need backup.**

[**Please Contribute today, fellow patriot:**](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=e128a94f21554133adf4741aee884e10&_e=yaYfQAYuN6i4E0LHz2mgcCvHpiVTSObk1dUvbWYzELHaguOKcjB3ctsOjS4Hra-7XontKqwqZGCu2CP5WBDHDqoftXcGg0oCTBboh6J_Ec6s_Wz1iSe5CZG_1XrDcgvH_6S_zj7tGumNisy31QcljCsOGaV_Jfffif7yqdMgEYm8udKcePG5PmjtAtQ3qNLcG6row-zwO3C3BbPNTPx2hvN4ip-s4XeWoeviWC931PB2r3pvgf_H22Xx7vPVlhM1MvtA5K2DQnLjPFGmklcqB5dYxz8e-RfvWUe5KnRqb4KyN0Lk-f_iOH9EKX6Li9DAfDqGP-T3tA-z2VLVR5H2sQaB9gcLmSJJHS1UeyeCwMcoh1gdroKd8yHhbjYurIJc2KeJxVaTMFzrW8cJNuQW_v5NMxjO9Nh-Jaobe5ZdktPZb2KovvoLSSC0BamyXZHzMKn_TN2vI_9kh06prlNF14RuL37VIe7jDgI7pBWnMwhIOBSpoREJbwOoNhG-yw--3jIYD8CPW2B8vTqolrLzMkq-VP3lMUDskWyAzkNTaGWATUnMDiJmH3XRQw4cAJ05OobNKB8PNxsW0W5_wmF7GGNs0BD83ERueuEu74dLVz-tjUVaisBfqJn2SxZeCydoZ3qZ5jqZ78lMp8VVmMOsiGSrH_Fpzp4Fg1rovRX2LxU%3D)

clean_body: | Fellow Patriot, I’m going to be brutally honest with you. Arizona is ground zero. If Democrats get even a little bit of power back in 2026, they’re going to turn our state into a political punching bag and a testing ground for their next wave of insanity. And that starts with flipping seats like this one. They don’t hate me because of my “tone” or because I’m “too conservative.” They hate me because I’ve done the job they refuse to do: I fought cartels. I chased fentanyl traffickers. I watched families get ripped apart because politicians in D.C. turned the border into a joke. Here’s what the Democrats want: They want open-border chaos to keep going. They want the fentanyl pipeline wide open. They want Americans to stay overwhelmed, unsafe, and ignored. And if they flip the House? They will come after EVERY SINGLE Republican who dared challenge their socialist policies. They’ll use the gavel to impeach President Trump, block the America First agenda, and spend two years doing investigations and political theater while our border continues to collapse. Because the radical left is going to dump millions into Arizona—they already are. And I’m not backing down. I’m running to secure the border, crush the cartels, and finally put America First. But I need backup. — Mark Lamb Join Mark Lamb on social media! | | PAID FOR BY MARK LAMB FOR CONGRESS Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go: .
