name: Frank S. Wright - Corporal, U.S. Marine Corps (Ret.)
subject: I was sixteen when I lied to join the Marines.
body:
I still remember seeing the flag raised on Iwo Jima...

| | | [](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=e95a2a1e1acc4b548f5ab35722f00519&_e=LKmO3X8V1XRWfA0UEGYtvNIKB-F40ubE7DBFoxYJcS3TKa8_cmhkLYG1n3q-r8X14C-4SFBzIjYNaiQzSzrdCBeP0mrEaIQOlHAt8sJmUuEXcGgByu3Ri3nG-REY3-8bYKg10w5PmDXgNmUo2gav_6OVexks3BLTIc5tcfEz6-rYt5cLONt2jLgZXsfpY5nyoM-LdYZzCvQAzt4NuHWHnKazbQTd6XMc7U7WgGZi8WQbY_LmxHS412dyA1ueqfTpCVVVQOyAbxmtZYzF7fgYjdkKKRMY-BCIOHnq0XeY2ayvqz0pOyrFbGWKBK9bKfGJzRs1SYvtquP-jHOw1ilowkQ5IB66eHwzWT7YzfJ9vVmXmdqPG6I7PeCAL8fPjQWTcCmBPg-NArmN8gevUOk8eUKcbLshx83qhw6jOQFeV3Tkamq7Z4UZC4TB0gCLmq56Q4l3Ww5pTjXpO7isSwgE0pu8XOF5vVk05Fe4yjrwWpoJIePyLIWWdpbuVxuuLqZKyvbNr8eNgt2OpuoCcGQIHNzS84JXA4A8ZmHvYAuShbHwjhmLWA7LVThDPQ6ICm-UKXe2zdUoNQzkOjW3M99sGdcZw4kG75OM82TbZKOPQxl_qm0DqE0RpA8NBjJ1pt-JyL0kGP4gGbDmiu_t3VTfuJtVV09WO5A14kOPpToirow%3D)
---
Peter,
---
My name is **Corporal Frank S. Wright** , United States Marine Corps, retired. I'm a hundred years old now -- one of the last living Marine Raiders of World War II.In January 1942, just weeks after the attack on Pearl Harbor, I quit high school in Arkansas and walked into the enlistment office. I was sixteen -- too young, too skinny, and too light to qualify. The sergeant told me to come back when I was heavier.So I went home, ate all the bananas I could find, and stuffed five pounds' worth into my pockets before stepping on that scale again.I passed. I lied about my age. And I became a Marine.
---
[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=e95a2a1e1acc4b548f5ab35722f00519&_e=LKmO3X8V1XRWfA0UEGYtvNIKB-F40ubE7DBFoxYJcS3TKa8_cmhkLYG1n3q-r8X14C-4SFBzIjYNaiQzSzrdCBeP0mrEaIQOlHAt8sJmUuEXcGgByu3Ri3nG-REY3-8bYKg10w5PmDXgNmUo2gav_6OVexks3BLTIc5tcfEz6-rYt5cLONt2jLgZXsfpY5nyoM-LdYZzCvQAzt4NuHWHnKazbQTd6XMc7U7WgGZi8WQ0_0wcM6FQTKFqdl-QXib7ca1lIpme_lD7VSCfzdOnnDczC_ISO8tmHT7zLSrw70M89Em27VbGs6hhuB1Rb3EPnAM8lopW83o5xh6ahMsXztdNYurPbvhdVYSnWNY5Y9caO-9Ya7kdNZnz4alTwV8Fku7P0dQGXE_z6zP0Ez7p6MNFlZ7z0MreeSHSNYHgijPPdSScflxneievuKnaHPzHSuhtg8-GD8XqdFCaXs3x4sbvfWQW1nq_u6TpqO5cQ1m7T0kV0iBeDks0-jSAqBHq4l5iB8sSsv0eLE2Ryjr5CA3T5YOMV2ZyhxhEeK6ZS7Kacat3PBmozaZOIepWvNpuon1uQ7TSkJ3DD0QQMnmEXNAeU4MkzGr2XAEsUaW1jtwJAoZ0X5Jcka7ncENl2HRAtI0I5EcNjqlCTMkzbxj29I3WpIIzKMSPIucofD_p__A%3D)
---
After boot camp, I volunteered to join the **4th Marine Raiders** , America's first special operations unit.They asked me why I wanted to join. I said, _" Because I want to fight."_Our commanding officer was **James Roosevelt** , the President's son -- a good man, the kind who never gave an order he wouldn't do himself. We were trained to land first, fight behind enemy lines, and take the beaches nobody else could reach.From **Guadalcanal** to **New Georgia** , from the jungles of the Solomons to the black sand of **Iwo Jima** , we fought to free the Pacific.On **Guam** , I was stabbed in the stomach during hand-to-hand combat. On **Iwo Jima** , I was hit by machine-gun fire and knocked unconscious. Both times, my men thought I was gone. Somehow, I wasn't.When I came to, I saw the flag rising on Mount Suribachi. Every ship in the harbor sounded its horn. I had tears in my eyes then, and I still do when I think about it.That flag meant freedom still lived.
---
[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=e95a2a1e1acc4b548f5ab35722f00519&_e=LKmO3X8V1XRWfA0UEGYtvNIKB-F40ubE7DBFoxYJcS3TKa8_cmhkLYG1n3q-r8X14C-4SFBzIjYNaiQzSzrdCBeP0mrEaIQOlHAt8sJmUuEXcGgByu3Ri3nG-REY3-8bYKg10w5PmDXgNmUo2gav_6OVexks3BLTIc5tcfEz6-rYt5cLONt2jLgZXsfpY5nyoM-LdYZzCvQAzt4NuHWHnKazbQTd6XMc7U7WgGZi8WStRmijsWOLTSB3PG3xqaJ-vk_47Bw444gEqL0VhhN1TUuKaZUOK_LA9Yq6RrFdr87unpXMK3vwNQj1_Dejx2bpUO0Wp6uYH444vKTqTQfXjUxxaBOHcN_tlWiMLy-ykvwM9yOjkzwLg2lK8CQGjysC0sHM9rmCWOtPRhX_K4W8IaCdJovvFjNsFgwnmLXNVpoEdOpMoeTFEq2FNz_HXyh24upmLrn47tkQE8pmpn45pSS44-dSrGUawfYsEVvZN-_ZURExrFSriSQRRFvnNmT5yilb6antpq6PSswbQo4yYdpPxaWexTGbAm-vF9voY7lLSh92a4xqAsRIyIs3Pq4-3iV1BjEHaGu9LCw_7H-S2-ig6sABbIX5nQssitnyd57a6ko6spRn4iGKLzct_tmZvp_luYUzPTbV_iZIQzPzo38IJvd8r6LQ-tEjazg9PjE%3D)
---
There were dark days too...On Guadalcanal, I caught malaria and ended up in a field hospital -- but when my unit was preparing to move out, I couldn't stand being left behind.I slipped out and rejoined them. I'll now admit, I was always a little rebellious. When the war ended, I became a drill instructor, helping shape the next generation of Marines. I was in my twenties, carrying wounds inside and out.For more than a decade, I didn't share my stories. I kept them locked away, like many of my brothers did. Over the years, I began to open up and share my story with friends, family, and others who wanted to know about the realities of the battlefield at the Pacific Front.Now, more than ever, the **American Veterans Center** has given me the opportunity to share them -- on the stage at the **Annual Conference** , and by capturing them on film for future generations. Not just my story, but those of the men who never came home, and those who are no longer here to tell theirs.
---
[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=e95a2a1e1acc4b548f5ab35722f00519&_e=LKmO3X8V1XRWfA0UEGYtvNIKB-F40ubE7DBFoxYJcS3TKa8_cmhkLYG1n3q-r8X14C-4SFBzIjYNaiQzSzrdCBeP0mrEaIQOlHAt8sJmUuEXcGgByu3Ri3nG-REY3-8bYKg10w5PmDXgNmUo2gav_6OVexks3BLTIc5tcfEz6-rYt5cLONt2jLgZXsfpY5nyoM-LdYZzCvQAzt4NuHWHnKazbQTd6XMc7U7WgGZi8WQxZtZzUrVF4iw7eaRV9cAgLj0cpAliUKjKSdfiUyJuVVjCe2E8nckRY2j0C1-2yC8C1uRIpinPveCoctc9FYD9tiCoGFAYhNn6cWAGpOZzthQDKCFgDJq-mmX3GhyIgyMKKydaBKpoEzUsSvjjrVPy2xIXtlrZvgPo56Tok6agBG-Gp22rRoLh89aDNcNq6E9Jh_UScC-am5VAFdjG0_zGXofpCHCzYJfh-Z9DITFHtiEJz0iCvsE2j7lrRZqas_pJ9djdd38QfXTubK6udS-wXkjn2zRcqhByANBmk7NFsbe5JH3ClBLGWKP4cOWvNW-CxW3_oGPOcRZT_CezQsZuapWZKkHXjreu8NHZVXtc-444p4FRJCVcWpOZM1wIL66S6sScSAL5rwcLeREidMs_WKDhdfYo1LlIfCXnmLQA-2y8L-CpsfJZpmBRgYhuKfQ%3D)
---
_**[That’s why I believe so deeply in the American Veterans Center...](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=e95a2a1e1acc4b548f5ab35722f00519&_e=LKmO3X8V1XRWfA0UEGYtvNIKB-F40ubE7DBFoxYJcS3TKa8_cmhkLYG1n3q-r8X14C-4SFBzIjYNaiQzSzrdCBeP0mrEaIQOlHAt8sJmUuEXcGgByu3Ri3nG-REY3-8bYKg10w5PmDXgNmUo2gav_6OVexks3BLTIc5tcfEz6-rYt5cLONt2jLgZXsfpY5nyoM-LdYZzCvQAzt4NuHWHnKazbQTd6XMc7U7WgGZi8WQ0LGgVvaDp1btWvzb5ruesXeqUUVSVEQffhyQIiVdlCAvKPC2gtk9JeOElZ8hUW_xRDP-EtvnJcgMwDcadkr80b6h5CK0PTrBYpYpadjbNhXwXTD2x4RIuLk3GKB1IcdBDZC8bjGU-SLVPbav2EYnH6ec8RKm7w5M1_nOah4WwzKcscoZz88mi9wJamwjTqsVZKbD0UOvmTmPASK_AR2gDzrlsIkkvPFue8dHmVMGSKGk51lBdl1kVENwUCVacDTbVxvzIZIjdO_RYeGLfbBNv4PQ3hn2JznHHvGXB_nONtgaTDlK6hik3rUPG8I6eGY95ifFUCEONimtL7vIcoh2ZxGuincby88MvLXPuNPNk1uPbI9FNM485rbu3QQl8K4YXlpOFnEcrO7i7RpeNi6GQgQnO-a6tsVOm-dErfrhyESaZeiSHTkfujJBxwNN_0aE%3D)**_ They've given old Marines like me a place to share what we lived through, to look young cadets and future service members in the eye and say, "This is what it means to serve."They've brought veterans from every generation together -- to remember, to teach, and to inspire. And every year, the **American Veterans Center Annual Conference** gives us something rare -- a gathering where history stands shoulder to shoulder with the future.It's where I've met cadets who listen with the same wide eyes I once had at sixteen. It's where old comrades find each other again, and where we all remember that the values we fought for -- courage, duty, honor -- are still being carried forward.It's a living bridge between those who fought for freedom and those who will defend it next.
---
[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=e95a2a1e1acc4b548f5ab35722f00519&_e=LKmO3X8V1XRWfA0UEGYtvNIKB-F40ubE7DBFoxYJcS3TKa8_cmhkLYG1n3q-r8X14C-4SFBzIjYNaiQzSzrdCBeP0mrEaIQOlHAt8sJmUuEXcGgByu3Ri3nG-REY3-8bYKg10w5PmDXgNmUo2gav_6OVexks3BLTIc5tcfEz6-rYt5cLONt2jLgZXsfpY5nyoM-LdYZzCvQAzt4NuHWHnKazbQTd6XMc7U7WgGZi8WSfV9GFAJbuKsfPwFrWFDvmCLWIt6b2cHoWxioONT0vC9A81arWbG7Iu6zujxbOCihBluJ5avd-TDSIORcJOJj0u7moeybVY5OWYw0k03mIWn5kNc5mzXFbA2QzjJ342FBujLrUWajNl1fyrS0xRUkW_4pjPzUlFuxg8NMsTjy-ECh7sAja9nB9k4o6zNgnqHf3PdqwLEPtXcTKw7FfWLt4wUJCT-mV_Bc0JQEoXww1oc7RvUqb_s6wre43tU9T-2t9VMmnuq2IlEvnxmjt3SzGws1Yfup30tu-Ef39AtgEcY9tJN6Bg8d0dZqVVXkYLchIyGUIMPULL8JMml3vhgKV0iNqtUs5drn--ACo-1srtulI0NeZEyizS_Ams4VHD2hD2je5EdLC6wW4hfHdkaQcTxa8W7WbTPIbGXiei9aW2LXzqnc4q_Yb7-hK2f6q_sE%3D)

[_**Your support makes that possible. clean_body: I still remember seeing the flag raised on Iwo Jima... | | | Peter, My name is Corporal Frank S. Wright , United States Marine Corps, retired. I'm a hundred years old now -- one of the last living Marine Raiders of World War II.In January 1942, just weeks after the attack on Pearl Harbor, I quit high school in Arkansas and walked into the enlistment office. I was sixteen -- too young, too skinny, and too light to qualify. The sergeant told me to come back when I was heavier.So I went home, ate all the bananas I could find, and stuffed five pounds' worth into my pockets before stepping on that scale again.I passed. I lied about my age. And I became a Marine. After boot camp, I volunteered to join the 4th Marine Raiders , America's first special operations unit.They asked me why I wanted to join. I said, " Because I want to fight."Our commanding officer was James Roosevelt , the President's son -- a good man, the kind who never gave an order he wouldn't do himself. We were trained to land first, fight behind enemy lines, and take the beaches nobody else could reach.From Guadalcanal to New Georgia , from the jungles of the Solomons to the black sand of Iwo Jima , we fought to free the Pacific.On Guam , I was stabbed in the stomach during hand-to-hand combat. On Iwo Jima , I was hit by machine-gun fire and knocked unconscious. Both times, my men thought I was gone. Somehow, I wasn't.When I came to, I saw the flag rising on Mount Suribachi. Every ship in the harbor sounded its horn. I had tears in my eyes then, and I still do when I think about it.That flag meant freedom still lived. There were dark days too...On Guadalcanal, I caught malaria and ended up in a field hospital -- but when my unit was preparing to move out, I couldn't stand being left behind.I slipped out and rejoined them. I'll now admit, I was always a little rebellious. When the war ended, I became a drill instructor, helping shape the next generation of Marines. I was in my twenties, carrying wounds inside and out.For more than a decade, I didn't share my stories. I kept them locked away, like many of my brothers did. Over the years, I began to open up and share my story with friends, family, and others who wanted to know about the realities of the battlefield at the Pacific Front.Now, more than ever, the American Veterans Center has given me the opportunity to share them -- on the stage at the Annual Conference , and by capturing them on film for future generations. Not just my story, but those of the men who never came home, and those who are no longer here to tell theirs. They've given old Marines like me a place to share what we lived through, to look young cadets and future service members in the eye and say, "This is what it means to serve."They've brought veterans from every generation together -- to remember, to teach, and to inspire. And every year, the American Veterans Center Annual Conference gives us something rare -- a gathering where history stands shoulder to shoulder with the future.It's where I've met cadets who listen with the same wide eyes I once had at sixteen. It's where old comrades find each other again, and where we all remember that the values we fought for -- courage, duty, honor -- are still being carried forward.It's a living bridge between those who fought for freedom and those who will defend it next. The National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C., where America gathers to honor its heroes. The Annual Veterans Conference each November, where we share stories and pass the torch to those who will serve next. The preservation of our stories through documentaries and oral histories -- so that when we are gone, the lessons remain. At my age, I don't take many things for granted. But I still believe in this country -- in what it stands for, and in the people who keep its history alive.If you believe that too, I ask you to help the American Veterans Center continue its work. So that long after the last of us is gone, our voices will still be heard -- reminders of what America can be when its people stand together.Thank you for remembering. Thank you for caring. And thank you for keeping faith with those who served.Semper Fidelis, Frank S. Wright Corporal, U.S. Marine Corps (Ret.) Veteran, 4th Marine Raiders | 21st Marines, 3rd Marine Division P.S.** When I was sixteen, I had to lie about my age to fight for my country. Now, at one hundred, I can tell you the truth as plain as I know it: freedom isn't free, and the stories of those who fought for it are fading fast. Your gift -- whatever you can give -- helps make sure they're never forgotten. Hey folks,
I jumped on with Rachel Cohen for an emergency episode of _Endless Urgency_ to talk about the ICE shooting in Minneapolis--what we know, what's still unclear, and why the response has been so disturbing. Rachel absolutely goes off, and if you care about justice, accountability, and action, this is a must-watch.
* **[00:01:06]** Rachel and I break down what the video shows--and why this looks like an execution.
* **[00:04:00]** How ICE's tactics mirror and escalate state violence across the country.
* **[00:10:57]** Rachel makes a powerful case for why now _is_ the time to talk about abolishing ICE.
* **[00:22:00]** Where are all the "Second Amendment" defenders now?
* **[00:28:40]** What Democrats need to do--today--to draw a line on this violence.

With urgency,
--Mike

clean_body: Watch now | A recording from Mike Nellis's live video | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more ? | | More state violence in Minnesota. | | and | Jan 24 | | | ---|---|--- | | | | | | | | | | | Hey folks, I jumped on with Rachel Cohen for an emergency episode of Endless Urgency to talk about the ICE shooting in Minneapolis--what we know, what's still unclear, and why the response has been so disturbing. Rachel absolutely goes off, and if you care about justice, accountability, and action, this is a must-watch. [00:01:06] Rachel and I break down what the video shows--and why this looks like an execution. [00:04:00] How ICE's tactics mirror and escalate state violence across the country. [00:10:57] Rachel makes a powerful case for why now is the time to talk about abolishing ICE. [00:22:00] Where are all the "Second Amendment" defenders now? [00:28:40] What Democrats need to do--today--to draw a line on this violence. ** With urgency, --Mike | A guest post by| but often political (isn't everything?). Never legal advice. Mike Nellis is a Democratic strategist and entrepreneur who has raised over $1 billion for Democratic campaigns and causes. He 's the founder of Authentic.org, an award-winning fundraising and advertising agency, and a former Senior Advisor to Vice President Kamala Harris. This Substack is where he writes with endless urgency about the issues of the day--and how we can save the Democratic Party and our democracy. You 're currently a free subscriber to Endless Urgency with Mike Nellis. For the full experience or to support my work so I can keep it free for as many people as possible, upgrade your subscription. | | | | | | | (C) 2026 Mike Nellis 548 Market Street PMB 72296, San Francisco, CA 94104 ? ?

body:
Folks – Michele Tafoya here! I never really considered running for office. Ever.
[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=7c76fe2260054d7c956b89d394d5ba67&_e=VU_gf8JQQq52FYaCHYxj1iILHT6ygaJLyGFHYMrc4H-6NP39_d8yVwZuybu5hcV0i_fmIS-Tuc2p_r1xn53MmtUkm-qx3ixnnRakTMTx-vPvKqzt-hWKk9P99uFQO0IuX8P_G07Yt5Um6aTkKhTqmx_V2Tax8Z_3m4WMUXEcjMiY443Xn5LIRn1zmkKlQY8iEjrTUv8DR7TNAr1qT0p-weJfFgzCnPrAyH_mm7TCA4KYM0yciHVqXVd-aWHdE7Y3-IdD2BYxI85hwqrelYyK0f4NTL4les9748CI4U-dXfZ5JOQcl87aUGdZ3TuH2szJkoKUbGtRtnULVbLMGMNAvbsk_fADAtr5EpJwlLs_xJI5pkt0_IVBukVBMp0_HXxVj2tsT3_yDEfKACvK1PcdHUz7Eun74R7Rx7f0h2aF8qMyW_xCYyLsr17V2iJ5zglBEeBfAPKK5ISZdMqPfPha-Udy0zHAhE3grH27QamvpxygoV2jlBtqL5CS7ISu2w7me8O5DeHvohmb4oD1YSKGq6aoi4q7lmHru7Gq_2wFgF_Zk_aXd2nSf8dK-mLwHwG7ajSIDDR7t01vwWmnB5ddXhOFB6Abbz2qtVtkBFE8dwM-6ygE5J_vodkWSs7wU7-_aAJnPyRW60j_6l2AANM2eW9ClYGtATvZzqZiyhtKH1bgOo_47kCLBQzS7s2G_pjz-GVpKUWEkDhJg_Sz0vPwLFW__6Yc0ycSfmcU9SARFzt1QyHqd2FTbEFmBiMnLhIgzLM9RbKE-cEGTVGr-sjmzz9Jjz4aJ6kffN1K48VzEhVhEKQryalPgaIW8A_XLbcTuLyShbvVaUuSXH53v1Lexg%3D%3D)Folks - Michele Tafoya here!**
**I never really considered running for office. Ever. I was too focused on raising my family, and being the best football sideline reporter I could be.**
**But even in the last few weeks, Minnesota has become the embodiment of everything wrong with politics today. Tim Walz, his inner circle, and the corrupt political class are too busy:**
**
* Wasting billions of our tax dollars on fraudulent daycares
* Failing to condemn the activists storming churches
* Raising prices on hardworking families
* Sabotaging anything the President wants to do
* Forcing men into women's spaces
* Pitting Americans against each other

**
**I can 't sit on the sidelines anymore. That's why I'm throwing my hat in the ring and announcing my candidacy for U.S. Senate!
[Is there ANYTHING I can say to convince you to become one of my first donors? The far is already racing to destroy my campaign before it even gets off the ground. I can’t shock the political world and flip this seat without your help.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=7c76fe2260054d7c956b89d394d5ba67&_e=VU_gf8JQQq52FYaCHYxj1iILHT6ygaJLyGFHYMrc4H-6NP39_d8yVwZuybu5hcV0i_fmIS-Tuc2p_r1xn53MmtUkm-qx3ixnnRakTMTx-vPvKqzt-hWKk9P99uFQO0IuX8P_G07Yt5Um6aTkKhTqmx_V2Tax8Z_3m4WMUXEcjMiY443Xn5LIRn1zmkKlQY8iEjrTUv8DR7TNAr1qT0p-weJfFgzCnPrAyH_mm7TCA4KYM0yciHVqXVd-aWHdE7Y3-IdD2BYxI85hwqrelYyK0f4NTL4les9748CI4U-dXfZ5JOQcl87aUGdZ3TuH2szJPVrEZXCnXDdmrn0eBWmK6s-H5VqzJiTRkDmgIYrmfSA8eB5uzO1XZ-srJZco-IUXpge7pKjlp_9iY1XGHeKkBXcp8jde4bHqt9gD8gr5u3rIoh57IATaLojY8S73YSSVDZ3MWk_SADAIzQNXEY7t9lLSZhcXGhNUoZ1XiYHTQ9iSMw8B1Iw2_XC-UHkzG-dPFWmc3JFYiJehNjiClYshAeQb-P0QQsM6AvqIgt8Gj7-9MNWvGcN5x1D7Bl2IckiZGm1FYCLfew2sb62LAgeWYMQj9bXcJJgwN69p2nMCnGP0l-ZPnpmxQIadRNiJWqmyL4kKDuve6QqTXG_Td2css2yBR2TIRbq0E4YpVz6F-X_62fVGsz5Fn11rcwGEUiisZO2i2ahX-uuAx7asihhYAn31q4-BtJosqI8_mgQWJRvqP2TBYPgiGAuMljpPUquR3CnGVkMfjaJ77P-8YBp66Q6SfZktXDg1YlDb2lO_NEU-CQONwGVAyb60JI1hFEJzLEmtn2Uo932Wn9-lYYXGlA%3D%3D)[BECOME A FOUNDING DONOR
](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=7c76fe2260054d7c956b89d394d5ba67&_e=VU_gf8JQQq52FYaCHYxj1iILHT6ygaJLyGFHYMrc4H-6NP39_d8yVwZuybu5hcV0i_fmIS-Tuc2p_r1xn53MmtUkm-qx3ixnnRakTMTx-vPvKqzt-hWKk9P99uFQO0IuX8P_G07Yt5Um6aTkKhTqmx_V2Tax8Z_3m4WMUXEcjMiY443Xn5LIRn1zmkKlQY8iEjrTUv8DR7TNAr1qT0p-weJfFgzCnPrAyH_mm7TCA4KYM0yciHVqXVd-aWHdE7Y3-IdD2BYxI85hwqrelYyK0f4NTL4les9748CI4U-dXfZ5JOQcl87aUGdZ3TuH2szJyluOfL_O5xogx3YSL7tKgll4PFNOTBoAp031hB22oadL3W-5Oe6HCKpB4mDXhQiPTdfJocEitJG1d47blp2ovGZ83LnHXSrZ-xHi54HyKDlGbKpJ4W7zhHPBxvAHlrmed4cTSP4hY_syNJtp4bZKkOcirtVEdKkWnL2CLCQOHsG0ChWFQN0kTjeV-ZRY8eLCxYkGG8kpKZDpNw66Yt-b25LIDu6d9Gh347z5DZmeaUbbHBvLEggy8xNumhFZ3ATG00ioE9XzLKoZlIRp7_ZRJH243g53ZUe6M4xnaazJ0YZ0a6aNevHQnHHVzbpWOTm5HY53Jw2KIVzv9cyogcNOiCuuQwQ9RsnXltLjHl57AKzmWyqDnG_-1EKaSpY0EGlwmEHrgD-Z9laYDxj9az48vgY77JPFASc_6MQlEUzH4FTROFaAlS3mCscG5s4A9u3xzp2h9Ie9MvMpihcVelDv2EvPLFdIFeOPfbVhJ7GC5KqFp5iFzntKxlkyjAzuM8x_wRqecJ9okBXhHv8K-gvJUA%3D%3D)I've thought long and hard about the dynamics of this race before jumping in. **
**Minnesota has long been considered simply out of reach for Republicans. The last time it voted for a GOP President was Nixon. The pundits and political experts say a Republican could never win here. **
**But this year is going to be different for three key reasons:**
**FIRST - I'm running against Tim Walz's right hand. All the rampant fraud that took place here happened under Peggy Flanagan's nose as much as it did under his. We will remind voters about that fact every single day. **
**SECOND - The President has increased his voter share each time he has run. He nearly flipped this state in the last election, and Kamala Harris' running mate was our sitting Governor! Momentum is on our side. **
**THIRD - I'm a different kind of candidate, and I know how to win. I didn't reach the top of my industry by pulling my punches. I put in the work. I never backed down. And I kept fighting, no matter what the naysayers said.**
**In my years on the sidelines, I 've seen a LOT of underdogs win football games that the "experts" said were impossible. **
**The Minnesota Senate race will be another chapter in that storied history.
[But only with your help. Will you be one of the first-ever donors to my new campaign? This is going to be one of the MOST IMPORTANT races in the entire country. Your support – especially in these early days – will make the difference between victory and defeat.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=7c76fe2260054d7c956b89d394d5ba67&_e=VU_gf8JQQq52FYaCHYxj1iILHT6ygaJLyGFHYMrc4H-6NP39_d8yVwZuybu5hcV0i_fmIS-Tuc2p_r1xn53MmtUkm-qx3ixnnRakTMTx-vPvKqzt-hWKk9P99uFQO0IuX8P_G07Yt5Um6aTkKhTqmx_V2Tax8Z_3m4WMUXEcjMiY443Xn5LIRn1zmkKlQY8iEjrTUv8DR7TNAr1qT0p-weJfFgzCnPrAyH_mm7TCA4KYM0yciHVqXVd-aWHdE7Y3-IdD2BYxI85hwqrelYyK0f4NTL4les9748CI4U-dXfZ5JOQcl87aUGdZ3TuH2szJe56Wdrj4rk-pA3RRo8otXqvwl8Y80J_4xyfAR2KkFcSfcRPXFALIIgRpXlGZYxF0TyUlBWFEwXEaeOPukmKbR0TDR1bUfvXjyF3LAtccWNr_mQwl8ph7kWqJXnpRi0_uKfTShfA8LgnwRXAkLy7ZFOlDoUwTPfPgy1h4aPGOF8WTzV6n-5pVhTjNHnIhrFg9MTTHyEjQ_rUl3J2kRhmhO4isZo4UIHosyO--21f61JklWLhrhN4eLTLHBbDVEzXSROHvCCkFD0y3T5mZUWbHr77v02bNKYiKLEXDNl0LbbECTQpPaxgDTAlVsNCBMnlQfD1p7ixQgQSwYEDTlldyRHj_hs-4vh305eJ6der-yM6zLn7Yj3f4Xkvj6nZdxGQrU8QFpxhptikWlaXhPET9vVPMI-8MFMXvLbbNL0M1coBDgfpF6l97qjFFNOg192_H_tz6finn6p7TRJhPqvw2qJLq0sttsoY-I1NqHlEeqNLVXXECU78CE4Dl-ddSQNd_AaChLFX5xR2nbLErKaGLbg%3D%3D)| [PLEASE ADD $10

clean_body: Folks – Michele Tafoya here! I never really considered running for office. Ever. - Michele Tafoya here! I never really considered running for office. Ever. I was too focused on raising my family, and being the best football sideline reporter I could be. But even in the last few weeks, Minnesota has become the embodiment of everything wrong with politics today. Tim Walz, his inner circle, and the corrupt political class are too busy: Wasting billions of our tax dollars on fraudulent daycares Failing to condemn the activists storming churches Raising prices on hardworking families Sabotaging anything the President wants to do Forcing men into women's spaces Pitting Americans against each other I can 't sit on the sidelines anymore. That's why I'm throwing my hat in the ring and announcing my candidacy for U.S. Senate! thought long and hard about the dynamics of this race before jumping in. Minnesota has long been considered simply out of reach for Republicans. The last time it voted for a GOP President was Nixon. The pundits and political experts say a Republican could never win here. But this year is going to be different for three key reasons: FIRST - I'm running against Tim Walz's right hand. All the rampant fraud that took place here happened under Peggy Flanagan's nose as much as it did under his. We will remind voters about that fact every single day. SECOND - The President has increased his voter share each time he has run. He nearly flipped this state in the last election, and Kamala Harris' running mate was our sitting Governor! Momentum is on our side. THIRD - I'm a different kind of candidate, and I know how to win. I didn't reach the top of my industry by pulling my punches. I put in the work. I never backed down. And I kept fighting, no matter what the naysayers said. In my years on the sidelines, I 've seen a LOT of underdogs win football games that the "experts" said were impossible. The Minnesota Senate race will be another chapter in that storied history. | | ---|--- Thanks in advance for your support. I'll never forget the good folks who stepped up in the opening days of this campaign. You and I are going to do great things together. I can feel it. Be brave. Do good. - Michele Michele Tafoya Republican for Senate, Minnesota It's official - Michele Tafoya is running for U.S. Senate in Minnesota! Endorse her here:** | Paid for by Tafoya for Senate 3500 Vicksburg LN N, STE 267, Plymouth, MN 55447

name: [Official Petition] Drop all charges
subject: [Official Petition] Drop all charges
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Defense Trust
body:
The Left thinks they’ve finally got me...
The Left thinks they've finally got me...
| Dear Patriot,
---
This is the most personal letter I've ever written.
---
I'm writing to you not as America's Mayor, not as a former prosecutor, not even as President Trump's former attorney, but as an 81-year-old man - a grandfather and a patriot - staring down a 20-year prison sentence for doing what I believed was right.
---
I've taken on mobsters. I've faced terrorists. I've battled corruption. I've been through it all.
---
_Or so I thought ..._
---
**... But now, a Democrat Attorney General is making me stand in a rigged trial for bogus state-level crimes, because she knows that not even the most powerful man on the face of the planet - President Trump - can save me with a _federal_ pardon in _state_ court.**
---
They think they've finally got me! Left me with no escape, no lifeline - especially after they've already STRIPPED me of my law licenses!
---
_No pardon.
No protection.
No cavalry coming over the hill. _
---
But even though the most powerful man in the country legally cannot step in to save me, the most powerful _force_ absolutely can: _THE AMERICAN PEOPLE_.
---
So, with my back against the wall, I'm turning to the one thing that can save me: _**the collective voices of MILLIONS of patriots like _YOU_.**_

clean_body: The Left thinks they’ve finally got me... The Left thinks they've finally got me... | Dear Patriot, This is the most personal letter I've ever written. I'm writing to you not as America's Mayor, not as a former prosecutor, not even as President Trump's former attorney, but as an 81-year-old man - a grandfather and a patriot - staring down a 20-year prison sentence for doing what I believed was right. I've taken on mobsters. I've faced terrorists. I've battled corruption. I've been through it all. Or so I thought ... ... But now, a Democrat Attorney General is making me stand in a rigged trial for bogus state-level crimes, because she knows that not even the most powerful man on the face of the planet - President Trump - can save me with a federal pardon in state court. They think they've finally got me! Left me with no escape, no lifeline - especially after they've already STRIPPED me of my law licenses! No pardon. No protection. No cavalry coming over the hill. But even though the most powerful man in the country legally cannot step in to save me, the most powerful force absolutely can: THE AMERICAN PEOPLE. So, with my back against the wall, I'm turning to the one thing that can save me: the collective voices of MILLIONS of patriots like YOU. My mugshot was entered under booking #2313757, so my goal is for 2,313,757 patriots to sign my official petition -- -- calling for my freedom and to DROP ALL CHARGES. Thank you and God Bless you, Rudy Giuliani Rudy Defense Trust Paid for by Rudy Defense Trust

name: Senator Vincent Hughes
subject: Be Prepared for Sunday's Snowstorm
body:
If you are having trouble viewing this message or would like to share it on a social network, you can [view the message online](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?gpiv=2100171307.172856.451&gen=1).
| Share On | [](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=share&piv=2100171307.172856.451&snid=2)
---|---
[](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100171307.172856.451&gen=1&mailing_linkid=16479)
**Be Prepared for Sunday 's Snowstorm** **** If you've been following the news, you know a major winter storm is expected to impact our region **starting Saturday night, January 24, through Monday afternoon, January 26.** [Governor Shapiro has signed a Proclamation of Disaster Emergency,](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100171307.172856.451&gen=1&mailing_linkid=16480) and local "[Code Blue](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100171307.172856.451&gen=1&mailing_linkid=16482)" alerts are in effect due to dangerously cold temperatures. That means bad conditions are expected in both Philadelphia and Montgomery County. Mayor Parker has also declared a [snow emergency for Philadelphia](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100171307.172856.451&gen=1&mailing_linkid=16483) starting at 9PM on Saturday. She said it will remain in effect until roadway conditions improve. **We want everyone to be prepared and stay safe in this upcoming storm. Below are resources and information that could be helpful over the next several days.** Follow your local news stations and city and county social channels for the latest updates and forecasts.
* * *
**Be Prepared**
* **Power Outages:** Heavy wet snow and ice could down trees and power lines. Charge all devices and have flashlights ready. Report outages to PECO at 1-800-841-4141.
* **Extreme Cold:** Temperatures are forecasted to stay very cold over the next few days. Check on elderly neighbors and ensure pets are indoors.
* **Supplies:** It's recommended that you have at least 3 days of food, water, and necessary prescriptions.

**SNOW EMERGENCY GUIDELINES** You **must** move your car if it is parked on a designated Snow Emergency Route (look for the red and white signs). Vehicles left on these routes will be ticketed and towed to a nearby location to allow for plows to pass. **School Closures** As of Friday afternoon: **In the School District of Philadelphia,** all schools, Early Childhood Centers, and administrative offices will be CLOSED on Monday. Superintendent Watlington has designated this as a traditional "snow day," meaning no remote learning is required. **In Montgomery County,** most districts are currently planning for closures or "Flexible Instructional Days" (FIDs). **SEPTA Service** SEPTA has said customers should expect impacts to bus, trolley and Regional Rail service due to the winter storm. Whenever possible, service shutdowns will be announced at least two hours before they go into effect. If you must travel on Sunday and Monday, SEPTA is recommending that the Market-Frankford Line (The L Line) and the Broad Street Line (The B Line) will be your best options. **Code Blue** Both Philadelphia and Montgomery County have activated Code Blue protocols, meaning those without stable housing can access emergency services for help with shelter and support. If you see someone in need of shelter, call:
* Montco: 610-278-3522
* Philly: 215-232-1984

_**Philadelphia Warming Centers**_ 24/7 Warming Center: Hub of Hope (located sub-surface at Dilworth Park/City Hall) will operate 24/7 starting Saturday night. Daytime Warming Centers (Libraries): The following will have extended hours on Saturday and Sunday:
* Northeast Regional (2228 Cottman Ave)
* Blackwell Regional (125 S. 52nd St)
* Parkway Central Library (1901 Vine St)

Overnight Warming Centers (9 PM - 9 AM):
* MLK Recreation Center (2101 Cecil B. Moore Ave)
* Scanlon Recreation Center (1099 E. Venango St)
* DiSilvestro Recreation Center (1701 S. 15th St)

* * *
| Offices of Senator Vincent Hughes
---
| | |
---
District Office
2401 North 54th Street
Philadelphia, PA 19131
Phone: 215.879.7777
Fax: 215.879.7778
| |
---
Harrisburg Office
Senate Box 203007
Harrisburg, PA 17120-3007
Phone: 717.787.7112
Fax: 717.772.0579

name: =?UTF-8?Q?Eduardo_Ver=C3=A1stegui=2C_Sound_of_Freedom_Foundation?=
subject: A hospital bed can stop a child from being trafficked
body:
I can’t forget what I saw in Mexico City
There are no ICU beds left. That's what we're changing, right now.

| | | [](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=5775141973aa44a5883f45eccd4227d0&_e=1YiPqQCDoELxChVSrG_-BCPg-7XTEwcD3pVLR4L5LD4SE8kXHK9PS4Mw3VXJOg7Xq06eKQyFoQUDw6qnqtWPtaYSyu_mq-zyjTs7VZbKaY_xHoRr2qOPjFuDsjYmAE17PGyMdAR6O-mv0bH1-MsYhHta1yR_yLBU0EsCJ5b_u3Joi9ohYdtx-uZ0ipTbJ_gDRFjhH_5cns4kAfXG5Oq2dADt8yHaSJkET9youCS6gZK2wSFfNTGO8Iq2kHOvrUk8yOU0nYkjvyuLRdk56oE3MzixSwFeEdvkwtk640sDVpI_nMQL0OfjElrhKQWiny0JWN1-6dRQFsMRofboP2KRel-c2wtUCYK4ZHj0cEAsPiT5CLu5Eri9cUY8x09aeo7KROqthxjNfT7HQBPXNrWa-Rjjt-WB2wO8Jt5_vyjQFIDj6SpKya6yxR8aJgMkkky-ezvPje4Fvmp8O17Ouii67QaJOQU5bxajIBrocHnMRqLOdXWArUk1f5hmc_p11MVEBbvPB4GvYGijoi7J6NabGnVs8vT8X3zA773vpw2oo86T3sVRd2JoeCCwlBx3q7_fPkO9emGpyXCEnRPwtx7gr_0f69AGcTev9zbtu0ZyKPygPO1CJj34KAYuXguedwiJPC6jyYPXurYJGv1e5eZ1f-5UfC9D3lPlWAhaC2z6gx8fcfdNKI_Kh0XW9O3PR38H-db1Sok9wwG8DtDVi5jjl4ZSirZD10kSqfZV2skwVgJos_3PYtEckE70ECvPeIZoAD4s-O7fQa8jevRYC87wWp6HG1Uw6r_Yuh1gVz8rjE8O54L9RxWIErqE5ODx7w-B)
---
Friend,
---
Mexico City is my home. It's where I was born, where I learned to believe in God's purpose, and where I first saw the kind of poverty and pain that can break your heart.When I speak with our partners there, the stories of children in need make my heart ache.You may know me as the producer of the blockbuster film _Sound of Freedom._ But what you may not know is that the film became the foundation for a massive movement, the **Sound of Freedom Foundation.** A humanitarian organization that rescues children from sex trafficking, supports their recovery, and helps stop exploitation before it begins. In hospitals across Mexico city, vulnerable children, including those rescued from trafficking and abuse, are now fighting to survive. But there aren't enough ICU beds to care for them.Some lie on stretchers or floors, waiting for a chance at healing that may never come.That's why I've set a goal:

**I want to raise $20,000 to deliver $200,000 worth of ICU beds** to hospitals and medical centers that serve God's children in Mexico City.
---
[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=5775141973aa44a5883f45eccd4227d0&_e=1YiPqQCDoELxChVSrG_-BCPg-7XTEwcD3pVLR4L5LD4SE8kXHK9PS4Mw3VXJOg7Xq06eKQyFoQUDw6qnqtWPtaYSyu_mq-zyjTs7VZbKaY_xHoRr2qOPjFuDsjYmAE17PGyMdAR6O-mv0bH1-MsYhHta1yR_yLBU0EsCJ5b_u3Joi9ohYdtx-uZ0ipTbJ_gDRFjhH_5cns4kAfXG5Oq2dADt8yHaSJkET9youCS6gZK2wSFfNTGO8Iq2kHOvrUk8yOU0nYkjvyuLRdk56oE3MzixSwFeEdvkwtk640sDVpJbkIA1xC0JfI9nOkdyxZa39FMiZssZ6DIoeZdV5ZkUJ0jopz7EQSoU5l0E7xBUAOvN47FigR3Yhdy7_NAB-DWk1Xwqqsr1njHtw7WZ-iZwH41mjcgy-xGRKQwVRHPrXV4BPrscfuzh3mMHWiH1VFdiWbGmo05Ku2AXdFBBZz1TdAkEsF8Rcso7qXpB0ZKGybnpsj0ROmUcwTYAkbIwPhAVqB0KuK6Al1dUL9I0SuMjZDzVMiyrACRSoGfNKjeN5WrNqjSvQqvhDUh8G6h9zw1M6q2zw7eXyTB_WZZnpDO2pYOLaXrtfoED8QRLVehRBUZAPQNHg7QyBdFIe_152WNfp_HRYWlDvxRMMf_eyKfbThLzmuQMhHUOwCMa8cUWKBUpRRHOpePb__gle0L8-hfcKAP7mVTWpcsUcL3BJfiKWB-9DIAzxR6GnipPCvn9rOmxpIRZHFx043s4GiEva_MKUOcxMd8remAlj-c-VtXLfDMQX_UrE8ds9xmA5_lnDsxP4CdFUixA0IySfnAN1iZo)

clean_body: I can’t forget what I saw in Mexico City There are no ICU beds left. That's what we're changing, right now. | | | Friend, Mexico City is my home. It's where I was born, where I learned to believe in God's purpose, and where I first saw the kind of poverty and pain that can break your heart.When I speak with our partners there, the stories of children in need make my heart ache.You may know me as the producer of the blockbuster film Sound of Freedom. But what you may not know is that the film became the foundation for a massive movement, the Sound of Freedom Foundation. A humanitarian organization that rescues children from sex trafficking, supports their recovery, and helps stop exploitation before it begins. In hospitals across Mexico city, vulnerable children, including those rescued from trafficking and abuse, are now fighting to survive. But there aren't enough ICU beds to care for them.Some lie on stretchers or floors, waiting for a chance at healing that may never come.That's why I've set a goal: I want to raise $20,000 to deliver $200,000 worth of ICU beds to hospitals and medical centers that serve God's children in Mexico City. These beds are lifelines. They are where a fragile heartbeat stabilizes, where a child's breathing grows stronger, where healing happens. Every $1 you give becomes $10 of real medical value.How?Because through the Sound of Freedom Foundation's partnerships with trusted humanitarian distributors, we're able to secure bulk discounts on high-need medical equipment. That means every dollar raised helps unlock $10 worth of ICU beds, monitors, and lifesaving hospital supplies. enough to care for children who are sick, weak, and desperately in need of help.$25 -> provides $250 worth of ICU equipment and supplies. $50 -> provides $500 toward children's ICU beds. $100 -> provides $1,000 in needed ICU supplies. $250 or more -> helps equip an entire hospital ward for rescued children. When these beds arrive, they will go straight into hospitals that have been praying for help, to doctors who refuse to give up, and nurses who comfort frightened children through the night.And the impact doesn't end there. Because when desperate families can access medical care for their children, they no longer face the unthinkable choice of selling a son or daughter just to survive.In communities where poverty and sickness make children vulnerable to traffickers, a single hospital bed can mean the difference between a child staying with their loving family or being trafficked and abused. This is what we can change together.We have the plan. We have the partners. But this mission can't launch without you.Friend, the next few days will decide how many children we can help, how many will have a bed instead of the floor, and hope instead of fear. If we reach our goal, those hospital rooms will be transformed. The caregivers will have the tools they need. And the children will finally be able to rest, to heal, and to live, safe from the predators who prey on desperation.If we fall short, vulnerable children will not receive the medical care they need and their families may be forced into the kind of impossible decisions that result in more children being trafficked and exploited for profit. For God's children, Eduardo Verastegui Sound of Freedom, Producer For the Sound of Freedom Foundation 6671 Southwest Freeway, Suite 700, Houston TX 77074

**I never really considered running for office. Ever. I was too focused on raising my family, and being the best football sideline reporter I could be.**
**But even in the last few weeks, Minnesota has become the embodiment of everything wrong with politics today. Tim Walz, his inner circle, and the corrupt political class are too busy:**
**
* Wasting billions of our tax dollars on fraudulent daycares
* Failing to condemn the activists storming churches
* Raising prices on hardworking families
* Sabotaging anything the President wants to do
* Forcing men into women's spaces
* Pitting Americans against each other

**
**I can 't sit on the sidelines anymore. That's why I'm throwing my hat in the ring and announcing my candidacy for U.S. Senate!

**Minnesota has long been considered simply out of reach for Republicans. The last time it voted for a GOP President was Nixon. The pundits and political experts say a Republican could never win here. **
**But this year is going to be different for three key reasons:**
**FIRST - I'm running against Tim Walz's right hand. All the rampant fraud that took place here happened under Peggy Flanagan's nose as much as it did under his. We will remind voters about that fact every single day. **
**SECOND - The President has increased his voter share each time he has run. He nearly flipped this state in the last election, and Kamala Harris' running mate was our sitting Governor! Momentum is on our side. **
**THIRD - I'm a different kind of candidate, and I know how to win. I didn't reach the top of my industry by pulling my punches. I put in the work. I never backed down. And I kept fighting, no matter what the naysayers said.**
**In my years on the sidelines, I 've seen a LOT of underdogs win football games that the "experts" said were impossible. **
**The Minnesota Senate race will be another chapter in that storied history.

clean_body: - Michele Tafoya here! I never really considered running for office. Ever. I was too focused on raising my family, and being the best football sideline reporter I could be. But even in the last few weeks, Minnesota has become the embodiment of everything wrong with politics today. Tim Walz, his inner circle, and the corrupt political class are too busy: Wasting billions of our tax dollars on fraudulent daycares Failing to condemn the activists storming churches Raising prices on hardworking families Sabotaging anything the President wants to do Forcing men into women's spaces Pitting Americans against each other I can 't sit on the sidelines anymore. That's why I'm throwing my hat in the ring and announcing my candidacy for U.S. Senate! thought long and hard about the dynamics of this race before jumping in. Minnesota has long been considered simply out of reach for Republicans. The last time it voted for a GOP President was Nixon. The pundits and political experts say a Republican could never win here. But this year is going to be different for three key reasons: FIRST - I'm running against Tim Walz's right hand. All the rampant fraud that took place here happened under Peggy Flanagan's nose as much as it did under his. We will remind voters about that fact every single day. SECOND - The President has increased his voter share each time he has run. He nearly flipped this state in the last election, and Kamala Harris' running mate was our sitting Governor! Momentum is on our side. THIRD - I'm a different kind of candidate, and I know how to win. I didn't reach the top of my industry by pulling my punches. I put in the work. I never backed down. And I kept fighting, no matter what the naysayers said. In my years on the sidelines, I 've seen a LOT of underdogs win football games that the "experts" said were impossible. The Minnesota Senate race will be another chapter in that storied history. | | ---|--- Thanks in advance for your support. I'll never forget the good folks who stepped up in the opening days of this campaign. You and I are going to do great things together. I can feel it. Be brave. name: Voter Action Project
subject: Reducing places for people to vote in-person
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
NC Newsline: Amid protests, NC elections board rejects campus voting sites and Sunday voting in several counties [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=012426_1&amount=25]
We're now facing the repercussions of the partisan election takeover laws that went into effect at the end of 2024, Team.
To refresh your memory: After the 2024 elections and the defeat of a MAGA candidate for governor, opponents of voting rights in North Carolina jammed through a bill that took the power of the governor to appoint people to election boards and handed that to the state auditor . It's worth noting that the state auditor is the only statewide elected Republican, with Democrats winning the 2024 races for governor, lieutenant governor, attorney general, and secretary of state.
Now, among massive protests from young voters, the MAGA-fied North Carolina State Elections Board recently shot down proposals to continue having early voting sites on several universities around the state . These weren't new sites either; these were places where North Carolina had provided early voting locations for a decade or more.
This is voter suppression, plain and simple, by making it harder for eligible, registered voters to vote in-person by taking away their polling place. It's another demonstration of how opponents of voting rights in North Carolina are more focused on expanding and cementing their own power than they are in serving the people and having fair elections.
We have to fight these suppressive actions in North Carolina and any other state where opponents of voting rights try to replicate this. Step up with $35 or whatever you can today to help every eligible voter cast their ballot >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=012426_1&amount=35]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=012426_1&amount=15] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=012426_1&amount=25] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=012426_1&amount=50]
GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=012426_1&amount=100] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=012426_1&amount=250] OTHER AMOUNT [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=012426_1&amount=35]
These new, highly partisan State Election Board members wouldn't even look the protestors in the eye or engage with their proposals. After the vote, Chairman Francis De Luca threatened to call the cops on students if they didn’t leave.
Need to better understand how this impacts young voters? Western Carolina University in Jackson County, for example, has had a polling place on campus since 2016 that’s been used in five general elections and four primaries, according to a document prepared for the board. The state board voted 3-2 to get rid of it.
Closing the campus voting site would not save money, but “ would create barriers to voting for young, rural residents ,” Jackson County Board member Betsy Swift told the state board. 64% of students don’t have vehicles to drive to the polling place, she said.
Without the on-campus site, the closest polling place for students will be a recreation center nearly two miles away. Students without transportation will have to walk along a four-lane highway and through a meadow to get there.
Voter suppression isn't just black and white photos of eligible voters being turned away from polling places. Voter suppression is making it harder for eligible voters to take part in our elections through onerous ID requirements, closing polling places, taking away voting locations, or ending mail-in voting. Every time someone makes it harder to cast your ballot, voters are suppressed.
It's not going to end until we stop them.
Opponents of voting rights aren't going to stop attacking our fundamental right to vote until we stop them at the ballot box and take away their power. Chip in $35 or whatever you can today to help fight back nationwide >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=012426_1&amount=35]
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=012426_1&amount=20]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=012426_1&amount=20]
Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). Integrity First Voter Action Project is organized and operates under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code.
A copy of Integrity First Voter Action Project's latest financial report may be obtained by mail at Integrity First Voter Action Project, c/o Mele Brengarth & Assoc, PO Box 15845, Washington, DC 20003.
Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www.voteractionproject.org, and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
Integrity First Voter Action Project
P.O. Box 19294
Portland, OR 97280
United States
This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Emails are a crucial way to keep supporters up to date on the latest attacks on voting rights and our efforts to expand ballot access for all Americans. If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.everyaction.com/p/FQb7Rbo110qLPmSvMAn63Q2?unsubscribedata=OFMnwOgTCQ6KKkKmMlB4Gt8CzKRwRiy1Y7KKKf3NophYxesw1kPDFp%2F7E6lyNxO66vkXyVWY%2F9Ls133llXpkvbQOmNQd1leVTVvgufrdXAOMDtFlDhZUg2nuy%2BM9RLtj5NAD6nJUIIFPO1TF2XyK40sk3OKQG8xAUhmw0da8CpTH%2BF4jmsYspUB7PM219HbEGOfFa0zUlG3C8H12cGQ1GPitC0%2FrDVvXX8WM39vBGksNKQNJ3oJ1ER5pvnDWeSh1ppLVDEnjA4gk1gTk34EMF8796WK0eytsJNXi2RrU%2FtaIRnbFkFdeW4q%2FiGXWsjIuarxa5AkskWcC8rVF36dowkFmi0077ijeYRWk%2B2GvAUzDVBzIsMy1vSXzsDPr1H45HmFmgVHxWkDxGPInvmdEbO5SYWAMcdabicaO0KKssW4%3D .

Friends, The news out of Minneapolis is gut-wrenching. Bodies are piling up. Enough is enough. I've got a plan to hold ICE accountable:
* They’re going to lose their immunity.
* They’re going to take off their masks.
* They’re going to be prosecuted for crimes.
* They’re going to lose their driver’s licenses.

# **BREAKING: Border Patrol shoots armed man in Minneapolis, suspect declared dead**
A Border Patrol member **[shot an armed individual in Minneapolis on Saturday](https://substack.com/redirect/8da9b3ca-41e9-4fbc-9d4e-a87b99221c48?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** at the intersection of West 26th Street and Nicollet Ave., with officials identifying the suspect as a 37-year-old White Minneapolis resident believed to be a U.S. citizen who was declared dead at the hospital, while DHS said the suspect was armed with a 9mm semi-automatic handgun and two magazines, had no ID, and "violently resisted" when officers attempted to disarm him during a "targeted operation against an illegal alien wanted for violent assault."
[| | | | | Homeland Security
---
@DHSgov
At 9:05 AM CT, as DHS law enforcement officers were conducting a targeted operation in Minneapolis against an illegal alien wanted for violent assault, an individual approached US Border Patrol officers with a 9 mm semi-automatic handgun, seen here. The officers attempted to
| 5:31 PM * Jan 24, 2026 * 137K Views1.08K Replies * 937 Reposts * 3.16K Likes
---](https://substack.com/redirect/f15a7dc5-bd14-477a-8cfc-8619cea318a9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
## Watch (graphic video):
[](https://substack.com/redirect/8e349b22-5e78-4ee1-b42d-36fbce24111d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* **200 agitators arrive, clash with law enforcement as fires set:** DHS said approximately 200 agitators arrived at the scene following the incident and began to "obstruct and assault law enforcement," leading to crowd control measures, while Minneapolis Police Chief Brian O'Hara said there had been an emergency recall of all sworn personnel with help from Minnesota State Patrol and county sheriffs, adding the fire department was working to "ensure that two small fires that were started in the area are safely extinguished" and the National Guard had been on standby "for several days."
* **Mayor Frey, Gov. Walz demand Trump end operation after "execution":** Minneapolis Mayor Jacob Frey condemned the shooting after seeing video of "more than six masked agents pummeling one of our constituents and shooting him to death," asking "How many more Americans need to die or get badly hurt for this operation to end?" while Gov. Tim Walz called it "another horrific shooting" and demanded "The president must end this operation. Pull the thousands of violent, untrained officers out of Minnesota. Now," as Rep. Ilhan Omar called it "an execution by immigration enforcement."
* **Tensions escalate following previous fatal ICE shooting:** Tensions between federal immigration enforcement and agitators in Minnesota have been high since the fatal Jan. 7 shooting of Renee Nicole Good by an ICE agent, which sparked nationwide protests and raised questions about the Trump administration's immigration crackdown, while the Border Patrol Union defended agents as "trained extremely well to protect themselves" and blamed "irresponsible, hate-filled and false rhetoric" from media and politicians for encouraging "reckless confrontations and attacks."

* * *
# **NYC Mayor Mamdani accuses ICE of terrorizing cities after Minneapolis shooting "Abolish ICE"**
NYC Mayor Zohran Mamdani **[accused ICE of terrorizing cities nationwide](https://substack.com/redirect/3975ad2f-d017-48e0-9653-634f8940b578?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** on Saturday after federal agents shot and killed an armed 37-year-old anti-ICE protester in Minneapolis, writing on X "As tens of thousands across America protest the violence that ICE sows with impunity, federal agents shot and killed another person in Minneapolis today. ICE terrorizes our cities. ICE puts us all in danger. Abolish ICE."

# **Nearly 10,000 flights canceled as massive winter storm hits U.S.**
Almost 10,000 flights across the U.S. set to take off over the weekend **[were canceled as a monster storm started wreaking havoc Saturday,](https://substack.com/redirect/b1aab296-a434-4ddb-bf5b-04c6055ebac1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** with roughly 140 million people--more than 40% of the U.S. population--under winter storm warnings from New Mexico to New England, while the National Weather Service forecast warns of widespread heavy snow and a band of "catastrophic ice" stretching from east Texas to North Carolina.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/b1aab296-a434-4ddb-bf5b-04c6055ebac1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Dangerously cold temperatures, power outages threaten millions:** More than 95,000 power outages were reported across the country Saturday morning, with about 36,000 in Texas and 10,000 in Virginia, while the Midwest saw wind chills as low as minus 40 degrees Fahrenheit where frostbite could set in within 10 minutes, and forecasters warned that damage, especially in areas pounded by ice, could rival that of a hurricane as ice-coated trees and power lines threaten to keep falling long after the storm passes.
* **Federal government, states prepare emergency response:** The federal government put nearly 30 search and rescue teams on standby with more than 7 million meals, 600,000 blankets, and 300 generators placed throughout the storm's path, while President Trump approved emergency declarations for South Carolina and Virginia, with requests from nine states pending, as governors in more than a dozen states declared emergencies, churches moved services online, schools closed, and Mardi Gras parades in Louisiana were canceled or rescheduled.

BREAKING: Border Patrol shoots armed man in Minneapolis, suspect declared dead A Border Patrol member at the intersection of West 26th Street and Nicollet Ave., with officials identifying the suspect as a 37-year-old White Minneapolis resident believed to be a U.S. citizen who was declared dead at the hospital, while DHS said the suspect was armed with a 9mm semi-automatic handgun and two magazines, had no ID, and "violently resisted" when officers attempted to disarm him during a "targeted operation against an illegal alien wanted for violent assault." Watch (graphic video): 200 agitators arrive, clash with law enforcement as fires set: DHS said approximately 200 agitators arrived at the scene following the incident and began to "obstruct and assault law enforcement," leading to crowd control measures, while Minneapolis Police Chief Brian O'Hara said there had been an emergency recall of all sworn personnel with help from Minnesota State Patrol and county sheriffs, adding the fire department was working to "ensure that two small fires that were started in the area are safely extinguished" and the National Guard had been on standby "for several days." Mayor Frey, Gov. Walz demand Trump end operation after "execution": Minneapolis Mayor Jacob Frey condemned the shooting after seeing video of "more than six masked agents pummeling one of our constituents and shooting him to death," asking "How many more Americans need to die or get badly hurt for this operation to end?" while Gov. Tim Walz called it "another horrific shooting" and demanded "The president must end this operation. Pull the thousands of violent, untrained officers out of Minnesota. Now," as Rep. Ilhan Omar called it "an execution by immigration enforcement." Tensions escalate following previous fatal ICE shooting: Tensions between federal immigration enforcement and agitators in Minnesota have been high since the fatal Jan. 7 shooting of Renee Nicole Good by an ICE agent, which sparked nationwide protests and raised questions about the Trump administration's immigration crackdown, while the Border Patrol Union defended agents as "trained extremely well to protect themselves" and blamed "irresponsible, hate-filled and false rhetoric" from media and politicians for encouraging "reckless confrontations and attacks." NYC Mayor Mamdani accuses ICE of terrorizing cities after Minneapolis shooting "Abolish ICE" NYC Mayor Zohran Mamdani on Saturday after federal agents shot and killed an armed 37-year-old anti-ICE protester in Minneapolis, writing on X "As tens of thousands across America protest the violence that ICE sows with impunity, federal agents shot and killed another person in Minneapolis today. ICE terrorizes our cities. ICE puts us all in danger. Abolish ICE." Nearly 10,000 flights canceled as massive winter storm hits U.S. Almost 10,000 flights across the U.S. set to take off over the weekend with roughly 140 million people--more than 40% of the U.S. population--under winter storm warnings from New Mexico to New England, while the National Weather Service forecast warns of widespread heavy snow and a band of "catastrophic ice" stretching from east Texas to North Carolina. | | ---|---|--- Dangerously cold temperatures, power outages threaten millions: More than 95,000 power outages were reported across the country Saturday morning, with about 36,000 in Texas and 10,000 in Virginia, while the Midwest saw wind chills as low as minus 40 degrees Fahrenheit where frostbite could set in within 10 minutes, and forecasters warned that damage, especially in areas pounded by ice, could rival that of a hurricane as ice-coated trees and power lines threaten to keep falling long after the storm passes. Federal government, states prepare emergency response: The federal government put nearly 30 search and rescue teams on standby with more than 7 million meals, 600,000 blankets, and 300 generators placed throughout the storm's path, while President Trump approved emergency declarations for South Carolina and Virginia, with requests from nine states pending, as governors in more than a dozen states declared emergencies, churches moved services online, schools closed, and Mardi Gras parades in Louisiana were canceled or rescheduled. * You're currently a free subscriber to . For the full experience, | | | | | | | (C) 2026 Politibrawl 548 Market Street PMB 72296, San Francisco, CA 94104 ? ?

name: Robert Garcia
subject: I have breaking news in the Epstein investigation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Robert Garcia for Congress
body:
We just issued more subpoenas
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123972705/597156488/938567526?refcode=header&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2Mjc2MzQ1Zi03NWY5LWYwMTEtOGQ0Yy0wMDIyNDgyZDI3OWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kNTZt_B6SU0jlI7nTDoqNuGVEAdV8cYxAeB4yuBIFNY=)
_I have breaking news in the Epstein investigation. _
**I forced a vote in the House Oversight Committee to subpoena Epstein’s longtime friend, client and financial backer, and his lawyer and accountant; and we won. Even Republican Chair Comer couldn’t shut down our demand for accountability.**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123972707/597156489/789508428?refcode=260124_RG_epstein-investigation-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2Mjc2MzQ1Zi03NWY5LWYwMTEtOGQ0Yy0wMDIyNDgyZDI3OWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kNTZt_B6SU0jlI7nTDoqNuGVEAdV8cYxAeB4yuBIFNY=)
These are the people who helped move the money, shield the powerful, and keep the truth buried for years.
Let me be clear: no one is above accountability. Not billionaires. Not fixers. Not anyone who thought this story would quietly disappear.
**I pushed for these subpoenas because the American people deserve answers — not half-truths, not delays, not another cover-up. Survivors deserve the truth. And Congress has a responsibility to dig until we get it.**
But here’s the reality: accountability only happens when people are willing to fight for it.
The same forces that protected Epstein for decades are still powerful. They are counting on fatigue. They are counting on silence. And they are counting on Democrats backing down.
I won’t.
**If you want leaders who will subpoena the powerful, confront corruption head-on, and keep pushing even when it’s uncomfortable — I need your help right now. ****[Chip in today to help me keep fighting. The truth doesn’t defend itself.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123972708/597156490/789508428?refcode=260124_RG_epstein-investigation-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2Mjc2MzQ1Zi03NWY5LWYwMTEtOGQ0Yy0wMDIyNDgyZDI3OWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kNTZt_B6SU0jlI7nTDoqNuGVEAdV8cYxAeB4yuBIFNY=)**
[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123972709/597156491/-309737922?refcode=260124_RG_epstein-investigation-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2Mjc2MzQ1Zi03NWY5LWYwMTEtOGQ0Yy0wMDIyNDgyZDI3OWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kNTZt_B6SU0jlI7nTDoqNuGVEAdV8cYxAeB4yuBIFNY=)
Thank you,
Robert Garcia
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123972710/597156492/-309737922?refcode=260124_RG_epstein-investigation-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2Mjc2MzQ1Zi03NWY5LWYwMTEtOGQ0Yy0wMDIyNDgyZDI3OWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kNTZt_B6SU0jlI7nTDoqNuGVEAdV8cYxAeB4yuBIFNY=)

Dear Peter, I’m Bill Cassidy, your U.S. Senator, a physician, husband, and conservative leader fighting every day in Washington for Louisiana values, strong families, and a Republican Senate majority that protects our freedoms and defends our future.

_**This election cycle isn’t just another campaign, it’s a turning point for our country. **_

The stakes could not be higher. Control of the United States Senate will determine whether we keep judges who respect the Constitution, secure our borders, preserve pro-life protections, protect hardworking taxpayers, and defend our Second Amendment rights. Republicans currently hold a narrow majority, and every seat, including my own, is absolutely critical to keeping Washington from sliding back to the radical Left.

In the U.S. Senate, I’ve worked to deliver real results for Louisiana: tax relief for families hit by hurricanes, repeal of unfair Social Security penalties, billions in infrastructure dollars for our state, and conservative leadership on health and economic issues.

But my seat is being targeted, not just by Democrats who want to flip the Senate, but by inside-the-party challengers who would rather sow division than unite conservatives around winning strategies. **That is why I am reaching out to you specifically, Peter. If we lose this seat, Democrats inch closer to regaining control and with it, the power to undo our tax cuts, expand federal power, and impose policies that hurt American families.**
Will you make a contribution today to help us keep this seat and keep the Senate red?

clean_body: | | | | Dear Peter, I’m Bill Cassidy, your U.S. Senator, a physician, husband, and conservative leader fighting every day in Washington for Louisiana values, strong families, and a Republican Senate majority that protects our freedoms and defends our future. This election cycle isn’t just another campaign, it’s a turning point for our country. The stakes could not be higher. Control of the United States Senate will determine whether we keep judges who respect the Constitution, secure our borders, preserve pro-life protections, protect hardworking taxpayers, and defend our Second Amendment rights. Republicans currently hold a narrow majority, and every seat, including my own, is absolutely critical to keeping Washington from sliding back to the radical Left. In the U.S. Senate, I’ve worked to deliver real results for Louisiana: tax relief for families hit by hurricanes, repeal of unfair Social Security penalties, billions in infrastructure dollars for our state, and conservative leadership on health and economic issues. But my seat is being targeted, not just by Democrats who want to flip the Senate, but by inside-the-party challengers who would rather sow division than unite conservatives around winning strategies. That is why I am reaching out to you specifically, Peter. If we lose this seat, Democrats inch closer to regaining control and with it, the power to undo our tax cuts, expand federal power, and impose policies that hurt American families. Will you make a contribution today to help us keep this seat and keep the Senate red? Your support fuels our grassroots strength and sends a clear message: We are conservatives first, and we win when we stand together. For Louisiana, | | | | | Bill Cassidy U.S. Senator | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- PAID FOR BY BILL CASSIDY FOR US SENATE Copyright © 2026 Bill Cassidy for US Senate, All rights reserved. TO DONATE BY MAIL, SEND CHECKS TO: Bill Cassidy for U.S. Senate PO BOX 80505 Baton Rouge, LA 70898 *By providing your phone number, you are consenting to receive calls and SMS/MMS messages, including autodialed and automated calls and texts, to that number from Bill Cassidy for US Senate. Message and data rates may apply. Terms and conditions and privacy policy apply. Text STOP to end. Text HELP for help.. .

name: Chris Pappas
subject: This is an attack on working families
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
I need you in this fight.
Peter, this is going to be a longer email about upholding New Hampshire values.
**[If you don’t have time to read the whole thing, please consider splitting a contribution of any amount between my campaign and Heartland Patriots to help fuel our campaign.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/99970?refcode=em20260124-9976&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=1&akid=9976%2E614464%2Ef3poBX)**
To say we’re living in unprecedented times would be an understatement. Right when people need help the most, we have a federal government that is doing anything but lending a hand.
They’re launching full-scale attacks on our communities, slashing Medicaid and Medicare for those who are most in need, and making the economy unworkable for working families.
Let me be clear: **We cannot let this be the status quo.**
Nothing about this is normal. The government should work _for_ the people, not against us. Yet Republicans in Congress continue to sit idly by as Granite Staters suffer the consequences of Trump’s disastrous policies.
They’d rather protect Trump’s political agenda than stand up for small business owners in places like Nashua, Conway, and Laconia. **That’s not who I am.** I was born and raised in Manchester. I went to public schools, and I own a small business here.
**New Hampshire isn’t just where I’m from — it’s shaped who I am, and it’s why I’m in this fight.** I’m running for Senate to defend Granite Staters who deserve a chance to thrive.
Republicans will throw everything they have at us — but that doesn’t worry me. I’ve won four elections in one of the toughest swing districts in America. And now, with this team on my side, I’m taking on my next challenge: **the U.S. Senate.**
Republicans are stopping at nothing to flip this seat. They’re flooding this race with piles of cash and successfully recruited John Sununu into the race. Things are only going to get more difficult from here.
This operation is only possible because of you, Peter. **I’m counting on grassroots supporters like you to continue to step up.**
**[That’s why I’m asking you directly: Can I count on you to split $10 between my campaign and Heartland Patriots today?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/99970?refcode=em20260124-9976&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=2&akid=9976%2E614464%2Ef3poBX)**
If you have stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, we will process your contribution to Chris Pappas and Heartland Patriots instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/99970?refcode=em20260124-9976&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=3&akid=9976%2E614464%2Ef3poBX) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/99970?refcode=em20260124-9976&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=4&akid=9976%2E614464%2Ef3poBX) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/99970?refcode=em20260124-9976&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=5&akid=9976%2E614464%2Ef3poBX) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/99970?refcode=em20260124-9976&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=6&akid=9976%2E614464%2Ef3poBX) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/99970?refcode=em20260124-9976&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=7&akid=9976%2E614464%2Ef3poBX) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/99970?refcode=em20260124-9976&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=8&akid=9976%2E614464%2Ef3poBX) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/99971?refcode=em20260124-9976&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=9&akid=9976%2E614464%2Ef3poBX)
---
This isn’t just about one Senate seat.
It’s about protecting our values. It’s about defending working families. And it’s about building a future where every Granite Stater has the freedom and opportunity to succeed.
Thanks for being in this fight with me. I’ll never stop fighting for you.
With gratitude,
Chris

| [](https://www.facebook.com/lucaskuncemo/) | [](https://twitter.com/lucaskuncemo) | [](https://www.instagram.com/lucaskuncemo/)
---|---|---

Mail us: PO BOX 1240 Independence, MO 64050.

name: Committee To Elect Zuri For CD5
subject: Murder in Minneapolis, Edwin is Safe, Zuri's Birthday
body:
Protest ICE Tomorrow 1pm City Hall, Edwin is out of ICE custody, John Mikos supports Zuri, Phone bank and get trained for Caucus and Assembly

| | | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/8119bd333ad6/happy-new-year-a-bit-of-what-ive-been-up-to-4792687?e=738470dca6)
---
|
---
| | | | | |
# Hi Everyone!

---
| | **RIP Alex Pretti**
Alex he was a 37 year old ICU nurse who worked at the VA with critically ill veterans who was murdered by ICE while attempting to protect a woman ICE was violently attacking.This [video](https://zuriforcd5.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0f6e59d8f916735599a3b9efd&id=e550387b4f&e=738470dca6) shows his last brave moments.Please join me tomorrow at at 12pm at Colorado Springs City Hall to protest against ICE. We must dismantle and prosecute ICE. Phil Weiser has a [new portal](https://zuriforcd5.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0f6e59d8f916735599a3b9efd&id=ad163f5acf&e=738470dca6) to report abuse and there is a Colorado State [Senate bill SB26-005](https://zuriforcd5.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0f6e59d8f916735599a3b9efd&id=b4b3e1df62&e=738470dca6) which proposed a structure for people abused by ICE to collect damages for their abuse.

**In What Passes As Good News: Edwin is with Family** This [video](https://zuriforcd5.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0f6e59d8f916735599a3b9efd&id=788ffa64f6&e=738470dca6) gets into what Edwin experienced. I am so grateful to everyone who stepped up to ensure Edwin was safe and out of ICE custody. Thank you to Mari, Erin, Kat, and Cassie and everyone of his family and friends for stepping up and being brave.
**Support from John Mikos for My Candidacy:** This was supposed to be a birthday email with a video of support from John Mikos, but that will wait another day.
**ICE Funding:** The House exposes establishment Democrats with seven voting for ICE funding after Jeffries decides not to whip votes.
_Call Senators Bennet and Hickenlooper to demand that they vote no and ensure their colleagues vote no on more ICE funding:_
Senator Bennet’s number: 202-224-5852Senator Hickenlooper’s number: 202-224-5941
**February 1st, 2026:** Remember to [affiliate](https://zuriforcd5.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0f6e59d8f916735599a3b9efd&id=c198ee5d4a&e=738470dca6) as a Democrat by February 1st so you can support me at Caucus and Assembly. This date is a little early but it gives you time in case there are snafus.Tell your friends and family!
**Phone Banking:** Monday Phone BankingDates: January 26th, February 2nd, 9th, 16th, 23rd, March 2nd and March 9thTimes: 5:30pm-7pmLocation: Online[**REGISTER HERE**](https://zuriforcd5.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0f6e59d8f916735599a3b9efd&id=7cafac7853&e=738470dca6)
Once you are trained you can make calls at any time
**Friday Phone Banking** Dates:**** January 30th, February 6th, 13th, 20th, 27th, March 6th and March 13thTimes: 5:30pm-7pmLocation: Online[**REGISTER HERE**](https://zuriforcd5.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0f6e59d8f916735599a3b9efd&id=fd749c39a4&e=738470dca6)
Once you are trained you can make calls at any time
**Wednesday Caucus and Assembly Training:** Dates: January 28th, February 4th, 11th, 18th, and 25thTime: 6-7pm (the first 25 minutes are the vital part, the last half is open to questions)Location: Online[**REGISTER HERE**](https://zuriforcd5.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0f6e59d8f916735599a3b9efd&id=b29fd11675&e=738470dca6)
or **Attend EPCO Dem Caucus and Assembly Trainings:**
We need a progressive in this fight who wont back down.
I will be your fighter.
**Zuri Horowitz****Candidate for Congressional District 5 in Colorado****www.ZuriforCD5.com**

****[**Donate**](https://zuriforcd5.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0f6e59d8f916735599a3b9efd&id=3c9c7f7832&e=738470dca6)**if you can****Community Events:**
**No Contract, No Coffee.** Support striking Starbucks workers! Don’t cross the line while workers are on strike.****
**Thank you everyone!**
**Let’s keep fighting the good fight for a better future.**
**With love,****Zuri Horowitz**
---
| | **Listen to my**[**podcast**](https://zuriforcd5.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0f6e59d8f916735599a3b9efd&id=c0fc1e5c35&e=738470dca6)**episode with Loving the Springs!****We talk about the importance of putting people first when it comes to all areas of policy.**
---
| | **Updates:**[**Donate**](https://zuriforcd5.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0f6e59d8f916735599a3b9efd&id=1aee52ac6b&e=738470dca6)**-** We made our first [ad](https://zuriforcd5.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0f6e59d8f916735599a3b9efd&id=275426aea0&e=738470dca6) with an Emmy winning editor. Now we need enough money to hire staff, and expand our outreach via door knocking, texts, postcards, and mailers.
[**Volunteer**](https://zuriforcd5.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0f6e59d8f916735599a3b9efd&id=9c5ecc228d&e=738470dca6)**-** Our outreach strategy will rely on volunteers & minimize paper waste. If you haven’t signed up already, please do!
**Social Media \- **We have the biggest community on [**TikTok**](https://zuriforcd5.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0f6e59d8f916735599a3b9efd&id=faf5a2a7c8&e=738470dca6)**** out of all of the candidates (we made it to 1700+ people), second biggest community on [**Instagram**](https://zuriforcd5.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0f6e59d8f916735599a3b9efd&id=6ef6dd9571&e=738470dca6) , and we’ve got a ways to go on [**Facebook**](https://zuriforcd5.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0f6e59d8f916735599a3b9efd&id=2bc2a6cb31&e=738470dca6).
Your _follows_ , _likes_ , and _shares_ help a lot to let people know about our campaign!
---
